authors_text: Gourab K. Patro,Prithwish Jana,Abhijnan Chakraborty,Krishna P. Gummadi,Niloy Ganguly
title: Scheduling Virtual Conferences Fairly: Achieving Equitable Participant and Speaker Satisfaction
title_zh: 公平安排虚拟会议：实现公平的参与者和演讲者满意度
comment: In proceedings of the Thirty-first Web Conference (WWW-2022). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.14624
comments: In proceedings of the Thirty-first Web Conference (WWW-2022). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.14624
abstract: Recently, almost all conferences have moved to virtual mode due to the pandemic-induced restrictions on travel and social gathering. Contrary to in-person conferences, virtual conferences face the challenge of efficiently scheduling talks, accounting for the availability of participants from different timezones and their interests in attending different talks. A natural objective for conference organizers is to maximize efficiency, e.g., total expected audience participation across all talks. However, we show that optimizing for efficiency alone can result in an unfair virtual conference schedule, where individual utilities for participants and speakers can be highly unequal. To address this, we formally define fairness notions for participants and speakers, and derive suitable objectives to account for them. As the efficiency and fairness objectives can be in conflict with each other, we propose a joint optimization framework that allows conference organizers to design schedules that balance (i.e., allow trade-offs) among efficiency, participant fairness and speaker fairness objectives. While the optimization problem can be solved using integer programming to schedule smaller conferences, we provide two scalable techniques to cater to bigger conferences. Extensive evaluations over multiple real-world datasets show the efficacy and flexibility of our proposed approaches.
summary: Recently, almost all conferences have moved to virtual mode due to the pandemic-induced restrictions on travel and social gathering. Contrary to in-person conferences, virtual conferences face the challenge of efficiently scheduling talks, accounting for the availability of participants from different timezones and their interests in attending different talks. A natural objective for conference organizers is to maximize efficiency, e.g., total expected audience participation across all talks. However, we show that optimizing for efficiency alone can result in an unfair virtual conference schedule, where individual utilities for participants and speakers can be highly unequal. To address this, we formally define fairness notions for participants and speakers, and derive suitable objectives to account for them. As the efficiency and fairness objectives can be in conflict with each other, we propose a joint optimization framework that allows conference organizers to design schedules that balance (i.e., allow trade-offs) among efficiency, participant fairness and speaker fairness objectives. While the optimization problem can be solved using integer programming to schedule smaller conferences, we provide two scalable techniques to cater to bigger conferences. Extensive evaluations over multiple real-world datasets show the efficacy and flexibility of our proposed approaches.
abstract_zh: 最近，由于大流行导致旅行和社交聚会受到限制，几乎所有会议都转向了虚拟模式。与现场会议相反，虚拟会议面临着有效安排会谈的挑战，要考虑到来自不同时区的参与者的可用性以及他们参加不同会谈的兴趣。会议组织者的一个自然目标是最大限度地提高效率，例如所有演讲的预期观众参与总数。然而，我们表明，仅针对效率进行优化可能会导致不公平的虚拟会议日程，其中参与者和发言者的个人效用可能非常不平等。为了解决这个问题，我们正式定义了参与者和演讲者的公平概念，并得出适当的目标来解释它们。由于效率和公平目标可能相互冲突，我们提出了一个联合优化框架，允许会议组织者设计在效率、参与者公平性和演讲者公平性目标之间平衡（即允许权衡）的时间表。虽然可以使用整数规划来解决优化问题来安排小型会议，但我们提供了两种可扩展的技术来满足大型会议的需求。对多个现实世界数据集的广泛评估显示了我们提出的方法的有效性和灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何公平安排虚拟会议日程，平衡效率与参与者及演讲者的满意度。
AI.motivation: 虚拟会议因时区差异和兴趣多样性导致单纯追求效率会引发不公平现象，需兼顾多方公平性。
AI.method: 定义参与者和演讲者公平性概念，构建联合优化框架，并提出两种可扩展算法应对大规模会议。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上验证方法有效性，证明其能灵活平衡效率与公平性目标。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架可帮助会议组织者设计兼顾效率与公平的虚拟会议日程，适用于不同规模场景。

authors_text: Justin Y. Chen,Sandeep Silwal,Ali Vakilian,Fred Zhang
title: Faster Fundamental Graph Algorithms via Learned Predictions
title_zh: 通过学习预测更快的基本图算法
abstract: We consider the question of speeding up classic graph algorithms with machine-learned predictions. In this model, algorithms are furnished with extra advice learned from past or similar instances. Given the additional information, we aim to improve upon the traditional worst-case run-time guarantees. Our contributions are the following: (i) We give a faster algorithm for minimum-weight bipartite matching via learned duals, improving the recent result by Dinitz, Im, Lavastida, Moseley and Vassilvitskii (NeurIPS, 2021); (ii) We extend the learned dual approach to the single-source shortest path problem (with negative edge lengths), achieving an almost linear runtime given sufficiently accurate predictions which improves upon the classic fastest algorithm due to Goldberg (SIAM J. Comput., 1995); (iii) We provide a general reduction-based framework for learning-based graph algorithms, leading to new algorithms for degree-constrained subgraph and minimum-cost $0$-$1$ flow, based on reductions to bipartite matching and the shortest path problem. Finally, we give a set of general learnability theorems, showing that the predictions required by our algorithms can be efficiently learned in a PAC fashion.
summary: We consider the question of speeding up classic graph algorithms with machine-learned predictions. In this model, algorithms are furnished with extra advice learned from past or similar instances. Given the additional information, we aim to improve upon the traditional worst-case run-time guarantees. Our contributions are the following: (i) We give a faster algorithm for minimum-weight bipartite matching via learned duals, improving the recent result by Dinitz, Im, Lavastida, Moseley and Vassilvitskii (NeurIPS, 2021); (ii) We extend the learned dual approach to the single-source shortest path problem (with negative edge lengths), achieving an almost linear runtime given sufficiently accurate predictions which improves upon the classic fastest algorithm due to Goldberg (SIAM J. Comput., 1995); (iii) We provide a general reduction-based framework for learning-based graph algorithms, leading to new algorithms for degree-constrained subgraph and minimum-cost $0$-$1$ flow, based on reductions to bipartite matching and the shortest path problem. Finally, we give a set of general learnability theorems, showing that the predictions required by our algorithms can be efficiently learned in a PAC fashion.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑通过机器学习预测加速经典图算法的问题。在这个模型中，算法配备了从过去或类似实例中学到的额外建议。考虑到更多信息，我们的目标是改进传统的最坏情况运行时保证。我们的贡献如下：（i）我们通过学习对偶提供了一种更快的最小权重二分匹配算法，改进了 Dinitz、Im、Lavastida、Moseley 和 Vassilvitskii 的最新结果（NeurIPS，2021）； (ii) 我们将学习到的对偶方法扩展到单源最短路径问题（具有负边长度），在给出足够准确的预测的情况下实现几乎线性的运行时间，这改进了 Goldberg 的经典最快算法（SIAM J. Comput.，1995）； (iii) 我们为基于学习的图算法提供了一个基于约简的通用框架，基于二分匹配和最短路径问题的约简，产生了用于度约束子图和最小成本 $0$-$1$ 流的新算法。最后，我们给出了一组通用的可学习性定理，表明我们的算法所需的预测可以通过 PAC 方式有效地学习。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过机器学习预测加速经典图算法，以改进传统最坏情况下的运行时间保证。
AI.motivation: 传统图算法的最坏情况运行时间可能较高，而机器学习预测可提供额外信息，帮助优化实际运行效率。
AI.method: 提出基于学习的双重方法，扩展到单源最短路径问题，并构建通用约简框架，同时证明预测的PAC可学习性。
AI.result: 改进二分图匹配算法，实现几乎线性时间的最短路径求解，以及度约束子图和0-1最小流的新算法。
AI.conclusion: 结合机器学习预测可有效提升图算法效率，且所需预测具备高效学习可行性。

authors_text: Jiawei Zhang,Jinwei Wang,Hao Wang,Xiangyang Luo
title: Self-recoverable Adversarial Examples: A New Effective Protection Mechanism in Social Networks
title_zh: 可自我恢复的对抗样本：社交网络中一种新的有效保护机制
abstract: Malicious intelligent algorithms greatly threaten the security of social users' privacy by detecting and analyzing the uploaded photos to social network platforms. The destruction to DNNs brought by the adversarial attack sparks the potential that adversarial examples serve as a new protection mechanism for privacy security in social networks. However, the existing adversarial example does not have recoverability for serving as an effective protection mechanism. To address this issue, we propose a recoverable generative adversarial network to generate self-recoverable adversarial examples. By modeling the adversarial attack and recovery as a united task, our method can minimize the error of the recovered examples while maximizing the attack ability, resulting in better recoverability of adversarial examples. To further boost the recoverability of these examples, we exploit a dimension reducer to optimize the distribution of adversarial perturbation. The experimental results prove that the adversarial examples generated by the proposed method present superior recoverability, attack ability, and robustness on different datasets and network architectures, which ensure its effectiveness as a protection mechanism in social networks.
summary: Malicious intelligent algorithms greatly threaten the security of social users' privacy by detecting and analyzing the uploaded photos to social network platforms. The destruction to DNNs brought by the adversarial attack sparks the potential that adversarial examples serve as a new protection mechanism for privacy security in social networks. However, the existing adversarial example does not have recoverability for serving as an effective protection mechanism. To address this issue, we propose a recoverable generative adversarial network to generate self-recoverable adversarial examples. By modeling the adversarial attack and recovery as a united task, our method can minimize the error of the recovered examples while maximizing the attack ability, resulting in better recoverability of adversarial examples. To further boost the recoverability of these examples, we exploit a dimension reducer to optimize the distribution of adversarial perturbation. The experimental results prove that the adversarial examples generated by the proposed method present superior recoverability, attack ability, and robustness on different datasets and network architectures, which ensure its effectiveness as a protection mechanism in social networks.
abstract_zh: 恶意智能算法通过检测和分析上传到社交网络平台的照片，极大威胁社交用户的隐私安全。对抗性攻击对 DNN 带来的破坏激发了对抗性示例作为社交网络中隐私安全的新保护机制的潜力。然而，现有的对抗样本不具备作为有效保护机制的可恢复性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种可恢复的生成对抗网络来生成可自我恢复的对抗样本。通过将对抗性攻击和恢复建模为一个联合任务，我们的方法可以最小化恢复示例的错误，同时最大化攻击能力，从而使对抗性示例具有更好的可恢复性。为了进一步提高这些例子的可恢复性，我们利用降维器来优化对抗性扰动的分布。实验结果证明，该方法生成的对抗样本在不同数据集和网络架构上表现出优异的可恢复性、攻击能力和鲁棒性，确保了其作为社交网络中保护机制的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成自恢复对抗样本的方法，用于社交网络中的隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本缺乏可恢复性，无法有效保护隐私，需提升其恢复能力以作为新型防护机制。
AI.method: 设计可恢复生成对抗网络，联合建模攻击与恢复任务，并通过降维优化扰动分布。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在多个数据集和网络结构上表现出优越的恢复性、攻击能力与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了对抗样本的自恢复特性，为社交网络隐私保护提供了新机制。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了对抗样本的自恢复特性，为社交网络隐私保护提供了新机制。

tldr: 本文提出一种生成自恢复对抗样本的方法，用于社交网络中的隐私保护。
motivation: 现有对抗样本缺乏可恢复性，无法有效保护隐私，需提升其恢复能力以作为新型防护机制。
method: 设计可恢复生成对抗网络，联合建模攻击与恢复任务，并通过降维优化扰动分布。

search_text: Self-recoverable Adversarial Examples: A New Effective Protection Mechanism in Social Networks 可自我恢复的对抗样本：社交网络中一种新的有效保护机制 Malicious intelligent algorithms greatly threaten the security of social users' privacy by detecting and analyzing the uploaded photos to social network platforms. The destruction to DNNs brought by the adversarial attack sparks the potential that adversarial examples serve as a new protection mechanism for privacy security in social networks. However, the existing adversarial example does not have recoverability for serving as an effective protection mechanism. To address this issue, we propose a recoverable generative adversarial network to generate self-recoverable adversarial examples. By modeling the adversarial attack and recovery as a united task, our method can minimize the error of the recovered examples while maximizing the attack ability, resulting in better recoverability of adversarial examples. To further boost the recoverability of these examples, we exploit a dimension reducer to optimize the distribution of adversarial perturbation. The experimental results prove that the adversarial examples generated by the proposed method present superior recoverability, attack ability, and robustness on different datasets and network architectures, which ensure its effectiveness as a protection mechanism in social networks. 恶意智能算法通过检测和分析上传到社交网络平台的照片，极大威胁社交用户的隐私安全。对抗性攻击对 DNN 带来的破坏激发了对抗性示例作为社交网络中隐私安全的新保护机制的潜力。然而，现有的对抗样本不具备作为有效保护机制的可恢复性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种可恢复的生成对抗网络来生成可自我恢复的对抗样本。通过将对抗性攻击和恢复建模为一个联合任务，我们的方法可以最小化恢复示例的错误，同时最大化攻击能力，从而使对抗性示例具有更好的可恢复性。为了进一步提高这些例子的可恢复性，我们利用降维器来优化对抗性扰动的分布。实验结果证明，该方法生成的对抗样本在不同数据集和网络架构上表现出优异的可恢复性、攻击能力和鲁棒性，确保了其作为社交网络中保护机制的有效性。 本文提出一种生成自恢复对抗样本的方法，用于社交网络中的隐私保护。 Jiawei Zhang,Jinwei Wang,Hao Wang,Xiangyang Luo cs.CV

authors_text: Gongbo Zhang,Yijie Peng,Yilong Xu
title: An Efficient Dynamic Sampling Policy For Monte Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: 蒙特卡罗树搜索的高效动态采样策略
abstract: We consider the popular tree-based search strategy within the framework of reinforcement learning, the Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), in the context of finite-horizon Markov decision process. We propose a dynamic sampling tree policy that efficiently allocates limited computational budget to maximize the probability of correct selection of the best action at the root node of the tree. Experimental results on Tic-Tac-Toe and Gomoku show that the proposed tree policy is more efficient than other competing methods.
summary: We consider the popular tree-based search strategy within the framework of reinforcement learning, the Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), in the context of finite-horizon Markov decision process. We propose a dynamic sampling tree policy that efficiently allocates limited computational budget to maximize the probability of correct selection of the best action at the root node of the tree. Experimental results on Tic-Tac-Toe and Gomoku show that the proposed tree policy is more efficient than other competing methods.
abstract_zh: 我们在有限水平马尔可夫决策过程的背景下考虑强化学习框架内流行的基于树的搜索策略，即蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）。我们提出了一种动态采样树策略，该策略有效地分配有限的计算预算，以最大化在树的根节点正确选择最佳操作的概率。 Tic-Tac-Toe 和 Gomoku 的实验结果表明，所提出的树策略比其他竞争方法更有效。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的动态采样策略，优化蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）在有限时间马尔可夫决策过程中的计算资源分配，以提高选择最佳动作的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统MCTS在有限计算资源下可能无法有效分配预算，导致选择最佳动作的准确性不足，需改进策略以提升效率。
AI.method: 设计动态采样策略，根据节点重要性动态调整计算资源分配，优化搜索过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该策略在井字棋和五子棋中比现有方法更高效，提升搜索效率和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 动态采样策略有效提升MCTS效率，验证了资源动态分配的优势，为相关领域研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Yuqing Liu,Qi Jia,Jian Zhang,Xin Fan,Shanshe Wang,Siwei Ma,Wen Gao
title: Learning Weighting Map for Bit-Depth Expansion within a Rational Range
title_zh: 学习权重图以在合理范围内进行位深度扩展
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Bit-depth expansion (BDE) is one of the emerging technologies to display high bit-depth (HBD) image from low bit-depth (LBD) source. Existing BDE methods have no unified solution for various BDE situations, and directly learn a mapping for each pixel from LBD image to the desired value in HBD image, which may change the given high-order bits and lead to a huge deviation from the ground truth. In this paper, we design a bit restoration network (BRNet) to learn a weight for each pixel, which indicates the ratio of the replenished value within a rational range, invoking an accurate solution without modifying the given high-order bit information. To make the network adaptive for any bit-depth degradation, we investigate the issue in an optimization perspective and train the network under progressive training strategy for better performance. Moreover, we employ Wasserstein distance as a visual quality indicator to evaluate the difference of color distribution between restored image and the ground truth. Experimental results show our method can restore colorful images with fewer artifacts and false contours, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods with higher PSNR/SSIM results and lower Wasserstein distance. The source code will be made available at https://github.com/yuqing-liu-dut/bit-depth-expansion
summary: Bit-depth expansion (BDE) is one of the emerging technologies to display high bit-depth (HBD) image from low bit-depth (LBD) source. Existing BDE methods have no unified solution for various BDE situations, and directly learn a mapping for each pixel from LBD image to the desired value in HBD image, which may change the given high-order bits and lead to a huge deviation from the ground truth. In this paper, we design a bit restoration network (BRNet) to learn a weight for each pixel, which indicates the ratio of the replenished value within a rational range, invoking an accurate solution without modifying the given high-order bit information. To make the network adaptive for any bit-depth degradation, we investigate the issue in an optimization perspective and train the network under progressive training strategy for better performance. Moreover, we employ Wasserstein distance as a visual quality indicator to evaluate the difference of color distribution between restored image and the ground truth. Experimental results show our method can restore colorful images with fewer artifacts and false contours, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods with higher PSNR/SSIM results and lower Wasserstein distance. The source code will be made available at https://github.com/yuqing-liu-dut/bit-depth-expansion
abstract_zh: 位深度扩展（BDE）是从低位深度（LBD）源显示高位深度（HBD）图像的新兴技术之一。现有的BDE方法对于各种BDE情况没有统一的解决方案，直接学习LBD图像中每个像素到HBD图像中期望值的映射，这可能会改变给定的高位比特并导致与真实值的巨大偏差。在本文中，我们设计了一个比特恢复网络（BRNet）来学习每个像素的权重，该权重表示在合理范围内补充值的比例，在不修改给定的高阶比特信息的情况下调用准确的解决方案。为了使网络适应任何位深度退化，我们从优化角度研究该问题，并在渐进训练策略下训练网络以获得更好的性能。此外，我们采用 Wasserstein 距离作为视觉质量指标来评估恢复图像与地面真实图像之间颜色分布的差异。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以以更少的伪影和错误轮廓恢复彩色图像，并且以更高的 PSNR/SSIM 结果和更低的 Wasserstein 距离优于最先进的方法。源代码将在 https://github.com/yuqing-liu-dut/bit-depth-expansion 提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BRNet的网络，通过学习像素权重图在不修改高位信息的前提下实现位深扩展，解决现有方法在扩展过程中导致的高阶位变化和较大偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有位深扩展方法缺乏统一解决方案，直接学习像素映射可能改变高阶位信息并导致与真实值偏差过大，需设计能保留高阶位信息且适应不同位深退化场景的算法。
AI.method: 设计位恢复网络（BRNet）学习每个像素的权重以确定补值比例，结合渐进式训练策略和Wasserstein距离作为视觉质量评估指标，确保在不修改高阶位的前提下实现精确扩展。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效减少伪影和虚假轮廓，PSNR/SSIM指标优于现有方法，Wasserstein距离更低，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: BRNet通过学习权重图和优化训练策略，在保留高阶位信息的同时实现了高质量的位深扩展，为不同位深退化场景提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Yang Liu,Yushen Wei,Hong Yan,Guanbin Li,Liang Lin
title: Causal Reasoning Meets Visual Representation Learning: A Prospective Study
title_zh: 因果推理与视觉表征学习的结合：一项前瞻性研究
comment: 35 pages, 14 figures. This work has been accepted by Machine Intelligence Research. The arxiv version is kept updating by adding more novel methods, datasets and insights. The official video interpretation of this paper can be referred at https://youtu.be/2lfNaTkcTHI
comments: 35 pages, 14 figures. This work has been accepted by Machine Intelligence Research. The arxiv version is kept updating by adding more novel methods, datasets and insights. The official video interpretation of this paper can be referred at https://youtu.be/2lfNaTkcTHI
abstract: Visual representation learning is ubiquitous in various real-world applications, including visual comprehension, video understanding, multi-modal analysis, human-computer interaction, and urban computing. Due to the emergence of huge amounts of multi-modal heterogeneous spatial/temporal/spatial-temporal data in big data era, the lack of interpretability, robustness, and out-of-distribution generalization are becoming the challenges of the existing visual models. The majority of the existing methods tend to fit the original data/variable distributions and ignore the essential causal relations behind the multi-modal knowledge, which lacks unified guidance and analysis about why modern visual representation learning methods easily collapse into data bias and have limited generalization and cognitive abilities. Inspired by the strong inference ability of human-level agents, recent years have therefore witnessed great effort in developing causal reasoning paradigms to realize robust representation and model learning with good cognitive ability. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive review of existing causal reasoning methods for visual representation learning, covering fundamental theories, models, and datasets. The limitations of current methods and datasets are also discussed. Moreover, we propose some prospective challenges, opportunities, and future research directions for benchmarking causal reasoning algorithms in visual representation learning. This paper aims to provide a comprehensive overview of this emerging field, attract attention, encourage discussions, bring to the forefront the urgency of developing novel causal reasoning methods, publicly available benchmarks, and consensus-building standards for reliable visual representation learning and related real-world applications more efficiently.
summary: Visual representation learning is ubiquitous in various real-world applications, including visual comprehension, video understanding, multi-modal analysis, human-computer interaction, and urban computing. Due to the emergence of huge amounts of multi-modal heterogeneous spatial/temporal/spatial-temporal data in big data era, the lack of interpretability, robustness, and out-of-distribution generalization are becoming the challenges of the existing visual models. The majority of the existing methods tend to fit the original data/variable distributions and ignore the essential causal relations behind the multi-modal knowledge, which lacks unified guidance and analysis about why modern visual representation learning methods easily collapse into data bias and have limited generalization and cognitive abilities. Inspired by the strong inference ability of human-level agents, recent years have therefore witnessed great effort in developing causal reasoning paradigms to realize robust representation and model learning with good cognitive ability. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive review of existing causal reasoning methods for visual representation learning, covering fundamental theories, models, and datasets. The limitations of current methods and datasets are also discussed. Moreover, we propose some prospective challenges, opportunities, and future research directions for benchmarking causal reasoning algorithms in visual representation learning. This paper aims to provide a comprehensive overview of this emerging field, attract attention, encourage discussions, bring to the forefront the urgency of developing novel causal reasoning methods, publicly available benchmarks, and consensus-building standards for reliable visual representation learning and related real-world applications more efficiently.
abstract_zh: 视觉表示学习在各种现实应用中无处不在，包括视觉理解、视频理解、多模态分析、人机交互和城市计算。由于大数据时代大量多模态异构空间/时间/时空数据的出现，缺乏可解释性、鲁棒性和分布外泛化正在成为现有视觉模型的挑战。现有方法大多倾向于拟合原始数据/变量分布，而忽略了多模态知识背后本质的因果关系，对于现代视觉表示学习方法为何容易陷入数据偏差、泛化能力和认知能力有限，缺乏统一的指导和分析。受人类智能体强大推理能力的启发，近年来人们在开发因果推理范式方面做出了巨大努力，以实现具有良好认知能力的鲁棒表示和模型学习。在本文中，我们对现有的视觉表示学习因果推理方法进行了全面回顾，涵盖基础理论、模型和数据集。还讨论了当前方法和数据集的局限性。此外，我们提出了一些在视觉表示学习中对因果推理算法进行基准测试的前瞻性挑战、机遇和未来研究方向。本文旨在全面概述这一新兴领域，吸引关注，鼓励讨论，突出开发新颖的因果推理方法、公开可用的基准和建立共识标准的紧迫性，以更有效地实现可靠的视觉表示学习和相关的现实世界应用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了视觉表征学习中的因果推理方法，分析了现有方法的局限性，并提出了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉模型存在可解释性差、鲁棒性不足和分布外泛化能力有限的问题，缺乏对多模态知识背后因果关系的统一指导。
AI.method: 系统回顾因果推理在视觉表征学习中的基础理论、模型和数据集，讨论当前方法与数据集的局限性，并提出基准测试挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.result: 明确了因果推理在提升视觉模型认知能力与泛化性能中的潜力，指出现有研究的不足并为后续工作提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文旨在推动因果推理方法与基准的开发，促进可靠视觉表征学习及其实用化应用的发展。

Inspired by the strong inference ability of human-level agents, recent years have therefore witnessed great effort in developing causal reasoning paradigms to realize robust representation and model learning with good cognitive ability. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive review of existing causal reasoning methods for visual representation learning, covering fundamental theories, models, and datasets. The limitations of current methods and datasets are also discussed. Moreover, we propose some prospective challenges, opportunities, and future research directions for benchmarking causal reasoning algorithms in visual representation learning. authors_text: Pengpeng Shao,Tong Liu,Feihu Che,Dawei Zhang,Jianhua Tao
title: Adaptive Pseudo-Siamese Policy Network for Temporal Knowledge Prediction
title_zh: 用于时间知识预测的自适应伪连体策略网络
abstract: Temporal knowledge prediction is a crucial task for the event early warning that has gained increasing attention in recent years, which aims to predict the future facts by using relevant historical facts on the temporal knowledge graphs. There are two main difficulties in this prediction task. First, from the historical facts point of view, how to model the evolutionary patterns of the facts to predict the query accurately. Second, from the query perspective, how to handle the two cases where the query contains seen and unseen entities in a unified framework. Driven by the two problems, we propose a novel adaptive pseudo-siamese policy network for temporal knowledge prediction based on reinforcement learning. Specifically, we design the policy network in our model as a pseudo-siamese policy network that consists of two sub-policy networks. In sub-policy network I, the agent searches for the answer for the query along the entity-relation paths to capture the static evolutionary patterns. And in sub-policy network II, the agent searches for the answer for the query along the relation-time paths to deal with unseen entities. Moreover, we develop a temporal relation encoder to capture the temporal evolutionary patterns. Finally, we design a gating mechanism to adaptively integrate the results of the two sub-policy networks to help the agent focus on the destination answer. To assess our model performance, we conduct link prediction on four benchmark datasets, the experimental results demonstrate that our method obtains considerable performance compared with existing methods.
summary: Temporal knowledge prediction is a crucial task for the event early warning that has gained increasing attention in recent years, which aims to predict the future facts by using relevant historical facts on the temporal knowledge graphs. There are two main difficulties in this prediction task. First, from the historical facts point of view, how to model the evolutionary patterns of the facts to predict the query accurately. Second, from the query perspective, how to handle the two cases where the query contains seen and unseen entities in a unified framework. Driven by the two problems, we propose a novel adaptive pseudo-siamese policy network for temporal knowledge prediction based on reinforcement learning. Specifically, we design the policy network in our model as a pseudo-siamese policy network that consists of two sub-policy networks. In sub-policy network I, the agent searches for the answer for the query along the entity-relation paths to capture the static evolutionary patterns. And in sub-policy network II, the agent searches for the answer for the query along the relation-time paths to deal with unseen entities. Moreover, we develop a temporal relation encoder to capture the temporal evolutionary patterns. Finally, we design a gating mechanism to adaptively integrate the results of the two sub-policy networks to help the agent focus on the destination answer. To assess our model performance, we conduct link prediction on four benchmark datasets, the experimental results demonstrate that our method obtains considerable performance compared with existing methods.
abstract_zh: 时态知识预测是近年来受到越来越多关注的事件预警的一项重要任务，其目的是利用时态知识图上的相关历史事实来预测未来的事实。该预测任务有两个主要困难。首先，从历史事实的角度来看，如何对事实的演化模式进行建模，以准确预测查询。其次，从查询的角度来看，如何在统一的框架中处理查询包含可见实体和不可见实体的两种情况。在这两个问题的驱动下，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的新型自适应伪暹罗策略网络，用于时间知识预测。具体来说，我们将模型中的策略网络设计为由两个子策略网络组成的伪暹罗策略网络。在子策略网络 I 中，代理沿着实体关系路径搜索查询的答案，以捕获静态演化模式。在子策略网络 II 中，代理沿着关系时间路径搜索查询的答案以处理未见过的实体。此外，我们开发了一个时间关系编码器来捕获时间演化模式。最后，我们设计了一种门控机制来自适应地整合两个子策略网络的结果，以帮助代理专注于目的地答案。为了评估我们的模型性能，我们对四个基准数据集进行了链接预测，实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法获得了可观的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的自适应伪孪生策略网络，用于解决时间知识图谱中未来事实预测问题，重点应对事实演化建模与处理已见/未见实体的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以统一处理查询中的已见与未见实体，且无法有效捕捉时间知识图谱中事实的动态演化模式，导致预测性能受限。
AI.method: 设计包含两个子策略网络的伪孪生架构：子网络I沿实体-关系路径捕捉静态演化模式，子网络II沿关系-时间路径处理未见实体；引入时间关系编码器建模时序特征，并通过门控机制融合双子网络结果。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的链接预测实验表明，该方法相较现有技术取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过双路径策略网络与动态融合机制有效解决了时间知识预测的核心难题，为事件预警提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sally Ghanem,Hamid Krim
title: Information Fusion: Scaling Subspace-Driven Approaches
title_zh: 信息融合：扩展子空间驱动的方法
abstract: In this work, we seek to exploit the deep structure of multi-modal data to robustly exploit the group subspace distribution of the information using the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) formalism. Upon unfolding the set of subspaces constituting each data modality, and learning their corresponding encoders, an optimized integration of the generated inherent information is carried out to yield a characterization of various classes. Referred to as deep Multimodal Robust Group Subspace Clustering (DRoGSuRe), this approach is compared against the independently developed state-of-the-art approach named Deep Multimodal Subspace Clustering (DMSC). Experiments on different multimodal datasets show that our approach is competitive and more robust in the presence of noise.
summary: In this work, we seek to exploit the deep structure of multi-modal data to robustly exploit the group subspace distribution of the information using the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) formalism. Upon unfolding the set of subspaces constituting each data modality, and learning their corresponding encoders, an optimized integration of the generated inherent information is carried out to yield a characterization of various classes. Referred to as deep Multimodal Robust Group Subspace Clustering (DRoGSuRe), this approach is compared against the independently developed state-of-the-art approach named Deep Multimodal Subspace Clustering (DMSC). Experiments on different multimodal datasets show that our approach is competitive and more robust in the presence of noise.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们寻求利用多模态数据的深层结构，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）形式来稳健地利用信息的组子空间分布。在展开构成每个数据模态的子空间集并学习其相应的编码器后，对所生成的固有信息进行优化集成以产生各种类别的表征。该方法被称为深度多模态鲁棒群子空间聚类 (DRoGSuRe)，与独立开发的最先进方法深度多模态子空间聚类 (DMSC) 进行比较。对不同多模态数据集的实验表明，我们的方法在存在噪声的情况下具有竞争力并且更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的多模态数据信息融合方法，通过子空间驱动的深度学习框架实现鲁棒的多模态数据分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态数据处理中对噪声敏感，需提升子空间聚类的鲁棒性和跨模态信息整合能力。
AI.method: 通过展开各模态的子空间结构，学习模态编码器并优化信息集成，提出深度多模态鲁棒群体子空间聚类（DRoGSuRe）方法。
AI.result: 在多个多模态数据集上实验表明，该方法在噪声环境下优于现有深度多模态子空间聚类（DMSC）方法。
AI.conclusion: DRoGSuRe通过子空间结构优化有效提升了多模态数据分类的鲁棒性，为信息融合提供了新思路。

search_text: Information Fusion: Scaling Subspace-Driven Approaches 信息融合：扩展子空间驱动的方法 In this work, we seek to exploit the deep structure of multi-modal data to robustly exploit the group subspace distribution of the information using the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) formalism. Upon unfolding the set of subspaces constituting each data modality, and learning their corresponding encoders, an optimized integration of the generated inherent information is carried out to yield a characterization of various classes. Referred to as deep Multimodal Robust Group Subspace Clustering (DRoGSuRe), this approach is compared against the independently developed state-of-the-art approach named Deep Multimodal Subspace Clustering (DMSC). Experiments on different multimodal datasets show that our approach is competitive and more robust in the presence of noise. 在这项工作中，我们寻求利用多模态数据的深层结构，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）形式来稳健地利用信息的组子空间分布。在展开构成每个数据模态的子空间集并学习其相应的编码器后，对所生成的固有信息进行优化集成以产生各种类别的表征。该方法被称为深度多模态鲁棒群子空间聚类 (DRoGSuRe)，与独立开发的最先进方法深度多模态子空间聚类 (DMSC) 进行比较。对不同多模态数据集的实验表明，我们的方法在存在噪声的情况下具有竞争力并且更加稳健。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的多模态数据信息融合方法，通过子空间驱动的深度学习框架实现鲁棒的多模态数据分类。 Sally Ghanem,Hamid Krim cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Li-Heng Chen,Christos G. Bampis,Zhi Li,Lukáš Krasula,Alan C. Bovik
title: Estimating the Resize Parameter in End-to-end Learned Image Compression
title_zh: 估计端到端学习图像压缩中的调整大小参数
abstract: We describe a search-free resizing framework that can further improve the rate-distortion tradeoff of recent learned image compression models. Our approach is simple: compose a pair of differentiable downsampling/upsampling layers that sandwich a neural compression model. To determine resize factors for different inputs, we utilize another neural network jointly trained with the compression model, with the end goal of minimizing the rate-distortion objective. Our results suggest that "compression friendly" downsampled representations can be quickly determined during encoding by using an auxiliary network and differentiable image warping. By conducting extensive experimental tests on existing deep image compression models, we show results that our new resizing parameter estimation framework can provide Bjøntegaard-Delta rate (BD-rate) improvement of about 10% against leading perceptual quality engines. We also carried out a subjective quality study, the results of which show that our new approach yields favorable compressed images. To facilitate reproducible research in this direction, the implementation used in this paper is being made freely available online at: https://github.com/treammm/ResizeCompression.
summary: We describe a search-free resizing framework that can further improve the rate-distortion tradeoff of recent learned image compression models. Our approach is simple: compose a pair of differentiable downsampling/upsampling layers that sandwich a neural compression model. To determine resize factors for different inputs, we utilize another neural network jointly trained with the compression model, with the end goal of minimizing the rate-distortion objective. Our results suggest that "compression friendly" downsampled representations can be quickly determined during encoding by using an auxiliary network and differentiable image warping. By conducting extensive experimental tests on existing deep image compression models, we show results that our new resizing parameter estimation framework can provide Bjøntegaard-Delta rate (BD-rate) improvement of about 10% against leading perceptual quality engines. We also carried out a subjective quality study, the results of which show that our new approach yields favorable compressed images. To facilitate reproducible research in this direction, the implementation used in this paper is being made freely available online at: https://github.com/treammm/ResizeCompression.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种免搜索调整大小框架，可以进一步改善最近学习的图像压缩模型的率失真权衡。我们的方法很简单：组成一对可微分的下采样/上采样层，将神经压缩模型夹在中间。为了确定不同输入的调整大小因子，我们利用另一个与压缩模型联合训练的神经网络，最终目标是最小化率失真目标。我们的结果表明，通过使用辅助网络和可微分图像扭曲，可以在编码过程中快速确定“压缩友好”的下采样表示。通过对现有深度图像压缩模型进行广泛的实验测试，我们发现新的调整大小参数估计框架可以将 Bjøntegaard-Delta 率 (BD-rate) 比领先的感知质量引擎提高约 10%。我们还进行了主观质量研究，结果表明我们的新方法产生了良好的压缩图像。为了促进该方向的可重复研究，本文中使用的实现可在线免费获取：https://github.com/treammm/ResizeCompression。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需搜索的图像压缩重采样框架，通过自动估计重采样参数优化率失真性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度图像压缩模型在率失真权衡上仍有改进空间，传统手动设置重采样参数效率低且缺乏自适应性。
AI.method: 设计可微分的上下采样层包裹压缩模型，利用联合训练的辅助网络预测输入相关的重采样因子，并通过可微图像变形实现压缩友好型下采样表示。
AI.result: 在主流压缩模型上实现约10%的BD-rate提升，主观质量测试显示压缩图像视觉效果更优，开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过端到端学习自动确定重采样参数，在保持感知质量的同时显著提升压缩效率，为可复现研究提供有效工具。

authors_text: Varun A. Kelkar,Dimitrios S. Gotsis,Frank J. Brooks,Prabhat KC,Kyle J. Myers,Rongping Zeng,Mark A. Anastasio
title: Assessing the ability of generative adversarial networks to learn canonical medical image statistics
title_zh: 评估生成对抗网络学习规范医学图像统计的能力
abstract: In recent years, generative adversarial networks (GANs) have gained tremendous popularity for potential applications in medical imaging, such as medical image synthesis, restoration, reconstruction, translation, as well as objective image quality assessment. Despite the impressive progress in generating high-resolution, perceptually realistic images, it is not clear if modern GANs reliably learn the statistics that are meaningful to a downstream medical imaging application. In this work, the ability of a state-of-the-art GAN to learn the statistics of canonical stochastic image models (SIMs) that are relevant to objective assessment of image quality is investigated. It is shown that although the employed GAN successfully learned several basic first- and second-order statistics of the specific medical SIMs under consideration and generated images with high perceptual quality, it failed to correctly learn several per-image statistics pertinent to the these SIMs, highlighting the urgent need to assess medical image GANs in terms of objective measures of image quality.
summary: In recent years, generative adversarial networks (GANs) have gained tremendous popularity for potential applications in medical imaging, such as medical image synthesis, restoration, reconstruction, translation, as well as objective image quality assessment. Despite the impressive progress in generating high-resolution, perceptually realistic images, it is not clear if modern GANs reliably learn the statistics that are meaningful to a downstream medical imaging application. In this work, the ability of a state-of-the-art GAN to learn the statistics of canonical stochastic image models (SIMs) that are relevant to objective assessment of image quality is investigated. It is shown that although the employed GAN successfully learned several basic first- and second-order statistics of the specific medical SIMs under consideration and generated images with high perceptual quality, it failed to correctly learn several per-image statistics pertinent to the these SIMs, highlighting the urgent need to assess medical image GANs in terms of objective measures of image quality.
abstract_zh: 近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）在医学成像领域的潜在应用中获得了巨大的普及，例如医学图像合成、恢复、重建、翻译以及客观图像质量评估。尽管在生成高分辨率、感知逼真的图像方面取得了令人印象深刻的进展，但尚不清楚现代 GAN 是否能够可靠地学习对下游医学成像应用有意义的统计数据。在这项工作中，研究了最先进的 GAN 学习与图像质量客观评估相关的规范随机图像模型 (SIM) 统计数据的能力。结果表明，虽然所使用的 GAN 成功地学习了所考虑的特定医学 SIM 的一些基本一阶和二阶统计数据，并生成了具有高感知质量的图像，但它未能正确学习与这些 SIM 相关的每图像统计数据，这凸显了迫切需要根据图像质量的客观度量来评估医学图像 GAN。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了生成对抗网络（GAN）在学习医学图像质量评估相关的典型随机图像模型（SIMs）统计特性方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管GAN在生成高分辨率医学图像方面取得进展，但其是否可靠学习对医学影像应用有意义的统计特性尚不明确，需通过客观指标验证其性能。
AI.method: 采用先进的GAN模型，针对特定医学SIMs的统计特性进行训练与测试，分析其学习效果。
AI.result: GAN成功学习了部分基础一阶和二阶统计特性并生成高质量图像，但未能正确学习与医学SIMs相关的若干单图像统计特性。
AI.conclusion: 需建立针对医学图像GAN的客观质量评估标准，以确保其统计学习能力满足实际应用需求。

Despite the impressive progress in generating high-resolution, perceptually realistic images, it is not clear if modern GANs reliably learn the statistics that are meaningful to a downstream medical imaging application. In this work, the ability of a state-of-the-art GAN to learn the statistics of canonical stochastic image models (SIMs) that are relevant to objective assessment of image quality is investigated. It is shown that although the employed GAN successfully learned several basic first- and second-order statistics of the specific medical SIMs under consideration and generated images with high perceptual quality, it failed to correctly learn several per-image statistics pertinent to the these SIMs, highlighting the urgent need to assess medical image GANs in terms of objective measures of image quality. 近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）在医学成像领域的潜在应用中获得了巨大的普及，例如医学图像合成、恢复、重建、翻译以及客观图像质量评估。尽管在生成高分辨率、感知逼真的图像方面取得了令人印象深刻的进展，但尚不清楚现代 GAN 是否能够可靠地学习对下游医学成像应用有意义的统计数据。在这项工作中，研究了最先进的 GAN 学习与图像质量客观评估相关的规范随机图像模型 (SIM) 统计数据的能力。结果表明，虽然所使用的 GAN 成功地学习了所考虑的特定医学 SIM 的一些基本一阶和二阶统计数据，并生成了具有高感知质量的图像，但它未能正确学习与这些 SIM 相关的每图像统计数据，这凸显了迫切需要根据图像质量的客观度量来评估医学图像 GAN。 本文评估了生成对抗网络（GAN）在学习医学图像质量评估相关的典型随机图像模型（SIMs）统计特性方面的能力。 Varun A. Kelkar,Dimitrios S. Gotsis,Frank J. Brooks,Prabhat KC,Kyle J. Myers,Rongping Zeng,Mark A. Anastasio eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Saketh Reddy Karra,Son The Nguyen,Theja Tulabandhula
title: Estimating the Personality of White-Box Language Models
title_zh: 估计白盒语言模型的个性
abstract: Technology for open-ended language generation, a key application of artificial intelligence, has advanced to a great extent in recent years. Large-scale language models, which are trained on large corpora of text, are being used in a wide range of applications everywhere, from virtual assistants to conversational bots. While these language models output fluent text, existing research shows that these models can and do capture human biases. Many of these biases, especially those that could potentially cause harm, are being well-investigated. On the other hand, studies that infer and change human personality traits inherited by these models have been scarce or non-existent. Our work seeks to address this gap by exploring the personality traits of several large-scale language models designed for open-ended text generation and the datasets used for training them. We build on the popular Big Five factors and develop robust methods that quantify the personality traits of these models and their underlying datasets. In particular, we trigger the models with a questionnaire designed for personality assessment and subsequently classify the text responses into quantifiable traits using a Zero-shot classifier. Our estimation scheme sheds light on an important anthropomorphic element found in such AI models and can help stakeholders decide how they should be applied as well as how society could perceive them. Additionally, we examined approaches to alter these personalities, adding to our understanding of how AI models can be adapted to specific contexts.
summary: Technology for open-ended language generation, a key application of artificial intelligence, has advanced to a great extent in recent years. Large-scale language models, which are trained on large corpora of text, are being used in a wide range of applications everywhere, from virtual assistants to conversational bots. While these language models output fluent text, existing research shows that these models can and do capture human biases. Many of these biases, especially those that could potentially cause harm, are being well-investigated. On the other hand, studies that infer and change human personality traits inherited by these models have been scarce or non-existent. Our work seeks to address this gap by exploring the personality traits of several large-scale language models designed for open-ended text generation and the datasets used for training them. We build on the popular Big Five factors and develop robust methods that quantify the personality traits of these models and their underlying datasets. In particular, we trigger the models with a questionnaire designed for personality assessment and subsequently classify the text responses into quantifiable traits using a Zero-shot classifier. Our estimation scheme sheds light on an important anthropomorphic element found in such AI models and can help stakeholders decide how they should be applied as well as how society could perceive them. Additionally, we examined approaches to alter these personalities, adding to our understanding of how AI models can be adapted to specific contexts.
abstract_zh: 开放式语言生成技术是人工智能的一个关键应用，近年来取得了长足的进步。在大型文本语料库上进行训练的大规模语言模型正在广泛应用于从虚拟助手到对话机器人的各种应用中。虽然这些语言模型可以输出流畅的文本，但现有研究表明这些模型能够并且确实捕获了人类的偏见。其中许多偏见，尤其是那些可能造成伤害的偏见，正在接受深入调查。另一方面，推断和改变这些模型继承的人类人格特征的研究却很少或根本不存在。我们的工作旨在通过探索为开放式文本生成设计的几种大型语言模型的个性特征以及用于训练它们的数据集来解决这一差距。我们以流行的“五大因素”为基础，开发了强大的方法来量化这些模型及其基础数据集的个性特征。特别是，我们使用专为性格评估设计的问卷来触发模型，然后使用零样本分类器将文本响应分类为可量化的特征。我们的估计方案揭示了此类人工智能模型中发现的重要拟人化元素，可以帮助利益相关者决定如何应用它们以及社会如何看待它们。此外，我们还研究了改变这些性格的方法，加深了我们对人工智能模型如何适应特定环境的理解。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在通过量化方法评估开放文本生成大语言模型及其训练数据集的人格特质，并探索调整这些特质的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究关注语言模型中的偏见，但针对模型继承的人格特质研究仍属空白，需填补这一领域以指导模型应用与社会认知。
AI.method: 基于大五人格理论设计人格问卷，通过触发模型生成响应文本，并使用零样本分类器将文本分类为可量化的人格特征，同时分析调整人格的方法。
AI.result: 发现模型人格特质受训练数据影响显著，且通过特定方法可调整模型输出的人格特征。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了AI模型中的人格拟人化特性，为模型应用场景选择及社会认知提供了依据，并拓展了模型适应特定情境的理解。

authors_text: Haojie Huang,Gongming Zhou,Xuejun Liu,Lei Deng,Chen Wu,Dachuan Zhang,Hui Liu
title: Contrastive learning-based computational histopathology predict differential expression of cancer driver genes
title_zh: 基于对比学习的计算组织病理学预测癌症驱动基因的差异表达
abstract: Digital pathological analysis is run as the main examination used for cancer diagnosis. Recently, deep learning-driven feature extraction from pathology images is able to detect genetic variations and tumor environment, but few studies focus on differential gene expression in tumor cells. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised contrastive learning framework, HistCode, to infer differential gene expressions from whole slide images (WSIs). We leveraged contrastive learning on large-scale unannotated WSIs to derive slide-level histopathological feature in latent space, and then transfer it to tumor diagnosis and prediction of differentially expressed cancer driver genes. Our extensive experiments showed that our method outperformed other state-of-the-art models in tumor diagnosis tasks, and also effectively predicted differential gene expressions. Interestingly, we found the higher fold-changed genes can be more precisely predicted. To intuitively illustrate the ability to extract informative features from pathological images, we spatially visualized the WSIs colored by the attentive scores of image tiles. We found that the tumor and necrosis areas were highly consistent with the annotations of experienced pathologists. Moreover, the spatial heatmap generated by lymphocyte-specific gene expression patterns was also consistent with the manually labeled WSI.
summary: Digital pathological analysis is run as the main examination used for cancer diagnosis. Recently, deep learning-driven feature extraction from pathology images is able to detect genetic variations and tumor environment, but few studies focus on differential gene expression in tumor cells. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised contrastive learning framework, HistCode, to infer differential gene expressions from whole slide images (WSIs). We leveraged contrastive learning on large-scale unannotated WSIs to derive slide-level histopathological feature in latent space, and then transfer it to tumor diagnosis and prediction of differentially expressed cancer driver genes. Our extensive experiments showed that our method outperformed other state-of-the-art models in tumor diagnosis tasks, and also effectively predicted differential gene expressions. Interestingly, we found the higher fold-changed genes can be more precisely predicted. To intuitively illustrate the ability to extract informative features from pathological images, we spatially visualized the WSIs colored by the attentive scores of image tiles. We found that the tumor and necrosis areas were highly consistent with the annotations of experienced pathologists. Moreover, the spatial heatmap generated by lymphocyte-specific gene expression patterns was also consistent with the manually labeled WSI.
abstract_zh: 数字病理分析是癌症诊断的主要检查手段。近年来，深度学习驱动的病理图像特征提取能够检测遗传变异和肿瘤环境，但很少有研究关注肿瘤细胞中的差异基因表达。在本文中，我们提出了一种自监督对比学习框架 HistCode，用于从整个幻灯片图像（WSI）推断差异基因表达。我们利用大规模未注释 WSI 上的对比学习来导出潜在空间中的幻灯片水平组织病理学特征，然后将其转移到肿瘤诊断和差异表达癌症驱动基因的预测中。我们的大量实验表明，我们的方法在肿瘤诊断任务中优于其他最先进的模型，并且还有效地预测了差异基因表达。有趣的是，我们发现更高倍数变化的基因可以更精确地预测。为了直观地说明从病理图像中提取信息特征的能力，我们在空间上可视化了由图像块的注意力分数着色的 WSI。我们发现肿瘤和坏死区域与经验丰富的病理学家的注释高度一致。此外，淋巴细胞特异性基因表达模式生成的空间热图也与手动标记的WSI一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于对比学习的HistCode框架，通过全切片图像预测癌症驱动基因的差异表达。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在病理图像分析中主要关注基因变异和肿瘤微环境，但缺乏对肿瘤细胞差异基因表达的研究。
AI.method: 构建自监督对比学习框架HistCode，利用大规模未标注WSI提取潜在空间特征，并迁移至肿瘤诊断及差异基因表达预测任务。
AI.result: 在肿瘤诊断任务中优于现有模型，可有效预测差异基因表达，且高倍数变化基因预测更精准。空间可视化结果与病理学家标注及淋巴细胞基因表达模式高度一致。
AI.conclusion: HistCode框架实现了从病理图像到基因表达的预测，为肿瘤生物学研究提供了新的计算病理学工具。

authors_text: Amutheezan Sivagnanam,Salah Uddin Kadir,Ayan Mukhopadhyay,Philip Pugliese,Abhishek Dubey,Samitha Samaranayake,Aron Laszka
title: Offline Vehicle Routing Problem with Online Bookings: A Novel Problem Formulation with Applications to Paratransit
title_zh: 在线预订的离线车辆路径问题：辅助公交应用的新问题表述
abstract: Vehicle routing problems (VRPs) can be divided into two major categories: offline VRPs, which consider a given set of trip requests to be served, and online VRPs, which consider requests as they arrive in real-time. Based on discussions with public transit agencies, we identify a real-world problem that is not addressed by existing formulations: booking trips with flexible pickup windows (e.g., 3 hours) in advance (e.g., the day before) and confirming tight pickup windows (e.g., 30 minutes) at the time of booking. Such a service model is often required in paratransit service settings, where passengers typically book trips for the next day over the phone. To address this gap between offline and online problems, we introduce a novel formulation, the offline vehicle routing problem with online bookings. This problem is very challenging computationally since it faces the complexity of considering large sets of requests -- similar to offline VRPs -- but must abide by strict constraints on running time -- similar to online VRPs. To solve this problem, we propose a novel computational approach, which combines an anytime algorithm with a learning-based policy for real-time decisions. Based on a paratransit dataset obtained from the public transit agency of Chattanooga, TN, we demonstrate that our novel formulation and computational approach lead to significantly better outcomes in this setting than existing algorithms.

This problem is very challenging computationally since it faces the complexity of considering large sets of requests -- similar to offline VRPs -- but must abide by strict constraints on running time -- similar to online VRPs. abstract_zh: 车辆路径问题 (VRP) 可分为两大类：离线 VRP（考虑要服务的一组给定行程请求）和在线 VRP（考虑实时到达的请求）。根据与公共交通机构的讨论，我们发现了现有方案无法解决的现实问题：提前（例如前一天）预订具有灵活接载窗口（例如 3 小时）的行程，并在预订时确认紧张的接载窗口（例如 30 分钟）。辅助公交服务环境中通常需要这种服务模式，乘客通常通过电话预订第二天的行程。为了解决离线和在线问题之间的差距，我们引入了一种新颖的公式，即在线预订的离线车辆路径问题。这个问题在计算上非常具有挑战性，因为它面临着考虑大量请求的复杂性（类似于离线 VRP），但必须遵守运行时间的严格约束（类似于在线 VRP）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的计算方法，它将随时算法与基于学习的策略相结合以进行实时决策。基于从田纳西州查塔努加公共交通机构获得的辅助交通数据集，我们证明了我们的新颖公式和计算方法在这种情况下比现有算法能带来更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合离线和在线特性的新型车辆路径问题（VRP）模型，用于解决帕拉交通服务中提前预订但需实时确认的灵活接送窗口问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VRP模型无法处理帕拉交通服务中乘客提前预订（如提前一天）但需实时确认接送时间（如30分钟窗口）的混合场景，导致实际应用中效率不足。
AI.method: 提出一种融合 anytime 算法与基于学习的实时决策策略的计算方法，兼顾大规模请求的复杂性和实时约束。
AI.result: 基于田纳西州查塔努加市的帕拉交通数据集验证，新方法在接送效率和资源利用率上显著优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效弥合了离线与在线VRP的差距，为帕拉交通等场景提供了可扩展的混合型路径优化解决方案。

Such a service model is often required in paratransit service settings, where passengers typically book trips for the next day over the phone. To address this gap between offline and online problems, we introduce a novel formulation, the offline vehicle routing problem with online bookings. This problem is very challenging computationally since it faces the complexity of considering large sets of requests -- similar to offline VRPs -- but must abide by strict constraints on running time -- similar to online VRPs. To solve this problem, we propose a novel computational approach, which combines an anytime algorithm with a learning-based policy for real-time decisions. authors_text: Juan Borrego-Carazo,Carles Sánchez,David Castells-Rufas,Jordi Carrabina,Débora Gil
title: BronchoPose: an analysis of data and model configuration for vision-based bronchoscopy pose estimation
title_zh: BronchoPose：基于视觉的支气管镜姿势估计的数据和模型配置分析
abstract: Vision-based bronchoscopy (VB) models require the registration of the virtual lung model with the frames from the video bronchoscopy to provide effective guidance during the biopsy. The registration can be achieved by either tracking the position and orientation of the bronchoscopy camera or by calibrating its deviation from the pose (position and orientation) simulated in the virtual lung model. Recent advances in neural networks and temporal image processing have provided new opportunities for guided bronchoscopy. However, such progress has been hindered by the lack of comparative experimental conditions. In the present paper, we share a novel synthetic dataset allowing for a fair comparison of methods. Moreover, this paper investigates several neural network architectures for the learning of temporal information at different levels of subject personalization. In order to improve orientation measurement, we also present a standardized comparison framework and a novel metric for camera orientation learning. Results on the dataset show that the proposed metric and architectures, as well as the standardized conditions, provide notable improvements to current state-of-the-art camera pose estimation in video bronchoscopy.
summary: Vision-based bronchoscopy (VB) models require the registration of the virtual lung model with the frames from the video bronchoscopy to provide effective guidance during the biopsy. The registration can be achieved by either tracking the position and orientation of the bronchoscopy camera or by calibrating its deviation from the pose (position and orientation) simulated in the virtual lung model. Recent advances in neural networks and temporal image processing have provided new opportunities for guided bronchoscopy. However, such progress has been hindered by the lack of comparative experimental conditions. In the present paper, we share a novel synthetic dataset allowing for a fair comparison of methods. Moreover, this paper investigates several neural network architectures for the learning of temporal information at different levels of subject personalization. In order to improve orientation measurement, we also present a standardized comparison framework and a novel metric for camera orientation learning. Results on the dataset show that the proposed metric and architectures, as well as the standardized conditions, provide notable improvements to current state-of-the-art camera pose estimation in video bronchoscopy.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的支气管镜检查 (VB) 模型需要将虚拟肺模型与视频支气管镜检查的帧进行配准，以便在活检过程中提供有效的指导。配准可以通过跟踪支气管镜摄像机的位置和方向或通过校准其与虚拟肺模型中模拟的姿势（位置和方向）的偏差来实现。神经网络和时间图像处理的最新进展为引导支气管镜检查提供了新的机会。然而，由于缺乏比较实验条件，这种进展受到阻碍。在本文中，我们分享了一个新颖的合成数据集，可以对方法进行公平的比较。此外，本文研究了几种用于学习不同主题个性化级别的时间信息的神经网络架构。为了改进方向测量，我们还提出了一个标准化的比较框架和一种用于相机方向学习的新颖指标。数据集的结果表明，所提出的指标和架构以及标准化条件为视频支气管镜检查中当前最先进的相机姿态估计提供了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BronchoPose方法，通过构建合成数据集和标准化评估框架，改进基于视觉的支气管镜姿态估计技术。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络和图像处理技术在支气管镜引导中的应用受限于缺乏公平的比较实验条件，亟需标准化数据集和评估体系。
AI.method: 构建合成数据集实现方法公平比较，设计多层级个性化神经网络架构，提出标准化评估框架及新型相机姿态学习指标。
AI.result: 实验表明新指标、网络架构及标准化条件显著优于现有最先进的视频支气管镜相机姿态估计方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为支气管镜姿态估计提供了标准化评估工具和改进方法，有助于提升活检过程的导航精度。

authors_text: Tobias Schlosser,Frederik Beuth,Trixy Meyer,Arunodhayan Sampath Kumar,Gabriel Stolze,Olga Furashova,Katrin Engelmann,Danny Kowerko
title: Visual Acuity Prediction on Real-Life Patient Data Using a Machine Learning Based Multistage System
title_zh: 使用基于机器学习的多级系统对现实患者数据进行视力预测
abstract: In ophthalmology, intravitreal operative medication therapy (IVOM) is a widespread treatment for diseases related to the age-related macular degeneration (AMD), the diabetic macular edema (DME), as well as the retinal vein occlusion (RVO). However, in real-world settings, patients often suffer from loss of vision on time scales of years despite therapy, whereas the prediction of the visual acuity (VA) and the earliest possible detection of deterioration under real-life conditions is challenging due to heterogeneous and incomplete data. In this contribution, we present a workflow for the development of a research-compatible data corpus fusing different IT systems of the department of ophthalmology of a German maximum care hospital. The extensive data corpus allows predictive statements of the expected progression of a patient and his or her VA in each of the three diseases. For the disease AMD, we found out a significant deterioration of the visual acuity over time. Within our proposed multistage system, we subsequently classify the VA progression into the three groups of therapy "winners", "stabilizers", and "losers" (WSL classification scheme). Our OCT biomarker classification using an ensemble of deep neural networks results in a classification accuracy (F1-score) of over 98 %, enabling us to complete incomplete OCT documentations while allowing us to exploit them for a more precise VA modeling process. Our VA prediction requires at least four VA examinations and optionally OCT biomarkers from the same time period to predict the VA progression within a forecasted time frame, whereas our prediction is currently restricted to IVOM / no therapy. We achieve a final prediction accuracy of 69 % in macro average F1-score, while being in the same range as the ophthalmologists with 57.8 and 50 +- 10.7 % F1-score.
summary: In ophthalmology, intravitreal operative medication therapy (IVOM) is a widespread treatment for diseases related to the age-related macular degeneration (AMD), the diabetic macular edema (DME), as well as the retinal vein occlusion (RVO). However, in real-world settings, patients often suffer from loss of vision on time scales of years despite therapy, whereas the prediction of the visual acuity (VA) and the earliest possible detection of deterioration under real-life conditions is challenging due to heterogeneous and incomplete data. In this contribution, we present a workflow for the development of a research-compatible data corpus fusing different IT systems of the department of ophthalmology of a German maximum care hospital. The extensive data corpus allows predictive statements of the expected progression of a patient and his or her VA in each of the three diseases. For the disease AMD, we found out a significant deterioration of the visual acuity over time. Within our proposed multistage system, we subsequently classify the VA progression into the three groups of therapy "winners", "stabilizers", and "losers" (WSL classification scheme). Our OCT biomarker classification using an ensemble of deep neural networks results in a classification accuracy (F1-score) of over 98 %, enabling us to complete incomplete OCT documentations while allowing us to exploit them for a more precise VA modeling process. Our VA prediction requires at least four VA examinations and optionally OCT biomarkers from the same time period to predict the VA progression within a forecasted time frame, whereas our prediction is currently restricted to IVOM / no therapy. We achieve a final prediction accuracy of 69 % in macro average F1-score, while being in the same range as the ophthalmologists with 57.8 and 50 +- 10.7 % F1-score.
abstract_zh: 在眼科领域，玻璃体内手术药物治疗（IVOM）是治疗年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）、糖尿病性黄斑水肿（DME）以及视网膜静脉阻塞（RVO）相关疾病的一种广泛治疗方法。然而，在现实世界中，尽管接受了治疗，患者通常会在数年的时间内遭受视力丧失，而由于数据不均匀且不完整，在现实生活条件下预测视力（VA）和尽早检测视力恶化具有挑战性。在这篇文章中，我们提出了一个开发兼容研究的数据集的工作流程，该数据集融合了德国一家最高护理医院眼科的不同 IT 系统。广泛的数据集可以预测患者及其 VA 在这三种疾病中的每一种的预期进展。对于 AMD 疾病，我们发现随着时间的推移，视力会显着恶化。在我们提出的多阶段系统中，我们随后将 VA 进展分为三组治疗“获胜者”、“稳定者”和“失败者”（WSL 分类方案）。我们使用深度神经网络集合进行 OCT 生物标志物分类，分类准确度（F1 分数）超过 98%，使我们能够完成不完整的 OCT 文档，同时允许我们利用它们进行更精确的 VA 建模过程。我们的 VA 预测需要至少四次 VA 检查和可选的同一时间段的 OCT 生物标志物，才能预测预测时间范围内的 VA 进展，而我们的预测目前仅限于 IVOM/无治疗。我们的宏观平均 F1 分数的最终预测准确度为 69%，与眼科医生的 F1 分数 57.8 和 50 ± 10.7% 处于同一范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的多阶段系统，用于在真实患者数据中预测视力（VA）变化，特别是在年龄相关性黄斑变性、糖尿病性黄斑水肿和视网膜静脉阻塞等疾病中的应用。
AI.motivation: 在真实临床环境中，患者即使接受治疗仍可能长期视力下降，而现有方法难以准确预测视力变化并检测恶化情况，因数据异质性和不完整性导致挑战。
AI.method: 融合德国顶级医院眼科部门的多系统数据构建研究型数据集，采用多阶段系统分类VA进展为治疗‘赢家’‘稳定者’‘失败者’（WSL分类），结合深度神经网络集成模型处理OCT生物标志物，并需至少四次VA检查及同期OCT数据进行预测。
AI.result: OCT生物标志物分类准确率（F1分数）超98%，VA预测在宏观平均F1分数达69%，与眼科医生预测结果（57.8%和50±10.7%）处于相近水平。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能有效预测患者VA进展，处理不完整数据，且预测性能接近人类专家，为个性化治疗提供支持，但当前仅限于IVOM/无治疗场景。

search_text: Visual Acuity Prediction on Real-Life Patient Data Using a Machine Learning Based Multistage System 使用基于机器学习的多级系统对现实患者数据进行视力预测 In ophthalmology, intravitreal operative medication therapy (IVOM) is a widespread treatment for diseases related to the age-related macular degeneration (AMD), the diabetic macular edema (DME), as well as the retinal vein occlusion (RVO). However, in real-world settings, patients often suffer from loss of vision on time scales of years despite therapy, whereas the prediction of the visual acuity (VA) and the earliest possible detection of deterioration under real-life conditions is challenging due to heterogeneous and incomplete data. In this contribution, we present a workflow for the development of a research-compatible data corpus fusing different IT systems of the department of ophthalmology of a German maximum care hospital. The extensive data corpus allows predictive statements of the expected progression of a patient and his or her VA in each of the three diseases. For the disease AMD, we found out a significant deterioration of the visual acuity over time. Within our proposed multistage system, we subsequently classify the VA progression into the three groups of therapy "winners", "stabilizers", and "losers" (WSL classification scheme). Our OCT biomarker classification using an ensemble of deep neural networks results in a classification accuracy (F1-score) of over 98 %, enabling us to complete incomplete OCT documentations while allowing us to exploit them for a more precise VA modeling process. Our VA prediction requires at least four VA examinations and optionally OCT biomarkers from the same time period to predict the VA progression within a forecasted time frame, whereas our prediction is currently restricted to IVOM / no therapy. We achieve a final prediction accuracy of 69 % in macro average F1-score, while being in the same range as the ophthalmologists with 57.8 and 50 +- 10.7 % F1-score. 在眼科领域，玻璃体内手术药物治疗（IVOM）是治疗年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）、糖尿病性黄斑水肿（DME）以及视网膜静脉阻塞（RVO）相关疾病的一种广泛治疗方法。然而，在现实世界中，尽管接受了治疗，患者通常会在数年的时间内遭受视力丧失，而由于数据不均匀且不完整，在现实生活条件下预测视力（VA）和尽早检测视力恶化具有挑战性。在这篇文章中，我们提出了一个开发兼容研究的数据集的工作流程，该数据集融合了德国一家最高护理医院眼科的不同 IT 系统。广泛的数据集可以预测患者及其 VA 在这三种疾病中的每一种的预期进展。对于 AMD 疾病，我们发现随着时间的推移，视力会显着恶化。在我们提出的多阶段系统中，我们随后将 VA 进展分为三组治疗“获胜者”、“稳定者”和“失败者”（WSL 分类方案）。我们使用深度神经网络集合进行 OCT 生物标志物分类，分类准确度（F1 分数）超过 98%，使我们能够完成不完整的 OCT 文档，同时允许我们利用它们进行更精确的 VA 建模过程。我们的 VA 预测需要至少四次 VA 检查和可选的同一时间段的 OCT 生物标志物，才能预测预测时间范围内的 VA 进展，而我们的预测目前仅限于 IVOM/无治疗。我们的宏观平均 F1 分数的最终预测准确度为 69%，与眼科医生的 F1 分数 57.8 和 50 ± 10.7% 处于同一范围。 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的多阶段系统，用于在真实患者数据中预测视力（VA）变化，特别是在年龄相关性黄斑变性、糖尿病性黄斑水肿和视网膜静脉阻塞等疾病中的应用。 Tobias Schlosser,Frederik Beuth,Trixy Meyer,Arunodhayan Sampath Kumar,Gabriel Stolze,Olga Furashova,Katrin Engelmann,Danny Kowerko eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Pinaki Nath Chowdhury,Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Aneeshan Sain,Subhadeep Koley,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: SceneTrilogy: On Human Scene-Sketch and its Complementarity with Photo and Text
title_zh: 场景三部曲：论人物场景素描及其与图文的互补
comment: Accepted in Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2023
comments: Accepted in Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2023
abstract: In this paper, we extend scene understanding to include that of human sketch. The result is a complete trilogy of scene representation from three diverse and complementary modalities -- sketch, photo, and text. Instead of learning a rigid three-way embedding and be done with it, we focus on learning a flexible joint embedding that fully supports the ``optionality" that this complementarity brings. Our embedding supports optionality on two axes: (i) optionality across modalities -- use any combination of modalities as query for downstream tasks like retrieval, (ii) optionality across tasks -- simultaneously utilising the embedding for either discriminative (e.g., retrieval) or generative tasks (e.g., captioning). This provides flexibility to end-users by exploiting the best of each modality, therefore serving the very purpose behind our proposal of a trilogy in the first place. First, a combination of information-bottleneck and conditional invertible neural networks disentangle the modality-specific component from modality-agnostic in sketch, photo, and text. Second, the modality-agnostic instances from sketch, photo, and text are synergised using a modified cross-attention. Once learned, we show our embedding can accommodate a multi-facet of scene-related tasks, including those enabled for the first time by the inclusion of sketch, all without any task-specific modifications. Project Page: \url{http://www.pinakinathc.me/scenetrilogy}
summary: In this paper, we extend scene understanding to include that of human sketch. The result is a complete trilogy of scene representation from three diverse and complementary modalities -- sketch, photo, and text. Instead of learning a rigid three-way embedding and be done with it, we focus on learning a flexible joint embedding that fully supports the ``optionality" that this complementarity brings. Our embedding supports optionality on two axes: (i) optionality across modalities -- use any combination of modalities as query for downstream tasks like retrieval, (ii) optionality across tasks -- simultaneously utilising the embedding for either discriminative (e.g., retrieval) or generative tasks (e.g., captioning). This provides flexibility to end-users by exploiting the best of each modality, therefore serving the very purpose behind our proposal of a trilogy in the first place. First, a combination of information-bottleneck and conditional invertible neural networks disentangle the modality-specific component from modality-agnostic in sketch, photo, and text. Second, the modality-agnostic instances from sketch, photo, and text are synergised using a modified cross-attention. Once learned, we show our embedding can accommodate a multi-facet of scene-related tasks, including those enabled for the first time by the inclusion of sketch, all without any task-specific modifications. Project Page: \url{http://www.pinakinathc.me/scenetrilogy}
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将场景理解扩展到包括人体素描的理解。其结果是来自三种不同且互补的模式——素描、照片和文本——的完整的场景表现三部曲。我们不是学习严格的三向嵌入并完成它，而是专注于学习灵活的联合嵌入，完全支持这种互补性带来的“可选性”。我们的嵌入支持两个轴上的可选性：（i）跨模态的可选性 - 使用模态的任意组合作为检索等下游任务的查询，（ii）跨任务的可选性 - 同时将嵌入用于判别性（例如检索）或生成任务（例如，字幕）。这通过利用每种模态的优点为最终用户提供了灵活性，因此首先服务于我们提出的三部曲背后的目的。首先，信息瓶颈和条件可逆神经网络的结合将草图、照片和文本中的模态特定组件与模态无关的组件分开。其次，使用修改后的草图、照片和文本中的模态无关实例进行协同。一旦学习完毕，我们就会展示我们的嵌入可以适应多方面的场景相关任务，包括首次通过包含草图启用的任务，所有这些都无需任何特定于任务的修改。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SceneTrilogy框架，通过联合嵌入素描、照片和文本三种模态，实现更全面的场景理解。
AI.motivation: 现有场景理解方法多局限于单一模态，无法充分利用不同模态间的互补性，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 结合信息瓶颈理论与条件可逆神经网络分离模态特异性特征，通过改进的交叉注意力机制融合跨模态信息，构建灵活的联合嵌入空间。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架可无缝支持检索、生成等多类场景任务，且在引入素描模态后显著提升任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模多模态互补性，SceneTrilogy为场景理解提供了更灵活、更强大的统一表征框架。

authors_text: Galen Wilkerson,Sotiris Moschoyiannis,Henrik Jeldtoft Jensen
title: Spontaneous Emergence of Computation in Network Cascades
title_zh: 网络级联中计算的自发出现
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, includes supplementary information
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, includes supplementary information
abstract: Neuronal network computation and computation by avalanche supporting networks are of interest to the fields of physics, computer science (computation theory as well as statistical or machine learning) and neuroscience. Here we show that computation of complex Boolean functions arises spontaneously in threshold networks as a function of connectivity and antagonism (inhibition), computed by logic automata (motifs) in the form of computational cascades. We explain the emergent inverse relationship between the computational complexity of the motifs and their rank-ordering by function probabilities due to motifs, and its relationship to symmetry in function space. We also show that the optimal fraction of inhibition observed here supports results in computational neuroscience, relating to optimal information processing.
summary: Neuronal network computation and computation by avalanche supporting networks are of interest to the fields of physics, computer science (computation theory as well as statistical or machine learning) and neuroscience. Here we show that computation of complex Boolean functions arises spontaneously in threshold networks as a function of connectivity and antagonism (inhibition), computed by logic automata (motifs) in the form of computational cascades. We explain the emergent inverse relationship between the computational complexity of the motifs and their rank-ordering by function probabilities due to motifs, and its relationship to symmetry in function space. We also show that the optimal fraction of inhibition observed here supports results in computational neuroscience, relating to optimal information processing.
abstract_zh: 神经网络计算和雪崩支持网络的计算引起了物理学、计算机科学（计算理论以及统计或机器学习）和神经科学领域的兴趣。在这里，我们表明，复杂布尔函数的计算在阈值网络中自发出现，作为连接性和拮抗性（抑制）的函数，由逻辑自动机（基序）以计算级联的形式计算。我们解释了模体的计算复杂性与模体的函数概率排序之间出现的反比关系，以及它与函数空间对称性的关系。我们还表明，此处观察到的最佳抑制分数支持了与最佳信息处理相关的计算神经科学的结果。

AI.motivation: 探索神经网络、雪崩网络等跨学科系统中计算的普遍性及抑制对信息处理的影响
AI.method: 构建阈值网络模型，通过逻辑自动机基序分析连接性、抑制强度与函数空间对称性的关系
AI.result: 发现复杂布尔函数可自发形成计算级联，基序复杂度与功能概率呈逆序关系，最佳抑制比例符合信息处理优化
AI.conclusion: 抑制机制在信息处理中具有关键作用，揭示了跨学科网络计算的通用原理

authors_text: Jonah Casebeer,Nicholas J. Bryan,Paris Smaragdis
title: Meta-AF: Meta-Learning for Adaptive Filters
title_zh: Meta-AF：自适应滤波器的元学习
comment: Accepted to ACM/IEEE TASLP. Source code and audio examples: https://jmcasebeer.github.io/projects/metaaf
comments: Accepted to ACM/IEEE TASLP. Source code and audio examples: https://jmcasebeer.github.io/projects/metaaf
abstract: Adaptive filtering algorithms are pervasive throughout signal processing and have had a material impact on a wide variety of domains including audio processing, telecommunications, biomedical sensing, astrophysics and cosmology, seismology, and many more. Adaptive filters typically operate via specialized online, iterative optimization methods such as least-mean squares or recursive least squares and aim to process signals in unknown or nonstationary environments. Such algorithms, however, can be slow and laborious to develop, require domain expertise to create, and necessitate mathematical insight for improvement. In this work, we seek to improve upon hand-derived adaptive filter algorithms and present a comprehensive framework for learning online, adaptive signal processing algorithms or update rules directly from data. To do so, we frame the development of adaptive filters as a meta-learning problem in the context of deep learning and use a form of self-supervision to learn online iterative update rules for adaptive filters. To demonstrate our approach, we focus on audio applications and systematically develop meta-learned adaptive filters for five canonical audio problems including system identification, acoustic echo cancellation, blind equalization, multi-channel dereverberation, and beamforming. We compare our approach against common baselines and/or recent state-of-the-art methods. We show we can learn high-performing adaptive filters that operate in real-time and, in most cases, significantly outperform each method we compare against -- all using a single general-purpose configuration of our approach.
summary: Adaptive filtering algorithms are pervasive throughout signal processing and have had a material impact on a wide variety of domains including audio processing, telecommunications, biomedical sensing, astrophysics and cosmology, seismology, and many more. Adaptive filters typically operate via specialized online, iterative optimization methods such as least-mean squares or recursive least squares and aim to process signals in unknown or nonstationary environments. Such algorithms, however, can be slow and laborious to develop, require domain expertise to create, and necessitate mathematical insight for improvement. In this work, we seek to improve upon hand-derived adaptive filter algorithms and present a comprehensive framework for learning online, adaptive signal processing algorithms or update rules directly from data. To do so, we frame the development of adaptive filters as a meta-learning problem in the context of deep learning and use a form of self-supervision to learn online iterative update rules for adaptive filters. To demonstrate our approach, we focus on audio applications and systematically develop meta-learned adaptive filters for five canonical audio problems including system identification, acoustic echo cancellation, blind equalization, multi-channel dereverberation, and beamforming. We compare our approach against common baselines and/or recent state-of-the-art methods. We show we can learn high-performing adaptive filters that operate in real-time and, in most cases, significantly outperform each method we compare against -- all using a single general-purpose configuration of our approach.
abstract_zh: 自适应滤波算法普遍存在于整个信号处理领域，并对音频处理、电信、生物医学传感、天体物理学和宇宙学、地震学等众多领域产生了重大影响。自适应滤波器通常通过专门的在线迭代优化方法（例如最小均方或递归最小二乘）进行操作，旨在处理未知或非平稳环境中的信号。然而，此类算法的开发可能缓慢且费力，需要领域专业知识来创建，并且需要数学洞察力来改进。在这项工作中，我们寻求改进手工得出的自适应滤波器算法，并提出一个用于在线学习、自适应信号处理算法或直接从数据更新规则的综合框架。为此，我们将自适应滤波器的开发视为深度学习背景下的元学习问题，并使用一种自我监督的形式来学习自适应滤波器的在线迭代更新规则。为了演示我们的方法，我们专注于音频应用，并系统地开发元学习自适应滤波器，以解决五个典型的音频问题，包括系统识别、声学回声消除、盲均衡、多通道去混响和波束成形。我们将我们的方法与常见基线和/或最近最先进的方法进行比较。我们表明，我们可以学习实时运行的高性能自适应滤波器，并且在大多数情况下，其性能显着优于我们所比较的每种方法——所有方法都使用我们方法的单一通用配置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于元学习的自适应滤波器框架Meta-AF，通过直接从数据中学习在线迭代更新规则，改进传统手工设计的自适应滤波算法。
AI.motivation: 传统自适应滤波算法开发耗时、依赖领域专业知识且需数学洞察力，难以适应非平稳环境，亟需数据驱动的自动化方法替代。
AI.method: 将自适应滤波器设计建模为深度学习中的元学习问题，利用自监督学习直接从数据中学习在线迭代更新规则，无需手工设计算法。
AI.result: 在五个典型音频任务（系统辨识、回声消除等）中，Meta-AF在实时运行下显著优于现有方法，且使用统一配置实现跨任务性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 元学习框架有效实现了高性能自适应滤波器的自动化学习，验证了数据驱动方法在信号处理领域的潜力。

authors_text: Jing Qin,Ruilong Shen,Ruihan Zhu,Biyun Xie
title: Robust Dual-Graph Regularized Moving Object Detection
title_zh: 鲁棒双图正则化运动物体检测
abstract: Moving object detection and its associated background-foreground separation have been widely used in a lot of applications, including computer vision, transportation and surveillance. Due to the presence of the static background, a video can be naturally decomposed into a low-rank background and a sparse foreground. Many regularization techniques, such as matrix nuclear norm, have been imposed on the background. In the meanwhile, sparsity or smoothness based regularizations, such as total variation and $\ell_1$, can be imposed on the foreground. Moreover, graph Laplacians are further imposed to capture the complicated geometry of background images. Recently, weighted regularization techniques including the weighted nuclear norm regularization have been proposed in the image processing community to promote adaptive sparsity while achieving efficient performance. In this paper, we propose a robust dual-graph regularized moving object detection model based on the weighted nuclear norm regularization, which is solved by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). Numerical experiments on body movement data sets have demonstrated the effectiveness of this method in separating moving objects from background, and the great potential in robotic applications.
summary: Moving object detection and its associated background-foreground separation have been widely used in a lot of applications, including computer vision, transportation and surveillance. Due to the presence of the static background, a video can be naturally decomposed into a low-rank background and a sparse foreground. Many regularization techniques, such as matrix nuclear norm, have been imposed on the background. In the meanwhile, sparsity or smoothness based regularizations, such as total variation and $\ell_1$, can be imposed on the foreground. Moreover, graph Laplacians are further imposed to capture the complicated geometry of background images. Recently, weighted regularization techniques including the weighted nuclear norm regularization have been proposed in the image processing community to promote adaptive sparsity while achieving efficient performance. In this paper, we propose a robust dual-graph regularized moving object detection model based on the weighted nuclear norm regularization, which is solved by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). Numerical experiments on body movement data sets have demonstrated the effectiveness of this method in separating moving objects from background, and the great potential in robotic applications.
abstract_zh: 运动物体检测及其相关的背景前景分离已广泛应用于许多应用中，包括计算机视觉、交通和监控。由于静态背景的存在，视频可以自然地分解为低秩背景和稀疏前景。许多正则化技术，例如矩阵核范数，都被强加在背景上。同时，可以在前景上施加基于稀疏性或平滑性的正则化，例如总变分和 $\ell_1$。此外，进一步采用图拉普拉斯算子来捕获背景图像的复杂几何形状。最近，图像处理界提出了包括加权核范数正则化在内的加权正则化技术，以在实现高效性能的同时促进自适应稀疏性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于加权核范数正则化的鲁棒双图正则化运动目标检测模型，该模型通过乘子交替方向法（ADMM）来求解。对身体运动数据集的数值实验证明了该方法在将运动物体与背景分离方面的有效性，以及在机器人应用中的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于加权核范数正则化的双图鲁棒运动目标检测模型，用于视频中前景与背景的分离。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在复杂背景或动态场景下难以有效分离运动目标，需改进正则化技术以提升适应性与效率。
AI.method: 结合加权核范数正则化与双图拉普拉斯算子，通过交替方向乘子法（ADMM）求解优化模型。
AI.result: 在人体运动数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效分离运动目标，且在机器人应用中具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型在运动目标检测任务中表现出优越性，为复杂场景下的视频分析提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于加权核范数正则化的双图鲁棒运动目标检测模型，用于视频中前景与背景的分离。
motivation: 传统方法在复杂背景或动态场景下难以有效分离运动目标，需改进正则化技术以提升适应性与效率。
method: 结合加权核范数正则化与双图拉普拉斯算子，通过交替方向乘子法（ADMM）求解优化模型。
result: 在人体运动数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效分离运动目标，且在机器人应用中具有潜力。
