search_text: Robust Dual-Graph Regularized Moving Object Detection 鲁棒双图正则化运动物体检测 Moving object detection and its associated background-foreground separation have been widely used in a lot of applications, including computer vision, transportation and surveillance. Due to the presence of the static background, a video can be naturally decomposed into a low-rank background and a sparse foreground. Many regularization techniques, such as matrix nuclear norm, have been imposed on the background. In the meanwhile, sparsity or smoothness based regularizations, such as total variation and $\ell_1$, can be imposed on the foreground. Moreover, graph Laplacians are further imposed to capture the complicated geometry of background images. Recently, weighted regularization techniques including the weighted nuclear norm regularization have been proposed in the image processing community to promote adaptive sparsity while achieving efficient performance. In this paper, we propose a robust dual-graph regularized moving object detection model based on the weighted nuclear norm regularization, which is solved by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). Numerical experiments on body movement data sets have demonstrated the effectiveness of this method in separating moving objects from background, and the great potential in robotic applications. 运动物体检测及其相关的背景前景分离已广泛应用于许多应用中，包括计算机视觉、交通和监控。由于静态背景的存在，视频可以自然地分解为低秩背景和稀疏前景。许多正则化技术，例如矩阵核范数，都被强加在背景上。同时，可以在前景上施加基于稀疏性或平滑性的正则化，例如总变分和 $\ell_1$。此外，进一步采用图拉普拉斯算子来捕获背景图像的复杂几何形状。最近，图像处理界提出了包括加权核范数正则化在内的加权正则化技术，以在实现高效性能的同时促进自适应稀疏性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于加权核范数正则化的鲁棒双图正则化运动目标检测模型，该模型通过乘子交替方向法（ADMM）来求解。对身体运动数据集的数值实验证明了该方法在将运动物体与背景分离方面的有效性，以及在机器人应用中的巨大潜力。 本文提出了一种基于加权核范数正则化的双图鲁棒运动目标检测模型，用于视频中前景与背景的分离。 Jing Qin,Ruilong Shen,Ruihan Zhu,Biyun Xie cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO,math.NA

authors_text: Kevin J. Doherty,Ziqi Lu,Kurran Singh,John J. Leonard
title: Discrete-Continuous Smoothing and Mapping
title_zh: 离散连续平滑和映射
comment: Extended technical report for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: Extended technical report for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: We describe a general approach for maximum a posteriori (MAP) inference in a class of discrete-continuous factor graphs commonly encountered in robotics applications. While there are openly available tools providing flexible and easy-to-use interfaces for specifying and solving inference problems formulated in terms of either discrete or continuous graphical models, at present, no similarly general tools exist enabling the same functionality for hybrid discrete-continuous problems. We aim to address this problem. In particular, we provide a library, DC-SAM, extending existing tools for inference problems defined in terms of factor graphs to the setting of discrete-continuous models. A key contribution of our work is a novel solver for efficiently recovering approximate solutions to discrete-continuous inference problems. The key insight to our approach is that while joint inference over continuous and discrete state spaces is often hard, many commonly encountered discrete-continuous problems can naturally be split into a "discrete part" and a "continuous part" that can individually be solved easily. Leveraging this structure, we optimize discrete and continuous variables in an alternating fashion. In consequence, our proposed work enables straightforward representation of and approximate inference in discrete-continuous graphical models. We also provide a method to approximate the uncertainty in estimates of both discrete and continuous variables. We demonstrate the versatility of our approach through its application to distinct robot perception applications, including robust pose graph optimization, and object-based mapping and localization.
summary: We describe a general approach for maximum a posteriori (MAP) inference in a class of discrete-continuous factor graphs commonly encountered in robotics applications. While there are openly available tools providing flexible and easy-to-use interfaces for specifying and solving inference problems formulated in terms of either discrete or continuous graphical models, at present, no similarly general tools exist enabling the same functionality for hybrid discrete-continuous problems. We aim to address this problem. In particular, we provide a library, DC-SAM, extending existing tools for inference problems defined in terms of factor graphs to the setting of discrete-continuous models. A key contribution of our work is a novel solver for efficiently recovering approximate solutions to discrete-continuous inference problems. The key insight to our approach is that while joint inference over continuous and discrete state spaces is often hard, many commonly encountered discrete-continuous problems can naturally be split into a "discrete part" and a "continuous part" that can individually be solved easily. Leveraging this structure, we optimize discrete and continuous variables in an alternating fashion. In consequence, our proposed work enables straightforward representation of and approximate inference in discrete-continuous graphical models. We also provide a method to approximate the uncertainty in estimates of both discrete and continuous variables. We demonstrate the versatility of our approach through its application to distinct robot perception applications, including robust pose graph optimization, and object-based mapping and localization.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了在机器人应用中常见的一类离散连续因子图中进行最大后验（MAP）推理的通用方法。虽然有公开可用的工具提供灵活且易于使用的界面，用于指定和解决根据离散或连续图形模型制定的推理问题，但目前不存在类似的通用工具，可以为混合离散连续问题提供相同的功能。我们的目标是解决这个问题。特别是，我们提供了一个库 DC-SAM，它将用于根据因子图定义的推理问题的现有工具扩展到离散连续模型的设置。我们工作的一个关键贡献是一种新颖的求解器，可以有效地恢复离散连续推理问题的近似解。我们方法的关键见解是，虽然连续和离散状态空间的联合推理通常很困难，但许多常见的离散连续问题可以自然地分为“离散部分”和“连续部分”，可以轻松地单独解决。利用这种结构，我们以交替的方式优化离散变量和连续变量。因此，我们提出的工作能够在离散连续图形模型中进行直接表示和近似推理。我们还提供了一种方法来近似估计离散变量和连续变量的不确定性。我们通过将其应用于不同的机器人感知应用来展示我们的方法的多功能性，包括强大的位姿图优化以及基于对象的映射和定位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于离散-连续因子图的最大后验（MAP）推理的通用方法，并开发了DC-SAM库以解决机器人应用中的混合离散-连续问题。
AI.motivation: 现有工具无法同时处理离散与连续变量的混合问题，而机器人应用中常需处理此类模型，因此需开发新的推理框架。
AI.method: 提出DC-SAM库及新型求解器，通过交替优化离散与连续变量，将复杂问题分解为易解的子问题，实现近似推理并估计不确定性。
AI.result: 方法在姿态图优化、基于对象的映射与定位等机器人感知任务中验证了有效性，展示了其灵活性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了离散-连续混合模型推理工具的空白，提供了高效近似解法，并通过多场景应用验证了方法的通用性。

authors_text: Apoorv Vyas,Wei-Ning Hsu,Michael Auli,Alexei Baevski
title: On-demand compute reduction with stochastic wav2vec 2.0
title_zh: 使用随机 wav2vec 2.0 按需减少计算量
abstract: Squeeze and Efficient Wav2vec (SEW) is a recently proposed architecture that squeezes the input to the transformer encoder for compute efficient pre-training and inference with wav2vec 2.0 (W2V2) models. In this work, we propose stochastic compression for on-demand compute reduction for W2V2 models. As opposed to using a fixed squeeze factor, we sample it uniformly during training. We further introduce query and key-value pooling mechanisms that can be applied to each transformer layer for further compression. Our results for models pre-trained on 960h Librispeech dataset and fine-tuned on 10h of transcribed data show that using the same stochastic model, we get a smooth trade-off between word error rate (WER) and inference time with only marginal WER degradation compared to the W2V2 and SEW models trained for a specific setting. We further show that we can fine-tune the same stochastically pre-trained model to a specific configuration to recover the WER difference resulting in significant computational savings on pre-training models from scratch.
summary: Squeeze and Efficient Wav2vec (SEW) is a recently proposed architecture that squeezes the input to the transformer encoder for compute efficient pre-training and inference with wav2vec 2.0 (W2V2) models. In this work, we propose stochastic compression for on-demand compute reduction for W2V2 models. As opposed to using a fixed squeeze factor, we sample it uniformly during training. We further introduce query and key-value pooling mechanisms that can be applied to each transformer layer for further compression. Our results for models pre-trained on 960h Librispeech dataset and fine-tuned on 10h of transcribed data show that using the same stochastic model, we get a smooth trade-off between word error rate (WER) and inference time with only marginal WER degradation compared to the W2V2 and SEW models trained for a specific setting. We further show that we can fine-tune the same stochastically pre-trained model to a specific configuration to recover the WER difference resulting in significant computational savings on pre-training models from scratch.
abstract_zh: Squeeze and Efficient Wav2vec (SEW) 是最近提出的一种架构，可压缩 Transformer 编码器的输入，以使用 wav2vec 2.0 (W2V2) 模型进行高效的预训练和推理计算。在这项工作中，我们提出了随机压缩来减少 W2V2 模型的按需计算量。与使用固定的挤压因子相反，我们在训练期间对其进行统一采样。我们进一步引入了查询和键值池机制，可以应用于每个转换器层以进一步压缩。我们在 960 小时 Librispeech 数据集上预训练并在 10 小时转录数据上微调的模型结果表明，使用相同的随机模型，我们在单词错误率 (WER) 和推理时间之间实现了平滑权衡，与针对特定设置训练的 W2V2 和 SEW 模型相比，WER 仅有边际退化。我们进一步表明，我们可以将相同的随机预训练模型微调到特定配置，以恢复 WER 差异，从而从头开始显着节省预训练模型的计算量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于随机压缩的按需计算减少方法，用于优化Wav2vec 2.0模型的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如SEW使用固定压缩因子，难以灵活适应不同计算需求，而随机压缩可实现动态调整以平衡性能与效率。
AI.method: 在训练时随机采样压缩因子，并引入查询和键值池化机制对每个Transformer层进行进一步压缩。
AI.result: 在Librispeech数据集上，随机模型在词错误率（WER）与推理时间间实现平滑权衡，微调后可恢复WER并节省预训练计算资源。
AI.conclusion: 随机压缩方法有效平衡了计算效率与模型性能，为按需调整计算资源提供了新思路。

We further show that we can fine-tune the same stochastically pre-trained model to a specific configuration to recover the WER difference resulting in significant computational savings on pre-training models from scratch. Squeeze and Efficient Wav2vec (SEW) 是最近提出的一种架构，可压缩 Transformer 编码器的输入，以使用 wav2vec 2.0 (W2V2) 模型进行高效的预训练和推理计算。在这项工作中，我们提出了随机压缩来减少 W2V2 模型的按需计算量。与使用固定的挤压因子相反，我们在训练期间对其进行统一采样。我们进一步引入了查询和键值池机制，可以应用于每个转换器层以进一步压缩。我们在 960 小时 Librispeech 数据集上预训练并在 10 小时转录数据上微调的模型结果表明，使用相同的随机模型，我们在单词错误率 (WER) 和推理时间之间实现了平滑权衡，与针对特定设置训练的 W2V2 和 SEW 模型相比，WER 仅有边际退化。我们进一步表明，我们可以将相同的随机预训练模型微调到特定配置，以恢复 WER 差异，从而从头开始显着节省预训练模型的计算量。 本文提出一种基于随机压缩的按需计算减少方法，用于优化Wav2vec 2.0模型的计算效率。 Apoorv Vyas,Wei-Ning Hsu,Michael Auli,Alexei Baevski cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Joseph Caroselli,Arun Narayanan,Nathan Howard,Tom O'Malley
title: Cleanformer: A multichannel array configuration-invariant neural enhancement frontend for ASR in smart speakers
title_zh: Cleanformer：用于智能扬声器中 ASR 的多通道阵列配置不变的神经增强前端
abstract: This work introduces the Cleanformer, a streaming multichannel neural based enhancement frontend for automatic speech recognition (ASR). This model has a conformer-based architecture which takes as inputs a single channel each of raw and enhanced signals, and uses self-attention to derive a time-frequency mask. The enhanced input is generated by a multichannel adaptive noise cancellation algorithm known as Speech Cleaner, which makes use of noise context to derive its filter taps. The time-frequency mask is applied to the noisy input to produce enhanced output features for ASR. Detailed evaluations are presented with simulated and re-recorded datasets in speech-based and non-speech-based noise that show significant reduction in word error rate (WER) when using a large-scale state-of-the-art ASR model. It also will be shown to significantly outperform enhancement using a beamformer with ideal steering. The enhancement model is agnostic of the number of microphones and array configuration and, therefore, can be used with different microphone arrays without the need for retraining. It is demonstrated that performance improves with more microphones, up to 4, with each additional microphone providing a smaller marginal benefit. Specifically, for an SNR of -6dB, relative WER improvements of about 80\% are shown in both noise conditions.
summary: This work introduces the Cleanformer, a streaming multichannel neural based enhancement frontend for automatic speech recognition (ASR). This model has a conformer-based architecture which takes as inputs a single channel each of raw and enhanced signals, and uses self-attention to derive a time-frequency mask. The enhanced input is generated by a multichannel adaptive noise cancellation algorithm known as Speech Cleaner, which makes use of noise context to derive its filter taps. The time-frequency mask is applied to the noisy input to produce enhanced output features for ASR. Detailed evaluations are presented with simulated and re-recorded datasets in speech-based and non-speech-based noise that show significant reduction in word error rate (WER) when using a large-scale state-of-the-art ASR model. It also will be shown to significantly outperform enhancement using a beamformer with ideal steering. The enhancement model is agnostic of the number of microphones and array configuration and, therefore, can be used with different microphone arrays without the need for retraining. It is demonstrated that performance improves with more microphones, up to 4, with each additional microphone providing a smaller marginal benefit. Specifically, for an SNR of -6dB, relative WER improvements of about 80\% are shown in both noise conditions.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了 Cleanformer，这是一种用于自动语音识别 (ASR) 的基于流式多通道神经的增强前端。该模型具有基于一致性的架构，将原始信号和增强信号各自的单个通道作为输入，并使用自注意力来导出时频掩模。增强输入由称为“语音清洁器”的多通道自适应噪声消除算法生成，该算法利用噪声上下文来导出其滤波器抽头。时频掩模应用于噪声输入，以产生 ASR 的增强输出特征。通过基于语音和非基于语音的噪声中的模拟和重新记录的数据集进行详细的评估，这些数据集显示，使用大规模最先进的 ASR 模型时，单词错误率 (WER) 显着降低。它还将被证明显着优于使用具有理想转向的波束形成器的增强。增强模型与麦克风的数量和阵列配置无关，因此可以与不同的麦克风阵列一起使用，而无需重新训练。事实证明，增加麦克风数量（最多 4 个）即可提高性能，并且每个额外的麦克风提供的边际效益较小。具体来说，对于 -6dB 的 SNR，在两种噪声条件下都显示出约 80% 的相对 WER 改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cleanformer，一种适用于智能音箱的多通道阵列配置不变的神经增强前端，通过结合自注意力机制和多通道自适应降噪算法提升语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语音识别系统在复杂噪声环境下表现不佳，且传统波束成形器依赖特定麦克风配置，难以适应不同设备。需开发一种与麦克风阵列无关、可通用的增强方法以提升识别准确率。
AI.method: 基于Conformer架构设计Cleanformer，输入原始信号与多通道自适应降噪算法（Speech Cleaner）生成的增强信号，利用自注意力机制生成时频掩码，对噪声输入进行增强处理。该模型不依赖麦克风数量及阵列配置。
AI.result: 在模拟与重录制数据集上，使用大规模ASR模型时，相对词错误率（WER）降低约80%（-6dB SNR），且优于理想波束成形器。麦克风数量增加至4时性能提升显著，但边际效益递减。
AI.conclusion: Cleanformer实现了与麦克风阵列配置无关的语音增强，显著降低WER，为智能音箱等设备提供通用、高效的前端增强方案。

authors_text: Quanfu Fan,Donghyun Kim,Chun-Fu,Chen,Stan Sclaroff,Kate Saenko,Sarah Adel Bargal
title: Temporal Relevance Analysis for Video Action Models
title_zh: 视频动作模型的时间相关性分析
abstract: In this paper, we provide a deep analysis of temporal modeling for action recognition, an important but underexplored problem in the literature. We first propose a new approach to quantify the temporal relationships between frames captured by CNN-based action models based on layer-wise relevance propagation. We then conduct comprehensive experiments and in-depth analysis to provide a better understanding of how temporal modeling is affected by various factors such as dataset, network architecture, and input frames. With this, we further study some important questions for action recognition that lead to interesting findings. Our analysis shows that there is no strong correlation between temporal relevance and model performance; and action models tend to capture local temporal information, but less long-range dependencies. Our codes and models will be publicly available.
summary: In this paper, we provide a deep analysis of temporal modeling for action recognition, an important but underexplored problem in the literature. We first propose a new approach to quantify the temporal relationships between frames captured by CNN-based action models based on layer-wise relevance propagation. We then conduct comprehensive experiments and in-depth analysis to provide a better understanding of how temporal modeling is affected by various factors such as dataset, network architecture, and input frames. With this, we further study some important questions for action recognition that lead to interesting findings. Our analysis shows that there is no strong correlation between temporal relevance and model performance; and action models tend to capture local temporal information, but less long-range dependencies. Our codes and models will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们对动作识别的时间建模进行了深入分析，这是文献中一个重要但尚未充分探索的问题。我们首先提出了一种新方法来量化基于 CNN 的动作模型捕获的帧之间的时间关系，该模型基于逐层相关性传播。然后，我们进行全面的实验和深入的分析，以更好地理解时间建模如何受到数据集、网络架构和输入帧等各种因素的影响。借此，我们进一步研究了动作识别的一些重要问题，从而得出了有趣的发现。我们的分析表明，时间相关性和模型性能之间没有很强的相关性；和动作模型倾向于捕获局部时间信息，但较少的远程依赖性。我们的代码和模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文针对视频动作识别中的时间建模问题，提出基于逐层相关性传播的方法量化帧间时间关系，并分析不同因素对时间建模的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对动作识别中的时间建模机制缺乏系统性分析，需要深入理解时间相关性与模型性能的关系及网络捕捉时间信息的特性。
AI.method: 提出基于层间相关性传播的量化方法，通过实验分析数据集、网络结构和输入帧等因素对时间建模的影响。
AI.result: 发现时间相关性与模型性能无强相关性，且动作模型更关注局部时间信息而难以捕捉长距离依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 当前动作识别模型在时间建模上存在局限性，未来需改进对长距离时间依赖的建模能力。

authors_text: Christian Rauch,Ran Long,Vladimir Ivan,Sethu Vijayakumar
title: Sparse-Dense Motion Modelling and Tracking for Manipulation without Prior Object Models
title_zh: 稀疏-密集运动建模和跟踪，用于无需先验对象模型的操作
abstract: This work presents an approach for modelling and tracking previously unseen objects for robotic grasping tasks. Using the motion of objects in a scene, our approach segments rigid entities from the scene and continuously tracks them to create a dense and sparse model of the object and the environment. While the dense tracking enables interaction with these models, the sparse tracking makes this robust against fast movements and allows to redetect already modelled objects. The evaluation on a dual-arm grasping task demonstrates that our approach 1) enables a robot to detect new objects online without a prior model and to grasp these objects using only a simple parameterisable geometric representation, and 2) is much more robust compared to the state of the art methods.
summary: This work presents an approach for modelling and tracking previously unseen objects for robotic grasping tasks. Using the motion of objects in a scene, our approach segments rigid entities from the scene and continuously tracks them to create a dense and sparse model of the object and the environment. While the dense tracking enables interaction with these models, the sparse tracking makes this robust against fast movements and allows to redetect already modelled objects. The evaluation on a dual-arm grasping task demonstrates that our approach 1) enables a robot to detect new objects online without a prior model and to grasp these objects using only a simple parameterisable geometric representation, and 2) is much more robust compared to the state of the art methods.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种为机器人抓取任务建模和跟踪以前未见过的物体的方法。利用场景中对象的运动，我们的方法从场景中分割刚性实体并连续跟踪它们以创建对象和环境的密集和稀疏模型。虽然密集跟踪能够与这些模型进行交互，但稀疏跟踪使其能够抵抗快速移动，并允许重新检测已经建模的对象。对双臂抓取任务的评估表明，我们的方法 1）使机器人能够在没有先前模型的情况下在线检测新物体，并仅使用简单的可参数化几何表示来抓取这些物体，2）与最先进的方法相比更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需先验物体模型的机械臂抓取方法，通过场景中物体运动分割和跟踪刚性实体，构建密集与稀疏模型以实现在线检测和抓取。
AI.motivation: 传统抓取方法依赖先验物体模型，难以应对未知物体和动态环境，需开发无需先验知识且鲁棒的实时物体建模与跟踪技术。
AI.method: 结合密集跟踪与稀疏跟踪技术，利用物体运动分割场景中的刚性实体，持续生成物体及环境的密集模型与稀疏模型，通过简单参数化几何表示实现抓取。
AI.result: 在双臂抓取任务实验中，方法可在线检测新物体并成功抓取，且相较现有技术展现出更高的鲁棒性，尤其在快速运动和重新检测场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了无需先验模型的运动建模与跟踪在机械臂抓取中的有效性，为动态未知环境下的机器人操作提供了鲁棒解决方案。

search_text: Sparse-Dense Motion Modelling and Tracking for Manipulation without Prior Object Models 稀疏-密集运动建模和跟踪，用于无需先验对象模型的操作 This work presents an approach for modelling and tracking previously unseen objects for robotic grasping tasks. Using the motion of objects in a scene, our approach segments rigid entities from the scene and continuously tracks them to create a dense and sparse model of the object and the environment. While the dense tracking enables interaction with these models, the sparse tracking makes this robust against fast movements and allows to redetect already modelled objects. The evaluation on a dual-arm grasping task demonstrates that our approach 1) enables a robot to detect new objects online without a prior model and to grasp these objects using only a simple parameterisable geometric representation, and 2) is much more robust compared to the state of the art methods. 这项工作提出了一种为机器人抓取任务建模和跟踪以前未见过的物体的方法。利用场景中对象的运动，我们的方法从场景中分割刚性实体并连续跟踪它们以创建对象和环境的密集和稀疏模型。虽然密集跟踪能够与这些模型进行交互，但稀疏跟踪使其能够抵抗快速移动，并允许重新检测已经建模的对象。对双臂抓取任务的评估表明，我们的方法 1）使机器人能够在没有先前模型的情况下在线检测新物体，并仅使用简单的可参数化几何表示来抓取这些物体，2）与最先进的方法相比更加稳健。 本文提出一种无需先验物体模型的机械臂抓取方法，通过场景中物体运动分割和跟踪刚性实体，构建密集与稀疏模型以实现在线检测和抓取。 Christian Rauch,Ran Long,Vladimir Ivan,Sethu Vijayakumar cs.RO

authors_text: Navid Rezaei,Marek Z. Reformat
title: Super-Prompting: Utilizing Model-Independent Contextual Data to Reduce Data Annotation Required in Visual Commonsense Tasks
title_zh: 超级提示：利用与模型无关的上下文数据来减少视觉常识任务中所需的数据注释
abstract: Pre-trained language models have shown excellent results in few-shot learning scenarios using in-context learning. Although it is impressive, the size of language models can be prohibitive to make them usable in on-device applications, such as sensors or smartphones. With smaller language models, task-specific data annotation is needed to fine-tune the language model for a specific purpose. However, data annotation can have a substantial financial and time burden for small research groups, startups, and even companies. In this paper, we analyze different prompt-based fine-tuning techniques to improve results on both language and multimodal causal transformer models. To evaluate our results, we use a dataset focusing on visual commonsense reasoning in time. Our results show that by simple model-agnostic prompt-based fine-tuning, comparable results can be reached by only using 35%-40% of the fine-tuning training dataset. The proposed approaches result in significant time and financial savings. As the proposed methods make minimal architectural assumptions, other researchers can use the results in their transformer models with minimal adaptations. We plan to release the source code freely to make it easier for the community to use and contribute to our work.
summary: Pre-trained language models have shown excellent results in few-shot learning scenarios using in-context learning. Although it is impressive, the size of language models can be prohibitive to make them usable in on-device applications, such as sensors or smartphones. With smaller language models, task-specific data annotation is needed to fine-tune the language model for a specific purpose. However, data annotation can have a substantial financial and time burden for small research groups, startups, and even companies. In this paper, we analyze different prompt-based fine-tuning techniques to improve results on both language and multimodal causal transformer models. To evaluate our results, we use a dataset focusing on visual commonsense reasoning in time. Our results show that by simple model-agnostic prompt-based fine-tuning, comparable results can be reached by only using 35%-40% of the fine-tuning training dataset. The proposed approaches result in significant time and financial savings. As the proposed methods make minimal architectural assumptions, other researchers can use the results in their transformer models with minimal adaptations. We plan to release the source code freely to make it easier for the community to use and contribute to our work.
abstract_zh: 预训练的语言模型在使用上下文学习的小样本学习场景中表现出了出色的结果。尽管令人印象深刻，但语言模型的大小可能不足以使其在设备上应用程序（例如传感器或智能手机）中使用。对于较小的语言模型，需要特定于任务的数据注释来针对特定目的微调语言模型。然而，数据注释可能会给小型研究团体、初创公司甚至公司带来巨大的财务和时间负担。在本文中，我们分析了不同的基于提示的微调技术，以改善语言和多模态因果变换器模型的结果。为了评估我们的结果，我们使用专注于及时视觉常识推理的数据集。我们的结果表明，通过简单的与模型无关的基于提示的微调，仅使用 35%-40% 的微调训练数据集就可以达到可比较的结果。所提出的方法可以节省大量时间和金钱。由于所提出的方法做出了最少的架构假设，其他研究人员可以在他们的变压器模型中使用结果，并进行最小的调整。我们计划免费发布源代码，以便社区更容易使用并为我们的工作做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为'Super-Prompting'的方法，通过利用与模型无关的上下文数据，减少视觉常识任务中所需的数据标注量。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在设备端应用时存在计算资源限制，而任务特定的数据标注成本高昂，需寻找更高效的小模型微调方案。
AI.method: 分析基于提示的微调技术，结合时序视觉常识推理数据集，通过模型无关的提示工程优化多模态转换器模型性能。
AI.result: 仅使用35%-40%的微调数据即可达到与全量数据相当的效果，显著降低时间和经济成本，且方法具有模型通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为资源受限场景提供了高效的视觉常识任务解决方案，开源代码将促进社区进一步研究与应用。

authors_text: Laura Downs,Anthony Francis,Nate Koenig,Brandon Kinman,Ryan Hickman,Krista Reymann,Thomas B. McHugh,Vincent Vanhoucke
title: Google Scanned Objects: A High-Quality Dataset of 3D Scanned Household Items
title_zh: Google 扫描物体：3D 扫描家居用品的高质量数据集
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables; to appear in the conference proceedings of ICRA 2022
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables; to appear in the conference proceedings of ICRA 2022
abstract: Interactive 3D simulations have enabled breakthroughs in robotics and computer vision, but simulating the broad diversity of environments needed for deep learning requires large corpora of photo-realistic 3D object models. To address this need, we present Google Scanned Objects, an open-source collection of over one thousand 3D-scanned household items released under a Creative Commons license; these models are preprocessed for use in Ignition Gazebo and the Bullet simulation platforms, but are easily adaptable to other simulators. We describe our object scanning and curation pipeline, then provide statistics about the contents of the dataset and its usage. We hope that the diversity, quality, and flexibility of Google Scanned Objects will lead to advances in interactive simulation, synthetic perception, and robotic learning.
summary: Interactive 3D simulations have enabled breakthroughs in robotics and computer vision, but simulating the broad diversity of environments needed for deep learning requires large corpora of photo-realistic 3D object models. To address this need, we present Google Scanned Objects, an open-source collection of over one thousand 3D-scanned household items released under a Creative Commons license; these models are preprocessed for use in Ignition Gazebo and the Bullet simulation platforms, but are easily adaptable to other simulators. We describe our object scanning and curation pipeline, then provide statistics about the contents of the dataset and its usage. We hope that the diversity, quality, and flexibility of Google Scanned Objects will lead to advances in interactive simulation, synthetic perception, and robotic learning.
abstract_zh: 交互式 3D 模拟使机器人和计算机视觉领域取得了突破，但模拟深度学习所需的广泛多样性环境需要大量逼真的 3D 对象模型。为了满足这一需求，我们推出了 Google Scanned Objects，这是一个开源集合，包含 1000 多个 3D 扫描家居用品，并根据 Creative Commons 许可发布；这些模型经过预处理，可在 Ignition Gazebo 和 Bullet 模拟平台中使用，但也可以轻松适应其他模拟器。我们描述我们的对象扫描和管理管道，然后提供有关数据集内容及其使用情况的统计数据。我们希望谷歌扫描对象的多样性、质量和灵活性将推动交互式模拟、综合感知和机器人学习的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Google Scanned Objects的高质量3D扫描家用物品数据集，旨在为机器人和计算机视觉的深度学习提供多样化、逼真的3D模型资源。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式模拟环境缺乏足够多样性和高质量的3D对象模型，难以满足深度学习对大规模真实场景数据的需求。
AI.method: 通过3D扫描技术采集千余件家用物品，建立标准化预处理流程，并适配Ignition Gazebo和Bullet等主流仿真平台。
AI.result: 发布包含1000+个高质量3D模型的数据集，提供详细统计信息和使用案例，验证其在仿真环境中的适用性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集的多样性和高质量特性有望推动交互式仿真、合成感知及机器人学习等领域的技术进步。

ai_content.conclusion: 该数据集的多样性和高质量特性有望推动交互式仿真、合成感知及机器人学习等领域的技术进步。

motivation: 现有交互式模拟环境缺乏足够多样性和高质量的3D对象模型，难以满足深度学习对大规模真实场景数据的需求。
method: 通过3D扫描技术采集千余件家用物品，建立标准化预处理流程，并适配Ignition Gazebo和Bullet等主流仿真平台。
result: 发布包含1000+个高质量3D模型的数据集，提供详细统计信息和使用案例，验证其在仿真环境中的适用性与灵活性。
conclusion: 该数据集的多样性和高质量特性有望推动交互式仿真、合成感知及机器人学习等领域的技术进步。
search_text: Google Scanned Objects: A High-Quality Dataset of 3D Scanned Household Items Google 扫描物体：3D 扫描家居用品的高质量数据集 Interactive 3D simulations have enabled breakthroughs in robotics and computer vision, but simulating the broad diversity of environments needed for deep learning requires large corpora of photo-realistic 3D object models. To address this need, we present Google Scanned Objects, an open-source collection of over one thousand 3D-scanned household items released under a Creative Commons license; these models are preprocessed for use in Ignition Gazebo and the Bullet simulation platforms, but are easily adaptable to other simulators. We describe our object scanning and curation pipeline, then provide statistics about the contents of the dataset and its usage. We hope that the diversity, quality, and flexibility of Google Scanned Objects will lead to advances in interactive simulation, synthetic perception, and robotic learning. 交互式 3D 模拟使机器人和计算机视觉领域取得了突破，但模拟深度学习所需的广泛多样性环境需要大量逼真的 3D 对象模型。为了满足这一需求，我们推出了 Google Scanned Objects，这是一个开源集合，包含 1000 多个 3D 扫描家居用品，并根据 Creative Commons 许可发布；这些模型经过预处理，可在 Ignition Gazebo 和 Bullet 模拟平台中使用，但也可以轻松适应其他模拟器。我们描述我们的对象扫描和管理管道，然后提供有关数据集内容及其使用情况的统计数据。我们希望谷歌扫描对象的多样性、质量和灵活性将推动交互式模拟、综合感知和机器人学习的进步。 本文介绍了一个名为Google Scanned Objects的高质量3D扫描家用物品数据集，旨在为机器人和计算机视觉的深度学习提供多样化、逼真的3D模型资源。 Laura Downs,Anthony Francis,Nate Koenig,Brandon Kinman,Ryan Hickman,Krista Reymann,Thomas B. McHugh,Vincent Vanhoucke cs.RO,cs.GR

authors_text: Yalin Liu,Jinfeng Lin,Oghenemaro Anuyah,Ronald Metoyer,Jane Cleland-Huang
title: Generating and Visualizing Trace Link Explanations
title_zh: 生成和可视化跟踪链接解释
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in deep-learning (DL) approaches have resulted in the dynamic generation of trace links that are far more accurate than was previously possible. However, DL-generated links lack clear explanations, and therefore non-experts in the domain can find it difficult to understand the underlying semantics of the link, making it hard for them to evaluate the link's correctness or suitability for a specific software engineering task. In this paper we present a novel NLP pipeline for generating and visualizing trace link explanations. Our approach identifies domain-specific concepts, retrieves a corpus of concept-related sentences, mines concept definitions and usage examples, and identifies relations between cross-artifact concepts in order to explain the links. It applies a post-processing step to prioritize the most likely acronyms and definitions and to eliminate non-relevant ones. We evaluate our approach using project artifacts from three different domains of interstellar telescopes, positive train control, and electronic health-care systems, and then report coverage, correctness, and potential utility of the generated definitions. We design and utilize an explanation interface which leverages concept definitions and relations to visualize and explain trace link rationales, and we report results from a user study that was conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of the explanation interface. Results show that the explanations presented in the interface helped non-experts to understand the underlying semantics of a trace link and improved their ability to vet the correctness of the link.
summary: Recent breakthroughs in deep-learning (DL) approaches have resulted in the dynamic generation of trace links that are far more accurate than was previously possible. However, DL-generated links lack clear explanations, and therefore non-experts in the domain can find it difficult to understand the underlying semantics of the link, making it hard for them to evaluate the link's correctness or suitability for a specific software engineering task. In this paper we present a novel NLP pipeline for generating and visualizing trace link explanations. Our approach identifies domain-specific concepts, retrieves a corpus of concept-related sentences, mines concept definitions and usage examples, and identifies relations between cross-artifact concepts in order to explain the links. It applies a post-processing step to prioritize the most likely acronyms and definitions and to eliminate non-relevant ones. We evaluate our approach using project artifacts from three different domains of interstellar telescopes, positive train control, and electronic health-care systems, and then report coverage, correctness, and potential utility of the generated definitions. We design and utilize an explanation interface which leverages concept definitions and relations to visualize and explain trace link rationales, and we report results from a user study that was conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of the explanation interface. Results show that the explanations presented in the interface helped non-experts to understand the underlying semantics of a trace link and improved their ability to vet the correctness of the link.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 方法的最新突破导致了跟踪链接的动态生成，其准确度远高于以前。然而，深度学习生成的链接缺乏清晰的解释，因此该领域的非专家可能会发现很难理解链接的底层语义，从而使他们很难评估链接的正确性或对特定软件工程任务的适用性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 NLP 管道，用于生成和可视化跟踪链接解释。我们的方法识别特定领域的概念，检索概念相关句子的语料库，挖掘概念定义和用法示例，并识别跨工件概念之间的关系以解释链接。它应用后处理步骤来优先考虑最可能的首字母缩写词和定义，并消除不相关的缩写词和定义。我们使用来自星际望远镜、主动列车控制和电子医疗系统三个不同领域的项目工件来评估我们的方法，然后报告所生成定义的覆盖范围、正确性和潜在效用。我们设计和利用一个解释界面，该界面利用概念定义和关系来可视化和解释跟踪链接的基本原理，并报告为评估解释界面的有效性而进行的用户研究的结果。结果表明，界面中提供的解释有助于非专家理解跟踪链接的底层语义，并提高了他们审查链接正确性的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自然语言处理（NLP）的新型流程，用于生成和可视化深度学习生成的追踪链接解释，以帮助非专家理解链接的语义并评估其正确性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习生成的追踪链接缺乏清晰解释，导致非领域专家难以理解其语义并评估其适用性，阻碍了软件工程任务中的有效使用。
AI.method: 构建NLP流程，识别领域概念、检索相关句子、挖掘定义与用例、分析跨文档概念关系，并通过后处理优化解释内容；设计可视化界面展示解释，结合用户研究验证效果。
AI.result: 在三个不同领域（星际望远镜、列车控制、电子医疗）的项目中，生成的解释覆盖率达较高，用户研究显示非专家通过界面能更好理解链接语义并验证其正确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了追踪链接的可解释性，为非专家提供了评估链接正确性的工具，对软件工程实践具有实用价值。

authors_text: Liangdong Qiu,Chongjie Ye,Pei Chen,Yunbi Liu,Xiaoguang Han,Shuguang Cui
title: DArch: Dental Arch Prior-assisted 3D Tooth Instance Segmentation
title_zh: DArch：牙弓 Prior 辅助 3D 牙齿实例分割
abstract: Automatic tooth instance segmentation on 3D dental models is a fundamental task for computer-aided orthodontic treatments. Existing learning-based methods rely heavily on expensive point-wise annotations. To alleviate this problem, we are the first to explore a low-cost annotation way for 3D tooth instance segmentation, i.e., labeling all tooth centroids and only a few teeth for each dental model. Regarding the challenge when only weak annotation is provided, we present a dental arch prior-assisted 3D tooth segmentation method, namely DArch. Our DArch consists of two stages, including tooth centroid detection and tooth instance segmentation. Accurately detecting the tooth centroids can help locate the individual tooth, thus benefiting the segmentation. Thus, our DArch proposes to leverage the dental arch prior to assist the detection. Specifically, we firstly propose a coarse-to-fine method to estimate the dental arch, in which the dental arch is initially generated by Bezier curve regression, and then a graph-based convolutional network (GCN) is trained to refine it. With the estimated dental arch, we then propose a novel Arch-aware Point Sampling (APS) method to assist the tooth centroid proposal generation. Meantime, a segmentor is independently trained using a patch-based training strategy, aiming to segment a tooth instance from a 3D patch centered at the tooth centroid. Experimental results on $4,773$ dental models have shown our DArch can accurately segment each tooth of a dental model, and its performance is superior to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Automatic tooth instance segmentation on 3D dental models is a fundamental task for computer-aided orthodontic treatments. Existing learning-based methods rely heavily on expensive point-wise annotations. To alleviate this problem, we are the first to explore a low-cost annotation way for 3D tooth instance segmentation, i.e., labeling all tooth centroids and only a few teeth for each dental model. Regarding the challenge when only weak annotation is provided, we present a dental arch prior-assisted 3D tooth segmentation method, namely DArch. Our DArch consists of two stages, including tooth centroid detection and tooth instance segmentation. Accurately detecting the tooth centroids can help locate the individual tooth, thus benefiting the segmentation. Thus, our DArch proposes to leverage the dental arch prior to assist the detection. Specifically, we firstly propose a coarse-to-fine method to estimate the dental arch, in which the dental arch is initially generated by Bezier curve regression, and then a graph-based convolutional network (GCN) is trained to refine it. With the estimated dental arch, we then propose a novel Arch-aware Point Sampling (APS) method to assist the tooth centroid proposal generation. Meantime, a segmentor is independently trained using a patch-based training strategy, aiming to segment a tooth instance from a 3D patch centered at the tooth centroid. Experimental results on $4,773$ dental models have shown our DArch can accurately segment each tooth of a dental model, and its performance is superior to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 3D 牙科模型上的自动牙齿实例分割是计算机辅助正畸治疗的一项基本任务。现有的基于学习的方法严重依赖昂贵的逐点注释。为了缓解这个问题，我们率先探索了一种低成本的 3D 牙齿实例分割标注方法，即为每个牙齿模型标记所有牙齿质心，仅标记少数牙齿。针对仅提供弱注释时的挑战，我们提出了一种牙弓先验辅助的 3D 牙齿分割方法，即 DArch。我们的 DArch 由两个阶段组成，包括牙齿质心检测和牙齿实例分割。准确检测牙齿质心可以帮助定位单个牙齿，从而有利于分割。因此，我们的 DArch 建议在协助检测之前利用牙弓。具体来说，我们首先提出一种从粗到细的方法来估计牙弓，其中牙弓最初通过贝塞尔曲线回归生成，然后训练基于图的卷积网络（GCN）对其进行细化。根据估计的牙弓，我们提出了一种新颖的牙弓感知点采样（APS）方法来辅助牙齿质心建议的生成。同时，分割器使用基于补丁的训练策略进行独立训练，旨在从以牙齿质心为中心的 3D 补丁中分割牙齿实例。在价值 4,773 美元的牙科模型上进行的实验结果表明，我们的 DArch 可以准确地分割牙科模型的每颗牙齿，并且其性能优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于牙弓先验的3D牙齿实例分割方法DArch，旨在降低标注成本并提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的牙齿分割方法依赖昂贵的逐点标注，而本文通过仅标注牙齿质心和少量牙齿实现低成本标注，解决标注成本高的问题。
AI.method: DArch包含两阶段：首先通过贝塞尔曲线回归和图卷积网络（GCN）估计牙弓先验，再结合基于牙弓的点采样（APS）生成质心提案；其次采用基于补丁的训练策略独立训练分割器进行牙齿实例分割。
AI.result: 在4,773个牙模数据集上，DArch实现了准确的牙齿分割，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DArch通过牙弓先验有效利用弱标注信息，显著提升了3D牙齿实例分割的效率和精度。

method: DArch包含两阶段：首先通过贝塞尔曲线回归和图卷积网络（GCN）估计牙弓先验，再结合基于牙弓的点采样（APS）生成质心提案；其次采用基于补丁的训练策略独立训练分割器进行牙齿实例分割。
result: 在4,773个牙模数据集上，DArch实现了准确的牙齿分割，性能优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: DArch通过牙弓先验有效利用弱标注信息，显著提升了3D牙齿实例分割的效率和精度。
search_text: DArch: Dental Arch Prior-assisted 3D Tooth Instance Segmentation DArch：牙弓 Prior 辅助 3D 牙齿实例分割 Automatic tooth instance segmentation on 3D dental models is a fundamental task for computer-aided orthodontic treatments. Existing learning-based methods rely heavily on expensive point-wise annotations. To alleviate this problem, we are the first to explore a low-cost annotation way for 3D tooth instance segmentation, i.e., labeling all tooth centroids and only a few teeth for each dental model. Regarding the challenge when only weak annotation is provided, we present a dental arch prior-assisted 3D tooth segmentation method, namely DArch. Our DArch consists of two stages, including tooth centroid detection and tooth instance segmentation. Accurately detecting the tooth centroids can help locate the individual tooth, thus benefiting the segmentation. Thus, our DArch proposes to leverage the dental arch prior to assist the detection. Specifically, we firstly propose a coarse-to-fine method to estimate the dental arch, in which the dental arch is initially generated by Bezier curve regression, and then a graph-based convolutional network (GCN) is trained to refine it. With the estimated dental arch, we then propose a novel Arch-aware Point Sampling (APS) method to assist the tooth centroid proposal generation. Meantime, a segmentor is independently trained using a patch-based training strategy, aiming to segment a tooth instance from a 3D patch centered at the tooth centroid. Experimental results on $4,773$ dental models have shown our DArch can accurately segment each tooth of a dental model, and its performance is superior to the state-of-the-art methods. 3D 牙科模型上的自动牙齿实例分割是计算机辅助正畸治疗的一项基本任务。现有的基于学习的方法严重依赖昂贵的逐点注释。为了缓解这个问题，我们率先探索了一种低成本的 3D 牙齿实例分割标注方法，即为每个牙齿模型标记所有牙齿质心，仅标记少数牙齿。针对仅提供弱注释时的挑战，我们提出了一种牙弓先验辅助的 3D 牙齿分割方法，即 DArch。我们的 DArch 由两个阶段组成，包括牙齿质心检测和牙齿实例分割。准确检测牙齿质心可以帮助定位单个牙齿，从而有利于分割。因此，我们的 DArch 建议在协助检测之前利用牙弓。具体来说，我们首先提出一种从粗到细的方法来估计牙弓，其中牙弓最初通过贝塞尔曲线回归生成，然后训练基于图的卷积网络（GCN）对其进行细化。根据估计的牙弓，我们提出了一种新颖的牙弓感知点采样（APS）方法来辅助牙齿质心建议的生成。同时，分割器使用基于补丁的训练策略进行独立训练，旨在从以牙齿质心为中心的 3D 补丁中分割牙齿实例。在价值 4,773 美元的牙科模型上进行的实验结果表明，我们的 DArch 可以准确地分割牙科模型的每颗牙齿，并且其性能优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种基于牙弓先验的3D牙齿实例分割方法DArch，旨在降低标注成本并提升分割精度。 Liangdong Qiu,Chongjie Ye,Pei Chen,Yunbi Liu,Xiaoguang Han,Shuguang Cui cs.CV

authors_text: Shiyue Zhang,Ben Frey,Mohit Bansal
title: How can NLP Help Revitalize Endangered Languages? A Case Study and Roadmap for the Cherokee Language
title_zh: NLP 如何帮助振兴濒危语言？切罗基语言的案例研究和路线图
abstract: More than 43% of the languages spoken in the world are endangered, and language loss currently occurs at an accelerated rate because of globalization and neocolonialism. Saving and revitalizing endangered languages has become very important for maintaining the cultural diversity on our planet. In this work, we focus on discussing how NLP can help revitalize endangered languages. We first suggest three principles that may help NLP practitioners to foster mutual understanding and collaboration with language communities, and we discuss three ways in which NLP can potentially assist in language education. We then take Cherokee, a severely-endangered Native American language, as a case study. After reviewing the language's history, linguistic features, and existing resources, we (in collaboration with Cherokee community members) arrive at a few meaningful ways NLP practitioners can collaborate with community partners. We suggest two approaches to enrich the Cherokee language's resources with machine-in-the-loop processing, and discuss several NLP tools that people from the Cherokee community have shown interest in. We hope that our work serves not only to inform the NLP community about Cherokee, but also to provide inspiration for future work on endangered languages in general. Our code and data will be open-sourced at https://github.com/ZhangShiyue/RevitalizeCherokee
summary: More than 43% of the languages spoken in the world are endangered, and language loss currently occurs at an accelerated rate because of globalization and neocolonialism. Saving and revitalizing endangered languages has become very important for maintaining the cultural diversity on our planet. In this work, we focus on discussing how NLP can help revitalize endangered languages. We first suggest three principles that may help NLP practitioners to foster mutual understanding and collaboration with language communities, and we discuss three ways in which NLP can potentially assist in language education. We then take Cherokee, a severely-endangered Native American language, as a case study. After reviewing the language's history, linguistic features, and existing resources, we (in collaboration with Cherokee community members) arrive at a few meaningful ways NLP practitioners can collaborate with community partners. We suggest two approaches to enrich the Cherokee language's resources with machine-in-the-loop processing, and discuss several NLP tools that people from the Cherokee community have shown interest in. We hope that our work serves not only to inform the NLP community about Cherokee, but also to provide inspiration for future work on endangered languages in general. Our code and data will be open-sourced at https://github.com/ZhangShiyue/RevitalizeCherokee
abstract_zh: 世界上超过 43% 的语言濒临灭绝，而且由于全球化和新殖民主义，目前语言消失的速度正在加快。拯救和振兴濒危语言对于维护地球的文化多样性变得非常重要。在这项工作中，我们重点讨论 NLP 如何帮助振兴濒危语言。我们首先提出了三个原则，可以帮助 NLP 从业者促进与语言社区的相互理解和合作，并且我们讨论了 NLP 可能协助语言教育的三种方式。然后，我们以切罗基语（一种严重濒临灭绝的美洲原住民语言）作为案例研究。在回顾了该语言的历史、语言特征和现有资源之后，我们（与切诺基社区成员合作）得出了 NLP 从业者与社区合作伙伴合作的一些有意义的方式。我们提出了两种通过机器在环处理来丰富 Cherokee 语言资源的方法，并讨论了 Cherokee 社区人们感兴趣的几种 NLP 工具。我们希望我们的工作不仅能让 NLP 社区了解 Cherokee，而且能为未来有关濒危语言的工作提供灵感。我们的代码和数据将开源在https://github.com/ZhangShiyue/RevitalizeCherokee

AI.tldr: 本文探讨自然语言处理（NLP）如何帮助复兴濒危语言，并以切罗基语为案例，提出具体方法和路线图。
AI.motivation: 全球43%的语言面临消亡风险，语言流失加速威胁文化多样性。需通过NLP技术促进濒危语言的保护与教育。
AI.method: 提出NLP与语言社区协作的三项原则及三种教育应用方式；以切罗基语为例，分析其历史、资源，并设计两种机器辅助的资源扩展方法及社区感兴趣的工具。
AI.result: 为NLP社区提供切罗基语研究案例，提出资源增强方案，并开源代码与数据以支持未来研究。
AI.conclusion: NLP可通过技术协作助力濒危语言复兴，本文为同类研究提供方法论参考与实践范例。

authors_text: Andrés Occhipinti Liberman,Blai Bonet,Hector Geffner
title: Learning First-Order Symbolic Planning Representations That Are Grounded
title_zh: 学习接地的一阶符号规划表示
abstract: Two main approaches have been developed for learning first-order planning (action) models from unstructured data: combinatorial approaches that yield crisp action schemas from the structure of the state space, and deep learning approaches that produce action schemas from states represented by images. A benefit of the former approach is that the learned action schemas are similar to those that can be written by hand; a benefit of the latter is that the learned representations (predicates) are grounded on the images, and as a result, new instances can be given in terms of images. In this work, we develop a new formulation for learning crisp first-order planning models that are grounded on parsed images, a step to combine the benefits of the two approaches. Parsed images are assumed to be given in a simple O2D language (objects in 2D) that involves a small number of unary and binary predicates like "left", "above", "shape", etc. After learning, new planning instances can be given in terms of pairs of parsed images, one for the initial situation and the other for the goal. Learning and planning experiments are reported for several domains including Blocks, Sokoban, IPC Grid, and Hanoi.
summary: Two main approaches have been developed for learning first-order planning (action) models from unstructured data: combinatorial approaches that yield crisp action schemas from the structure of the state space, and deep learning approaches that produce action schemas from states represented by images. A benefit of the former approach is that the learned action schemas are similar to those that can be written by hand; a benefit of the latter is that the learned representations (predicates) are grounded on the images, and as a result, new instances can be given in terms of images. In this work, we develop a new formulation for learning crisp first-order planning models that are grounded on parsed images, a step to combine the benefits of the two approaches. Parsed images are assumed to be given in a simple O2D language (objects in 2D) that involves a small number of unary and binary predicates like "left", "above", "shape", etc. After learning, new planning instances can be given in terms of pairs of parsed images, one for the initial situation and the other for the goal. Learning and planning experiments are reported for several domains including Blocks, Sokoban, IPC Grid, and Hanoi.
abstract_zh: 已经开发了两种主要方法用于从非结构化数据学习一阶规划（动作）模型：从状态空间结构产生清晰动作模式的组合方法，以及从图像表示的状态产生动作模式的深度学习方法。前一种方法的好处是学习到的动作模式类似于可以手写的动作模式。后者的好处是学习的表示（谓词）基于图像，因此可以根据图像给出新的实例。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新的公式，用于学习基于解析图像的清晰一阶规划模型，这是结合两种方法优点的一步。假设解析的图像以简单的 O2D 语言（2D 中的对象）给出，其中涉及少量一元和二元谓词，如“左”、“上”、“形状”等。学习后，可以以解析图像对的形式给出新的规划实例，一个用于初始情况，另一个用于目标。报告了几个领域的学习和规划实验，包括 Blocks、Sokoban、IPC Grid 和 Hanoi。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从解析图像中学习 grounded 的第一阶符号规划表示的新方法，结合了组合方法和深度学习方法的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么生成类似人工书写的清晰动作模式但缺乏图像 grounding，要么通过图像生成 grounded 表示但模式不清晰，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 利用简单 O2D 语言解析的图像（含少量一元/二元谓词如 left、above 等），学习可解释的第一阶规划模型，支持通过初始和目标图像实例化规划问题。
AI.result: 在 Blocks、Sokoban 等多个领域实验验证了方法有效性，表明模型能学习到 grounded 且清晰的动作模式并成功规划。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功结合了组合方法的可解释性与深度学习的图像 grounding 能力，为符号规划与感知数据的融合提供了新思路。

In this work, we develop a new formulation for learning crisp first-order planning models that are grounded on parsed images, a step to combine the benefits of the two approaches. Learning and planning experiments are reported for several domains including Blocks, Sokoban, IPC Grid, and Hanoi. 已经开发了两种主要方法用于从非结构化数据学习一阶规划（动作）模型：从状态空间结构产生清晰动作模式的组合方法，以及从图像表示的状态产生动作模式的深度学习方法。前一种方法的好处是学习到的动作模式类似于可以手写的动作模式。后者的好处是学习的表示（谓词）基于图像，因此可以根据图像给出新的实例。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新的公式，用于学习基于解析图像的清晰一阶规划模型，这是结合两种方法优点的一步。假设解析的图像以简单的 O2D 语言（2D 中的对象）给出，其中涉及少量一元和二元谓词，如“左”、“上”、“形状”等。学习后，可以以解析图像对的形式给出新的规划实例，一个用于初始情况，另一个用于目标。报告了几个领域的学习和规划实验，包括 Blocks、Sokoban、IPC Grid 和 Hanoi。 本文提出了一种从解析图像中学习 grounded 的第一阶符号规划表示的新方法，结合了组合方法和深度学习方法的优势。 Andrés Occhipinti Liberman,Blai Bonet,Hector Geffner cs.AI

authors_text: Jane Lange,Ronitt Rubinfeld,Arsen Vasilyan
title: Properly learning monotone functions via local reconstruction
title_zh: 通过局部重建正确学习单调函数
abstract: We give a $2^{\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}/ε)}$-time algorithm for properly learning monotone Boolean functions under the uniform distribution over $\{0,1\}^n$. Our algorithm is robust to adversarial label noise and has a running time nearly matching that of the state-of-the-art improper learning algorithm of Bshouty and Tamon (JACM '96) and an information-theoretic lower bound of Blais et al (RANDOM '15). Prior to this work, no proper learning algorithm with running time smaller than $2^{Ω(n)}$ was known to exist. The core of our proper learner is a \emph{local computation algorithm} for sorting binary labels on a poset. Our algorithm is built on a body of work on distributed greedy graph algorithms; specifically we rely on a recent work of Ghaffari (FOCS'22), which gives an efficient algorithm for computing maximal matchings in a graph in the LCA model of Rubinfeld et al and Alon et al (ICS'11, SODA'12). The applications of our local sorting algorithm extend beyond learning on the Boolean cube: we also give a tolerant tester for Boolean functions over general posets that distinguishes functions that are $ε/3$-close to monotone from those that are $ε$-far. Previous tolerant testers for the Boolean cube only distinguished between $ε/Ω(\sqrt{n})$-close and $ε$-far.
summary: We give a $2^{\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}/ε)}$-time algorithm for properly learning monotone Boolean functions under the uniform distribution over $\{0,1\}^n$. Our algorithm is robust to adversarial label noise and has a running time nearly matching that of the state-of-the-art improper learning algorithm of Bshouty and Tamon (JACM '96) and an information-theoretic lower bound of Blais et al (RANDOM '15). Prior to this work, no proper learning algorithm with running time smaller than $2^{Ω(n)}$ was known to exist. The core of our proper learner is a \emph{local computation algorithm} for sorting binary labels on a poset. Our algorithm is built on a body of work on distributed greedy graph algorithms; specifically we rely on a recent work of Ghaffari (FOCS'22), which gives an efficient algorithm for computing maximal matchings in a graph in the LCA model of Rubinfeld et al and Alon et al (ICS'11, SODA'12). The applications of our local sorting algorithm extend beyond learning on the Boolean cube: we also give a tolerant tester for Boolean functions over general posets that distinguishes functions that are $ε/3$-close to monotone from those that are $ε$-far. Previous tolerant testers for the Boolean cube only distinguished between $ε/Ω(\sqrt{n})$-close and $ε$-far.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了一个 $2^{\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}/ε)}$ 时间算法，用于在 $\{0,1\}^n$ 上的均匀分布下正确学习单调布尔函数。我们的算法对对抗性标签噪声具有鲁棒性，并且运行时间几乎与 Bsouty 和 Tamon (JACM '96) 的最先进的不正确学习算法以及 Blais 等人 (RANDOM '15) 的信息论下界相匹配。在这项工作之前，已知不存在运行时间小于 $2^{Ω(n)}$ 的适当学习算法。我们正确的学习器的核心是一个 \emph{局部计算算法}，用于对偏序集上的二进制标签进行排序。我们的算法建立在分布式贪婪图算法的基础上；具体来说，我们依赖于 Ghaffari 最近的工作（FOCS'22），它给出了一种有效的算法，用于计算 Rubinfeld 等人和 Alon 等人的 LCA 模型中的图中的最大匹配（ICS'11，SODA'12）。我们的本地排序算法的应用超出了布尔立方体的学习范围：我们还为布尔函数提供了一个通用偏序集的容错测试器，可以区分 $ε/3$ 接近单调的函数和 $ε$ 远的函数。以前布尔立方体的容忍测试人员仅区分 $ε/Ω(\sqrt{n})$-close 和 $ε$-far。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在均匀分布下高效正确学习单调布尔函数的算法，并通过局部重构技术实现了对对抗性标签噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 此前所有正确学习单调布尔函数的算法时间复杂度均为指数级，缺乏更高效的解决方案，且现有容错测试器在布尔立方体上的区分能力有限。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于偏序集二进制标签排序的局部计算算法，结合分布式贪心图算法（如Ghaffari的LCA模型最大匹配算法）实现高效学习。
AI.result: 实现了时间复杂度为$2^{\tilde{O}(\\sqrt{n}/ε)}$的正确学习算法，接近最优下界，并扩展到一般偏序集的容错测试器，区分精度提升至$ε/3$与$ε$。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在理论界和应用上均取得突破，为单调函数学习和偏序集测试提供了更高效的方法，推动了相关领域的发展。

authors_text: Shahaf Ettedgui,Shady Abu-Hussein,Raja Giryes
title: ProCST: Boosting Semantic Segmentation Using Progressive Cyclic Style-Transfer
title_zh: ProCST：使用渐进式循环风格转移增强语义分割
abstract: Using synthetic data for training neural networks that achieve good performance on real-world data is an important task as it can reduce the need for costly data annotation. Yet, synthetic and real world data have a domain gap. Reducing this gap, also known as domain adaptation, has been widely studied in recent years. Closing the domain gap between the source (synthetic) and target (real) data by directly performing the adaptation between the two is challenging. In this work, we propose a novel two-stage framework for improving domain adaptation techniques on image data. In the first stage, we progressively train a multi-scale neural network to perform image translation from the source domain to the target domain. We denote the new transformed data as "Source in Target" (SiT). Then, we insert the generated SiT data as the input to any standard UDA approach. This new data has a reduced domain gap from the desired target domain, which facilitates the applied UDA approach to close the gap further. We emphasize the effectiveness of our method via a comparison to other leading UDA and image-to-image translation techniques when used as SiT generators. Moreover, we demonstrate the improvement of our framework with three state-of-the-art UDA methods for semantic segmentation, HRDA, DAFormer and ProDA, on two UDA tasks, GTA5 to Cityscapes and Synthia to Cityscapes.
summary: Using synthetic data for training neural networks that achieve good performance on real-world data is an important task as it can reduce the need for costly data annotation. Yet, synthetic and real world data have a domain gap. Reducing this gap, also known as domain adaptation, has been widely studied in recent years. Closing the domain gap between the source (synthetic) and target (real) data by directly performing the adaptation between the two is challenging. In this work, we propose a novel two-stage framework for improving domain adaptation techniques on image data. In the first stage, we progressively train a multi-scale neural network to perform image translation from the source domain to the target domain. We denote the new transformed data as "Source in Target" (SiT). Then, we insert the generated SiT data as the input to any standard UDA approach. This new data has a reduced domain gap from the desired target domain, which facilitates the applied UDA approach to close the gap further. We emphasize the effectiveness of our method via a comparison to other leading UDA and image-to-image translation techniques when used as SiT generators. Moreover, we demonstrate the improvement of our framework with three state-of-the-art UDA methods for semantic segmentation, HRDA, DAFormer and ProDA, on two UDA tasks, GTA5 to Cityscapes and Synthia to Cityscapes.
abstract_zh: 使用合成数据来训练神经网络，使其在现实数据上取得良好的性能是一项重要的任务，因为它可以减少对昂贵的数据注释的需求。然而，合成数据和现实世界数据存在领域差距。近年来，缩小这种差距（也称为领域适应）已得到广泛研究。通过直接执行两者之间的适应来缩小源（合成）和目标（真实）数据之间的域差距是具有挑战性的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段框架，用于改进图像数据的域适应技术。在第一阶段，我们逐步训练多尺度神经网络来执行从源域到目标域的图像转换。我们将新转换的数据表示为“目标中的源”(SiT)。然后，我们将生成的 SiT 数据插入作为任何标准 UDA 方法的输入。这些新数据与所需目标域的域差距缩小了，这有利于应用 UDA 方法进一步缩小差距。我们通过与其他领先的 UDA 和图像到图像转换技术用作 SiT 生成器时的比较来强调我们方法的有效性。此外，我们在两个 UDA 任务（GTA5 到 Cityscapes 和 Synthia 到 Cityscapes）上展示了使用三种最先进的语义分割 UDA 方法（HRDA、DAFormer 和 ProDA）对我们的框架的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段框架ProCST，通过渐进循环风格迁移缩小合成数据与真实数据间的领域差距，从而提升语义分割的领域自适应效果。
AI.motivation: 合成数据与真实世界数据存在领域差距，直接进行领域自适应效果有限，需更有效的方法缩小差距以提高语义分割性能。
AI.method: 第一阶段使用多尺度网络逐步生成接近真实域的'Source in Target'（SiT）数据；第二阶段将SiT数据输入标准UDA方法（如HRDA、DAFormer、ProDA）进一步优化领域适应。
AI.result: 在GTA5→Cityscapes和Synthia→Cityscapes任务中，ProCST框架显著优于其他UDA和图像翻译方法，提升了语义分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过生成SiT数据辅助UDA方法，ProCST有效缩小领域差距，在语义分割领域自适应任务中表现出色。

Moreover, we demonstrate the improvement of our framework with three state-of-the-art UDA methods for semantic segmentation, HRDA, DAFormer and ProDA, on two UDA tasks, GTA5 to Cityscapes and Synthia to Cityscapes. 使用合成数据来训练神经网络，使其在现实数据上取得良好的性能是一项重要的任务，因为它可以减少对昂贵的数据注释的需求。然而，合成数据和现实世界数据存在领域差距。近年来，缩小这种差距（也称为领域适应）已得到广泛研究。通过直接执行两者之间的适应来缩小源（合成）和目标（真实）数据之间的域差距是具有挑战性的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段框架，用于改进图像数据的域适应技术。在第一阶段，我们逐步训练多尺度神经网络来执行从源域到目标域的图像转换。我们将新转换的数据表示为“目标中的源”(SiT)。然后，我们将生成的 SiT 数据插入作为任何标准 UDA 方法的输入。这些新数据与所需目标域的域差距缩小了，这有利于应用 UDA 方法进一步缩小差距。我们通过与其他领先的 UDA 和图像到图像转换技术用作 SiT 生成器时的比较来强调我们方法的有效性。此外，我们在两个 UDA 任务（GTA5 到 Cityscapes 和 Synthia 到 Cityscapes）上展示了使用三种最先进的语义分割 UDA 方法（HRDA、DAFormer 和 ProDA）对我们的框架的改进。 本文提出一种两阶段框架ProCST，通过渐进循环风格迁移缩小合成数据与真实数据间的领域差距，从而提升语义分割的领域自适应效果。 Shahaf Ettedgui,Shady Abu-Hussein,Raja Giryes cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Benjamín Machín,Sergio Nesmachnow,Jamal Toutouh
title: Evolutionary latent space search for driving human portrait generation
title_zh: 驱动人类肖像生成的进化潜在空间搜索
comment: This paper was accepted and presented during the 2021 IEEE Latin American Conference on Computational Intelligence (LA-CCI)
comments: This paper was accepted and presented during the 2021 IEEE Latin American Conference on Computational Intelligence (LA-CCI)
abstract: This article presents an evolutionary approach for synthetic human portraits generation based on the latent space exploration of a generative adversarial network. The idea is to produce different human face images very similar to a given target portrait. The approach applies StyleGAN2 for portrait generation and FaceNet for face similarity evaluation. The evolutionary search is based on exploring the real-coded latent space of StyleGAN2. The main results over both synthetic and real images indicate that the proposed approach generates accurate and diverse solutions, which represent realistic human portraits. The proposed research can contribute to improving the security of face recognition systems.
summary: This article presents an evolutionary approach for synthetic human portraits generation based on the latent space exploration of a generative adversarial network. The idea is to produce different human face images very similar to a given target portrait. The approach applies StyleGAN2 for portrait generation and FaceNet for face similarity evaluation. The evolutionary search is based on exploring the real-coded latent space of StyleGAN2. The main results over both synthetic and real images indicate that the proposed approach generates accurate and diverse solutions, which represent realistic human portraits. The proposed research can contribute to improving the security of face recognition systems.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络的潜在空间探索的合成人类肖像生成的进化方法。这个想法是产生与给定目标肖像非常相似的不同人脸图像。该方法应用 StyleGAN2 进行肖像生成，使用 FaceNet 进行人脸相似度评估。进化搜索基于探索 StyleGAN2 的实编码潜在空间。合成图像和真实图像的主要结果表明，所提出的方法生成了准确且多样化的解决方案，代表了真实的人物肖像。所提出的研究有助于提高人脸识别系统的安全性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化算法的潜在空间搜索方法，利用StyleGAN2生成与目标肖像相似的人类人脸图像。
AI.motivation: 现有生成对抗网络在生成高质量人脸图像时存在潜在空间搜索效率低、多样性不足的问题，需改进生成精度与多样性以提升人脸识别系统安全性。
AI.method: 结合StyleGAN2生成图像与FaceNet评估相似度，通过进化算法在StyleGAN2的实数编码潜在空间中进行优化搜索。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图像测试中，方法生成的肖像具有高准确性与多样性，能有效生成逼真的人类面部图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成高质量人脸图像提供了新思路，可增强人脸识别系统的安全性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Le-yang Gao,Rui Wang,Chuang Liu,Zhao-hong Jia
title: Multi-objective Pointer Network for Combinatorial Optimization
title_zh: 用于组合优化的多目标指针网络
abstract: Multi-objective combinatorial optimization problems (MOCOPs), one type of complex optimization problems, widely exist in various real applications. Although meta-heuristics have been successfully applied to address MOCOPs, the calculation time is often much longer. Recently, a number of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) methods have been proposed to generate approximate optimal solutions to the combinatorial optimization problems. However, the existing studies on DRL have seldom focused on MOCOPs. This study proposes a single-model deep reinforcement learning framework, called multi-objective Pointer Network (MOPN), where the input structure of PN is effectively improved so that the single PN is capable of solving MOCOPs. In addition, two training strategies, based on representative model and transfer learning, respectively, are proposed to further enhance the performance of MOPN in different application scenarios. Moreover, compared to classical meta-heuristics, MOPN only consumes much less time on forward propagation to obtain the Pareto front. Meanwhile, MOPN is insensitive to problem scale, meaning that a trained MOPN is able to address MOCOPs with different scales. To verify the performance of MOPN, extensive experiments are conducted on three multi-objective traveling salesman problems, in comparison with one state-of-the-art model DRL-MOA and three classical multi-objective meta-heuristics. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms all the comparative methods with only 20\% to 40\% training time of DRL-MOA.
summary: Multi-objective combinatorial optimization problems (MOCOPs), one type of complex optimization problems, widely exist in various real applications. Although meta-heuristics have been successfully applied to address MOCOPs, the calculation time is often much longer. Recently, a number of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) methods have been proposed to generate approximate optimal solutions to the combinatorial optimization problems. However, the existing studies on DRL have seldom focused on MOCOPs. This study proposes a single-model deep reinforcement learning framework, called multi-objective Pointer Network (MOPN), where the input structure of PN is effectively improved so that the single PN is capable of solving MOCOPs. In addition, two training strategies, based on representative model and transfer learning, respectively, are proposed to further enhance the performance of MOPN in different application scenarios. Moreover, compared to classical meta-heuristics, MOPN only consumes much less time on forward propagation to obtain the Pareto front. Meanwhile, MOPN is insensitive to problem scale, meaning that a trained MOPN is able to address MOCOPs with different scales. To verify the performance of MOPN, extensive experiments are conducted on three multi-objective traveling salesman problems, in comparison with one state-of-the-art model DRL-MOA and three classical multi-objective meta-heuristics. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms all the comparative methods with only 20\% to 40\% training time of DRL-MOA.
abstract_zh: 多目标组合优化问题（MOCOP）是复杂优化问题的一种，广泛存在于各种实际应用中。尽管元启发式方法已成功应用于解决 MOCOP，但计算时间通常要长得多。最近，人们提出了许多深度强化学习（DRL）方法来生成组合优化问题的近似最优解。然而，现有的 DRL 研究很少关注 MOCOP。本研究提出了一种单模型深度强化学习框架，称为多目标指针网络（MOPN），有效改进了PN的输入结构，使得单个PN能够求解MOCOP。此外，还提出了分别基于代表性模型和迁移学习的两种训练策略，以进一步增强MOPN在不同应用场景下的性能。此外，与经典的元启发式方法相比，MOPN 在前向传播上仅花费更少的时间来获得 Pareto 前沿。同时，MOPN 对问题规模不敏感，这意味着经过训练的 MOPN 能够解决不同规模的 MOCOP。为了验证 MOPN 的性能，对三个多目标旅行商问题进行了广泛的实验，并与一种最先进的模型 DRL-MOA 和三种经典的多目标元启发法进行了比较。实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于所有比较方法，DRL-MOA 的训练时间仅为 20% 到 40%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的多目标指针网络（MOPN），用于高效求解多目标组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统元启发式算法求解多目标组合优化问题（MOCOPs）耗时过长，而现有深度强化学习（DRL）方法较少关注MOCOPs，需开发更高效的单模型解决方案。
AI.method: 改进指针网络（PN）输入结构，构建单模型MOPN框架，并提出基于代表性模型和迁移学习的两种训练策略以提升性能。
AI.result: 在三个多目标旅行商问题上，MOPN相较先进模型DRL-MOA和三种经典元启发式算法，以20%-40%的训练时间取得更优性能，且对问题规模不敏感。
AI.conclusion: MOPN通过单模型架构和训练策略创新，在求解MOCOPs时兼具高效性与泛化能力，为相关领域提供新方法。

authors_text: Bongjoon Park,Eunkyung Koh
title: Data Uncertainty without Prediction Models
title_zh: 没有预测模型的数据不确定性
abstract: Data acquisition processes for machine learning are often costly. To construct a high-performance prediction model with fewer data, a degree of difficulty in prediction is often deployed as the acquisition function in adding a new data point. The degree of difficulty is referred to as uncertainty in prediction models. We propose an uncertainty estimation method named a Distance-weighted Class Impurity without explicit use of prediction models. We estimated uncertainty using distances and class impurities around the location, and compared it with several methods based on prediction models for uncertainty estimation by active learning tasks. We verified that the Distance-weighted Class Impurity works effectively regardless of prediction models.
summary: Data acquisition processes for machine learning are often costly. To construct a high-performance prediction model with fewer data, a degree of difficulty in prediction is often deployed as the acquisition function in adding a new data point. The degree of difficulty is referred to as uncertainty in prediction models. We propose an uncertainty estimation method named a Distance-weighted Class Impurity without explicit use of prediction models. We estimated uncertainty using distances and class impurities around the location, and compared it with several methods based on prediction models for uncertainty estimation by active learning tasks. We verified that the Distance-weighted Class Impurity works effectively regardless of prediction models.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的数据采集过程通常成本高昂。为了用更少的数据构建高性能的预测模型，通常将预测难度部署为添加新数据点的获取函数。困难程度在预测模型中被称为不确定性。我们提出了一种名为距离加权类杂质的不确定性估计方法，无需显式使用预测模型。我们使用位置周围的距离和类杂质来估计不确定性，并将其与基于主动学习任务的不确定性估计的预测模型的几种方法进行比较。我们验证了距离加权类别杂质无论预测模型如何都有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需显式预测模型的不确定性估计方法，名为距离加权类别不纯度，并验证其在主动学习任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 数据获取成本高昂，传统方法依赖预测模型估计不确定性，但可能受限于模型本身。需探索不依赖预测模型的不确定性评估方式以提高数据效率。
AI.method: 通过计算数据点周围距离权重与类别不纯度的结合值，估计不确定性，避免直接使用预测模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在主动学习任务中表现优于基于预测模型的不确定性估计方法，且不受预测模型影响。
AI.conclusion: 距离加权类别不纯度方法为不确定性估计提供了新思路，适用于无需预测模型的场景，提升了数据选择的灵活性与效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需显式预测模型的不确定性估计方法，名为距离加权类别不纯度，并验证其在主动学习任务中的有效性。
ai_content.motivation: 数据获取成本高昂，传统方法依赖预测模型估计不确定性，但可能受限于模型本身。需探索不依赖预测模型的不确定性评估方式以提高数据效率。
ai_content.method: 通过计算数据点周围距离权重与类别不纯度的结合值，估计不确定性，避免直接使用预测模型。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在主动学习任务中表现优于基于预测模型的不确定性估计方法，且不受预测模型影响。
ai_content.conclusion: 距离加权类别不纯度方法为不确定性估计提供了新思路，适用于无需预测模型的场景，提升了数据选择的灵活性与效率。

search_text: Data Uncertainty without Prediction Models 没有预测模型的数据不确定性 Data acquisition processes for machine learning are often costly. To construct a high-performance prediction model with fewer data, a degree of difficulty in prediction is often deployed as the acquisition function in adding a new data point. The degree of difficulty is referred to as uncertainty in prediction models. We propose an uncertainty estimation method named a Distance-weighted Class Impurity without explicit use of prediction models. We estimated uncertainty using distances and class impurities around the location, and compared it with several methods based on prediction models for uncertainty estimation by active learning tasks. We verified that the Distance-weighted Class Impurity works effectively regardless of prediction models. 机器学习的数据采集过程通常成本高昂。为了用更少的数据构建高性能的预测模型，通常将预测难度部署为添加新数据点的获取函数。困难程度在预测模型中被称为不确定性。我们提出了一种名为距离加权类杂质的不确定性估计方法，无需显式使用预测模型。我们使用位置周围的距离和类杂质来估计不确定性，并将其与基于主动学习任务的不确定性估计的预测模型的几种方法进行比较。我们验证了距离加权类别杂质无论预测模型如何都有效。 本文提出了一种无需显式预测模型的不确定性估计方法，名为距离加权类别不纯度，并验证其在主动学习任务中的有效性。 Bongjoon Park,Eunkyung Koh cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Lyu Zhijian,Jiang Shaohua,Liang Yigao,Gao Min
title: GDGRU-DTA: Predicting Drug-Target Binding Affinity Based on GNN and Double GRU
title_zh: GDGRU-DTA：基于GNN和双GRU预测药物靶点结合亲和力
abstract: The work for predicting drug and target affinity(DTA) is crucial for drug development and repurposing. In this work, we propose a novel method called GDGRU-DTA to predict the binding affinity between drugs and targets, which is based on GraphDTA, but we consider that protein sequences are long sequences, so simple CNN cannot capture the context dependencies in protein sequences well. Therefore, we improve it by interpreting the protein sequences as time series and extracting their features using Gate Recurrent Unit(GRU) and Bidirectional Gate Recurrent Unit(BiGRU). For the drug, our processing method is similar to that of GraphDTA, but uses two different graph convolution methods. Subsequently, the representation of drugs and proteins are concatenated for final prediction. We evaluate the proposed model on two benchmark datasets. Our model outperforms some state-of-the-art deep learning methods, and the results demonstrate the feasibility and excellent feature capture ability of our model.
summary: The work for predicting drug and target affinity(DTA) is crucial for drug development and repurposing. In this work, we propose a novel method called GDGRU-DTA to predict the binding affinity between drugs and targets, which is based on GraphDTA, but we consider that protein sequences are long sequences, so simple CNN cannot capture the context dependencies in protein sequences well. Therefore, we improve it by interpreting the protein sequences as time series and extracting their features using Gate Recurrent Unit(GRU) and Bidirectional Gate Recurrent Unit(BiGRU). For the drug, our processing method is similar to that of GraphDTA, but uses two different graph convolution methods. Subsequently, the representation of drugs and proteins are concatenated for final prediction. We evaluate the proposed model on two benchmark datasets. Our model outperforms some state-of-the-art deep learning methods, and the results demonstrate the feasibility and excellent feature capture ability of our model.
abstract_zh: 预测药物和靶标亲和力 (DTA) 的工作对于药物开发和重新利用至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为GDGRU-DTA的新方法来预测药物与靶标之间的结合亲和力，该方法基于GraphDTA，但我们认为蛋白质序列是长序列，因此简单的CNN无法很好地捕获蛋白质序列中的上下文依赖性。因此，我们通过将蛋白质序列解释为时间序列并使用门循环单元（GRU）和双向门循环单元（BiGRU）提取其特征来改进它。对于药物，我们的处理方法与GraphDTA类似，但使用了两种不同的图卷积方法。随后，将药物和蛋白质的表示连接起来以进行最终预测。我们在两个基准数据集上评估所提出的模型。我们的模型优于一些最先进的深度学习方法，结果证明了我们模型的可行性和出色的特征捕获能力。

AI.tldr: 提出GDGRU-DTA方法预测药物与靶点结合亲和力，结合图神经网络与双GRU模型
AI.motivation: 传统CNN难以有效捕捉蛋白质长序列的上下文依赖，需改进特征提取方法以提高DTA预测精度
AI.method: 将蛋白质序列作为时间序列，采用GRU和BiGRU提取特征；药物使用双图卷积方法，融合后输入全连接层预测结合亲和力
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，验证模型有效性和特征捕捉能力
AI.conclusion: 证明结合GNN与双GRU的模型在DTA预测中具有优越性，为药物开发提供新思路

authors_text: Dogan Altan,Mohammad Etemad,Dusica Marijan,Tetyana Kholodna
title: Discovering Gateway Ports in Maritime Using Temporal Graph Neural Network Port Classification
title_zh: 使用时态图神经网络端口分类发现海事网关端口
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, to appear in the proceedings of the 35th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures, to appear in the proceedings of the 35th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Vessel navigation is influenced by various factors, such as dynamic environmental factors that change over time or static features such as vessel type or depth of the ocean. These dynamic and static navigational factors impose limitations on vessels, such as long waiting times in regions outside the actual ports, and we call these waiting regions gateway ports. Identifying gateway ports and their associated features such as congestion and available utilities can enhance vessel navigation by planning on fuel optimization or saving time in cargo operation. In this paper, we propose a novel temporal graph neural network (TGNN) based port classification method to enable vessels to discover gateway ports efficiently, thus optimizing their operations. The proposed method processes vessel trajectory data to build dynamic graphs capturing spatio-temporal dependencies between a set of static and dynamic navigational features in the data, and it is evaluated in terms of port classification accuracy on a real-world data set collected from ten vessels operating in Halifax, NS, Canada. The experimental results indicate that our TGNN-based port classification method provides an f-score of 95% in classifying ports.
summary: Vessel navigation is influenced by various factors, such as dynamic environmental factors that change over time or static features such as vessel type or depth of the ocean. These dynamic and static navigational factors impose limitations on vessels, such as long waiting times in regions outside the actual ports, and we call these waiting regions gateway ports. Identifying gateway ports and their associated features such as congestion and available utilities can enhance vessel navigation by planning on fuel optimization or saving time in cargo operation. In this paper, we propose a novel temporal graph neural network (TGNN) based port classification method to enable vessels to discover gateway ports efficiently, thus optimizing their operations. The proposed method processes vessel trajectory data to build dynamic graphs capturing spatio-temporal dependencies between a set of static and dynamic navigational features in the data, and it is evaluated in terms of port classification accuracy on a real-world data set collected from ten vessels operating in Halifax, NS, Canada. The experimental results indicate that our TGNN-based port classification method provides an f-score of 95% in classifying ports.
abstract_zh: 船舶航行受到多种因素的影响，例如随时间变化的动态环境因素或船舶类型或海洋深度等静态特征。这些动态和静态的航行因素对船舶造成了限制，例如在实际港口以外的区域等待时间较长，我们将这些等待区域称为门户港。识别门户港口及其相关特征（例如拥堵和可用公用设施）可以通过规划燃料优化或节省货物操作时间来增强船舶导航。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于时间图神经网络（TGNN）的新型港口分类方法，使船舶能够有效地发现网关港口，从而优化其运营。所提出的方法处理船舶轨迹数据以构建动态图，捕获数据中一组静态和动态导航特征之间的时空依赖性，并根据从加拿大新斯科舍省哈利法克斯运营的十艘船舶收集的真实世界数据集的港口分类准确性进行评估。实验结果表明，我们基于 TGNN 的端口分类方法在端口分类方面提供了 95% 的 f 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时序图神经网络（TGNN）的港口分类方法，用于高效识别海上航行中的‘网关港口’。
AI.motivation: 船舶航行受动态环境因素和静态特征影响，导致在非实际港口区域长时间等待，识别这些‘网关港口’及其特征可优化燃料使用和货物操作时间。
AI.method: 通过处理船舶轨迹数据构建动态图，捕捉静态与动态导航特征间的时空依赖关系，利用TGNN进行港口分类。
AI.result: 在加拿大哈利法克斯实际船舶数据集上，该方法实现港口分类F值达95%。
AI.conclusion: TGNN方法能有效识别网关港口，为船舶运营优化提供支持。

authors_text: Ehsan Nowroozi,Yassine Mekdad,Mauro Conti,Simone Milani,Selcuk Uluagac,Berrin Yanikoglu
title: Real or Virtual: A Video Conferencing Background Manipulation-Detection System
title_zh: 真实还是虚拟：视频会议后台操纵检测系统
comment: 34 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.15130
comments: 34 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.15130
abstract: Recently, the popularity and wide use of the last-generation video conferencing technologies created an exponential growth in its market size. Such technology allows participants in different geographic regions to have a virtual face-to-face meeting. Additionally, it enables users to employ a virtual background to conceal their own environment due to privacy concerns or to reduce distractions, particularly in professional settings. Nevertheless, in scenarios where the users should not hide their actual locations, they may mislead other participants by claiming their virtual background as a real one. Therefore, it is crucial to develop tools and strategies to detect the authenticity of the considered virtual background. In this paper, we present a detection strategy to distinguish between real and virtual video conferencing user backgrounds. We demonstrate that our detector is robust against two attack scenarios. The first scenario considers the case where the detector is unaware about the attacks and inn the second scenario, we make the detector aware of the adversarial attacks, which we refer to Adversarial Multimedia Forensics (i.e, the forensically-edited frames are included in the training set). Given the lack of publicly available dataset of virtual and real backgrounds for video conferencing, we created our own dataset and made them publicly available [1]. Then, we demonstrate the robustness of our detector against different adversarial attacks that the adversary considers. Ultimately, our detector's performance is significant against the CRSPAM1372 [2] features, and post-processing operations such as geometric transformations with different quality factors that the attacker may choose. Moreover, our performance results shows that we can perfectly identify a real from a virtual background with an accuracy of 99.80%.
summary: Recently, the popularity and wide use of the last-generation video conferencing technologies created an exponential growth in its market size. Such technology allows participants in different geographic regions to have a virtual face-to-face meeting. Additionally, it enables users to employ a virtual background to conceal their own environment due to privacy concerns or to reduce distractions, particularly in professional settings. Nevertheless, in scenarios where the users should not hide their actual locations, they may mislead other participants by claiming their virtual background as a real one. Therefore, it is crucial to develop tools and strategies to detect the authenticity of the considered virtual background. In this paper, we present a detection strategy to distinguish between real and virtual video conferencing user backgrounds. We demonstrate that our detector is robust against two attack scenarios. The first scenario considers the case where the detector is unaware about the attacks and inn the second scenario, we make the detector aware of the adversarial attacks, which we refer to Adversarial Multimedia Forensics (i.e, the forensically-edited frames are included in the training set). Given the lack of publicly available dataset of virtual and real backgrounds for video conferencing, we created our own dataset and made them publicly available [1]. Then, we demonstrate the robustness of our detector against different adversarial attacks that the adversary considers. Ultimately, our detector's performance is significant against the CRSPAM1372 [2] features, and post-processing operations such as geometric transformations with different quality factors that the attacker may choose. Moreover, our performance results shows that we can perfectly identify a real from a virtual background with an accuracy of 99.80%.
abstract_zh: 近年来，最新一代视频会议技术的普及和广泛使用使其市场规模呈指数级增长。这种技术允许不同地理区域的参与者进行虚拟的面对面会议。此外，出于隐私考虑，它使用户能够使用虚拟背景来隐藏自己的环境或减少干扰，特别是在专业环境中。然而，在用户不应该隐藏其实际位置的情况下，他们可能会通过声称自己的虚拟背景是真实的背景来误导其他参与者。因此，开发工具和策略来检测所考虑的虚拟背景的真实性至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种区分真实和虚拟视频会议用户背景的检测策略。我们证明我们的检测器对于两种攻击场景具有鲁棒性。第一种情况考虑了检测器不知道攻击的情况，在第二种情况下，我们让检测器意识到对抗性攻击，我们将其称为对抗性多媒体取证（即，经过取证编辑的帧包含在训练集中）。鉴于缺乏视频会议虚拟和真实背景的公开数据集，我们创建了自己的数据集并将其公开[1]。然后，我们展示了检测器针对对手认为的不同对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。最终，我们的检测器的性能对于 CRSPAM1372 [2] 功能和后处理操作（例如攻击者可能选择的具有不同品质因数的几何变换）来说非常重要。此外，我们的性能结果表明，我们可以完美地从虚拟背景中识别真实物体，准确率达到 99.80%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种视频会议背景真实性检测系统，用于区分真实背景与虚拟背景。
AI.motivation: 随着视频会议技术的普及，用户可能通过虚拟背景隐藏真实环境，导致信息误导，亟需检测工具确保背景真实性。
AI.method: 构建自定义数据集并公开，设计鲁棒检测算法，针对两种攻击场景（未知攻击与对抗攻击）进行优化，结合CRSPAM1372特征与后处理操作增强检测能力。
AI.result: 检测系统在对抗攻击下仍保持高精度，准确率达99.80%，有效识别真实与虚拟背景。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的检测方法在视频会议背景真实性验证中表现优异，为虚拟背景安全应用提供可靠解决方案。

search_text: Real or Virtual: A Video Conferencing Background Manipulation-Detection System 真实还是虚拟：视频会议后台操纵检测系统 Recently, the popularity and wide use of the last-generation video conferencing technologies created an exponential growth in its market size. Such technology allows participants in different geographic regions to have a virtual face-to-face meeting. Additionally, it enables users to employ a virtual background to conceal their own environment due to privacy concerns or to reduce distractions, particularly in professional settings. Nevertheless, in scenarios where the users should not hide their actual locations, they may mislead other participants by claiming their virtual background as a real one. Therefore, it is crucial to develop tools and strategies to detect the authenticity of the considered virtual background. In this paper, we present a detection strategy to distinguish between real and virtual video conferencing user backgrounds. We demonstrate that our detector is robust against two attack scenarios. The first scenario considers the case where the detector is unaware about the attacks and inn the second scenario, we make the detector aware of the adversarial attacks, which we refer to Adversarial Multimedia Forensics (i.e, the forensically-edited frames are included in the training set). Given the lack of publicly available dataset of virtual and real backgrounds for video conferencing, we created our own dataset and made them publicly available [1]. Then, we demonstrate the robustness of our detector against different adversarial attacks that the adversary considers. Ultimately, our detector's performance is significant against the CRSPAM1372 [2] features, and post-processing operations such as geometric transformations with different quality factors that the attacker may choose.
