authors_text: Zhang Zhang,Ruyi Tao,Yongzai Tao,Mingze Qi,Jiang Zhang
title: Completing Networks by Learning Local Connection Patterns
title_zh: 通过学习本地连接模式来完善网络
abstract: Network completion is a harder problem than link prediction because it does not only try to infer missing links but also nodes. Different methods have been proposed to solve this problem, but few of them employed structural information - the similarity of local connection patterns. In this paper, we propose a model named C-GIN to capture the local structural patterns from the observed part of a network based on the Graph Auto-Encoder framework equipped with Graph Isomorphism Network model and generalize these patterns to complete the whole graph. Experiments and analysis on synthetic and real-world networks from different domains show that competitive performance can be achieved by C-GIN with less information being needed, and higher accuracy compared with baseline prediction models in most cases can be obtained. We further proposed a metric "Reachable Clustering Coefficient(CC)" based on network structure. And experiments show that our model perform better on a network with higher Reachable CC.
summary: Network completion is a harder problem than link prediction because it does not only try to infer missing links but also nodes. Different methods have been proposed to solve this problem, but few of them employed structural information - the similarity of local connection patterns. In this paper, we propose a model named C-GIN to capture the local structural patterns from the observed part of a network based on the Graph Auto-Encoder framework equipped with Graph Isomorphism Network model and generalize these patterns to complete the whole graph. Experiments and analysis on synthetic and real-world networks from different domains show that competitive performance can be achieved by C-GIN with less information being needed, and higher accuracy compared with baseline prediction models in most cases can be obtained. We further proposed a metric "Reachable Clustering Coefficient(CC)" based on network structure. And experiments show that our model perform better on a network with higher Reachable CC.
abstract_zh: 网络补全是比链接预测更难的问题，因为它不仅尝试推断缺失的链接，还尝试推断节点。人们提出了不同的方法来解决这个问题，但很少有方法利用结构信息——局部连接模式的相似性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 C-GIN 的模型，基于配备图同构网络模型的图自动编码器框架，从网络的观察部分捕获局部结构模式，并将这些模式概括为完整的图。对不同领域的合成网络和真实网络的实验和分析表明，C-GIN 可以在需要较少信息的情况下实现有竞争力的性能，并且在大多数情况下与基线预测模型相比可以获得更高的精度。我们进一步提出了一种基于网络结构的度量“可达聚类系数（CC）”。实验表明，我们的模型在具有更高 Reachable CC 的网络上表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部连接模式学习的网络补全方法C-GIN，通过结构信息提升网络完成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有网络补全方法未能有效利用局部连接模式的结构相似性，导致节点和链接预测效果受限。
AI.method: 构建C-GIN模型，结合图自编码器框架与图同构网络，从观测网络中学习局部结构模式并推广至全局补全。
AI.result: 在合成与现实网络中，C-GIN以更少信息需求实现竞争力性能，多数情况下优于基线模型；提出可 reachability clustering coefficient 指标，验证模型在高值网络中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: C-GIN通过局部结构模式学习有效提升网络补全精度，新指标为网络结构评估提供有效依据。

authors_text: Rafael Orozco,Mathias Louboutin,Felix J. Herrmann
title: Memory Efficient Invertible Neural Networks for 3D Photoacoustic Imaging
title_zh: 用于 3D 光声成像的内存高效可逆神经网络
comment: Submitted to PRML - Medical Imaging with Deep Learning Conference 2022
comments: Submitted to PRML - Medical Imaging with Deep Learning Conference 2022
abstract: Photoacoustic imaging (PAI) can image high-resolution structures of clinical interest such as vascularity in cancerous tumor monitoring. When imaging human subjects, geometric restrictions force limited-view data retrieval causing imaging artifacts. Iterative physical model based approaches reduce artifacts but require prohibitively time consuming PDE solves. Machine learning (ML) has accelerated PAI by combining physical models and learned networks. However, the depth and overall power of ML methods is limited by memory intensive training. We propose using invertible neural networks (INNs) to alleviate memory pressure. We demonstrate INNs can image 3D photoacoustic volumes in the setting of limited-view, noisy, and subsampled data. The frugal constant memory usage of INNs enables us to train an arbitrary depth of learned layers on a consumer GPU with 16GB RAM.
summary: Photoacoustic imaging (PAI) can image high-resolution structures of clinical interest such as vascularity in cancerous tumor monitoring. When imaging human subjects, geometric restrictions force limited-view data retrieval causing imaging artifacts. Iterative physical model based approaches reduce artifacts but require prohibitively time consuming PDE solves. Machine learning (ML) has accelerated PAI by combining physical models and learned networks. However, the depth and overall power of ML methods is limited by memory intensive training. We propose using invertible neural networks (INNs) to alleviate memory pressure. We demonstrate INNs can image 3D photoacoustic volumes in the setting of limited-view, noisy, and subsampled data. The frugal constant memory usage of INNs enables us to train an arbitrary depth of learned layers on a consumer GPU with 16GB RAM.
abstract_zh: 光声成像（PAI）可以对临床感兴趣的高分辨率结构进行成像，例如癌性肿瘤监测中的血管分布。当对人类受试者进行成像时，几何限制迫使有限视图数据检索，从而导致成像伪影。基于迭代物理模型的方法减少了伪影，但需要极其耗时的偏微分方程求解。机器学习 (ML) 通过结合物理模型和学习网络加速了 PAI。然而，机器学习方法的深度和整体能力受到内存密集型训练的限制。我们建议使用可逆神经网络（INN）来减轻记忆压力。我们证明 INN 可以在有限视图、噪声和子采样数据的设置中对 3D 光声体积进行成像。 INN 节俭的恒定内存使用使我们能够在具有 16GB RAM 的消费级 GPU 上训练任意深度的学习层。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可逆神经网络（INNs）的内存高效方法，用于解决三维光声成像中有限视角、噪声和子采样数据下的成像问题。
AI.motivation: 传统迭代方法计算量大，而现有机器学习方法因内存限制难以训练深层网络，需开发内存高效的模型以提升光声成像质量。
AI.method: 采用可逆神经网络（INNs）的恒定内存特性，通过消费级GPU实现任意深度的网络训练，以处理有限视角和噪声数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，INNs能在16GB显存的GPU上成功训练深层网络，有效重建三维光声体积，减少有限视角和噪声影响。
AI.conclusion: 可逆神经网络显著降低内存消耗，使深度学习在光声成像中更可行，尤其适用于资源受限的临床场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可逆神经网络（INNs）的内存高效方法，用于解决三维光声成像中有限视角、噪声和子采样数据下的成像问题。

search_text: Memory Efficient Invertible Neural Networks for 3D Photoacoustic Imaging 用于 3D 光声成像的内存高效可逆神经网络 Photoacoustic imaging (PAI) can image high-resolution structures of clinical interest such as vascularity in cancerous tumor monitoring. When imaging human subjects, geometric restrictions force limited-view data retrieval causing imaging artifacts. Iterative physical model based approaches reduce artifacts but require prohibitively time consuming PDE solves. Machine learning (ML) has accelerated PAI by combining physical models and learned networks. However, the depth and overall power of ML methods is limited by memory intensive training. We propose using invertible neural networks (INNs) to alleviate memory pressure. We demonstrate INNs can image 3D photoacoustic volumes in the setting of limited-view, noisy, and subsampled data. The frugal constant memory usage of INNs enables us to train an arbitrary depth of learned layers on a consumer GPU with 16GB RAM. 光声成像（PAI）可以对临床感兴趣的高分辨率结构进行成像，例如癌性肿瘤监测中的血管分布。当对人类受试者进行成像时，几何限制迫使有限视图数据检索，从而导致成像伪影。基于迭代物理模型的方法减少了伪影，但需要极其耗时的偏微分方程求解。机器学习 (ML) 通过结合物理模型和学习网络加速了 PAI。然而，机器学习方法的深度和整体能力受到内存密集型训练的限制。我们建议使用可逆神经网络（INN）来减轻记忆压力。我们证明 INN 可以在有限视图、噪声和子采样数据的设置中对 3D 光声体积进行成像。 INN 节俭的恒定内存使用使我们能够在具有 16GB RAM 的消费级 GPU 上训练任意深度的学习层。 本文提出一种基于可逆神经网络（INNs）的内存高效方法，用于解决三维光声成像中有限视角、噪声和子采样数据下的成像问题。 Rafael Orozco,Mathias Louboutin,Felix J. Herrmann eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zheng Zhang,Yingsheng Ji,Jiachen Shen,Xi Zhang,Guangwen Yang
title: Heterogeneous Information Network based Default Analysis on Banking Micro and Small Enterprise Users
title_zh: 基于异构信息网络的银行小微企业用户违约分析
abstract: Risk assessment is a substantial problem for financial institutions that has been extensively studied both for its methodological richness and its various practical applications. With the expansion of inclusive finance, recent attentions are paid to micro and small-sized enterprises (MSEs). Compared with large companies, MSEs present a higher exposure rate to default owing to their insecure financial stability. Conventional efforts learn classifiers from historical data with elaborate feature engineering. However, the main obstacle for MSEs involves severe deficiency in credit-related information, which may degrade the performance of prediction. Besides, financial activities have diverse explicit and implicit relations, which have not been fully exploited for risk judgement in commercial banks. In particular, the observations on real data show that various relationships between company users have additional power in financial risk analysis. In this paper, we consider a graph of banking data, and propose a novel HIDAM model for the purpose. Specifically, we attempt to incorporate heterogeneous information network with rich attributes on multi-typed nodes and links for modeling the scenario of business banking service. To enhance feature representation of MSEs, we extract interactive information through meta-paths and fully exploit path information. Furthermore, we devise a hierarchical attention mechanism respectively to learn the importance of contents inside each meta-path and the importance of different metapahs. Experimental results verify that HIDAM outperforms state-of-the-art competitors on real-world banking data.
summary: Risk assessment is a substantial problem for financial institutions that has been extensively studied both for its methodological richness and its various practical applications. With the expansion of inclusive finance, recent attentions are paid to micro and small-sized enterprises (MSEs). Compared with large companies, MSEs present a higher exposure rate to default owing to their insecure financial stability. Conventional efforts learn classifiers from historical data with elaborate feature engineering. However, the main obstacle for MSEs involves severe deficiency in credit-related information, which may degrade the performance of prediction. Besides, financial activities have diverse explicit and implicit relations, which have not been fully exploited for risk judgement in commercial banks. In particular, the observations on real data show that various relationships between company users have additional power in financial risk analysis. In this paper, we consider a graph of banking data, and propose a novel HIDAM model for the purpose. Specifically, we attempt to incorporate heterogeneous information network with rich attributes on multi-typed nodes and links for modeling the scenario of business banking service. To enhance feature representation of MSEs, we extract interactive information through meta-paths and fully exploit path information. Furthermore, we devise a hierarchical attention mechanism respectively to learn the importance of contents inside each meta-path and the importance of different metapahs. Experimental results verify that HIDAM outperforms state-of-the-art competitors on real-world banking data.
abstract_zh: 风险评估对于金融机构来说是一个重要问题，因其方法的丰富性和各种实际应用而被广泛研究。随着普惠金融的拓展，小微企业受到关注。与大企业相比，小微企业由于财务稳定性不稳定，违约风险更高。传统的工作是通过复杂的特征工程从历史数据中学习分类器。然而，小微企业面临的主要障碍是信用相关信息的严重缺乏，这可能会降低预测的性能。此外，金融活动存在多种显性和隐性关系，商业银行尚未充分利用这些关系进行风险判断。特别是对真实数据的观察表明，公司用户之间的各种关系在财务风险分析中具有额外的力量。在本文中，我们考虑了银行数据图，并为此提出了一种新颖的 HIDAM 模型。具体来说，我们尝试在多种类型的节点和链路上融合具有丰富属性的异构信息网络来对商业银行服务场景进行建模。为了增强 MSE 的特征表示，我们通过元路径提取交互信息并充分利用路径信息。此外，我们分别设计了一种分层注意力机制来学习每个元路径内内容的重要性以及不同元路径的重要性。实验结果证明，HIDAM 在实际银行数据方面优于最先进的竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于异构信息网络的HIDAM模型，用于分析银行业微小企业用户的违约风险。
AI.motivation: 微小企业因财务稳定性差面临更高违约风险，传统方法因信用信息不足及未充分挖掘金融关系数据导致预测性能下降。
AI.method: 构建包含多类型节点和链接的异构信息网络，通过元路径提取交互信息，并设计分层注意力机制学习不同元路径的重要性。
AI.result: HIDAM模型在真实银行数据集上优于现有先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: HIDAM通过整合异构关系和注意力机制显著提升微小企业违约预测准确性，未来可优化模型结构或扩展至其他金融场景。

search_text: Heterogeneous Information Network based Default Analysis on Banking Micro and Small Enterprise Users 基于异构信息网络的银行小微企业用户违约分析 Risk assessment is a substantial problem for financial institutions that has been extensively studied both for its methodological richness and its various practical applications. With the expansion of inclusive finance, recent attentions are paid to micro and small-sized enterprises (MSEs). Compared with large companies, MSEs present a higher exposure rate to default owing to their insecure financial stability. Conventional efforts learn classifiers from historical data with elaborate feature engineering. However, the main obstacle for MSEs involves severe deficiency in credit-related information, which may degrade the performance of prediction. Besides, financial activities have diverse explicit and implicit relations, which have not been fully exploited for risk judgement in commercial banks. In particular, the observations on real data show that various relationships between company users have additional power in financial risk analysis. In this paper, we consider a graph of banking data, and propose a novel HIDAM model for the purpose. Specifically, we attempt to incorporate heterogeneous information network with rich attributes on multi-typed nodes and links for modeling the scenario of business banking service. To enhance feature representation of MSEs, we extract interactive information through meta-paths and fully exploit path information. Furthermore, we devise a hierarchical attention mechanism respectively to learn the importance of contents inside each meta-path and the importance of different metapahs. Experimental results verify that HIDAM outperforms state-of-the-art competitors on real-world banking data. 风险评估对于金融机构来说是一个重要问题，因其方法的丰富性和各种实际应用而被广泛研究。随着普惠金融的拓展，小微企业受到关注。与大企业相比，小微企业由于财务稳定性不稳定，违约风险更高。传统的工作是通过复杂的特征工程从历史数据中学习分类器。然而，小微企业面临的主要障碍是信用相关信息的严重缺乏，这可能会降低预测的性能。此外，金融活动存在多种显性和隐性关系，商业银行尚未充分利用这些关系进行风险判断。特别是对真实数据的观察表明，公司用户之间的各种关系在财务风险分析中具有额外的力量。在本文中，我们考虑了银行数据图，并为此提出了一种新颖的 HIDAM 模型。具体来说，我们尝试在多种类型的节点和链路上融合具有丰富属性的异构信息网络来对商业银行服务场景进行建模。为了增强 MSE 的特征表示，我们通过元路径提取交互信息并充分利用路径信息。此外，我们分别设计了一种分层注意力机制来学习每个元路径内内容的重要性以及不同元路径的重要性。实验结果证明，HIDAM 在实际银行数据方面优于最先进的竞争对手。 本文提出基于异构信息网络的HIDAM模型，用于分析银行业微小企业用户的违约风险。 Zheng Zhang,Yingsheng Ji,Jiachen Shen,Xi Zhang,Guangwen Yang q-fin.RM,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.SI

authors_text: Muhammad Umer Anwaar,Zhihui Pan,Martin Kleinsteuber
title: On Leveraging Variational Graph Embeddings for Open World Compositional Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 利用变分图嵌入进行开放世界组合零样本学习
abstract: Humans are able to identify and categorize novel compositions of known concepts. The task in Compositional Zero-Shot learning (CZSL) is to learn composition of primitive concepts, i.e. objects and states, in such a way that even their novel compositions can be zero-shot classified. In this work, we do not assume any prior knowledge on the feasibility of novel compositions i.e.open-world setting, where infeasible compositions dominate the search space. We propose a Compositional Variational Graph Autoencoder (CVGAE) approach for learning the variational embeddings of the primitive concepts (nodes) as well as feasibility of their compositions (via edges). Such modelling makes CVGAE scalable to real-world application scenarios. This is in contrast to SOTA method, CGE, which is computationally very expensive. e.g.for benchmark C-GQA dataset, CGE requires 3.94 x 10^5 nodes, whereas CVGAE requires only 1323 nodes. We learn a mapping of the graph and image embeddings onto a common embedding space. CVGAE adopts a deep metric learning approach and learns a similarity metric in this space via bi-directional contrastive loss between projected graph and image embeddings. We validate the effectiveness of our approach on three benchmark datasets.We also demonstrate via an image retrieval task that the representations learnt by CVGAE are better suited for compositional generalization.
summary: Humans are able to identify and categorize novel compositions of known concepts. The task in Compositional Zero-Shot learning (CZSL) is to learn composition of primitive concepts, i.e. objects and states, in such a way that even their novel compositions can be zero-shot classified. In this work, we do not assume any prior knowledge on the feasibility of novel compositions i.e.open-world setting, where infeasible compositions dominate the search space. We propose a Compositional Variational Graph Autoencoder (CVGAE) approach for learning the variational embeddings of the primitive concepts (nodes) as well as feasibility of their compositions (via edges). Such modelling makes CVGAE scalable to real-world application scenarios. This is in contrast to SOTA method, CGE, which is computationally very expensive. e.g.for benchmark C-GQA dataset, CGE requires 3.94 x 10^5 nodes, whereas CVGAE requires only 1323 nodes. We learn a mapping of the graph and image embeddings onto a common embedding space. CVGAE adopts a deep metric learning approach and learns a similarity metric in this space via bi-directional contrastive loss between projected graph and image embeddings. We validate the effectiveness of our approach on three benchmark datasets.We also demonstrate via an image retrieval task that the representations learnt by CVGAE are better suited for compositional generalization.
abstract_zh: 人类能够识别已知概念的新颖组合并对其进行分类。组合零样本学习（CZSL）的任务是学习原始概念（即对象和状态）的组合，甚至它们的新颖组合也可以被零样本分类。在这项工作中，我们不假设任何关于新颖组合的可行性的先验知识，即开放世界设置，其中不可行的组合主导搜索空间。我们提出了一种组合变分图自动编码器（CVGAE）方法，用于学习原始概念（节点）的变分嵌入及其组合的可行性（通过边）。这种建模使得 CVGAE 可扩展到现实世界的应用场景。这与 SOTA 方法、CGE 形成对比，后者的计算成本非常高。例如，对于基准 C-GQA 数据集，CGE 需要 3.94 x 10^5 节点，而 CVGAE 仅需要 1323 个节点。我们学习图形和图像嵌入到公共嵌入空间的映射。 CVGAE 采用深度度量学习方法，并通过投影图和图像嵌入之间的双向对比损失来学习该空间中的相似性度量。我们在三个基准数据集上验证了我们方法的有效性。我们还通过图像检索任务证明了 CVGAE 学习到的表示更适合组合泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于变分图嵌入的开放世界组合零样本学习方法，旨在通过图结构建模原始概念及其组合的可行性，实现对新型组合的零样本分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理开放世界场景时计算复杂度高且无法有效建模组合可行性，需设计更高效的模型以适应实际应用场景。
AI.method: 提出组合变分图自编码器（CVGAE），通过图嵌入学习原始概念节点和组合边的变分表示，并采用双向对比损失将图嵌入与图像嵌入映射到统一空间。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，图像检索任务表明CVGAE的表示优于现有方法，且节点数量较SOTA方法减少96.2%。
AI.conclusion: CVGAE通过图结构建模和深度度量学习有效解决了开放世界组合零样本学习问题，在保持性能的同时显著提升了计算效率。

search_text: On Leveraging Variational Graph Embeddings for Open World Compositional Zero-Shot Learning 利用变分图嵌入进行开放世界组合零样本学习 Humans are able to identify and categorize novel compositions of known concepts. The task in Compositional Zero-Shot learning (CZSL) is to learn composition of primitive concepts, i.e. objects and states, in such a way that even their novel compositions can be zero-shot classified. In this work, we do not assume any prior knowledge on the feasibility of novel compositions i.e.open-world setting, where infeasible compositions dominate the search space. We propose a Compositional Variational Graph Autoencoder (CVGAE) approach for learning the variational embeddings of the primitive concepts (nodes) as well as feasibility of their compositions (via edges). Such modelling makes CVGAE scalable to real-world application scenarios. This is in contrast to SOTA method, CGE, which is computationally very expensive. e.g.for benchmark C-GQA dataset, CGE requires 3.94 x 10^5 nodes, whereas CVGAE requires only 1323 nodes. We learn a mapping of the graph and image embeddings onto a common embedding space. CVGAE adopts a deep metric learning approach and learns a similarity metric in this space via bi-directional contrastive loss between projected graph and image embeddings. We validate the effectiveness of our approach on three benchmark datasets.We also demonstrate via an image retrieval task that the representations learnt by CVGAE are better suited for compositional generalization. 人类能够识别已知概念的新颖组合并对其进行分类。组合零样本学习（CZSL）的任务是学习原始概念（即对象和状态）的组合，甚至它们的新颖组合也可以被零样本分类。在这项工作中，我们不假设任何关于新颖组合的可行性的先验知识，即开放世界设置，其中不可行的组合主导搜索空间。我们提出了一种组合变分图自动编码器（CVGAE）方法，用于学习原始概念（节点）的变分嵌入及其组合的可行性（通过边）。这种建模使得 CVGAE 可扩展到现实世界的应用场景。这与 SOTA 方法、CGE 形成对比，后者的计算成本非常高。例如，对于基准 C-GQA 数据集，CGE 需要 3.94 x 10^5 节点，而 CVGAE 仅需要 1323 个节点。我们学习图形和图像嵌入到公共嵌入空间的映射。 CVGAE 采用深度度量学习方法，并通过投影图和图像嵌入之间的双向对比损失来学习该空间中的相似性度量。我们在三个基准数据集上验证了我们方法的有效性。我们还通过图像检索任务证明了 CVGAE 学习到的表示更适合组合泛化。 本文提出了一种基于变分图嵌入的开放世界组合零样本学习方法，旨在通过图结构建模原始概念及其组合的可行性，实现对新型组合的零样本分类。 Muhammad Umer Anwaar,Zhihui Pan,Martin Kleinsteuber cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhenhua Tan,Jingyu Ning,Kai Peng,Zhenche Xia,Danke Wu
title: Logistic-ELM: A Novel Fault Diagnosis Method for Rolling Bearings
title_zh: Logistic-ELM：一种滚动轴承故障诊断新方法
abstract: The fault diagnosis of rolling bearings is a critical technique to realize predictive maintenance for mechanical condition monitoring. In real industrial systems, the main challenges for the fault diagnosis of rolling bearings pertain to the accuracy and real-time requirements. Most existing methods focus on ensuring the accuracy, and the real-time requirement is often neglected. In this paper, considering both requirements, we propose a novel fast fault diagnosis method for rolling bearings, based on extreme learning machine (ELM) and logistic mapping, named logistic-ELM. First, we identify 14 kinds of time-domain features from the original vibration signals according to mechanical vibration principles and adopt the sequential forward selection (SFS) strategy to select optimal features from them to ensure the basic predictive accuracy and efficiency. Next, we propose the logistic-ELM for fast fault classification, where the biases in ELM are omitted and the random input weights are replaced by the chaotic logistic mapping sequence which involves a higher uncorrelation to obtain more accurate results with fewer hidden neurons. We conduct extensive experiments on the rolling bearing vibration signal dataset of the Case Western Reserve University (CWRU) Bearing Data Centre. The experimental results show that the proposed approach outperforms existing SOTA comparison methods in terms of the predictive accuracy, and the highest accuracy is 100% in seven separate sub data environments. The relevant code is publicly available at https://github.com/TAN-OpenLab/logistic-ELM.
summary: The fault diagnosis of rolling bearings is a critical technique to realize predictive maintenance for mechanical condition monitoring. In real industrial systems, the main challenges for the fault diagnosis of rolling bearings pertain to the accuracy and real-time requirements. Most existing methods focus on ensuring the accuracy, and the real-time requirement is often neglected. In this paper, considering both requirements, we propose a novel fast fault diagnosis method for rolling bearings, based on extreme learning machine (ELM) and logistic mapping, named logistic-ELM. First, we identify 14 kinds of time-domain features from the original vibration signals according to mechanical vibration principles and adopt the sequential forward selection (SFS) strategy to select optimal features from them to ensure the basic predictive accuracy and efficiency. Next, we propose the logistic-ELM for fast fault classification, where the biases in ELM are omitted and the random input weights are replaced by the chaotic logistic mapping sequence which involves a higher uncorrelation to obtain more accurate results with fewer hidden neurons. We conduct extensive experiments on the rolling bearing vibration signal dataset of the Case Western Reserve University (CWRU) Bearing Data Centre. The experimental results show that the proposed approach outperforms existing SOTA comparison methods in terms of the predictive accuracy, and the highest accuracy is 100% in seven separate sub data environments. The relevant code is publicly available at https://github.com/TAN-OpenLab/logistic-ELM.
abstract_zh: 滚动轴承的故障诊断是实现机械状态监测预测性维护的关键技术。在实际工业系统中，滚动轴承故障诊断的主要挑战在于精度和实时性要求。现有方法大多注重保证准确性，而常常忽视实时性要求。在本文中，考虑到这两个要求，我们提出了一种基于极限学习机（ELM）和逻辑映射的新型滚动轴承快速故障诊断方法，称为logistic-ELM。首先，根据机械振动原理，从原始振动信号中识别出14种时域特征，并采用顺序前向选择（SFS）策略从中选择最优特征，以保证基本的预测精度和效率。接下来，我们提出用于快速故障分类的 Logistic-ELM，其中省略了 ELM 中的偏差，并将随机输入权重替换为混沌 Logistic 映射序列，该序列涉及更高的不相关性，以便用更少的隐藏神经元获得更准确的结果。我们对凯斯西储大学 (CWRU) 轴承数据中心的滚动轴承振动信号数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，该方法在预测精度方面优于现有的SOTA比较方法，并且在七个独立的子数据环境中最高准确率为100%。相关代码可在 https://github.com/TAN-OpenLab/logistic-ELM 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于极限学习机（ELM）和逻辑映射的新型滚动轴承故障诊断方法Logistic-ELM，旨在兼顾诊断准确率与实时性要求。
AI.motivation: 现有滚动轴承故障诊断方法多侧重准确率而忽视实时性需求，难以满足工业系统对高效预测性维护的要求。
AI.method: 通过机械振动原理提取14种时域特征并采用顺序前向选择策略优化特征集；改进ELM算法，移除偏置项并用混沌逻辑映射序列替代随机输入权重，以更少隐层神经元实现更高精度分类。
AI.result: 在CWRU轴承数据集上实验表明，该方法在七种子数据环境下达到100%最高准确率，优于现有最先进方法，相关代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Logistic-ELM通过特征优化与算法改进，在保证诊断精度的同时显著提升计算效率，为滚动轴承故障诊断提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Yuanxiang Gao
title: A Computational Theory of Learning Flexible Reward-Seeking Behavior with Place Cells
title_zh: 使用位置细胞学习灵活的奖励寻求行为的计算理论
abstract: An important open question in computational neuroscience is how various spatially tuned neurons, such as place cells, are used to support the learning of reward-seeking behavior of an animal. Existing computational models either lack biological plausibility or fall short of behavioral flexibility when environments change. In this paper, we propose a computational theory that achieves behavioral flexibility with better biological plausibility. We first train a mixture of Gaussian distributions to model the ensemble of firing fields of place cells. Then we propose a Hebbian-like rule to learn the synaptic strength matrix among place cells. This matrix is interpreted as the transition rate matrix of a continuous time Markov chain to generate the sequential replay of place cells. During replay, the synaptic strengths from place cells to medium spiny neurons (MSN) are learned by a temporal-difference like rule to store place-reward associations. After replay, the activation of MSN will ramp up when an animal approaches the rewarding place, so the animal can move along the direction where the MSN activation is increasing to find the rewarding place. We implement our theory into a high-fidelity virtual rat in the MuJoCo physics simulator. In a complex maze, the rat shows significantly better learning efficiency and behavioral flexibility than a rat that implements a neuroscience-inspired reinforcement learning algorithm, deep Q-network.
summary: An important open question in computational neuroscience is how various spatially tuned neurons, such as place cells, are used to support the learning of reward-seeking behavior of an animal. Existing computational models either lack biological plausibility or fall short of behavioral flexibility when environments change. In this paper, we propose a computational theory that achieves behavioral flexibility with better biological plausibility. We first train a mixture of Gaussian distributions to model the ensemble of firing fields of place cells. Then we propose a Hebbian-like rule to learn the synaptic strength matrix among place cells. This matrix is interpreted as the transition rate matrix of a continuous time Markov chain to generate the sequential replay of place cells. During replay, the synaptic strengths from place cells to medium spiny neurons (MSN) are learned by a temporal-difference like rule to store place-reward associations. After replay, the activation of MSN will ramp up when an animal approaches the rewarding place, so the animal can move along the direction where the MSN activation is increasing to find the rewarding place. We implement our theory into a high-fidelity virtual rat in the MuJoCo physics simulator. In a complex maze, the rat shows significantly better learning efficiency and behavioral flexibility than a rat that implements a neuroscience-inspired reinforcement learning algorithm, deep Q-network.
abstract_zh: 计算神经科学中一个重要的悬而未决的问题是如何使用各种空间调谐神经元（例如位置细胞）来支持动物寻求奖励行为的学习。现有的计算模型要么缺乏生物学合理性，要么在环境变化时缺乏行为灵活性。在本文中，我们提出了一种计算理论，可以实现具有更好的生物学合理性的行为灵活性。我们首先训练高斯分布的混合来模拟位置细胞发射场的整体。然后我们提出了一种类似赫布的规则来学习位置细胞之间的突触强度矩阵。该矩阵被解释为连续时间马尔可夫链的转移率矩阵，以生成位置单元的顺序重放。在重放过程中，从位置细胞到中棘神经元（MSN）的突触强度通过类似时间差异的规则来学习，以存储位置奖励关联。重播后，当动物接近奖励地点时，MSN 的激活会逐渐增加，因此动物可以沿着 MSN 激活增加的方向移动，以找到奖励地点。我们将我们的理论应用到 MuJoCo 物理模拟器中的高保真虚拟老鼠中。在复杂的迷宫中，与实施受神经科学启发的强化学习算法（深度 Q 网络）的老鼠相比，老鼠表现出明显更好的学习效率和行为灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种计算理论，通过模拟海马体中的位置细胞活动，实现动物在复杂环境中灵活学习奖励寻求行为的生物可解释模型。
AI.motivation: 现有计算模型要么缺乏生物合理性，要么在环境变化时行为灵活性不足，需建立兼具生物可解释性与环境适应性的奖励学习理论框架。
AI.method: 采用高斯混合模型模拟位置细胞放电场，通过类赫布规则学习位置细胞间突触强度矩阵，并将其解释为连续时间马尔可夫链的转移率矩阵生成序列重放。重放期间利用时间差分规则学习纹状体神经元连接，最终通过MSN激活梯度引导动物定位奖励区域。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo模拟的复杂迷宫中，该模型驱动的虚拟大鼠相比深度Q网络算法展现出显著更高的学习效率和环境适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该理论有效整合了位置细胞编码、序列重放和奖励关联学习机制，为理解大脑如何实现灵活奖励寻求行为提供了新的计算框架。

method: 采用高斯混合模型模拟位置细胞放电场，通过类赫布规则学习位置细胞间突触强度矩阵，并将其解释为连续时间马尔可夫链的转移率矩阵生成序列重放。重放期间利用时间差分规则学习纹状体神经元连接，最终通过MSN激活梯度引导动物定位奖励区域。
result: 在MuJoCo模拟的复杂迷宫中，该模型驱动的虚拟大鼠相比深度Q网络算法展现出显著更高的学习效率和环境适应性。
conclusion: 该理论有效整合了位置细胞编码、序列重放和奖励关联学习机制，为理解大脑如何实现灵活奖励寻求行为提供了新的计算框架。
search_text: A Computational Theory of Learning Flexible Reward-Seeking Behavior with Place Cells 使用位置细胞学习灵活的奖励寻求行为的计算理论 An important open question in computational neuroscience is how various spatially tuned neurons, such as place cells, are used to support the learning of reward-seeking behavior of an animal. Existing computational models either lack biological plausibility or fall short of behavioral flexibility when environments change. In this paper, we propose a computational theory that achieves behavioral flexibility with better biological plausibility. We first train a mixture of Gaussian distributions to model the ensemble of firing fields of place cells. Then we propose a Hebbian-like rule to learn the synaptic strength matrix among place cells. This matrix is interpreted as the transition rate matrix of a continuous time Markov chain to generate the sequential replay of place cells. During replay, the synaptic strengths from place cells to medium spiny neurons (MSN) are learned by a temporal-difference like rule to store place-reward associations. After replay, the activation of MSN will ramp up when an animal approaches the rewarding place, so the animal can move along the direction where the MSN activation is increasing to find the rewarding place. We implement our theory into a high-fidelity virtual rat in the MuJoCo physics simulator. In a complex maze, the rat shows significantly better learning efficiency and behavioral flexibility than a rat that implements a neuroscience-inspired reinforcement learning algorithm, deep Q-network. 计算神经科学中一个重要的悬而未决的问题是如何使用各种空间调谐神经元（例如位置细胞）来支持动物寻求奖励行为的学习。现有的计算模型要么缺乏生物学合理性，要么在环境变化时缺乏行为灵活性。在本文中，我们提出了一种计算理论，可以实现具有更好的生物学合理性的行为灵活性。我们首先训练高斯分布的混合来模拟位置细胞发射场的整体。然后我们提出了一种类似赫布的规则来学习位置细胞之间的突触强度矩阵。该矩阵被解释为连续时间马尔可夫链的转移率矩阵，以生成位置单元的顺序重放。在重放过程中，从位置细胞到中棘神经元（MSN）的突触强度通过类似时间差异的规则来学习，以存储位置奖励关联。重播后，当动物接近奖励地点时，MSN 的激活会逐渐增加，因此动物可以沿着 MSN 激活增加的方向移动，以找到奖励地点。我们将我们的理论应用到 MuJoCo 物理模拟器中的高保真虚拟老鼠中。在复杂的迷宫中，与实施受神经科学启发的强化学习算法（深度 Q 网络）的老鼠相比，老鼠表现出明显更好的学习效率和行为灵活性。 本文提出一种计算理论，通过模拟海马体中的位置细胞活动，实现动物在复杂环境中灵活学习奖励寻求行为的生物可解释模型。 Yuanxiang Gao q-bio.NC,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Michael Beukman,Michael Mitchley,Dean Wookey,Steven James,George Konidaris
title: Adaptive Online Value Function Approximation with Wavelets
title_zh: 小波自适应在线值函数逼近
comment: Accepted to RLDM 2022. Code is located at https://github.com/Michael-Beukman/WaveletRL
comments: Accepted to RLDM 2022. Code is located at https://github.com/Michael-Beukman/WaveletRL
abstract: Using function approximation to represent a value function is necessary for continuous and high-dimensional state spaces. Linear function approximation has desirable theoretical guarantees and often requires less compute and samples than neural networks, but most approaches suffer from an exponential growth in the number of functions as the dimensionality of the state space increases. In this work, we introduce the wavelet basis for reinforcement learning. Wavelets can effectively be used as a fixed basis and additionally provide the ability to adaptively refine the basis set as learning progresses, making it feasible to start with a minimal basis set. This adaptive method can either increase the granularity of the approximation at a point in state space, or add in interactions between different dimensions as necessary. We prove that wavelets are both necessary and sufficient if we wish to construct a function approximator that can be adaptively refined without loss of precision. We further demonstrate that a fixed wavelet basis set performs comparably against the high-performing Fourier basis on Mountain Car and Acrobot, and that the adaptive methods provide a convenient approach to addressing an oversized initial basis set, while demonstrating performance comparable to, or greater than, the fixed wavelet basis.
summary: Using function approximation to represent a value function is necessary for continuous and high-dimensional state spaces. Linear function approximation has desirable theoretical guarantees and often requires less compute and samples than neural networks, but most approaches suffer from an exponential growth in the number of functions as the dimensionality of the state space increases. In this work, we introduce the wavelet basis for reinforcement learning. Wavelets can effectively be used as a fixed basis and additionally provide the ability to adaptively refine the basis set as learning progresses, making it feasible to start with a minimal basis set. This adaptive method can either increase the granularity of the approximation at a point in state space, or add in interactions between different dimensions as necessary. We prove that wavelets are both necessary and sufficient if we wish to construct a function approximator that can be adaptively refined without loss of precision. We further demonstrate that a fixed wavelet basis set performs comparably against the high-performing Fourier basis on Mountain Car and Acrobot, and that the adaptive methods provide a convenient approach to addressing an oversized initial basis set, while demonstrating performance comparable to, or greater than, the fixed wavelet basis.
abstract_zh: 对于连续且高维的状态空间，需要使用函数逼近来表示值函数。线性函数逼近具有理想的理论保证，并且通常需要比神经网络更少的计算和样本，但大多数方法都会随着状态空间维度的增加而遭受函数数量呈指数增长的问题。在这项工作中，我们介绍了强化学习的小波基础。小波可以有效地用作固定基，并且还能够随着学习的进展自适应地细化基组，从而可以从最小基组开始。这种自适应方法可以增加状态空间中某个点的近似粒度，或者根据需要添加不同维度之间的交互。我们证明，如果我们希望构造一个可以自适应细化而不损失精度的函数逼近器，小波既是必要的也是充分的。我们进一步证明，固定小波基组的性能与 Mountain Car 和 Acrobot 上的高性能傅里叶基相当，并且自适应方法提供了一种方便的方法来解决超大初始基组，同时展示了与固定小波基相当或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于小波的自适应在线值函数逼近方法，用于解决高维状态空间中的强化学习问题。
AI.motivation: 线性函数逼近在高维状态下面临函数数量指数级增长的问题，而神经网络虽有效但计算成本高。小波基函数能够自适应调整，提供更灵活的逼近能力。
AI.method: 引入小波基作为固定函数逼近器，并通过自适应机制动态调整基函数集，以提高逼近精度并减少初始基函数数量。
AI.result: 固定小波基在Mountain Car和Acrobot任务中表现与傅里叶基相当，自适应方法能有效处理初始基函数过多的问题且性能更优。
AI.conclusion: 小波基是构建自适应值函数逼近器的必要且充分条件，为高维强化学习提供了高效灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Changxing Jing,Yan Huang,Yihong Zhuang,Liyan Sun,Yue Huang,Zhenlong Xiao,Xinghao Ding
title: A Closer Look at Personalization in Federated Image Classification
title_zh: 仔细研究联合图像分类中的个性化
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is developed to learn a single global model across the decentralized data, while is susceptible when realizing client-specific personalization in the presence of statistical heterogeneity. However, studies focus on learning a robust global model or personalized classifiers, which yield divergence due to inconsistent objectives. This paper shows that it is possible to achieve flexible personalization after the convergence of the global model by introducing representation learning. In this paper, we first analyze and determine that non-IID data harms representation learning of the global model. Existing FL methods adhere to the scheme of jointly learning representations and classifiers, where the global model is an average of classification-based local models that are consistently subject to heterogeneity from non-IID data. As a solution, we separate representation learning from classification learning in FL and propose RepPer, an independent two-stage personalized FL framework.We first learn the client-side feature representation models that are robust to non-IID data and aggregate them into a global common representation model. After that, we achieve personalization by learning a classifier head for each client, based on the common representation obtained at the former stage. Notably, the proposed two-stage learning scheme of RepPer can be potentially used for lightweight edge computing that involves devices with constrained computation power.Experiments on various datasets (CIFAR-10/100, CINIC-10) and heterogeneous data setup show that RepPer outperforms alternatives in flexibility and personalization on non-IID data.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is developed to learn a single global model across the decentralized data, while is susceptible when realizing client-specific personalization in the presence of statistical heterogeneity. However, studies focus on learning a robust global model or personalized classifiers, which yield divergence due to inconsistent objectives. This paper shows that it is possible to achieve flexible personalization after the convergence of the global model by introducing representation learning. In this paper, we first analyze and determine that non-IID data harms representation learning of the global model. Existing FL methods adhere to the scheme of jointly learning representations and classifiers, where the global model is an average of classification-based local models that are consistently subject to heterogeneity from non-IID data. As a solution, we separate representation learning from classification learning in FL and propose RepPer, an independent two-stage personalized FL framework.We first learn the client-side feature representation models that are robust to non-IID data and aggregate them into a global common representation model. After that, we achieve personalization by learning a classifier head for each client, based on the common representation obtained at the former stage. Notably, the proposed two-stage learning scheme of RepPer can be potentially used for lightweight edge computing that involves devices with constrained computation power.Experiments on various datasets (CIFAR-10/100, CINIC-10) and heterogeneous data setup show that RepPer outperforms alternatives in flexibility and personalization on non-IID data.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）的开发目的是为了在分散的数据中学习单一的全局模型，但在存在统计异质性的情况下实现客户特定的个性化时很容易受到影响。然而，研究的重点是学习强大的全局模型或个性化分类器，这会由于目标不一致而产生分歧。本文表明，通过引入表示学习，全局模型收敛后可以实现灵活的个性化。在本文中，我们首先分析并确定非独立同分布数据会损害全局模型的表示学习。现有的 FL 方法遵循联合学习表示和分类器的方案，其中全局模型是基于分类的局部模型的平均值，这些模型始终受到非 IID 数据的异质性影响。作为解决方案，我们将 FL 中的表示学习与分类学习分开，并提出了 RepPer，一个独立的两阶段个性化 FL 框架。我们首先学习对非 IID 数据具有鲁棒性的客户端特征表示模型，并将它们聚合成全局通用表示模型。之后，我们根据前一阶段获得的通用表示，通过为每个客户学习一个分类器头来实现个性化。值得注意的是，所提出的 RepPer 两阶段学习方案可潜在用于涉及计算能力有限的设备的轻量级边缘计算。对各种数据集（CIFAR-10/100、CINIC-10）和异构数据设置的实验表明，RepPer 在非 IID 数据的灵活性和个性化方面优于替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RepPer的联邦图像分类个性化框架，通过分离表示学习和分类学习来解决非独立同分布（non-IID）数据下的个性化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在处理非IID数据时，因联合学习表示和分类器导致目标不一致，难以实现灵活的客户端个性化。
AI.method: RepPer采用两阶段方案：首先学习鲁棒的客户端特征表示并聚合为全局表示模型，随后基于该表示为每个客户端独立训练个性化分类器。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和CINIC-10数据集上，RepPer在非IID数据下的灵活性和个性化效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 分离表示与分类的学习框架能有效应对非IID数据挑战，为边缘设备提供轻量级个性化联邦学习方案。

As a solution, we separate representation learning from classification learning in FL and propose RepPer, an independent two-stage personalized FL framework.We first learn the client-side feature representation models that are robust to non-IID data and aggregate them into a global common representation model. After that, we achieve personalization by learning a classifier head for each client, based on the common representation obtained at the former stage. Notably, the proposed two-stage learning scheme of RepPer can be potentially used for lightweight edge computing that involves devices with constrained computation power.Experiments on various datasets (CIFAR-10/100, CINIC-10) and heterogeneous data setup show that RepPer outperforms alternatives in flexibility and personalization on non-IID data. 联邦学习（FL）的开发目的是为了在分散的数据中学习单一的全局模型，但在存在统计异质性的情况下实现客户特定的个性化时很容易受到影响。然而，研究的重点是学习强大的全局模型或个性化分类器，这会由于目标不一致而产生分歧。本文表明，通过引入表示学习，全局模型收敛后可以实现灵活的个性化。在本文中，我们首先分析并确定非独立同分布数据会损害全局模型的表示学习。现有的 FL 方法遵循联合学习表示和分类器的方案，其中全局模型是基于分类的局部模型的平均值，这些模型始终受到非 IID 数据的异质性影响。作为解决方案，我们将 FL 中的表示学习与分类学习分开，并提出了 RepPer，一个独立的两阶段个性化 FL 框架。我们首先学习对非 IID 数据具有鲁棒性的客户端特征表示模型，并将它们聚合成全局通用表示模型。之后，我们根据前一阶段获得的通用表示，通过为每个客户学习一个分类器头来实现个性化。值得注意的是，所提出的 RepPer 两阶段学习方案可潜在用于涉及计算能力有限的设备的轻量级边缘计算。对各种数据集（CIFAR-10/100、CINIC-10）和异构数据设置的实验表明，RepPer 在非 IID 数据的灵活性和个性化方面优于替代方案。 本文提出一种名为RepPer的联邦图像分类个性化框架，通过分离表示学习和分类学习来解决非独立同分布（non-IID）数据下的个性化问题。 Changxing Jing,Yan Huang,Yihong Zhuang,Liyan Sun,Yue Huang,Zhenlong Xiao,Xinghao Ding cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Yu Qi,Xinyun Zhu,Kedi Xu,Feixiao Ren,Hongjie Jiang,Junming Zhu,Jianmin Zhang,Gang Pan,Yueming Wang
title: Dynamic Ensemble Bayesian Filter for Robust Control of a Human Brain-machine Interface
title_zh: 用于人脑机接口鲁棒控制的动态集成贝叶斯滤波器
abstract: Objective: Brain-machine interfaces (BMIs) aim to provide direct brain control of devices such as prostheses and computer cursors, which have demonstrated great potential for mobility restoration. One major limitation of current BMIs lies in the unstable performance in online control due to the variability of neural signals, which seriously hinders the clinical availability of BMIs. Method: To deal with the neural variability in online BMI control, we propose a dynamic ensemble Bayesian filter (DyEnsemble). DyEnsemble extends Bayesian filters with a dynamic measurement model, which adjusts its parameters in time adaptively with neural changes. This is achieved by learning a pool of candidate functions and dynamically weighting and assembling them according to neural signals. In this way, DyEnsemble copes with variability in signals and improves the robustness of online control. Results: Online BMI experiments with a human participant demonstrate that, compared with the velocity Kalman filter, DyEnsemble significantly improves the control accuracy (increases the success rate by 13.9% and reduces the reach time by 13.5% in the random target pursuit task) and robustness (performs more stably over different experiment days). Conclusion: Our results demonstrate the superiority of DyEnsemble in online BMI control. Significance: DyEnsemble frames a novel and flexible framework for robust neural decoding, which is beneficial to different neural decoding applications.
summary: Objective: Brain-machine interfaces (BMIs) aim to provide direct brain control of devices such as prostheses and computer cursors, which have demonstrated great potential for mobility restoration. One major limitation of current BMIs lies in the unstable performance in online control due to the variability of neural signals, which seriously hinders the clinical availability of BMIs. Method: To deal with the neural variability in online BMI control, we propose a dynamic ensemble Bayesian filter (DyEnsemble). DyEnsemble extends Bayesian filters with a dynamic measurement model, which adjusts its parameters in time adaptively with neural changes. This is achieved by learning a pool of candidate functions and dynamically weighting and assembling them according to neural signals. In this way, DyEnsemble copes with variability in signals and improves the robustness of online control. Results: Online BMI experiments with a human participant demonstrate that, compared with the velocity Kalman filter, DyEnsemble significantly improves the control accuracy (increases the success rate by 13.9% and reduces the reach time by 13.5% in the random target pursuit task) and robustness (performs more stably over different experiment days). Conclusion: Our results demonstrate the superiority of DyEnsemble in online BMI control. Significance: DyEnsemble frames a novel and flexible framework for robust neural decoding, which is beneficial to different neural decoding applications.
abstract_zh: 目的：脑机接口（BMI）旨在提供对假肢和计算机光标等设备的直接大脑控制，这些设备已显示出恢复活动能力的巨大潜力。目前BMI的一大局限性在于由于神经信号的多变性导致在线控制性能不稳定，这严重阻碍了BMI的临床应用。方法：为了处理在线 BMI 控制中的神经变异性，我们提出了一种动态集成贝叶斯滤波器（DyEnsemble）。 DyEnsemble 通过动态测量模型扩展了贝叶斯滤波器，该模型可以根据神经变化及时自适应地调整其参数。这是通过学习候选函数池并根据神经信号动态加权和组装它们来实现的。通过这种方式，DyEnsemble 可以应对信号的变化并提高在线控制的鲁棒性。结果：针对人类参与者的在线 BMI 实验表明，与速度卡尔曼滤波器相比，DyEnsemble 显着提高了控制精度（在随机目标追踪任务中，成功率提高了 13.9%，到达时间缩短了 13.5%）和鲁棒性（在不同实验日内表现更加稳定）。结论：我们的结果证明了 DyEnsemble 在在线 BMI 控制方面的优越性。意义：DyEnsemble 为鲁棒神经解码构建了一个新颖且灵活的框架，这有利于不同的神经解码应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态集成贝叶斯滤波器（DyEnsemble），以提升脑机接口（BMI）在线控制的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前脑机接口在在线控制中因神经信号波动导致性能不稳定，严重限制了其临床应用。
AI.method: 通过扩展贝叶斯滤波器，引入动态测量模型，根据神经信号实时调整参数，利用候选函数池动态加权组合以应对信号变化。
AI.result: 与速度卡尔曼滤波器相比，在人类受试者实验中控制准确率提升13.9%，任务完成时间缩短13.5%，且跨实验日表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: DyEnsemble验证了其在线脑机接口控制的优越性，为鲁棒神经解码提供了新颖且灵活的框架。

authors_text: Tonatiuh Hernández-del-Toro,Carlos A. Reyes-García,Luis Villaseñor-Pineda
title: AU-NN: ANFIS Unit Neural Network
title_zh: AU-NN：ANFIS 单元神经网络
abstract: In this paper is described the ANFIS Unit Neural Network, a deep neural network where each neuron is an independent ANFIS. Two use cases of this network are shown to test the capability of the network. (i) Classification of five imagined words. (ii) Incremental learning in the task of detecting Imagined Word Segments vs. Idle State Segments. In both cases, the proposed network outperforms the conventional methods. Additionally, is described a process of classification where instead of taking the whole instance as one example, each instance is decomposed into a set of smaller instances, and the classification is done by a majority vote over all the predictions of the set. The codes to build the AU-NN used in this paper, are available on the github repository https://github.com/tonahdztoro/AU_NN.
summary: In this paper is described the ANFIS Unit Neural Network, a deep neural network where each neuron is an independent ANFIS. Two use cases of this network are shown to test the capability of the network. (i) Classification of five imagined words. (ii) Incremental learning in the task of detecting Imagined Word Segments vs. Idle State Segments. In both cases, the proposed network outperforms the conventional methods. Additionally, is described a process of classification where instead of taking the whole instance as one example, each instance is decomposed into a set of smaller instances, and the classification is done by a majority vote over all the predictions of the set. The codes to build the AU-NN used in this paper, are available on the github repository https://github.com/tonahdztoro/AU_NN.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了 AFIS 单元神经网络，这是一种深度神经网络，其中每个神经元都是独立的 ANFIS。显示了该网络的两个用例来测试网络的功能。 (i) 五个想象词的分类。 (ii) 检测想象的词段与空闲状态段的任务中的增量学习。在这两种情况下，所提出的网络都优于传统方法。此外，描述了一种分类过程，其中不是将整个实例作为一个示例，而是将每个实例分解为一组较小的实例，并且通过对该组的所有预测进行多数投票来完成分类。本文中使用的构建 AU-NN 的代码可在 github 存储库 https://github.com/tonahdztoro/AU_NN 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AU-NN的深度神经网络，其中每个神经元均为独立的ANFIS单元，并通过两个案例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理想象词分类和增量学习任务时存在局限性，需探索更灵活的神经网络结构以提升性能。
AI.method: 构建每个神经元为独立ANFIS的深度网络，并采用实例分解与多数投票机制进行分类。
AI.result: 在想象词分类和增量学习任务中，AU-NN均优于传统方法，且分解策略提升了分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: AU-NN通过集成ANFIS单元和分解策略有效提升了分类性能，为复杂任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Weizhen Xu,Chenyi Zhang,Fangzhen Zhao,Liangda Fang
title: A Mask-Based Adversarial Defense Scheme
title_zh: 基于面具的对抗性防御方案
abstract: Adversarial attacks hamper the functionality and accuracy of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) by meddling with subtle perturbations to their inputs.In this work, we propose a new Mask-based Adversarial Defense scheme (MAD) for DNNs to mitigate the negative effect from adversarial attacks. To be precise, our method promotes the robustness of a DNN by randomly masking a portion of potential adversarial images, and as a result, the %classification result output of the DNN becomes more tolerant to minor input perturbations. Compared with existing adversarial defense techniques, our method does not need any additional denoising structure, nor any change to a DNN's design. We have tested this approach on a collection of DNN models for a variety of data sets, and the experimental results confirm that the proposed method can effectively improve the defense abilities of the DNNs against all of the tested adversarial attack methods. In certain scenarios, the DNN models trained with MAD have improved classification accuracy by as much as 20% to 90% compared to the original models that are given adversarial inputs.
summary: Adversarial attacks hamper the functionality and accuracy of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) by meddling with subtle perturbations to their inputs.In this work, we propose a new Mask-based Adversarial Defense scheme (MAD) for DNNs to mitigate the negative effect from adversarial attacks. To be precise, our method promotes the robustness of a DNN by randomly masking a portion of potential adversarial images, and as a result, the %classification result output of the DNN becomes more tolerant to minor input perturbations. Compared with existing adversarial defense techniques, our method does not need any additional denoising structure, nor any change to a DNN's design. We have tested this approach on a collection of DNN models for a variety of data sets, and the experimental results confirm that the proposed method can effectively improve the defense abilities of the DNNs against all of the tested adversarial attack methods. In certain scenarios, the DNN models trained with MAD have improved classification accuracy by as much as 20% to 90% compared to the original models that are given adversarial inputs.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击通过干扰深度神经网络 (DNN) 输入的微妙扰动来阻碍其功能和准确性。在这项工作中，我们为 DNN 提出了一种新的基于掩码的对抗性防御方案 (MAD)，以减轻对抗性攻击的负面影响。准确地说，我们的方法通过随机屏蔽一部分潜在的对抗性图像来提高 DNN 的鲁棒性，因此，DNN 的分类结果输出变得更能容忍较小的输入扰动。与现有的对抗性防御技术相比，我们的方法不需要任何额外的去噪结构，也不需要对 DNN 的设计进行任何改变。我们在多种数据集的 DNN 模型集合上测试了这种方法，实验结果证实，所提出的方法可以有效提高 DNN 针对所有测试的对抗性攻击方法的防御能力。在某些场景中，与给予对抗性输入的原​​始模型相比，使用 MAD 训练的 DNN 模型的分类精度提高了 20% 到 90%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码的对抗防御方案（MAD），通过随机掩码部分潜在对抗图像来增强深度神经网络（DNN）的鲁棒性，无需修改网络结构或增加去噪模块。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击通过微小输入扰动破坏DNN性能，现有防御方法常需额外结构或修改模型设计，而本文旨在提出一种无需额外开销的高效防御方案。
AI.method: 在输入图像中随机掩码部分区域，使DNN对微小扰动更鲁棒。该方法无需改变DNN原有结构或引入额外模块。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和DNN模型上实验验证，MAD使模型在对抗攻击下的分类准确率提升20%-90%，有效防御所有测试攻击方法。
AI.conclusion: MAD通过简单掩码策略显著提升DNN防御能力，且保持原有模型结构不变，为对抗攻击防御提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

search_text: A Mask-Based Adversarial Defense Scheme 基于面具的对抗性防御方案 Adversarial attacks hamper the functionality and accuracy of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) by meddling with subtle perturbations to their inputs.In this work, we propose a new Mask-based Adversarial Defense scheme (MAD) for DNNs to mitigate the negative effect from adversarial attacks. To be precise, our method promotes the robustness of a DNN by randomly masking a portion of potential adversarial images, and as a result, the %classification result output of the DNN becomes more tolerant to minor input perturbations. Compared with existing adversarial defense techniques, our method does not need any additional denoising structure, nor any change to a DNN's design. We have tested this approach on a collection of DNN models for a variety of data sets, and the experimental results confirm that the proposed method can effectively improve the defense abilities of the DNNs against all of the tested adversarial attack methods. In certain scenarios, the DNN models trained with MAD have improved classification accuracy by as much as 20% to 90% compared to the original models that are given adversarial inputs. 对抗性攻击通过干扰深度神经网络 (DNN) 输入的微妙扰动来阻碍其功能和准确性。在这项工作中，我们为 DNN 提出了一种新的基于掩码的对抗性防御方案 (MAD)，以减轻对抗性攻击的负面影响。准确地说，我们的方法通过随机屏蔽一部分潜在的对抗性图像来提高 DNN 的鲁棒性，因此，DNN 的分类结果输出变得更能容忍较小的输入扰动。与现有的对抗性防御技术相比，我们的方法不需要任何额外的去噪结构，也不需要对 DNN 的设计进行任何改变。我们在多种数据集的 DNN 模型集合上测试了这种方法，实验结果证实，所提出的方法可以有效提高 DNN 针对所有测试的对抗性攻击方法的防御能力。在某些场景中，与给予对抗性输入的原​​始模型相比，使用 MAD 训练的 DNN 模型的分类精度提高了 20% 到 90%。 本文提出了一种基于掩码的对抗防御方案（MAD），通过随机掩码部分潜在对抗图像来增强深度神经网络（DNN）的鲁棒性，无需修改网络结构或增加去噪模块。 Weizhen Xu,Chenyi Zhang,Fangzhen Zhao,Liangda Fang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Than Htut Soe,Cristiana Teixeira Santos,Marija Slavkovik
title: Automated detection of dark patterns in cookie banners: how to do it poorly and why it is hard to do it any other way
title_zh: 自动检测 cookie 横幅中的深色图案：如何做得不好以及为什么很难以其他方式做到这一点
abstract: Cookie banners, the pop ups that appear to collect your consent for data collection, are a tempting ground for dark patterns. Dark patterns are design elements that are used to influence the user's choice towards an option that is not in their interest. The use of dark patterns renders consent elicitation meaningless and voids the attempts to improve a fair collection and use of data. Can machine learning be used to automatically detect the presence of dark patterns in cookie banners? In this work, a dataset of cookie banners of 300 news websites was used to train a prediction model that does exactly that. The machine learning pipeline we used includes feature engineering, parameter search, training a Gradient Boosted Tree classifier and evaluation. The accuracy of the trained model is promising, but allows a lot of room for improvement. We provide an in-depth analysis of the interdisciplinary challenges that automated dark pattern detection poses to artificial intelligence. The dataset and all the code created using machine learning is available at the url to repository removed for review.

We provide an in-depth analysis of the interdisciplinary challenges that automated dark pattern detection poses to artificial intelligence. The dataset and all the code created using machine learning is available at the url to repository removed for review.
abstract_zh: Cookie 横幅是一种弹出窗口，旨在征得您对数据收集的同意，是深色图案的诱人土壤。深色图案是用于影响用户选择不符合他们兴趣的选项的设计元素。深色图案的使用使得征求同意变得毫无意义，并且使改进数据公平收集和使用的尝试变得无效。机器学习可以用来自动检测 cookie 横幅中深色图案的存在吗？在这项工作中，我们使用 300 个新闻网站的 cookie 横幅数据集来训练一个预测模型来实现这一目标。我们使用的机器学习流程包括特征工程、参数搜索、训练梯度提升树分类器和评估。训练后模型的准确性很有希望，但仍有很大的改进空间。我们深入分析了自动暗纹检测给人工智能带来的跨学科挑战。数据集和使用机器学习创建的所有代码都可以在已删除的存储库的 URL 中找到以供审查。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用机器学习自动检测cookie横幅中的暗模式，但指出当前方法存在局限性。
AI.motivation: 暗模式设计使用户同意数据收集的行为失去意义，需通过技术手段识别此类违规设计以保障用户权益。
AI.method: 基于300个新闻网站的cookie横幅数据集，构建包含特征工程、参数调优和梯度提升树分类器的机器学习流水线进行检测。
AI.result: 模型准确率表现尚可但仍有较大提升空间，同时揭示了暗模式检测在人工智能领域面临的跨学科挑战。
AI.conclusion: 自动检测暗模式技术难度高，需结合多领域知识突破，研究数据集和代码已公开供进一步探索。

authors_text: Preeti Jha,Aruna Tiwari,Neha Bharill,Milind Ratnaparkhe,Om Prakash Patel,Nilagiri Harshith,Mukkamalla Mounika,Neha Nagendra
title: A Novel Scalable Apache Spark Based Feature Extraction Approaches for Huge Protein Sequence and their Clustering Performance Analysis
title_zh: 一种新型可扩展的基于 Apache Spark 的大型蛋白质序列特征提取方法及其聚类性能分析
abstract: Genome sequencing projects are rapidly increasing the number of high-dimensional protein sequence datasets. Clustering a high-dimensional protein sequence dataset using traditional machine learning approaches poses many challenges. Many different feature extraction methods exist and are widely used. However, extracting features from millions of protein sequences becomes impractical because they are not scalable with current algorithms. Therefore, there is a need for an efficient feature extraction approach that extracts significant features. We have proposed two scalable feature extraction approaches for extracting features from huge protein sequences using Apache Spark, which are termed 60d-SPF (60-dimensional Scalable Protein Feature) and 6d-SCPSF (6-dimensional Scalable Co-occurrence-based Probability-Specific Feature). The proposed 60d-SPF and 6d-SCPSF approaches capture the statistical properties of amino acids to create a fixed-length numeric feature vector that represents each protein sequence in terms of 60-dimensional and 6-dimensional features, respectively. The preprocessed huge protein sequences are used as an input in two clustering algorithms, i.e., Scalable Random Sampling with Iterative Optimization Fuzzy c-Means (SRSIO-FCM) and Scalable Literal Fuzzy C-Means (SLFCM) for clustering. We have conducted extensive experiments on various soybean protein datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed feature extraction methods, 60d-SPF, 6d-SCPSF, and existing feature extraction methods on SRSIO-FCM and SLFCM clustering algorithms. The reported results in terms of the Silhouette index and the Davies-Bouldin index show that the proposed 60d-SPF extraction method on SRSIO-FCM and SLFCM clustering algorithms achieves significantly better results than the proposed 6d-SCPSF and existing feature extraction approaches.
summary: Genome sequencing projects are rapidly increasing the number of high-dimensional protein sequence datasets. Clustering a high-dimensional protein sequence dataset using traditional machine learning approaches poses many challenges. Many different feature extraction methods exist and are widely used. However, extracting features from millions of protein sequences becomes impractical because they are not scalable with current algorithms. Therefore, there is a need for an efficient feature extraction approach that extracts significant features. We have proposed two scalable feature extraction approaches for extracting features from huge protein sequences using Apache Spark, which are termed 60d-SPF (60-dimensional Scalable Protein Feature) and 6d-SCPSF (6-dimensional Scalable Co-occurrence-based Probability-Specific Feature). The proposed 60d-SPF and 6d-SCPSF approaches capture the statistical properties of amino acids to create a fixed-length numeric feature vector that represents each protein sequence in terms of 60-dimensional and 6-dimensional features, respectively. The preprocessed huge protein sequences are used as an input in two clustering algorithms, i.e., Scalable Random Sampling with Iterative Optimization Fuzzy c-Means (SRSIO-FCM) and Scalable Literal Fuzzy C-Means (SLFCM) for clustering. We have conducted extensive experiments on various soybean protein datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed feature extraction methods, 60d-SPF, 6d-SCPSF, and existing feature extraction methods on SRSIO-FCM and SLFCM clustering algorithms. The reported results in terms of the Silhouette index and the Davies-Bouldin index show that the proposed 60d-SPF extraction method on SRSIO-FCM and SLFCM clustering algorithms achieves significantly better results than the proposed 6d-SCPSF and existing feature extraction approaches.
abstract_zh: 基因组测序项目正在迅速增加高维蛋白质序列数据集的数量。使用传统机器学习方法对高维蛋白质序列数据集进行聚类带来了许多挑战。存在许多不同的特征提取方法并被广泛使用。然而，从数百万个蛋白质序列中提取特征变得不切实际，因为它们无法用当前算法进行扩展。因此，需要一种有效的特征提取方法来提取重要特征。我们提出了两种使用 Apache Spark 从巨大蛋白质序列中提取特征的可扩展特征提取方法，称为 60d-SPF（60 维可扩展蛋白质特征）和 6d-SCPSF（6 维可扩展共现概率特定特征）。所提出的 60d-SPF 和 6d-SCPSF 方法捕获氨基酸的统计特性，以创建固定长度的数字特征向量，分别以 60 维和 6 维特征表示每个蛋白质序列。预处理后的巨大蛋白质序列被用作两种聚类算法的输入，即用于聚类的可扩展随机采样迭代优化模糊c均值（SRSIO-FCM）和可扩展文字模糊C均值（SLFCM）。我们对各种大豆蛋白数据集进行了广泛的实验，以证明所提出的特征提取方法、60d-SPF、6d-SCPSF 以及现有的 SRSIO-FCM 和 SLFCM 聚类算法特征提取方法的有效性。报告的 Silhouette 指数和 Davies-Bouldin 指数结果表明，所提出的 SRSIO-FCM 和 SLFCM 聚类算法的 60d-SPF 提取方法比所提出的 6d-SCPSF 和现有特征提取方法取得了明显更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于Apache Spark的可扩展特征提取方法（60d-SPF和6d-SCPSF），用于处理大规模蛋白质序列数据，并分析其在聚类算法中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法难以高效处理高维蛋白质序列数据，现有特征提取算法缺乏可扩展性，无法应对海量序列的特征提取需求。
AI.method: 提出60d-SPF（60维统计特征）和6d-SCPSF（6维共现概率特征）两种方法，利用Apache Spark并行计算统计氨基酸特性生成固定长度数值特征向量，结合SRSIO-FCM和SLFCM聚类算法进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在大豆蛋白数据集上实验表明，60d-SPF方法在Silhouette指数和Davies-Bouldin指数上显著优于6d-SCPSF及现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于Spark的60d-SPF方法在可扩展性和聚类性能上优于现有方案，为大规模蛋白质序列分析提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出两种基于Apache Spark的可扩展特征提取方法（60d-SPF和6d-SCPSF），用于处理大规模蛋白质序列数据，并分析其在聚类算法中的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统机器学习方法难以高效处理高维蛋白质序列数据，现有特征提取算法缺乏可扩展性，无法应对海量序列的特征提取需求。

ai_content.result: 在大豆蛋白数据集上实验表明，60d-SPF方法在Silhouette指数和Davies-Bouldin指数上显著优于6d-SCPSF及现有方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 基于Spark的60d-SPF方法在可扩展性和聚类性能上优于现有方案，为大规模蛋白质序列分析提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: A Novel Scalable Apache Spark Based Feature Extraction Approaches for Huge Protein Sequence and their Clustering Performance Analysis 一种新型可扩展的基于 Apache Spark 的大型蛋白质序列特征提取方法及其聚类性能分析 Genome sequencing projects are rapidly increasing the number of high-dimensional protein sequence datasets. Clustering a high-dimensional protein sequence dataset using traditional machine learning approaches poses many challenges. Many different feature extraction methods exist and are widely used. However, extracting features from millions of protein sequences becomes impractical because they are not scalable with current algorithms. Therefore, there is a need for an efficient feature extraction approach that extracts significant features. We have proposed two scalable feature extraction approaches for extracting features from huge protein sequences using Apache Spark, which are termed 60d-SPF (60-dimensional Scalable Protein Feature) and 6d-SCPSF (6-dimensional Scalable Co-occurrence-based Probability-Specific Feature). The proposed 60d-SPF and 6d-SCPSF approaches capture the statistical properties of amino acids to create a fixed-length numeric feature vector that represents each protein sequence in terms of 60-dimensional and 6-dimensional features, respectively. The preprocessed huge protein sequences are used as an input in two clustering algorithms, i.e., Scalable Random Sampling with Iterative Optimization Fuzzy c-Means (SRSIO-FCM) and Scalable Literal Fuzzy C-Means (SLFCM) for clustering. We have conducted extensive experiments on various soybean protein datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed feature extraction methods, 60d-SPF, 6d-SCPSF, and existing feature extraction methods on SRSIO-FCM and SLFCM clustering algorithms. The reported results in terms of the Silhouette index and the Davies-Bouldin index show that the proposed 60d-SPF extraction method on SRSIO-FCM and SLFCM clustering algorithms achieves significantly better results than the proposed 6d-SCPSF and existing feature extraction approaches. 基因组测序项目正在迅速增加高维蛋白质序列数据集的数量。使用传统机器学习方法对高维蛋白质序列数据集进行聚类带来了许多挑战。存在许多不同的特征提取方法并被广泛使用。然而，从数百万个蛋白质序列中提取特征变得不切实际，因为它们无法用当前算法进行扩展。因此，需要一种有效的特征提取方法来提取重要特征。我们提出了两种使用 Apache Spark 从巨大蛋白质序列中提取特征的可扩展特征提取方法，称为 60d-SPF（60 维可扩展蛋白质特征）和 6d-SCPSF（6 维可扩展共现概率特定特征）。所提出的 60d-SPF 和 6d-SCPSF 方法捕获氨基酸的统计特性，以创建固定长度的数字特征向量，分别以 60 维和 6 维特征表示每个蛋白质序列。预处理后的巨大蛋白质序列被用作两种聚类算法的输入，即用于聚类的可扩展随机采样迭代优化模糊c均值（SRSIO-FCM）和可扩展文字模糊C均值（SLFCM）。我们对各种大豆蛋白数据集进行了广泛的实验，以证明所提出的特征提取方法、60d-SPF、6d-SCPSF 以及现有的 SRSIO-FCM 和 SLFCM 聚类算法特征提取方法的有效性。报告的 Silhouette 指数和 Davies-Bouldin 指数结果表明，所提出的 SRSIO-FCM 和 SLFCM 聚类算法的 60d-SPF 提取方法比所提出的 6d-SCPSF 和现有特征提取方法取得了明显更好的结果。 本文提出两种基于Apache Spark的可扩展特征提取方法（60d-SPF和6d-SCPSF），用于处理大规模蛋白质序列数据，并分析其在聚类算法中的性能。 Preeti Jha,Aruna Tiwari,Neha Bharill,Milind Ratnaparkhe,Om Prakash Patel,Nilagiri Harshith,Mukkamalla Mounika,Neha Nagendra q-bio.QM,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: B. N. Kausik
title: Accelerating Machine Learning via the Weber-Fechner Law
title_zh: 通过韦伯-费希纳定律加速机器学习
abstract: The Weber-Fechner Law observes that human perception scales as the logarithm of the stimulus. We argue that learning algorithms for human concepts could benefit from the Weber-Fechner Law. Specifically, we impose Weber-Fechner on simple neural networks, with or without convolution, via the logarithmic power series of their sorted output. Our experiments show surprising performance and accuracy on the MNIST data set within a few training iterations and limited computational resources, suggesting that Weber-Fechner can accelerate machine learning of human concepts.
summary: The Weber-Fechner Law observes that human perception scales as the logarithm of the stimulus. We argue that learning algorithms for human concepts could benefit from the Weber-Fechner Law. Specifically, we impose Weber-Fechner on simple neural networks, with or without convolution, via the logarithmic power series of their sorted output. Our experiments show surprising performance and accuracy on the MNIST data set within a few training iterations and limited computational resources, suggesting that Weber-Fechner can accelerate machine learning of human concepts.
abstract_zh: 韦伯-费希纳定律指出，人类感知与刺激的对数成正比。我们认为，人类概念的学习算法可以受益于韦伯-费希纳定律。具体来说，我们通过其排序输出的对数幂级数，将 Weber-Fechner 应用于简单的神经网络（无论是否有卷积）。我们的实验在几次训练迭代和有限的计算资源下在 MNIST 数据集上显示出令人惊讶的性能和准确性，这表明 Weber-Fechner 可以加速人类概念的机器学习。

AI.tldr: 本文将韦伯-费希纳定律应用于机器学习模型，通过在神经网络中引入对数特性加速训练过程。
AI.motivation: 基于人类感知遵循对数规律的韦伯-费希纳定律，推测其可提升机器学习对人类概念的建模效率，减少计算资源消耗。
AI.method: 在简单神经网络（含/不含卷积）中，通过对排序后的输出应用对数幂级数，强制引入韦伯-费希纳定律的感知特性。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上，模型仅需少量训练迭代和有限计算资源即可达到高准确率，验证了方法的加速效果。
AI.conclusion: 韦伯-费希纳定律为机器学习提供了新的优化方向，尤其适合资源受限场景下的人类概念学习任务。

authors_text: Christos Verginis,Cevahir Koprulu,Sandeep Chinchali,Ufuk Topcu
title: Joint Learning of Reward Machines and Policies in Environments with Partially Known Semantics
title_zh: 语义部分已知的环境中奖励机器和策略的联合学习
abstract: We study the problem of reinforcement learning for a task encoded by a reward machine. The task is defined over a set of properties in the environment, called atomic propositions, and represented by Boolean variables. One unrealistic assumption commonly used in the literature is that the truth values of these propositions are accurately known. In real situations, however, these truth values are uncertain since they come from sensors that suffer from imperfections. At the same time, reward machines can be difficult to model explicitly, especially when they encode complicated tasks. We develop a reinforcement-learning algorithm that infers a reward machine that encodes the underlying task while learning how to execute it, despite the uncertainties of the propositions' truth values. In order to address such uncertainties, the algorithm maintains a probabilistic estimate about the truth value of the atomic propositions; it updates this estimate according to new sensory measurements that arrive from the exploration of the environment. Additionally, the algorithm maintains a hypothesis reward machine, which acts as an estimate of the reward machine that encodes the task to be learned. As the agent explores the environment, the algorithm updates the hypothesis reward machine according to the obtained rewards and the estimate of the atomic propositions' truth value. Finally, the algorithm uses a Q-learning procedure for the states of the hypothesis reward machine to determine the policy that accomplishes the task. We prove that the algorithm successfully infers the reward machine and asymptotically learns a policy that accomplishes the respective task.
summary: We study the problem of reinforcement learning for a task encoded by a reward machine. The task is defined over a set of properties in the environment, called atomic propositions, and represented by Boolean variables. One unrealistic assumption commonly used in the literature is that the truth values of these propositions are accurately known. In real situations, however, these truth values are uncertain since they come from sensors that suffer from imperfections. At the same time, reward machines can be difficult to model explicitly, especially when they encode complicated tasks. We develop a reinforcement-learning algorithm that infers a reward machine that encodes the underlying task while learning how to execute it, despite the uncertainties of the propositions' truth values. In order to address such uncertainties, the algorithm maintains a probabilistic estimate about the truth value of the atomic propositions; it updates this estimate according to new sensory measurements that arrive from the exploration of the environment. Additionally, the algorithm maintains a hypothesis reward machine, which acts as an estimate of the reward machine that encodes the task to be learned. As the agent explores the environment, the algorithm updates the hypothesis reward machine according to the obtained rewards and the estimate of the atomic propositions' truth value. Finally, the algorithm uses a Q-learning procedure for the states of the hypothesis reward machine to determine the policy that accomplishes the task. We prove that the algorithm successfully infers the reward machine and asymptotically learns a policy that accomplishes the respective task.
abstract_zh: 我们研究奖励机器编码的任务的强化学习问题。该任务是通过环境中的一组属性（称为原子命题）定义的，并由布尔变量表示。文献中常用的一种不切实际的假设是这些命题的真值是准确已知的。然而，在实际情况中，这些真值是不确定的，因为它们来自存在缺陷的传感器。与此同时，奖励机器可能很难明确地建模，特别是当它们编码复杂的任务时。我们开发了一种强化学习算法，该算法可以推断出一个奖励机器，该机器对底层任务进行编码，同时学习如何执行它，尽管命题的真值存在不确定性。为了解决这种不确定性，算法保持对原子命题真值的概率估计；它根据对环境的探索获得的新的感官测量结果来更新这一估计。此外，该算法还维护一个假设奖励机，它充当对要学习的任务进行编码的奖励机的估计。当智能体探索环境时，算法根据获得的奖励和原子命题真值的估计来更新假设奖励机。最后，该算法对假设奖励机的状态使用 Q 学习过程来确定完成任务的策略。我们证明该算法成功地推断了奖励机并渐进地学习了完成相应任务的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在部分已知语义的环境中，通过强化学习同时推断奖励机和策略的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法假设环境中的原子命题真值已知，但实际中传感器存在误差导致真值不确定，且复杂任务的奖励机难以显式建模。
AI.method: 算法维护原子命题的概率估计，并根据环境探索更新；同时维护假设奖励机，根据奖励和命题估计更新其结构，最后通过Q学习生成策略。
AI.result: 算法能够成功推断奖励机，并渐近学习完成任务的策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合学习奖励机和策略，有效应对命题真值不确定性和复杂任务建模难题。

As the agent explores the environment, the algorithm updates the hypothesis reward machine according to the obtained rewards and the estimate of the atomic propositions' truth value. Finally, the algorithm uses a Q-learning procedure for the states of the hypothesis reward machine to determine the policy that accomplishes the task. We prove that the algorithm successfully infers the reward machine and asymptotically learns a policy that accomplishes the respective task. 我们研究奖励机器编码的任务的强化学习问题。该任务是通过环境中的一组属性（称为原子命题）定义的，并由布尔变量表示。文献中常用的一种不切实际的假设是这些命题的真值是准确已知的。然而，在实际情况中，这些真值是不确定的，因为它们来自存在缺陷的传感器。与此同时，奖励机器可能很难明确地建模，特别是当它们编码复杂的任务时。我们开发了一种强化学习算法，该算法可以推断出一个奖励机器，该机器对底层任务进行编码，同时学习如何执行它，尽管命题的真值存在不确定性。为了解决这种不确定性，算法保持对原子命题真值的概率估计；它根据对环境的探索获得的新的感官测量结果来更新这一估计。此外，该算法还维护一个假设奖励机，它充当对要学习的任务进行编码的奖励机的估计。当智能体探索环境时，算法根据获得的奖励和原子命题真值的估计来更新假设奖励机。最后，该算法对假设奖励机的状态使用 Q 学习过程来确定完成任务的策略。我们证明该算法成功地推断了奖励机并渐进地学习了完成相应任务的策略。 本文研究在部分已知语义的环境中，通过强化学习同时推断奖励机和策略的问题。 Christos Verginis,Cevahir Koprulu,Sandeep Chinchali,Ufuk Topcu cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Monish Keswani,Sriranjani Ramakrishnan,Nishant Reddy,Vineeth N Balasubramanian
title: Proto2Proto: Can you recognize the car, the way I do?
title_zh: Proto2Proto：你能像我一样认出这辆车吗？
comment: To appear in CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/archmaester/proto2proto
comments: To appear in CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/archmaester/proto2proto
abstract: Prototypical methods have recently gained a lot of attention due to their intrinsic interpretable nature, which is obtained through the prototypes. With growing use cases of model reuse and distillation, there is a need to also study transfer of interpretability from one model to another. We present Proto2Proto, a novel method to transfer interpretability of one prototypical part network to another via knowledge distillation. Our approach aims to add interpretability to the "dark" knowledge transferred from the teacher to the shallower student model. We propose two novel losses: "Global Explanation" loss and "Patch-Prototype Correspondence" loss to facilitate such a transfer. Global Explanation loss forces the student prototypes to be close to teacher prototypes, and Patch-Prototype Correspondence loss enforces the local representations of the student to be similar to that of the teacher. Further, we propose three novel metrics to evaluate the student's proximity to the teacher as measures of interpretability transfer in our settings. We qualitatively and quantitatively demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on CUB-200-2011 and Stanford Cars datasets. Our experiments show that the proposed method indeed achieves interpretability transfer from teacher to student while simultaneously exhibiting competitive performance.
summary: Prototypical methods have recently gained a lot of attention due to their intrinsic interpretable nature, which is obtained through the prototypes. With growing use cases of model reuse and distillation, there is a need to also study transfer of interpretability from one model to another. We present Proto2Proto, a novel method to transfer interpretability of one prototypical part network to another via knowledge distillation. Our approach aims to add interpretability to the "dark" knowledge transferred from the teacher to the shallower student model. We propose two novel losses: "Global Explanation" loss and "Patch-Prototype Correspondence" loss to facilitate such a transfer. Global Explanation loss forces the student prototypes to be close to teacher prototypes, and Patch-Prototype Correspondence loss enforces the local representations of the student to be similar to that of the teacher. Further, we propose three novel metrics to evaluate the student's proximity to the teacher as measures of interpretability transfer in our settings. We qualitatively and quantitatively demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on CUB-200-2011 and Stanford Cars datasets. Our experiments show that the proposed method indeed achieves interpretability transfer from teacher to student while simultaneously exhibiting competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 原型方法由于其内在的可解释性（通过原型获得）最近获得了很多关注。随着模型重用和蒸馏的用例不断增加，还需要研究可解释性从一种模型到另一种模型的转移。我们提出了 Proto2Proto，这是一种通过知识蒸馏将一个原型部分网络的可解释性转移到另一个原型部分网络的新方法。我们的方法旨在增加从教师转移到较浅学生模型的“黑暗”知识的可解释性。我们提出了两种新颖的损失：“全局解释”损失和“补丁原型对应”损失来促进这种转移。全局解释损失迫使学生原型接近教师原型，而补丁原型对应损失则迫使学生的局部表征与教师的相似。此外，我们提出了三个新颖的指标来评估学生与老师的接近程度，作为我们环境中可解释性转移的衡量标准。我们定性和定量地证明了我们的方法在 CUB-200-2011 和斯坦福汽车数据集上的有效性。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法确实实现了从教师到学生的可解释性迁移，同时表现出竞争性的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Proto2Proto方法，通过知识蒸馏将原型网络的可解释性从教师模型转移到浅层学生模型。
AI.motivation: 原型方法因可解释性受到关注，但模型复用和蒸馏场景下缺乏可解释性迁移的研究，需探索如何保留教师模型的可解释性特征。
AI.method: 设计全局解释损失（使学生原型接近教师原型）和块-原型对应损失（对齐局部表征），并提出三个可解释性迁移评估指标。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011和Stanford Cars数据集上验证了方法有效性，学生模型成功继承教师可解释性且保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Proto2Proto实现了可解释性迁移，为模型蒸馏场景下的可解释性保留提供了新思路。

authors_text: Taewook Nam,Shao-Hua Sun,Karl Pertsch,Sung Ju Hwang,Joseph J Lim
title: Skill-based Meta-Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于技能的元强化学习
abstract: While deep reinforcement learning methods have shown impressive results in robot learning, their sample inefficiency makes the learning of complex, long-horizon behaviors with real robot systems infeasible. To mitigate this issue, meta-reinforcement learning methods aim to enable fast learning on novel tasks by learning how to learn. Yet, the application has been limited to short-horizon tasks with dense rewards. To enable learning long-horizon behaviors, recent works have explored leveraging prior experience in the form of offline datasets without reward or task annotations. While these approaches yield improved sample efficiency, millions of interactions with environments are still required to solve complex tasks. In this work, we devise a method that enables meta-learning on long-horizon, sparse-reward tasks, allowing us to solve unseen target tasks with orders of magnitude fewer environment interactions. Our core idea is to leverage prior experience extracted from offline datasets during meta-learning. Specifically, we propose to (1) extract reusable skills and a skill prior from offline datasets, (2) meta-train a high-level policy that learns to efficiently compose learned skills into long-horizon behaviors, and (3) rapidly adapt the meta-trained policy to solve an unseen target task. Experimental results on continuous control tasks in navigation and manipulation demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently solve long-horizon novel target tasks by combining the strengths of meta-learning and the usage of offline datasets, while prior approaches in RL, meta-RL, and multi-task RL require substantially more environment interactions to solve the tasks.
summary: While deep reinforcement learning methods have shown impressive results in robot learning, their sample inefficiency makes the learning of complex, long-horizon behaviors with real robot systems infeasible. To mitigate this issue, meta-reinforcement learning methods aim to enable fast learning on novel tasks by learning how to learn. Yet, the application has been limited to short-horizon tasks with dense rewards. To enable learning long-horizon behaviors, recent works have explored leveraging prior experience in the form of offline datasets without reward or task annotations. While these approaches yield improved sample efficiency, millions of interactions with environments are still required to solve complex tasks. In this work, we devise a method that enables meta-learning on long-horizon, sparse-reward tasks, allowing us to solve unseen target tasks with orders of magnitude fewer environment interactions. Our core idea is to leverage prior experience extracted from offline datasets during meta-learning. Specifically, we propose to (1) extract reusable skills and a skill prior from offline datasets, (2) meta-train a high-level policy that learns to efficiently compose learned skills into long-horizon behaviors, and (3) rapidly adapt the meta-trained policy to solve an unseen target task. Experimental results on continuous control tasks in navigation and manipulation demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently solve long-horizon novel target tasks by combining the strengths of meta-learning and the usage of offline datasets, while prior approaches in RL, meta-RL, and multi-task RL require substantially more environment interactions to solve the tasks.
abstract_zh: 虽然深度强化学习方法在机器人学习中取得了令人印象深刻的成果，但它们的样本效率低下使得用真实的机器人系统学习复杂的、长期的行为是不可行的。为了缓解这个问题，元强化学习方法旨在通过学习如何学习来实现新任务的快速学习。然而，该应用程序仅限于奖励密集的短期任务。为了能够学习长期行为，最近的工作已经探索利用离线数据集形式的先前经验，而无需奖励或任务注释。虽然这些方法提高了样本效率，但仍然需要数百万次与环境的交互才能解决复杂的任务。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种方法，可以对长期、稀疏奖励任务进行元学习，使我们能够以更少的环境交互来解决看不见的目标任务。我们的核心思想是利用元学习期间从离线数据集中提取的先前经验。具体来说，我们建议（1）从离线数据集中提取可重用的技能和先验技能，（2）元训练一个高级策略，学习如何有效地将学到的技能组合成长期行为，以及（3）快速调整元训练的策略来解决看不见的目标任务。导航和操作中连续控制任务的实验结果表明，该方法可以通过结合元学习的优势和离线数据集的使用来有效地解决长期新颖的目标任务，而现有的强化学习、元强化学习和多任务强化学习方法需要更多的环境交互来解决任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于技能的元强化学习方法，旨在通过利用离线数据集中的先验经验，解决长时域、稀疏奖励任务的样本效率问题。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在机器人学习中表现优异，但样本效率低下，难以处理复杂长时域任务；现有元强化学习方法受限于短时域和密集奖励场景，且仍需大量环境交互。
AI.method: 提出三步方法：(1) 从离线数据集中提取可复用技能及技能先验；(2) 元训练高层策略以高效组合技能；(3) 快速适应新任务。
AI.result: 在导航与操作任务实验中，该方法相比传统RL、元RL及多任务RL方法，显著减少环境交互次数，高效解决长时域新任务。
AI.conclusion: 结合元学习与离线数据集的优势，可有效提升长时域稀疏奖励任务的学习效率，减少环境交互需求。
