Our core idea is to leverage prior experience extracted from offline datasets during meta-learning. Specifically, we propose to (1) extract reusable skills and a skill prior from offline datasets, (2) meta-train a high-level policy that learns to efficiently compose learned skills into long-horizon behaviors, and (3) rapidly adapt the meta-trained policy to solve an unseen target task. Experimental results on continuous control tasks in navigation and manipulation demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently solve long-horizon novel target tasks by combining the strengths of meta-learning and the usage of offline datasets, while prior approaches in RL, meta-RL, and multi-task RL require substantially more environment interactions to solve the tasks. 虽然深度强化学习方法在机器人学习中取得了令人印象深刻的成果，但它们的样本效率低下使得用真实的机器人系统学习复杂的、长期的行为是不可行的。为了缓解这个问题，元强化学习方法旨在通过学习如何学习来实现新任务的快速学习。然而，该应用程序仅限于奖励密集的短期任务。为了能够学习长期行为，最近的工作已经探索利用离线数据集形式的先前经验，而无需奖励或任务注释。虽然这些方法提高了样本效率，但仍然需要数百万次与环境的交互才能解决复杂的任务。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种方法，可以对长期、稀疏奖励任务进行元学习，使我们能够以更少的环境交互来解决看不见的目标任务。我们的核心思想是利用元学习期间从离线数据集中提取的先前经验。具体来说，我们建议（1）从离线数据集中提取可重用的技能和先验技能，（2）元训练一个高级策略，学习如何有效地将学到的技能组合成长期行为，以及（3）快速调整元训练的策略来解决看不见的目标任务。导航和操作中连续控制任务的实验结果表明，该方法可以通过结合元学习的优势和离线数据集的使用来有效地解决长期新颖的目标任务，而现有的强化学习、元强化学习和多任务强化学习方法需要更多的环境交互来解决任务。 本文提出了一种基于技能的元强化学习方法，旨在通过利用离线数据集中的先验经验，解决长时域、稀疏奖励任务的样本效率问题。 Taewook Nam,Shao-Hua Sun,Karl Pertsch,Sung Ju Hwang,Joseph J Lim cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jun Yamada,Karl Pertsch,Anisha Gunjal,Joseph J. Lim
title: Task-Induced Representation Learning
title_zh: 任务引发的表征学习
abstract: In this work, we evaluate the effectiveness of representation learning approaches for decision making in visually complex environments. Representation learning is essential for effective reinforcement learning (RL) from high-dimensional inputs. Unsupervised representation learning approaches based on reconstruction, prediction or contrastive learning have shown substantial learning efficiency gains. Yet, they have mostly been evaluated in clean laboratory or simulated settings. In contrast, real environments are visually complex and contain substantial amounts of clutter and distractors. Unsupervised representations will learn to model such distractors, potentially impairing the agent's learning efficiency. In contrast, an alternative class of approaches, which we call task-induced representation learning, leverages task information such as rewards or demonstrations from prior tasks to focus on task-relevant parts of the scene and ignore distractors. We investigate the effectiveness of unsupervised and task-induced representation learning approaches on four visually complex environments, from Distracting DMControl to the CARLA driving simulator. For both, RL and imitation learning, we find that representation learning generally improves sample efficiency on unseen tasks even in visually complex scenes and that task-induced representations can double learning efficiency compared to unsupervised alternatives. Code is available at https://clvrai.com/tarp.
summary: In this work, we evaluate the effectiveness of representation learning approaches for decision making in visually complex environments. Representation learning is essential for effective reinforcement learning (RL) from high-dimensional inputs. Unsupervised representation learning approaches based on reconstruction, prediction or contrastive learning have shown substantial learning efficiency gains. Yet, they have mostly been evaluated in clean laboratory or simulated settings. In contrast, real environments are visually complex and contain substantial amounts of clutter and distractors. Unsupervised representations will learn to model such distractors, potentially impairing the agent's learning efficiency. In contrast, an alternative class of approaches, which we call task-induced representation learning, leverages task information such as rewards or demonstrations from prior tasks to focus on task-relevant parts of the scene and ignore distractors. We investigate the effectiveness of unsupervised and task-induced representation learning approaches on four visually complex environments, from Distracting DMControl to the CARLA driving simulator. For both, RL and imitation learning, we find that representation learning generally improves sample efficiency on unseen tasks even in visually complex scenes and that task-induced representations can double learning efficiency compared to unsupervised alternatives. Code is available at https://clvrai.com/tarp.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们评估了表示学习方法在视觉复杂环境中决策的有效性。表征学习对于高维输入的有效强化学习 (RL) 至关重要。基于重建、预测或对比学习的无监督表示学习方法已经显示出显着的学习效率提升。然而，它们大多是在洁净实验室或模拟环境中进行评估的。相比之下，真实环境在视觉上是复杂的，并且包含大量的混乱和干扰因素。无监督表示将学习对此类干扰因素进行建模，这可能会损害代理的学习效率。相比之下，另一种方法，我们称之为任务诱导的表示学习，利用任务信息（例如来自先前任务的奖励或演示）来专注于场景中与任务相关的部分并忽略干扰因素。我们研究了无监督和任务诱导的表示学习方法在四种视觉复杂环境（从 Distracting DMControl 到 CARLA 驾驶模拟器）上的有效性。对于强化学习和模仿学习，我们发现表示学习通常可以提高未见过的任务的样本效率，即使在视觉复杂的场景中也是如此，并且与无监督替代方案相比，任务诱导的表示可以使学习效率提高一倍。代码可在 https://clvrai.com/tarp 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了在视觉复杂环境中用于决策的表示学习方法的有效性，对比了无监督学习与任务诱导表示学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 无监督表示学习在真实环境中可能因捕捉干扰信息而降低效率，而任务诱导方法通过利用任务信息（如奖励或演示）可聚焦关键特征。
AI.method: 在Distracting DMControl和CARLA等复杂环境中，对比无监督（重建、预测、对比学习）与任务诱导（利用任务信息）表示学习方法，并结合强化学习与模仿学习进行评估。
AI.result: 表示学习在复杂场景中提升了样本效率，任务诱导方法相比无监督方法使学习效率提高近一倍。
AI.conclusion: 任务诱导表示学习在视觉复杂环境中更有效，表明利用任务信息可显著提升决策效率。

authors_text: Miriam Sturdee,Matthew Ivory,David Ellis,Patrick Stacey,Paul Ralph
title: Personality Traits in Game Development
title_zh: 游戏开发中的人格特质
abstract: Existing work on personality traits in software development excludes game developers as a discrete group. Whilst games are software, game development has unique considerations, so game developers may exhibit different personality traits from other software professionals. We assessed responses from 123 game developers on an International Personality Item Pool Five Factor Model scale and demographic questionnaire using factor analysis. Programmers reported lower Extraversion than designers, artists and production team members; lower Openness than designers and production, and reported higher Neuroticism than production -- potentially linked to burnout and crunch time. Compared to published norms of software developers, game developers reported lower Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion and Agreeableness, but higher Neuroticism. These personality differences have many practical implications: differences in Extraversion among roles may precipitate communication breakdowns; differences in Openness may induce conflict between programmers and designers. Understanding the relationship between personality traits and roles can help recruiters steer new employees into appropriate roles, and help managers apply appropriate stress management techniques. To realise these benefits, individuals must be distinguished from roles: just because an individual occupies a role does not mean they possess personality traits associated with that role.
summary: Existing work on personality traits in software development excludes game developers as a discrete group. Whilst games are software, game development has unique considerations, so game developers may exhibit different personality traits from other software professionals. We assessed responses from 123 game developers on an International Personality Item Pool Five Factor Model scale and demographic questionnaire using factor analysis. Programmers reported lower Extraversion than designers, artists and production team members; lower Openness than designers and production, and reported higher Neuroticism than production -- potentially linked to burnout and crunch time. Compared to published norms of software developers, game developers reported lower Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion and Agreeableness, but higher Neuroticism. These personality differences have many practical implications: differences in Extraversion among roles may precipitate communication breakdowns; differences in Openness may induce conflict between programmers and designers. Understanding the relationship between personality traits and roles can help recruiters steer new employees into appropriate roles, and help managers apply appropriate stress management techniques. To realise these benefits, individuals must be distinguished from roles: just because an individual occupies a role does not mean they possess personality traits associated with that role.
abstract_zh: 现有的软件开发中的人格特质研究将游戏开发人员作为一个离散的群体排除在外。虽然游戏是软件，但游戏开发具有独特的考虑因素，因此游戏开发人员可能会表现出与其他软件专业人员不同的性格特征。我们使用因子分析评估了 123 名游戏开发者对国际个性项目池五因素模型量表和人口统计调查问卷的回答。程序员的外向性低于设计师、艺术家和制作团队成员；开放性低于设计师和生产，并且报告的神经质高于生产——可能与倦怠和关键时间有关。与已公布的软件开发人员标准相比，游戏开发人员的开放性、尽责性、外向性和宜人性较低，但神经质较高。这些性格差异具有许多实际意义：角色之间外向性的差异可能会导致沟通障碍；开放性的差异可能会引发程序员和设计师之间的冲突。了解性格特征和角色之间的关系可以帮助招聘人员引导新员工进入适当的角色，并帮助管理者应用适当的压力管理技巧。为了实现这些好处，必须将个人与角色区分开来：仅仅因为个人占据一个角色并不意味着他们拥有与该角色相关的个性特征。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究游戏开发者的人格特质，分析其与其他软件开发者的差异，并探讨角色与人格特质的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未将游戏开发者作为独立群体分析，而游戏开发具有独特性，可能导致人格特质差异，这对团队管理和招聘有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过国际人格项目池五因素模型量表和人口统计问卷，对123名游戏开发者进行因子分析，比较不同角色（程序员、设计师等）及整体群体的人格特质。
AI.result: 程序员在外向性、开放性低于其他角色，神经质高于生产团队；游戏开发者整体开放性、尽责性、外向性、宜人性低于一般软件开发者，但神经质更高。角色间差异可能引发沟通障碍和冲突。
AI.conclusion: 理解人格特质与角色的关系可优化招聘和压力管理，但需避免将角色与人格特质直接绑定。

To realise these benefits, individuals must be distinguished from roles: just because an individual occupies a role does not mean they possess personality traits associated with that role. 现有的软件开发中的人格特质研究将游戏开发人员作为一个离散的群体排除在外。虽然游戏是软件，但游戏开发具有独特的考虑因素，因此游戏开发人员可能会表现出与其他软件专业人员不同的性格特征。我们使用因子分析评估了 123 名游戏开发者对国际个性项目池五因素模型量表和人口统计调查问卷的回答。程序员的外向性低于设计师、艺术家和制作团队成员；开放性低于设计师和生产，并且报告的神经质高于生产——可能与倦怠和关键时间有关。与已公布的软件开发人员标准相比，游戏开发人员的开放性、尽责性、外向性和宜人性较低，但神经质较高。这些性格差异具有许多实际意义：角色之间外向性的差异可能会导致沟通障碍；开放性的差异可能会引发程序员和设计师之间的冲突。了解性格特征和角色之间的关系可以帮助招聘人员引导新员工进入适当的角色，并帮助管理者应用适当的压力管理技巧。为了实现这些好处，必须将个人与角色区分开来：仅仅因为个人占据一个角色并不意味着他们拥有与该角色相关的个性特征。 该论文研究游戏开发者的人格特质，分析其与其他软件开发者的差异，并探讨角色与人格特质的关系。 Miriam Sturdee,Matthew Ivory,David Ellis,Patrick Stacey,Paul Ralph cs.SE,cs.HC

authors_text: Andreas Blattmann,Robin Rombach,Kaan Oktay,Jonas Müller,Björn Ommer
title: Semi-Parametric Neural Image Synthesis
title_zh: 半参数神经图像合成
abstract: Novel architectures have recently improved generative image synthesis leading to excellent visual quality in various tasks. Much of this success is due to the scalability of these architectures and hence caused by a dramatic increase in model complexity and in the computational resources invested in training these models. Our work questions the underlying paradigm of compressing large training data into ever growing parametric representations. We rather present an orthogonal, semi-parametric approach. We complement comparably small diffusion or autoregressive models with a separate image database and a retrieval strategy. During training we retrieve a set of nearest neighbors from this external database for each training instance and condition the generative model on these informative samples. While the retrieval approach is providing the (local) content, the model is focusing on learning the composition of scenes based on this content. As demonstrated by our experiments, simply swapping the database for one with different contents transfers a trained model post-hoc to a novel domain. The evaluation shows competitive performance on tasks which the generative model has not been trained on, such as class-conditional synthesis, zero-shot stylization or text-to-image synthesis without requiring paired text-image data. With negligible memory and computational overhead for the external database and retrieval we can significantly reduce the parameter count of the generative model and still outperform the state-of-the-art.
summary: Novel architectures have recently improved generative image synthesis leading to excellent visual quality in various tasks. Much of this success is due to the scalability of these architectures and hence caused by a dramatic increase in model complexity and in the computational resources invested in training these models. Our work questions the underlying paradigm of compressing large training data into ever growing parametric representations. We rather present an orthogonal, semi-parametric approach. We complement comparably small diffusion or autoregressive models with a separate image database and a retrieval strategy. During training we retrieve a set of nearest neighbors from this external database for each training instance and condition the generative model on these informative samples. While the retrieval approach is providing the (local) content, the model is focusing on learning the composition of scenes based on this content. As demonstrated by our experiments, simply swapping the database for one with different contents transfers a trained model post-hoc to a novel domain. The evaluation shows competitive performance on tasks which the generative model has not been trained on, such as class-conditional synthesis, zero-shot stylization or text-to-image synthesis without requiring paired text-image data. With negligible memory and computational overhead for the external database and retrieval we can significantly reduce the parameter count of the generative model and still outperform the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 新颖的架构最近改进了生成图像合成，从而在各种任务中实现了出色的视觉质量。这种成功很大程度上归功于这些架构的可扩展性，以及模型复杂性和训练这些模型所投入的计算资源的急剧增加。我们的工作质疑将大型训练数据压缩为不断增长的参数表示的基本范式。我们宁愿提出一种正交的半参数方法。我们用单独的图像数据库和检索策略来补充相对较小的扩散或自回归模型。在训练过程中，我们从这个外部数据库中为每个训练实例检索一组最近邻，并根据这些信息样本来调整生成模型。虽然检索方法提供（本地）内容，但该模型专注于学习基于该内容的场景组成。正如我们的实验所证明的，只需将数据库替换为具有不同内容的数据库即可将经过训练的模型事后转移到新的领域。该评估显示了生成模型在未经过训练的任务上的竞争性能，例如类条件合成、零样本风格化或不需要配对文本图像数据的文本到图像合成。通过外部数据库和检索的内存和计算开销可以忽略不计，我们可以显着减少生成模型的参数数量，并且仍然优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半参数化神经图像合成方法，通过结合小型生成模型与外部图像数据库的检索策略，减少模型参数量同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型依赖大规模参数表示导致计算资源消耗大，本文旨在探索减少参数量的同时保持生成能力的新范式。
AI.method: 使用小型扩散或自回归模型，配合外部图像数据库的最近邻检索策略，在训练时以检索样本作为条件，使模型学习场景组合而非直接压缩数据。
AI.result: 在未训练的任务（如类条件合成、零样本风格迁移）中表现优异，参数量显著减少且无需配对文本-图像数据即可实现文本到图像生成。
AI.conclusion: 半参数化方法通过外部数据库有效降低模型复杂度，在保持性能的同时提供更高效的生成解决方案。

authors_text: Jianglin Fu,Shikai Li,Yuming Jiang,Kwan-Yee Lin,Chen Qian,Chen Change Loy,Wayne Wu,Ziwei Liu
title: StyleGAN-Human: A Data-Centric Odyssey of Human Generation
title_zh: StyleGAN-人类：人类一代以数据为中心的奥德赛
comment: Technical Report. Project page: https://stylegan-human.github.io/ Code and models: https://github.com/stylegan-human/StyleGAN-Human/
comments: Technical Report. Project page: https://stylegan-human.github.io/ Code and models: https://github.com/stylegan-human/StyleGAN-Human/
abstract: Unconditional human image generation is an important task in vision and graphics, which enables various applications in the creative industry. Existing studies in this field mainly focus on "network engineering" such as designing new components and objective functions. This work takes a data-centric perspective and investigates multiple critical aspects in "data engineering", which we believe would complement the current practice. To facilitate a comprehensive study, we collect and annotate a large-scale human image dataset with over 230K samples capturing diverse poses and textures. Equipped with this large dataset, we rigorously investigate three essential factors in data engineering for StyleGAN-based human generation, namely data size, data distribution, and data alignment. Extensive experiments reveal several valuable observations w.r.t. these aspects: 1) Large-scale data, more than 40K images, are needed to train a high-fidelity unconditional human generation model with vanilla StyleGAN. 2) A balanced training set helps improve the generation quality with rare face poses compared to the long-tailed counterpart, whereas simply balancing the clothing texture distribution does not effectively bring an improvement. 3) Human GAN models with body centers for alignment outperform models trained using face centers or pelvis points as alignment anchors. In addition, a model zoo and human editing applications are demonstrated to facilitate future research in the community.
summary: Unconditional human image generation is an important task in vision and graphics, which enables various applications in the creative industry. Existing studies in this field mainly focus on "network engineering" such as designing new components and objective functions. This work takes a data-centric perspective and investigates multiple critical aspects in "data engineering", which we believe would complement the current practice. To facilitate a comprehensive study, we collect and annotate a large-scale human image dataset with over 230K samples capturing diverse poses and textures. Equipped with this large dataset, we rigorously investigate three essential factors in data engineering for StyleGAN-based human generation, namely data size, data distribution, and data alignment. Extensive experiments reveal several valuable observations w.r.t. these aspects: 1) Large-scale data, more than 40K images, are needed to train a high-fidelity unconditional human generation model with vanilla StyleGAN. 2) A balanced training set helps improve the generation quality with rare face poses compared to the long-tailed counterpart, whereas simply balancing the clothing texture distribution does not effectively bring an improvement. 3) Human GAN models with body centers for alignment outperform models trained using face centers or pelvis points as alignment anchors. In addition, a model zoo and human editing applications are demonstrated to facilitate future research in the community.
abstract_zh: 无条件人体图像生成是视觉和图形领域的一项重要任务，它使得创意产业中的各种应用成为可能。该领域现有的研究主要集中在“网络工程”，例如设计新组件和目标函数。这项工作采用以数据为中心的视角，研究了“数据工程”中的多个关键方面，我们相信这将补充当前的实践。为了促进全面的研究，我们收集并注释了一个大规模的人类图像数据集，其中包含超过 23 万个捕获不同姿势和纹理的样本。借助这个大型数据集，我们严格研究了基于 StyleGAN 的人类生成的数据工程中的三个基本因素，即数据大小、数据分布和数据对齐。大量的实验揭示了一些有价值的观察结果。这些方面：1）使用普通 StyleGAN 训练高保真无条件人类生成模型需要大规模数据，超过 40K 图像。 2）与长尾对应物相比，平衡的训练集有助于提高罕见面部姿势的生成质量，而简单地平衡服装纹理分布并不能有效地带来改善。 3）具有身体中心对齐的人类 GAN 模型优于使用面部中心或骨盆点作为对齐锚点训练的模型。此外，还演示了模型动物园和人类编辑应用程序，以促进社区未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文从数据工程角度研究基于StyleGAN的人体图像生成，探讨数据规模、分布与对齐对生成效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重于网络结构设计，而数据工程的关键因素尚未充分探索，需通过大规模数据验证数据相关影响。
AI.method: 构建包含23万张多样人体姿态与纹理的标注数据集，系统分析数据规模、分布平衡性及对齐方式对StyleGAN生成效果的作用。
AI.result: 发现需超4万张图像训练高质量模型，平衡罕见面部姿态数据可提升质量，基于身体中心对齐优于面部或骨盆点对齐。
AI.conclusion: 数据工程在人体生成中至关重要，研究结果为后续模型优化与应用开发提供数据驱动的指导方向。

authors_text: Dubing Chen,Yuming Shen,Haofeng Zhang,Philip H. S. Torr
title: Zero-Shot Logit Adjustment
title_zh: 零样本 Logit 调整
abstract: Semantic-descriptor-based Generalized Zero-Shot Learning (GZSL) poses challenges in recognizing novel classes in the test phase. The development of generative models enables current GZSL techniques to probe further into the semantic-visual link, culminating in a two-stage form that includes a generator and a classifier. However, existing generation-based methods focus on enhancing the generator's effect while neglecting the improvement of the classifier. In this paper, we first analyze of two properties of the generated pseudo unseen samples: bias and homogeneity. Then, we perform variational Bayesian inference to back-derive the evaluation metrics, which reflects the balance of the seen and unseen classes. As a consequence of our derivation, the aforementioned two properties are incorporated into the classifier training as seen-unseen priors via logit adjustment. The Zero-Shot Logit Adjustment further puts semantic-based classifiers into effect in generation-based GZSL. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed technique achieves state-of-the-art when combined with the basic generator, and it can improve various generative Zero-Shot Learning frameworks. Our codes are available on https://github.com/cdb342/IJCAI-2022-ZLA.
summary: Semantic-descriptor-based Generalized Zero-Shot Learning (GZSL) poses challenges in recognizing novel classes in the test phase. The development of generative models enables current GZSL techniques to probe further into the semantic-visual link, culminating in a two-stage form that includes a generator and a classifier. However, existing generation-based methods focus on enhancing the generator's effect while neglecting the improvement of the classifier. In this paper, we first analyze of two properties of the generated pseudo unseen samples: bias and homogeneity. Then, we perform variational Bayesian inference to back-derive the evaluation metrics, which reflects the balance of the seen and unseen classes. As a consequence of our derivation, the aforementioned two properties are incorporated into the classifier training as seen-unseen priors via logit adjustment. The Zero-Shot Logit Adjustment further puts semantic-based classifiers into effect in generation-based GZSL. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed technique achieves state-of-the-art when combined with the basic generator, and it can improve various generative Zero-Shot Learning frameworks. Our codes are available on https://github.com/cdb342/IJCAI-2022-ZLA.
abstract_zh: 基于语义描述符的广义零样本学习（GZSL）对测试阶段识别新类别提出了挑战。生成模型的发展使当前的 GZSL 技术能够进一步探讨语义视觉链接，最终形成包括生成器和分类器的两阶段形式。然而，现有的基于生成的方法侧重于增强生成器的效果，而忽略了分类器的改进。在本文中，我们首先分析生成的伪未见样本的两个属性：偏差和同质性。然后，我们执行变分贝叶斯推理来反向推导评估指标，这反映了可见类和未见类的平衡。作为我们推导的结果，上述两个属性通过 logit 调整作为可见的先验被纳入分类器训练中。零样本 Logit 调整进一步将基于语义的分类器在基于生成的 GZSL 中发挥作用。我们的实验表明，所提出的技术与基本生成器结合时达到了最先进的水平，并且可以改进各种生成式零样本学习框架。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/cdb342/IJCAI-2022-ZLA 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义描述符的零样本学习方法，通过调整分类器logit来提升生成式广义零样本学习（GZSL）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式GZSL方法过度关注生成器优化，忽视分类器改进，导致可见类与不可见类间不平衡问题未被有效解决。
AI.method: 分析生成伪样本的偏差与同质性特性，通过变分贝叶斯推断反向推导评估指标，将特性转化为分类器训练中的先验知识进行logit调整。
AI.result: 该方法在基础生成器上达到SOTA性能，可有效提升多种生成式零样本学习框架的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入logit调整机制，本文实现了可见类与不可见类的平衡优化，为生成式GZSL提供了新的分类器改进范式。

authors_text: Hao Ouyang,Bo Zhang,Pan Zhang,Hao Yang,Jiaolong Yang,Dong Chen,Qifeng Chen,Fang Wen
title: Real-Time Neural Character Rendering with Pose-Guided Multiplane Images
title_zh: 使用姿势引导多平面图像进行实时神经角色渲染
abstract: We propose pose-guided multiplane image (MPI) synthesis which can render an animatable character in real scenes with photorealistic quality. We use a portable camera rig to capture the multi-view images along with the driving signal for the moving subject. Our method generalizes the image-to-image translation paradigm, which translates the human pose to a 3D scene representation -- MPIs that can be rendered in free viewpoints, using the multi-views captures as supervision. To fully cultivate the potential of MPI, we propose depth-adaptive MPI which can be learned using variable exposure images while being robust to inaccurate camera registration. Our method demonstrates advantageous novel-view synthesis quality over the state-of-the-art approaches for characters with challenging motions. Moreover, the proposed method is generalizable to novel combinations of training poses and can be explicitly controlled. Our method achieves such expressive and animatable character rendering all in real time, serving as a promising solution for practical applications.
summary: We propose pose-guided multiplane image (MPI) synthesis which can render an animatable character in real scenes with photorealistic quality. We use a portable camera rig to capture the multi-view images along with the driving signal for the moving subject. Our method generalizes the image-to-image translation paradigm, which translates the human pose to a 3D scene representation -- MPIs that can be rendered in free viewpoints, using the multi-views captures as supervision. To fully cultivate the potential of MPI, we propose depth-adaptive MPI which can be learned using variable exposure images while being robust to inaccurate camera registration. Our method demonstrates advantageous novel-view synthesis quality over the state-of-the-art approaches for characters with challenging motions. Moreover, the proposed method is generalizable to novel combinations of training poses and can be explicitly controlled. Our method achieves such expressive and animatable character rendering all in real time, serving as a promising solution for practical applications.
abstract_zh: 我们提出姿势引导多平面图像（MPI）合成，它可以在真实场景中渲染具有照片级真实感质量的可动画角色。我们使用便携式相机设备来捕获多视图图像以及移动主体的驱动信号。我们的方法概括了图像到图像的转换范式，它将人体姿势转换为 3D 场景表示——可以在自由视点中渲染的 MPI，使用多视图捕获作为监督。为了充分发挥 MPI 的潜力，我们提出了深度自适应 MPI，它可以使用可变曝光图像进行学习，同时对不准确的相机配准具有鲁棒性。对于具有挑战性动作的角色，我们的方法展示了优于最先进方法的小说视图合成质量。此外，所提出的方法可推广到训练姿势的新颖组合，并且可以明确地控制。我们的方法实时实现了这种富有表现力和可动画的角色渲染，为实际应用提供了一个有前景的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于姿态引导的多平面图像（MPI）合成方法，可在真实场景中实时生成具有逼真视觉效果的可动画角色。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂动作或真实场景中的角色渲染时存在质量与效率的不足，需开发更鲁棒且实时的神经渲染方案。
AI.method: 通过便携式相机捕获多视角图像及驱动信号，将人体姿态转化为MPI表示，并利用多视角数据作为监督。提出深度自适应MPI技术，结合可变曝光图像训练以增强对相机注册误差的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在复杂动作角色的新型视角合成任务中，优于现有最先进方法，支持训练姿态外的泛化组合，且实现端到端实时渲染。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实时可控的角色动画生成提供了高效解决方案，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Carl Edwards,Tuan Lai,Kevin Ros,Garrett Honke,Kyunghyun Cho,Heng Ji
title: Translation between Molecules and Natural Language
title_zh: 分子与自然语言之间的翻译
comment: Accepted at EMNLP 2022. Data and code can be found on [Github](https://github.com/blender-nlp/MolT5)
comments: Accepted at EMNLP 2022. Data and code can be found on [Github](https://github.com/blender-nlp/MolT5)
abstract: We present $\textbf{MolT5}$ $-$ a self-supervised learning framework for pretraining models on a vast amount of unlabeled natural language text and molecule strings. $\textbf{MolT5}$ allows for new, useful, and challenging analogs of traditional vision-language tasks, such as molecule captioning and text-based de novo molecule generation (altogether: translation between molecules and language), which we explore for the first time. Since $\textbf{MolT5}$ pretrains models on single-modal data, it helps overcome the chemistry domain shortcoming of data scarcity. Furthermore, we consider several metrics, including a new cross-modal embedding-based metric, to evaluate the tasks of molecule captioning and text-based molecule generation. Our results show that $\textbf{MolT5}$-based models are able to generate outputs, both molecules and captions, which in many cases are high quality.
summary: We present $\textbf{MolT5}$ $-$ a self-supervised learning framework for pretraining models on a vast amount of unlabeled natural language text and molecule strings. $\textbf{MolT5}$ allows for new, useful, and challenging analogs of traditional vision-language tasks, such as molecule captioning and text-based de novo molecule generation (altogether: translation between molecules and language), which we explore for the first time. Since $\textbf{MolT5}$ pretrains models on single-modal data, it helps overcome the chemistry domain shortcoming of data scarcity. Furthermore, we consider several metrics, including a new cross-modal embedding-based metric, to evaluate the tasks of molecule captioning and text-based molecule generation. Our results show that $\textbf{MolT5}$-based models are able to generate outputs, both molecules and captions, which in many cases are high quality.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 $\textbf{MolT5}$ $-$ 一个自监督学习框架，用于在大量未标记的自然语言文本和分子字符串上预训练模型。 $\textbf{MolT5}$ 允许对传统视觉语言任务进行新的、有用的和具有挑战性的模拟，例如分子字幕和基于文本的从头分子生成（总而言之：分子和语言之间的翻译），这是我们第一次探索。由于 $\textbf{MolT5}$ 在单模态数据上预训练模型，因此有助于克服化学领域数据稀缺的缺点。此外，我们考虑了几个指标，包括一个新的基于跨模式嵌入的指标，来评估分子字幕和基于文本的分子生成的任务。我们的结果表明，基于 $\textbf{MolT5}$ 的模型能够生成分子和标题等输出，在许多情况下都是高质量的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MolT5框架，实现分子与自然语言之间的双向翻译任务，包括分子描述生成和文本引导的分子生成。
AI.motivation: 化学领域存在数据稀缺问题，传统方法难以有效处理分子与语言的跨模态任务，需开发新框架突破数据限制。
AI.method: 基于自监督学习，利用单模态数据预训练模型，设计跨模态嵌入评估指标，实现分子字符串与自然语言的双向翻译。
AI.result: MolT5模型在分子描述生成和文本到分子生成任务中表现出高质量输出，验证了跨模态翻译的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MolT5为分子与语言的跨模态任务提供了新方法，通过单模态预训练克服数据稀缺，推动了化学领域自然语言处理的应用。

ai_content.result: MolT5模型在分子描述生成和文本到分子生成任务中表现出高质量输出，验证了跨模态翻译的有效性。

search_text: Translation between Molecules and Natural Language 分子与自然语言之间的翻译 We present $\textbf{MolT5}$ $-$ a self-supervised learning framework for pretraining models on a vast amount of unlabeled natural language text and molecule strings. $\textbf{MolT5}$ allows for new, useful, and challenging analogs of traditional vision-language tasks, such as molecule captioning and text-based de novo molecule generation (altogether: translation between molecules and language), which we explore for the first time. Since $\textbf{MolT5}$ pretrains models on single-modal data, it helps overcome the chemistry domain shortcoming of data scarcity. Furthermore, we consider several metrics, including a new cross-modal embedding-based metric, to evaluate the tasks of molecule captioning and text-based molecule generation. Our results show that $\textbf{MolT5}$-based models are able to generate outputs, both molecules and captions, which in many cases are high quality. 我们提出了 $\textbf{MolT5}$ $-$ 一个自监督学习框架，用于在大量未标记的自然语言文本和分子字符串上预训练模型。 $\textbf{MolT5}$ 允许对传统视觉语言任务进行新的、有用的和具有挑战性的模拟，例如分子字幕和基于文本的从头分子生成（总而言之：分子和语言之间的翻译），这是我们第一次探索。由于 $\textbf{MolT5}$ 在单模态数据上预训练模型，因此有助于克服化学领域数据稀缺的缺点。此外，我们考虑了几个指标，包括一个新的基于跨模式嵌入的指标，来评估分子字幕和基于文本的分子生成的任务。我们的结果表明，基于 $\textbf{MolT5}$ 的模型能够生成分子和标题等输出，在许多情况下都是高质量的。 本文提出MolT5框架，实现分子与自然语言之间的双向翻译任务，包括分子描述生成和文本引导的分子生成。 Carl Edwards,Tuan Lai,Kevin Ros,Garrett Honke,Kyunghyun Cho,Heng Ji cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Po-chun Hsu,Da-rong Liu,Andy T. Liu,Hung-yi Lee
title: Parallel Synthesis for Autoregressive Speech Generation
title_zh: 自回归语音生成的并行综合
comment: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
comments: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
abstract: Autoregressive neural vocoders have achieved outstanding performance in speech synthesis tasks such as text-to-speech and voice conversion. An autoregressive vocoder predicts a sample at some time step conditioned on those at previous time steps. Though it synthesizes natural human speech, the iterative generation inevitably makes the synthesis time proportional to the utterance length, leading to low efficiency. Many works were dedicated to generating the whole speech sequence in parallel and proposed GAN-based, flow-based, and score-based vocoders. This paper proposed a new thought for the autoregressive generation. Instead of iteratively predicting samples in a time sequence, the proposed model performs frequency-wise autoregressive generation (FAR) and bit-wise autoregressive generation (BAR) to synthesize speech. In FAR, a speech utterance is split into frequency subbands, and a subband is generated conditioned on the previously generated one. Similarly, in BAR, an 8-bit quantized signal is generated iteratively from the first bit. By redesigning the autoregressive method to compute in domains other than the time domain, the number of iterations in the proposed model is no longer proportional to the utterance length but to the number of subbands/bits, significantly increasing inference efficiency. Besides, a post-filter is employed to sample signals from output posteriors; its training objective is designed based on the characteristics of the proposed methods. Experimental results show that the proposed model can synthesize speech faster than real-time without GPU acceleration. Compared with baseline vocoders, the proposed model achieves better MUSHRA results and shows good generalization ability for unseen speakers and 44 kHz speech.

An autoregressive vocoder predicts a sample at some time step conditioned on those at previous time steps. Though it synthesizes natural human speech, the iterative generation inevitably makes the synthesis time proportional to the utterance length, leading to low efficiency. Many works were dedicated to generating the whole speech sequence in parallel and proposed GAN-based, flow-based, and score-based vocoders. This paper proposed a new thought for the autoregressive generation. Instead of iteratively predicting samples in a time sequence, the proposed model performs frequency-wise autoregressive generation (FAR) and bit-wise autoregressive generation (BAR) to synthesize speech. In FAR, a speech utterance is split into frequency subbands, and a subband is generated conditioned on the previously generated one. Similarly, in BAR, an 8-bit quantized signal is generated iteratively from the first bit. By redesigning the autoregressive method to compute in domains other than the time domain, the number of iterations in the proposed model is no longer proportional to the utterance length but to the number of subbands/bits, significantly increasing inference efficiency. Besides, a post-filter is employed to sample signals from output posteriors; its training objective is designed based on the characteristics of the proposed methods. Experimental results show that the proposed model can synthesize speech faster than real-time without GPU acceleration. Compared with baseline vocoders, the proposed model achieves better MUSHRA results and shows good generalization ability for unseen speakers and 44 kHz speech.
abstract_zh: 自回归神经声码器在文本到语音和语音转换等语音合成任务中取得了出色的性能。自回归声码器根据先前时间步的样本来预测某个时间步的样本。虽然它合成了自然的人类语音，但迭代生成不可避免地使合成时间与话语长度成正比，导致效率低下。许多工作致力于并行生成整个语音序列，并提出了基于 GAN、基于流和基于分数的声码器。本文提出了自回归生成的新思路。该模型不是按时间序列迭代预测样本，而是执行频率自回归生成（FAR）和按位自回归生成（BAR）来合成语音。在 FAR 中，语音话语被分成频率子带，并根据先前生成的子带生成子带。类似地，在 BAR 中，从第一位开始迭代生成 8 位量化信号。通过重新设计自回归方法以在时域以外的域中进行计算，所提出的模型中的迭代次数不再与话语长度成正比，而是与子带/比特的数量成正比，从而显着提高了推理效率。此外，采用后置滤波器对输出后验信号进行采样；其训练目标是根据所提出方法的特点设计的。实验结果表明，该模型无需 GPU 加速即可比实时更快地合成语音。与基线声码器相比，所提出的模型取得了更好的 MUSHRA 结果，并对看不见的说话者和 44 kHz 语音表现出良好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的自回归语音生成方法，通过频率域和比特域的并行合成提升效率。
AI.motivation: 传统自回归语音合成因逐时间步迭代生成导致效率低下，而现有并行生成方法存在质量或泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出频率-wise自回归生成（FAR）和比特-wise自回归生成（BAR）方法，将语音分解为频段或比特级进行并行生成，并设计基于输出后验的后置滤波器。
AI.result: 模型在无GPU加速下实现实时语音合成，MUSHRA评分优于基线模型，且对未见说话人和44kHz语音具有良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过域变换减少迭代次数，兼顾效率与质量，为自回归语音生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Wei Cheng,Su Xu,Jingtan Piao,Chen Qian,Wayne Wu,Kwan-Yee Lin,Hongsheng Li
title: Generalizable Neural Performer: Learning Robust Radiance Fields for Human Novel View Synthesis
title_zh: 可推广的神经表演者：学习用于人类新颖视图合成的鲁棒辐射场
abstract: This work targets at using a general deep learning framework to synthesize free-viewpoint images of arbitrary human performers, only requiring a sparse number of camera views as inputs and skirting per-case fine-tuning. The large variation of geometry and appearance, caused by articulated body poses, shapes and clothing types, are the key bottlenecks of this task. To overcome these challenges, we present a simple yet powerful framework, named Generalizable Neural Performer (GNR), that learns a generalizable and robust neural body representation over various geometry and appearance. Specifically, we compress the light fields for novel view human rendering as conditional implicit neural radiance fields from both geometry and appearance aspects. We first introduce an Implicit Geometric Body Embedding strategy to enhance the robustness based on both parametric 3D human body model and multi-view images hints. We further propose a Screen-Space Occlusion-Aware Appearance Blending technique to preserve the high-quality appearance, through interpolating source view appearance to the radiance fields with a relax but approximate geometric guidance. To evaluate our method, we present our ongoing effort of constructing a dataset with remarkable complexity and diversity. The dataset GeneBody-1.0, includes over 360M frames of 370 subjects under multi-view cameras capturing, performing a large variety of pose actions, along with diverse body shapes, clothing, accessories and hairdos. Experiments on GeneBody-1.0 and ZJU-Mocap show better robustness of our methods than recent state-of-the-art generalizable methods among all cross-dataset, unseen subjects and unseen poses settings. We also demonstrate the competitiveness of our model compared with cutting-edge case-specific ones. Dataset, code and model will be made publicly available.
summary: This work targets at using a general deep learning framework to synthesize free-viewpoint images of arbitrary human performers, only requiring a sparse number of camera views as inputs and skirting per-case fine-tuning. The large variation of geometry and appearance, caused by articulated body poses, shapes and clothing types, are the key bottlenecks of this task. To overcome these challenges, we present a simple yet powerful framework, named Generalizable Neural Performer (GNR), that learns a generalizable and robust neural body representation over various geometry and appearance. Specifically, we compress the light fields for novel view human rendering as conditional implicit neural radiance fields from both geometry and appearance aspects. We first introduce an Implicit Geometric Body Embedding strategy to enhance the robustness based on both parametric 3D human body model and multi-view images hints. We further propose a Screen-Space Occlusion-Aware Appearance Blending technique to preserve the high-quality appearance, through interpolating source view appearance to the radiance fields with a relax but approximate geometric guidance. To evaluate our method, we present our ongoing effort of constructing a dataset with remarkable complexity and diversity. The dataset GeneBody-1.0, includes over 360M frames of 370 subjects under multi-view cameras capturing, performing a large variety of pose actions, along with diverse body shapes, clothing, accessories and hairdos. Experiments on GeneBody-1.0 and ZJU-Mocap show better robustness of our methods than recent state-of-the-art generalizable methods among all cross-dataset, unseen subjects and unseen poses settings. We also demonstrate the competitiveness of our model compared with cutting-edge case-specific ones. Dataset, code and model will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是使用通用的深度学习框架来合成任意人类表演者的自由视点图像，只需要少量的摄像机视图作为输入，并绕过每个案例的微调。由铰接的身体姿势、形状和服装类型引起的几何形状和外观的巨大变化是这项任务的关键瓶颈。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一个简单但功能强大的框架，名为泛化神经执行器（GNR），它学习各种几何和外观的可泛化和鲁棒的神经体表示。具体来说，我们从几何和外观方面将用于新视角人类渲染的光场压缩为条件隐式神经辐射场。我们首先引入隐式几何人体嵌入策略，以增强基于参数化 3D 人体模型和多视图图像提示的鲁棒性。我们进一步提出了一种屏幕空间遮挡感知外观混合技术，通过使用宽松但近似的几何指导将源视图外观插值到辐射场，以保持高质量的外观。为了评估我们的方法，我们展示了我们在构建具有显着复杂性和多样性的数据集方面所做的持续努力。数据集 GeneBody-1.0 包含多视角摄像机捕获的 370 个对象的超过 3.6 亿帧，执行各种姿势动作，以及不同的体型、服装、配饰和发型。 GeneBody-1.0 和 ZJU-Mocap 上的实验表明，在所有跨数据集、未见过的受试者和未见过的姿势设置中，我们的方法比最近最先进的可推广方法具有更好的鲁棒性。我们还展示了我们的模型与尖端特定案例模型相比的竞争力。数据集、代码和模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的神经网络框架Generalizable Neural Performer (GNR)，用于在仅需少量输入视角的情况下，合成任意人体表演者的新型视角图像，无需逐案例微调。
AI.motivation: 人体姿态、形状和服装的多样性导致几何和外观变化巨大，成为新型视角合成任务的关键瓶颈，现有方法难以兼顾通用性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: GNR通过条件隐式神经辐射场压缩光场，结合参数化3D人体模型与多视角图像的隐式几何体嵌入策略，以及基于屏幕空间遮挡感知的外观混合技术，实现几何与外观的鲁棒建模。
AI.result: 在自建的GeneBody-1.0数据集和ZJU-Mocap数据集上，GNR在跨数据集、未见过的主体和姿态场景下均优于最新通用方法，并与案例特定方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: GNR通过几何与外观联合建模有效解决了人体新型视角合成的通用性难题，公开了数据集、代码和模型以推动相关研究。

tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的神经网络框架Generalizable Neural Performer (GNR)，用于在仅需少量输入视角的情况下，合成任意人体表演者的新型视角图像，无需逐案例微调。
motivation: 人体姿态、形状和服装的多样性导致几何和外观变化巨大，成为新型视角合成任务的关键瓶颈，现有方法难以兼顾通用性与鲁棒性。
method: GNR通过条件隐式神经辐射场压缩光场，结合参数化3D人体模型与多视角图像的隐式几何体嵌入策略，以及基于屏幕空间遮挡感知的外观混合技术，实现几何与外观的鲁棒建模。
result: 在自建的GeneBody-1.0数据集和ZJU-Mocap数据集上，GNR在跨数据集、未见过的主体和姿态场景下均优于最新通用方法，并与案例特定方法具有竞争力。
conclusion: GNR通过几何与外观联合建模有效解决了人体新型视角合成的通用性难题，公开了数据集、代码和模型以推动相关研究。
search_text: Generalizable Neural Performer: Learning Robust Radiance Fields for Human Novel View Synthesis 可推广的神经表演者：学习用于人类新颖视图合成的鲁棒辐射场 This work targets at using a general deep learning framework to synthesize free-viewpoint images of arbitrary human performers, only requiring a sparse number of camera views as inputs and skirting per-case fine-tuning. The large variation of geometry and appearance, caused by articulated body poses, shapes and clothing types, are the key bottlenecks of this task. To overcome these challenges, we present a simple yet powerful framework, named Generalizable Neural Performer (GNR), that learns a generalizable and robust neural body representation over various geometry and appearance. Specifically, we compress the light fields for novel view human rendering as conditional implicit neural radiance fields from both geometry and appearance aspects. We first introduce an Implicit Geometric Body Embedding strategy to enhance the robustness based on both parametric 3D human body model and multi-view images hints. We further propose a Screen-Space Occlusion-Aware Appearance Blending technique to preserve the high-quality appearance, through interpolating source view appearance to the radiance fields with a relax but approximate geometric guidance. To evaluate our method, we present our ongoing effort of constructing a dataset with remarkable complexity and diversity. The dataset GeneBody-1.0, includes over 360M frames of 370 subjects under multi-view cameras capturing, performing a large variety of pose actions, along with diverse body shapes, clothing, accessories and hairdos. Experiments on GeneBody-1.0 and ZJU-Mocap show better robustness of our methods than recent state-of-the-art generalizable methods among all cross-dataset, unseen subjects and unseen poses settings. We also demonstrate the competitiveness of our model compared with cutting-edge case-specific ones. Dataset, code and model will be made publicly available. 这项工作的目标是使用通用的深度学习框架来合成任意人类表演者的自由视点图像，只需要少量的摄像机视图作为输入，并绕过每个案例的微调。由铰接的身体姿势、形状和服装类型引起的几何形状和外观的巨大变化是这项任务的关键瓶颈。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一个简单但功能强大的框架，名为泛化神经执行器（GNR），它学习各种几何和外观的可泛化和鲁棒的神经体表示。具体来说，我们从几何和外观方面将用于新视角人类渲染的光场压缩为条件隐式神经辐射场。我们首先引入隐式几何人体嵌入策略，以增强基于参数化 3D 人体模型和多视图图像提示的鲁棒性。我们进一步提出了一种屏幕空间遮挡感知外观混合技术，通过使用宽松但近似的几何指导将源视图外观插值到辐射场，以保持高质量的外观。为了评估我们的方法，我们展示了我们在构建具有显着复杂性和多样性的数据集方面所做的持续努力。数据集 GeneBody-1.0 包含多视角摄像机捕获的 370 个对象的超过 3.6 亿帧，执行各种姿势动作，以及不同的体型、服装、配饰和发型。 GeneBody-1.0 和 ZJU-Mocap 上的实验表明，在所有跨数据集、未见过的受试者和未见过的姿势设置中，我们的方法比最近最先进的可推广方法具有更好的鲁棒性。我们还展示了我们的模型与尖端特定案例模型相比的竞争力。数据集、代码和模型将公开。 本文提出了一种通用的神经网络框架Generalizable Neural Performer (GNR)，用于在仅需少量输入视角的情况下，合成任意人体表演者的新型视角图像，无需逐案例微调。 Wei Cheng,Su Xu,Jingtan Piao,Chen Qian,Wayne Wu,Kwan-Yee Lin,Hongsheng Li cs.CV

authors_text: Zhijian Liu,Haotian Tang,Shengyu Zhao,Kevin Shao,Song Han
title: PVNAS: 3D Neural Architecture Search with Point-Voxel Convolution
title_zh: PVNAS：使用点体素卷积的 3D 神经架构搜索
comment: Journal extension of arXiv:1907.03739 and arXiv:2007.16100 (IEEE TPAMI, 2021). The first two authors contributed equally to this work
comments: Journal extension of arXiv:1907.03739 and arXiv:2007.16100 (IEEE TPAMI, 2021). The first two authors contributed equally to this work
abstract: 3D neural networks are widely used in real-world applications (e.g., AR/VR headsets, self-driving cars). They are required to be fast and accurate; however, limited hardware resources on edge devices make these requirements rather challenging. Previous work processes 3D data using either voxel-based or point-based neural networks, but both types of 3D models are not hardware-efficient due to the large memory footprint and random memory access. In this paper, we study 3D deep learning from the efficiency perspective. We first systematically analyze the bottlenecks of previous 3D methods. We then combine the best from point-based and voxel-based models together and propose a novel hardware-efficient 3D primitive, Point-Voxel Convolution (PVConv). We further enhance this primitive with the sparse convolution to make it more effective in processing large (outdoor) scenes. Based on our designed 3D primitive, we introduce 3D Neural Architecture Search (3D-NAS) to explore the best 3D network architecture given a resource constraint. We evaluate our proposed method on six representative benchmark datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance with 1.8-23.7x measured speedup. Furthermore, our method has been deployed to the autonomous racing vehicle of MIT Driverless, achieving larger detection range, higher accuracy and lower latency.
summary: 3D neural networks are widely used in real-world applications (e.g., AR/VR headsets, self-driving cars). They are required to be fast and accurate; however, limited hardware resources on edge devices make these requirements rather challenging. Previous work processes 3D data using either voxel-based or point-based neural networks, but both types of 3D models are not hardware-efficient due to the large memory footprint and random memory access. In this paper, we study 3D deep learning from the efficiency perspective. We first systematically analyze the bottlenecks of previous 3D methods. We then combine the best from point-based and voxel-based models together and propose a novel hardware-efficient 3D primitive, Point-Voxel Convolution (PVConv). We further enhance this primitive with the sparse convolution to make it more effective in processing large (outdoor) scenes. Based on our designed 3D primitive, we introduce 3D Neural Architecture Search (3D-NAS) to explore the best 3D network architecture given a resource constraint. We evaluate our proposed method on six representative benchmark datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance with 1.8-23.7x measured speedup. Furthermore, our method has been deployed to the autonomous racing vehicle of MIT Driverless, achieving larger detection range, higher accuracy and lower latency.
abstract_zh: 3D 神经网络广泛应用于现实世界的应用（例如 AR/VR 耳机、自动驾驶汽车）。他们要求快速、准确；然而，边缘设备上有限的硬件资源使得这些要求相当具有挑战性。以前的工作使用基于体素或基于点的神经网络处理 3D 数据，但这两种类型的 3D 模型由于内存占用和随机内存访问都不是硬件高效的。在本文中，我们从效率角度研究 3D 深度学习。我们首先系统地分析了以往3D方法的瓶颈。然后，我们将基于点和基于体素的模型的优点结合在一起，并提出一种新颖的硬件高效 3D 原语：点体素卷积 (PVConv)。我们通过稀疏卷积进一步增强了这个原语，使其在处理大型（室外）场景时更有效。基于我们设计的 3D 原语，我们引入 3D 神经架构搜索 (3D-NAS) 来探索给定资源约束的最佳 3D 网络架构。我们在六个代表性基准数据集上评估了我们提出的方法，实现了最先进的性能，测得的加速比为 1.8-23.7 倍。此外，我们的方法已部署到麻省理工学院无人驾驶的自动赛车上，实现了更大的检测范围、更高的精度和更低的延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于点-体素卷积的高效3D神经网络架构搜索方法PVNAS，解决边缘设备上的3D感知效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D神经网络在边缘设备上面临硬件资源限制，体素和点云模型分别存在内存占用大、随机访问效率低的问题。
AI.method: 设计点-体素卷积(PVConv)融合两种模型优势，并引入稀疏卷积优化大场景处理；基于此提出3D-NAS架构搜索框架。
AI.result: 在6个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，速度提升1.8-23.7倍，并成功部署于MIT自动驾驶赛车实现更优检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过硬件感知的架构设计与搜索，有效解决了3D神经网络在边缘设备上的效率瓶颈问题。

search_text: PVNAS: 3D Neural Architecture Search with Point-Voxel Convolution PVNAS：使用点体素卷积的 3D 神经架构搜索 3D neural networks are widely used in real-world applications (e.g., AR/VR headsets, self-driving cars). They are required to be fast and accurate; however, limited hardware resources on edge devices make these requirements rather challenging. Previous work processes 3D data using either voxel-based or point-based neural networks, but both types of 3D models are not hardware-efficient due to the large memory footprint and random memory access. In this paper, we study 3D deep learning from the efficiency perspective. We first systematically analyze the bottlenecks of previous 3D methods. We then combine the best from point-based and voxel-based models together and propose a novel hardware-efficient 3D primitive, Point-Voxel Convolution (PVConv). We further enhance this primitive with the sparse convolution to make it more effective in processing large (outdoor) scenes. Based on our designed 3D primitive, we introduce 3D Neural Architecture Search (3D-NAS) to explore the best 3D network architecture given a resource constraint. We evaluate our proposed method on six representative benchmark datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance with 1.8-23.7x measured speedup. Furthermore, our method has been deployed to the autonomous racing vehicle of MIT Driverless, achieving larger detection range, higher accuracy and lower latency. 3D 神经网络广泛应用于现实世界的应用（例如 AR/VR 耳机、自动驾驶汽车）。他们要求快速、准确；然而，边缘设备上有限的硬件资源使得这些要求相当具有挑战性。以前的工作使用基于体素或基于点的神经网络处理 3D 数据，但这两种类型的 3D 模型由于内存占用和随机内存访问都不是硬件高效的。在本文中，我们从效率角度研究 3D 深度学习。我们首先系统地分析了以往3D方法的瓶颈。然后，我们将基于点和基于体素的模型的优点结合在一起，并提出一种新颖的硬件高效 3D 原语：点体素卷积 (PVConv)。我们通过稀疏卷积进一步增强了这个原语，使其在处理大型（室外）场景时更有效。基于我们设计的 3D 原语，我们引入 3D 神经架构搜索 (3D-NAS) 来探索给定资源约束的最佳 3D 网络架构。我们在六个代表性基准数据集上评估了我们提出的方法，实现了最先进的性能，测得的加速比为 1.8-23.7 倍。此外，我们的方法已部署到麻省理工学院无人驾驶的自动赛车上，实现了更大的检测范围、更高的精度和更低的延迟。 本文提出一种基于点-体素卷积的高效3D神经网络架构搜索方法PVNAS，解决边缘设备上的3D感知效率问题。 Zhijian Liu,Haotian Tang,Shengyu Zhao,Kevin Shao,Song Han cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ella Lan
title: Performer: A Novel PPG-to-ECG Reconstruction Transformer for a Digital Biomarker of Cardiovascular Disease Detection
title_zh: 表演者：用于心血管疾病检测数字生物标记的新型 PPG 至 ECG 重建变压器
abstract: Electrocardiography (ECG), an electrical measurement which captures cardiac activities, is the gold standard for diagnosing cardiovascular disease (CVD). However, ECG is infeasible for continuous cardiac monitoring due to its requirement for user participation. By contrast, photoplethysmography (PPG) provides easy-to-collect data, but its limited accuracy constrains its clinical usage. To combine the advantages of both signals, recent studies incorporate various deep learning techniques for the reconstruction of PPG signals to ECG; however, the lack of contextual information as well as the limited abilities to denoise biomedical signals ultimately constrain model performance. In this research, we propose Performer, a novel Transformer-based architecture that reconstructs ECG from PPG and combines the PPG and reconstructed ECG as multiple modalities for CVD detection. This method is the first time that Transformer sequence-to-sequence translation has been performed on biomedical waveform reconstruction, combining the advantages of both PPG and ECG. We also create Shifted Patch-based Attention (SPA), an effective method to encode/decode the biomedical waveforms. Through fetching the various sequence lengths and capturing cross-patch connections, SPA maximizes the signal processing for both local features and global contextual representations. The proposed architecture generates a state-of-the-art performance of 0.29 RMSE for the reconstruction of PPG to ECG on the BIDMC database, surpassing prior studies. We also evaluated this model on the MIMIC-III dataset, achieving a 95.9% accuracy in CVD detection, and on the PPG-BP dataset, achieving 75.9% accuracy in related CVD diabetes detection, indicating its generalizability. As a proof of concept, an earring wearable named PEARL (prototype), was designed to scale up the point-of-care (POC) healthcare system.
summary: Electrocardiography (ECG), an electrical measurement which captures cardiac activities, is the gold standard for diagnosing cardiovascular disease (CVD). However, ECG is infeasible for continuous cardiac monitoring due to its requirement for user participation. By contrast, photoplethysmography (PPG) provides easy-to-collect data, but its limited accuracy constrains its clinical usage. To combine the advantages of both signals, recent studies incorporate various deep learning techniques for the reconstruction of PPG signals to ECG; however, the lack of contextual information as well as the limited abilities to denoise biomedical signals ultimately constrain model performance. In this research, we propose Performer, a novel Transformer-based architecture that reconstructs ECG from PPG and combines the PPG and reconstructed ECG as multiple modalities for CVD detection. This method is the first time that Transformer sequence-to-sequence translation has been performed on biomedical waveform reconstruction, combining the advantages of both PPG and ECG. We also create Shifted Patch-based Attention (SPA), an effective method to encode/decode the biomedical waveforms. Through fetching the various sequence lengths and capturing cross-patch connections, SPA maximizes the signal processing for both local features and global contextual representations. The proposed architecture generates a state-of-the-art performance of 0.29 RMSE for the reconstruction of PPG to ECG on the BIDMC database, surpassing prior studies. We also evaluated this model on the MIMIC-III dataset, achieving a 95.9% accuracy in CVD detection, and on the PPG-BP dataset, achieving 75.9% accuracy in related CVD diabetes detection, indicating its generalizability. As a proof of concept, an earring wearable named PEARL (prototype), was designed to scale up the point-of-care (POC) healthcare system.
abstract_zh: 心电图 (ECG) 是一种捕捉心脏活动的电测量方法，是诊断心血管疾病 (CVD) 的金标准。然而，由于心电图需要用户参与，因此无法用于连续心脏监测。相比之下，光电体积描记法（PPG）提供易于收集的数据，但其有限的准确性限制了其临床使用。为了结合两种信号的优点，最近的研究结合了各种深度学习技术来将 PPG 信号重建为 ECG；然而，上下文信息的缺乏以及生物医学信号去噪能力有限最终限制了模型的性能。在这项研究中，我们提出了 Performer，一种基于 Transformer 的新型架构，它可以从 PPG 重建 ECG，并将 PPG 和重建的 ECG 结合起来作为 CVD 检测的多种模式。该方法首次将Transformer序列到序列转换应用于生物医学波形重建，结合了PPG和ECG两者的优点。我们还创建了基于转移补丁的注意力（SPA），这是一种对生物医学波形进行编码/解码的有效方法。通过获取各种序列长度并捕获跨补丁连接，SPA 最大化了局部特征和全局上下文表示的信号处理。所提出的架构在 BIDMC 数据库上将 PPG 重建为 ECG 时产生了 0.29 RMSE 的最先进性能，超过了之前的研究。我们还在 MIMIC-III 数据集上评估了该模型，在 CVD 检测中实现了 95.9% 的准确率，在 PPG-BP 数据集上评估了该模型，在相关 CVD 糖尿病检测中实现了 75.9% 的准确率，表明了其普适性。作为概念验证，一款名为 PEARL（原型）的耳环可穿戴设备旨在扩大即时护理 (POC) 医疗保健系统的规模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Performer，一种基于Transformer的PPG到ECG重建模型，用于心血管疾病检测的数字生物标志物开发。
AI.motivation: ECG是心血管疾病诊断的黄金标准，但难以实现连续监测；PPG虽易采集但准确性不足。现有方法因缺乏上下文信息和去噪能力限制性能，需结合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计Performer架构，首次将Transformer序列到序列翻译应用于生物医学波形重建，引入Shifted Patch-based Attention（SPA）机制以捕捉局部特征与全局上下文，并融合PPG与重建ECG多模态数据。
AI.result: 在BIDMC数据集上实现0.29 RMSE的ECG重建性能，在MIMIC-III数据集上达到95.9%的CVD检测准确率，在PPG-BP数据集上达到75.9%的糖尿病相关CVD检测准确率，并开发了可穿戴设备PEARL原型。
AI.conclusion: Performer通过多模态融合与SPA机制显著提升重建与检测性能，验证了其在点-of-care医疗系统的可行性与泛化能力。

ai_content.result: 在BIDMC数据集上实现0.29 RMSE的ECG重建性能，在MIMIC-III数据集上达到95.9%的CVD检测准确率，在PPG-BP数据集上达到75.9%的糖尿病相关CVD检测准确率，并开发了可穿戴设备PEARL原型。

search_text: Performer: A Novel PPG-to-ECG Reconstruction Transformer for a Digital Biomarker of Cardiovascular Disease Detection 表演者：用于心血管疾病检测数字生物标记的新型 PPG 至 ECG 重建变压器 Electrocardiography (ECG), an electrical measurement which captures cardiac activities, is the gold standard for diagnosing cardiovascular disease (CVD). However, ECG is infeasible for continuous cardiac monitoring due to its requirement for user participation. By contrast, photoplethysmography (PPG) provides easy-to-collect data, but its limited accuracy constrains its clinical usage. To combine the advantages of both signals, recent studies incorporate various deep learning techniques for the reconstruction of PPG signals to ECG; however, the lack of contextual information as well as the limited abilities to denoise biomedical signals ultimately constrain model performance. In this research, we propose Performer, a novel Transformer-based architecture that reconstructs ECG from PPG and combines the PPG and reconstructed ECG as multiple modalities for CVD detection. This method is the first time that Transformer sequence-to-sequence translation has been performed on biomedical waveform reconstruction, combining the advantages of both PPG and ECG. We also create Shifted Patch-based Attention (SPA), an effective method to encode/decode the biomedical waveforms. Through fetching the various sequence lengths and capturing cross-patch connections, SPA maximizes the signal processing for both local features and global contextual representations. The proposed architecture generates a state-of-the-art performance of 0.29 RMSE for the reconstruction of PPG to ECG on the BIDMC database, surpassing prior studies. We also evaluated this model on the MIMIC-III dataset, achieving a 95.9% accuracy in CVD detection, and on the PPG-BP dataset, achieving 75.9% accuracy in related CVD diabetes detection, indicating its generalizability. As a proof of concept, an earring wearable named PEARL (prototype), was designed to scale up the point-of-care (POC) healthcare system. 心电图 (ECG) 是一种捕捉心脏活动的电测量方法，是诊断心血管疾病 (CVD) 的金标准。然而，由于心电图需要用户参与，因此无法用于连续心脏监测。相比之下，光电体积描记法（PPG）提供易于收集的数据，但其有限的准确性限制了其临床使用。为了结合两种信号的优点，最近的研究结合了各种深度学习技术来将 PPG 信号重建为 ECG；然而，上下文信息的缺乏以及生物医学信号去噪能力有限最终限制了模型的性能。在这项研究中，我们提出了 Performer，一种基于 Transformer 的新型架构，它可以从 PPG 重建 ECG，并将 PPG 和重建的 ECG 结合起来作为 CVD 检测的多种模式。该方法首次将Transformer序列到序列转换应用于生物医学波形重建，结合了PPG和ECG两者的优点。我们还创建了基于转移补丁的注意力（SPA），这是一种对生物医学波形进行编码/解码的有效方法。通过获取各种序列长度并捕获跨补丁连接，SPA 最大化了局部特征和全局上下文表示的信号处理。所提出的架构在 BIDMC 数据库上将 PPG 重建为 ECG 时产生了 0.29 RMSE 的最先进性能，超过了之前的研究。我们还在 MIMIC-III 数据集上评估了该模型，在 CVD 检测中实现了 95.9% 的准确率，在 PPG-BP 数据集上评估了该模型，在相关 CVD 糖尿病检测中实现了 75.9% 的准确率，表明了其普适性。作为概念验证，一款名为 PEARL（原型）的耳环可穿戴设备旨在扩大即时护理 (POC) 医疗保健系统的规模。 本文提出Performer，一种基于Transformer的PPG到ECG重建模型，用于心血管疾病检测的数字生物标志物开发。 Ella Lan eess.SP,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhenhui Ye,Zhou Zhao,Yi Ren,Fei Wu
title: SyntaSpeech: Syntax-Aware Generative Adversarial Text-to-Speech
title_zh: SyntaSpeech：语法感知的生成对抗性文本转语音
abstract: The recent progress in non-autoregressive text-to-speech (NAR-TTS) has made fast and high-quality speech synthesis possible. However, current NAR-TTS models usually use phoneme sequence as input and thus cannot understand the tree-structured syntactic information of the input sequence, which hurts the prosody modeling. To this end, we propose SyntaSpeech, a syntax-aware and light-weight NAR-TTS model, which integrates tree-structured syntactic information into the prosody modeling modules in PortaSpeech \cite{ren2021portaspeech}. Specifically, 1) We build a syntactic graph based on the dependency tree of the input sentence, then process the text encoding with a syntactic graph encoder to extract the syntactic information. 2) We incorporate the extracted syntactic encoding with PortaSpeech to improve the prosody prediction. 3) We introduce a multi-length discriminator to replace the flow-based post-net in PortaSpeech, which simplifies the training pipeline and improves the inference speed, while keeping the naturalness of the generated audio. Experiments on three datasets not only show that the tree-structured syntactic information grants SyntaSpeech the ability to synthesize better audio with expressive prosody, but also demonstrate the generalization ability of SyntaSpeech to adapt to multiple languages and multi-speaker text-to-speech. Ablation studies demonstrate the necessity of each component in SyntaSpeech. Source code and audio samples are available at https://syntaspeech.github.io
summary: The recent progress in non-autoregressive text-to-speech (NAR-TTS) has made fast and high-quality speech synthesis possible. However, current NAR-TTS models usually use phoneme sequence as input and thus cannot understand the tree-structured syntactic information of the input sequence, which hurts the prosody modeling. To this end, we propose SyntaSpeech, a syntax-aware and light-weight NAR-TTS model, which integrates tree-structured syntactic information into the prosody modeling modules in PortaSpeech \cite{ren2021portaspeech}. Specifically, 1) We build a syntactic graph based on the dependency tree of the input sentence, then process the text encoding with a syntactic graph encoder to extract the syntactic information. 2) We incorporate the extracted syntactic encoding with PortaSpeech to improve the prosody prediction. 3) We introduce a multi-length discriminator to replace the flow-based post-net in PortaSpeech, which simplifies the training pipeline and improves the inference speed, while keeping the naturalness of the generated audio. Experiments on three datasets not only show that the tree-structured syntactic information grants SyntaSpeech the ability to synthesize better audio with expressive prosody, but also demonstrate the generalization ability of SyntaSpeech to adapt to multiple languages and multi-speaker text-to-speech. Ablation studies demonstrate the necessity of each component in SyntaSpeech. Source code and audio samples are available at https://syntaspeech.github.io
abstract_zh: 非自回归文本转语音 (NAR-TTS) 的最新进展使得快速、高质量的语音合成成为可能。然而，当前的NAR-TTS模型通常使用音素序列作为输入，因此无法理解输入序列的树形结构句法信息，这不利于韵律建模。为此，我们提出了 SyntaSpeech，一种语法感知的轻量级 NAR-TTS 模型，它将树结构句法信息集成到 PortaSpeech \cite{ren2021portaspeech} 中的韵律建模模块中。具体来说，1）我们基于输入句子的依存树构建句法图，然后用句法图编码器处理文本编码以提取句法信息。 2）我们将提取的句法编码与PortaSpeech结合起来以改进韵律预测。 3）我们引入了多长度鉴别器来取代PortaSpeech中基于流的后置网络，这简化了训练流程并提高了推理速度，同时保持了生成音频的自然度。在三个数据集上的实验不仅表明树形结构的句法信息赋予了SyntaSpeech合成更好的具有表达韵律的音频的能力，而且还证明了SyntaSpeech适应多种语言和多说话人文本转语音的泛化能力。消融研究证明了 SyntaSpeech 中每个组件的必要性。源代码和音频示例可在 https://syntaspeech.github.io 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出SyntaSpeech，一种结合句法信息的非自回归文本到语音合成模型，以提升语音的韵律表现力。
AI.motivation: 现有非自回归文本到语音模型（NAR-TTS）因忽略输入文本的树状句法结构，导致韵律建模不足，影响语音自然度。
AI.method: 1) 基于输入句子的依存树构建句法图，并通过句法图编码器提取句法信息；2) 将句法编码与PortaSpeech结合优化韵律预测；3) 引入多长度判别器替代流式后网络，简化训练流程并提升推理速度。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上验证了句法信息对韵律表现力的提升，模型可泛化至多语言和多说话人场景，消融实验验证各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: SyntaSpeech通过整合句法信息显著提升了语音合成质量与效率，为多语言和多说话人场景提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Renichiro Haba,Masayuki Ohzeki,Kazuyuki Tanaka
title: Travel time optimization on multi-AGV routing by reverse annealing
title_zh: 通过反向退火优化多 AGV 路径的行程时间
abstract: Quantum annealing has been actively researched since D-Wave Systems produced the first commercial machine in 2011. Controlling a large fleet of automated guided vehicles is one of the real-world applications utilizing quantum annealing. In this study, we propose a formulation to control the traveling routes to minimize the travel time. We validate our formulation through simulation in a virtual plant and authenticate the effectiveness for faster distribution compared to a greedy algorithm that does not consider the overall detour distance. Furthermore, we utilize reverse annealing to maximize the advantage of the D-Wave's quantum annealer. Starting from relatively good solutions obtained by a fast greedy algorithm, reverse annealing searches for better solutions around them. Our reverse annealing method improves the performance compared to standard quantum annealing alone and performs up to 10 times faster than the strong classical solver, Gurobi. This study extends a use of optimization with general problem solvers in the application of multi-AGV systems and reveals the potential of reverse annealing as an optimizer.
summary: Quantum annealing has been actively researched since D-Wave Systems produced the first commercial machine in 2011. Controlling a large fleet of automated guided vehicles is one of the real-world applications utilizing quantum annealing. In this study, we propose a formulation to control the traveling routes to minimize the travel time. We validate our formulation through simulation in a virtual plant and authenticate the effectiveness for faster distribution compared to a greedy algorithm that does not consider the overall detour distance. Furthermore, we utilize reverse annealing to maximize the advantage of the D-Wave's quantum annealer. Starting from relatively good solutions obtained by a fast greedy algorithm, reverse annealing searches for better solutions around them. Our reverse annealing method improves the performance compared to standard quantum annealing alone and performs up to 10 times faster than the strong classical solver, Gurobi. This study extends a use of optimization with general problem solvers in the application of multi-AGV systems and reveals the potential of reverse annealing as an optimizer.
abstract_zh: 自 D-Wave Systems 在 2011 年生产出第一台商用机器以来，量子退火的研究一直在积极进行。控制大量自动引导车辆是利用量子退火的现实应用之一。在本研究中，我们提出了一种控制出行路线以尽量减少出行时间的方案。我们通过在虚拟工厂中进行模拟来验证我们的配方，并验证与不考虑整体绕行距离的贪婪算法相比更快分配的有效性。此外，我们利用反向退火来最大限度地发挥 D-Wave 量子退火器的优势。从快速贪婪算法获得的相对较好的解开始，反向退火在它们周围搜索更好的解。与单独的标准量子退火相比，我们的反向退火方法提高了性能，并且比强大的经典求解器 Gurobi 快 10 倍。这项研究扩展了优化在多 AGV 系统应用中的一般问题求解器的使用，并揭示了反向退火作为优化器的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用反向退火技术优化多自动导引车（AGV）路径规划，以最小化运输时间。
AI.motivation: 多AGV系统在工业场景中广泛存在，但传统算法难以兼顾全局路径最优与计算效率，需探索量子退火等新型优化方法提升调度性能。
AI.method: 构建路径规划数学模型，结合贪心算法快速生成初始解，再通过D-Wave量子退火器的反向退火技术局部优化解空间，对比标准量子退火与经典求解器Gurobi的性能差异。
AI.result: 反向退火方法相较标准量子退火提升性能，且计算速度达经典求解器Gurobi的10倍，验证了其在多AGV系统中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 反向退火技术能有效解决多AGV路径优化问题，为量子计算在工业调度领域的应用提供了新思路和实践价值。

ai_content_json.result: 反向退火方法相较标准量子退火提升性能，且计算速度达经典求解器Gurobi的10倍，验证了其在多AGV系统中的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 反向退火技术能有效解决多AGV路径优化问题，为量子计算在工业调度领域的应用提供了新思路和实践价值。

search_text: Travel time optimization on multi-AGV routing by reverse annealing 通过反向退火优化多 AGV 路径的行程时间 Quantum annealing has been actively researched since D-Wave Systems produced the first commercial machine in 2011. Controlling a large fleet of automated guided vehicles is one of the real-world applications utilizing quantum annealing. In this study, we propose a formulation to control the traveling routes to minimize the travel time. We validate our formulation through simulation in a virtual plant and authenticate the effectiveness for faster distribution compared to a greedy algorithm that does not consider the overall detour distance. Furthermore, we utilize reverse annealing to maximize the advantage of the D-Wave's quantum annealer. Starting from relatively good solutions obtained by a fast greedy algorithm, reverse annealing searches for better solutions around them. Our reverse annealing method improves the performance compared to standard quantum annealing alone and performs up to 10 times faster than the strong classical solver, Gurobi. This study extends a use of optimization with general problem solvers in the application of multi-AGV systems and reveals the potential of reverse annealing as an optimizer. 自 D-Wave Systems 在 2011 年生产出第一台商用机器以来，量子退火的研究一直在积极进行。控制大量自动引导车辆是利用量子退火的现实应用之一。在本研究中，我们提出了一种控制出行路线以尽量减少出行时间的方案。我们通过在虚拟工厂中进行模拟来验证我们的配方，并验证与不考虑整体绕行距离的贪婪算法相比更快分配的有效性。此外，我们利用反向退火来最大限度地发挥 D-Wave 量子退火器的优势。从快速贪婪算法获得的相对较好的解开始，反向退火在它们周围搜索更好的解。与单独的标准量子退火相比，我们的反向退火方法提高了性能，并且比强大的经典求解器 Gurobi 快 10 倍。这项研究扩展了优化在多 AGV 系统应用中的一般问题求解器的使用，并揭示了反向退火作为优化器的潜力。 本文提出利用反向退火技术优化多自动导引车（AGV）路径规划，以最小化运输时间。 Renichiro Haba,Masayuki Ohzeki,Kazuyuki Tanaka quant-ph,cs.MA,cs.RO,eess.SY,stat.CO

authors_text: Vivian Lai,Samuel Carton,Rajat Bhatnagar,Q. Vera Liao,Yunfeng Zhang,Chenhao Tan
title: Human-AI Collaboration via Conditional Delegation: A Case Study of Content Moderation
title_zh: 通过条件委托进行人机协作：内容审核案例研究
abstract: Despite impressive performance in many benchmark datasets, AI models can still make mistakes, especially among out-of-distribution examples. It remains an open question how such imperfect models can be used effectively in collaboration with humans. Prior work has focused on AI assistance that helps people make individual high-stakes decisions, which is not scalable for a large amount of relatively low-stakes decisions, e.g., moderating social media comments. Instead, we propose conditional delegation as an alternative paradigm for human-AI collaboration where humans create rules to indicate trustworthy regions of a model. Using content moderation as a testbed, we develop novel interfaces to assist humans in creating conditional delegation rules and conduct a randomized experiment with two datasets to simulate in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios. Our study demonstrates the promise of conditional delegation in improving model performance and provides insights into design for this novel paradigm, including the effect of AI explanations.
summary: Despite impressive performance in many benchmark datasets, AI models can still make mistakes, especially among out-of-distribution examples. It remains an open question how such imperfect models can be used effectively in collaboration with humans. Prior work has focused on AI assistance that helps people make individual high-stakes decisions, which is not scalable for a large amount of relatively low-stakes decisions, e.g., moderating social media comments. Instead, we propose conditional delegation as an alternative paradigm for human-AI collaboration where humans create rules to indicate trustworthy regions of a model. Using content moderation as a testbed, we develop novel interfaces to assist humans in creating conditional delegation rules and conduct a randomized experiment with two datasets to simulate in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios. Our study demonstrates the promise of conditional delegation in improving model performance and provides insights into design for this novel paradigm, including the effect of AI explanations.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能模型在许多基准数据集中表现出色，但仍然可能会犯错误，尤其是在分布外的示例中。如何有效地与人类合作使用这些不完美的模型仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。之前的工作主要集中在人工智能辅助上，它可以帮助人们做出个人高风险决策，但对于大量相对低风险的决策（例如，调节社交媒体评论）来说，这种决策是不可扩展的。相反，我们提出条件委托作为人类与人工智能协作的替代范例，其中人类创建规则来指示模型的可信区域。使用内容审核作为测试平台，我们开发了新颖的界面来帮助人们创建条件委托规则，并使用两个数据集进行随机实验以模拟分发内和分发外场景。我们的研究证明了条件委托在提高模型性能方面的前景，并为这种新颖范式的设计提供了见解，包括人工智能解释的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出条件委托框架以解决AI模型在分布外数据中的错误问题，通过人机协作提升内容审核效率。
AI.motivation: 现有AI模型在分布外数据表现不佳，且传统协作方式难以应对大量低风险决策任务，如社交媒体评论审核。
AI.method: 开发条件委托接口，使人类制定规则界定模型可信区域，并通过两个数据集的随机实验验证效果。
AI.result: 条件委托显著提升模型性能，揭示AI解释对规则制定的影响，为新型协作范式提供设计洞察。
AI.conclusion: 条件委托有效促进人机协作，尤其适用于内容审核场景，未来需深化其设计原则与应用边界研究。

authors_text: Han Cai,Ji Lin,Yujun Lin,Zhijian Liu,Haotian Tang,Hanrui Wang,Ligeng Zhu,Song Han
title: Enable Deep Learning on Mobile Devices: Methods, Systems, and Applications
title_zh: 在移动设备上启用深度学习：方法、系统和应用程序
comment: Journal preprint (ACM TODAES, 2021). The first seven authors contributed equally to this work and are listed in the alphabetical order
comments: Journal preprint (ACM TODAES, 2021). The first seven authors contributed equally to this work and are listed in the alphabetical order
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved unprecedented success in the field of artificial intelligence (AI), including computer vision, natural language processing and speech recognition. However, their superior performance comes at the considerable cost of computational complexity, which greatly hinders their applications in many resource-constrained devices, such as mobile phones and Internet of Things (IoT) devices. Therefore, methods and techniques that are able to lift the efficiency bottleneck while preserving the high accuracy of DNNs are in great demand in order to enable numerous edge AI applications. This paper provides an overview of efficient deep learning methods, systems and applications. We start from introducing popular model compression methods, including pruning, factorization, quantization as well as compact model design. To reduce the large design cost of these manual solutions, we discuss the AutoML framework for each of them, such as neural architecture search (NAS) and automated pruning and quantization. We then cover efficient on-device training to enable user customization based on the local data on mobile devices. Apart from general acceleration techniques, we also showcase several task-specific accelerations for point cloud, video and natural language processing by exploiting their spatial sparsity and temporal/token redundancy. Finally, to support all these algorithmic advancements, we introduce the efficient deep learning system design from both software and hardware perspectives.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved unprecedented success in the field of artificial intelligence (AI), including computer vision, natural language processing and speech recognition. However, their superior performance comes at the considerable cost of computational complexity, which greatly hinders their applications in many resource-constrained devices, such as mobile phones and Internet of Things (IoT) devices. Therefore, methods and techniques that are able to lift the efficiency bottleneck while preserving the high accuracy of DNNs are in great demand in order to enable numerous edge AI applications. This paper provides an overview of efficient deep learning methods, systems and applications. We start from introducing popular model compression methods, including pruning, factorization, quantization as well as compact model design. To reduce the large design cost of these manual solutions, we discuss the AutoML framework for each of them, such as neural architecture search (NAS) and automated pruning and quantization. We then cover efficient on-device training to enable user customization based on the local data on mobile devices. Apart from general acceleration techniques, we also showcase several task-specific accelerations for point cloud, video and natural language processing by exploiting their spatial sparsity and temporal/token redundancy. Finally, to support all these algorithmic advancements, we introduce the efficient deep learning system design from both software and hardware perspectives.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在人工智能（AI）领域取得了前所未有的成功，包括计算机视觉、自然语言处理和语音识别。然而，它们的卓越性能是以相当大的计算复杂性为代价的，这极大地阻碍了它们在许多资源受限设备中的应用，例如手机和物联网（IoT）设备。因此，为了实现众多边缘人工智能应用，迫切需要能够在保持 DNN 高精度的同时消除效率瓶颈的方法和技术。本文概述了高效的深度学习方法、系统和应用。我们首先介绍流行的模型压缩方法，包括剪枝、分解、量化以及紧凑模型设计。为了降低这些手动解决方案的大量设计成本，我们讨论了每个解决方案的 AutoML 框架，例如神经架构搜索 (NAS) 以及自动修剪和量化。然后，我们介绍高效的设备端培训，以便根据移动设备上的本地数据实现用户定制。除了一般的加速技术之外，我们还通过利用空间稀疏性和时间/令牌冗余来展示点云、视频和自然语言处理的几种特定于任务的加速。最后，为了支持所有这些算法进步，我们从软件和硬件角度介绍了高效的深度学习系统设计。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了在移动设备上实现深度学习的方法、系统及应用，旨在解决深度神经网络计算复杂度高导致的资源受限设备部署难题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽性能优越，但其高计算复杂度严重限制了其在移动设备和物联网等资源受限场景中的应用，亟需兼顾效率与精度的解决方案。
AI.method: 涵盖模型压缩（剪枝、分解、量化、紧凑设计）、AutoML框架（神经架构搜索、自动化剪枝量化）、设备端训练及针对点云、视频、自然语言处理的专用加速技术，并从软硬件角度设计高效系统。
AI.result: 系统梳理了高效深度学习技术体系，提出了适应移动设备的算法优化与系统设计方法，为边缘AI应用提供了理论与实践指导。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法创新与系统优化协同，可有效突破深度学习在移动设备上的效率瓶颈，推动边缘侧智能化应用的普及。

We then cover efficient on-device training to enable user customization based on the local data on mobile devices. Apart from general acceleration techniques, we also showcase several task-specific accelerations for point cloud, video and natural language processing by exploiting their spatial sparsity and temporal/token redundancy. Finally, to support all these algorithmic advancements, we introduce the efficient deep learning system design from both software and hardware perspectives. 深度神经网络（DNN）在人工智能（AI）领域取得了前所未有的成功，包括计算机视觉、自然语言处理和语音识别。然而，它们的卓越性能是以相当大的计算复杂性为代价的，这极大地阻碍了它们在许多资源受限设备中的应用，例如手机和物联网（IoT）设备。因此，为了实现众多边缘人工智能应用，迫切需要能够在保持 DNN 高精度的同时消除效率瓶颈的方法和技术。本文概述了高效的深度学习方法、系统和应用。我们首先介绍流行的模型压缩方法，包括剪枝、分解、量化以及紧凑模型设计。为了降低这些手动解决方案的大量设计成本，我们讨论了每个解决方案的 AutoML 框架，例如神经架构搜索 (NAS) 以及自动修剪和量化。然后，我们介绍高效的设备端培训，以便根据移动设备上的本地数据实现用户定制。除了一般的加速技术之外，我们还通过利用空间稀疏性和时间/令牌冗余来展示点云、视频和自然语言处理的几种特定于任务的加速。最后，为了支持所有这些算法进步，我们从软件和硬件角度介绍了高效的深度学习系统设计。 本文综述了在移动设备上实现深度学习的方法、系统及应用，旨在解决深度神经网络计算复杂度高导致的资源受限设备部署难题。 Han Cai,Ji Lin,Yujun Lin,Zhijian Liu,Haotian Tang,Hanrui Wang,Ligeng Zhu,Song Han cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Christos K. Verginis,Yiannis Kantaros,Dimos V. Dimarogonas
title: Planning and Control of Multi-Robot-Object Systems under Temporal Logic Tasks and Uncertain Dynamics
title_zh: 时态逻辑任务和不确定动力学下的多机器人对象系统的规划与控制
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1803.01579
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1803.01579
abstract: We develop an algorithm for the motion and task planning of a system comprised of multiple robots and unactuated objects under tasks expressed as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) constraints. The robots and objects evolve subject to uncertain dynamics in an obstacle-cluttered environment. The key part of the proposed solution is the intelligent construction of a coupled transition system that encodes the motion and tasks of the robots and the objects. We achieve such a construction by designing appropriate adaptive control protocols in the lower level, which guarantee the safe robot navigation/object transportation in the environment while compensating for the dynamic uncertainties. The transition system is efficiently interfaced with the temporal logic specification via a sampling-based algorithm to output a discrete path as a sequence of synchronized actions of the robots; such actions satisfy the robots' as well as the objects' specifications. The robots execute this discrete path by using the derived low level control protocol. Simulation results verify the proposed framework.
summary: We develop an algorithm for the motion and task planning of a system comprised of multiple robots and unactuated objects under tasks expressed as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) constraints. The robots and objects evolve subject to uncertain dynamics in an obstacle-cluttered environment. The key part of the proposed solution is the intelligent construction of a coupled transition system that encodes the motion and tasks of the robots and the objects. We achieve such a construction by designing appropriate adaptive control protocols in the lower level, which guarantee the safe robot navigation/object transportation in the environment while compensating for the dynamic uncertainties. The transition system is efficiently interfaced with the temporal logic specification via a sampling-based algorithm to output a discrete path as a sequence of synchronized actions of the robots; such actions satisfy the robots' as well as the objects' specifications. The robots execute this discrete path by using the derived low level control protocol. Simulation results verify the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种算法，用于在以线性时序逻辑（LTL）约束表示的任务下由多个机器人和未驱动物体组成的系统的运动和任务规划。机器人和物体在障碍物杂乱的环境中根据不确定的动力学演化。该解决方案的关键部分是智能构建耦合转换系统，该系统对机器人和物体的运动和任务进行编码。我们通过在较低层设计适当的自适应控制协议来实现这样的结构，保证机器人在环境中安全导航/物体运输，同时补偿动态不确定性。转换系统通过基于采样的算法与时间逻辑规范有效地连接，以输出离散路径作为机器人的一系列同步动作；这些动作满足机器人以及物体的规格。机器人通过使用派生的低级控制协议来执行该离散路径。仿真结果验证了所提出的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多机器人-物体系统在时序逻辑任务和不确定动力学下的运动与任务规划算法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理多机器人与非驱动物体在复杂动态环境中的协同任务规划及动力学不确定性补偿问题。
AI.method: 构建耦合状态转移系统并设计自适应控制协议，通过采样算法将时序逻辑规范转化为同步动作序列。
AI.result: 仿真验证了框架在障碍物环境中满足时序逻辑约束的机器人协同规划与控制有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了不确定动力学下多机器人-物体系统的安全协同任务执行。

authors_text: Pierre-Yves Lajoie,Christophe Bédard,Giovanni Beltrame
title: Analyze, Debug, Optimize: Real-Time Tracing for Perception and Mapping Systems in ROS 2
title_zh: 分析、调试、优化：ROS 2 中感知和绘图系统的实时跟踪
abstract: Perception and mapping systems are among the most computationally, memory, and bandwidth intensive software components in robotics. Therefore, analysis, debugging, and optimization are crucial to improve perception systems performance in real-time applications. However, standard approaches often depict a partial picture of the actual performance. Fortunately, instrumentation and tracing offer a great opportunity for detailed performance analysis of real-time systems. In this paper, we show how our novel open-source tracing tools and techniques for ROS 2 enable us to identify delays, bottlenecks and critical paths inside centralized, or distributed, perception and mapping systems.
summary: Perception and mapping systems are among the most computationally, memory, and bandwidth intensive software components in robotics. Therefore, analysis, debugging, and optimization are crucial to improve perception systems performance in real-time applications. However, standard approaches often depict a partial picture of the actual performance. Fortunately, instrumentation and tracing offer a great opportunity for detailed performance analysis of real-time systems. In this paper, we show how our novel open-source tracing tools and techniques for ROS 2 enable us to identify delays, bottlenecks and critical paths inside centralized, or distributed, perception and mapping systems.
abstract_zh: 感知和绘图系统是机器人技术中计算量、内存和带宽最密集的软件组件之一。因此，分析、调试和优化对于提高实时应用中的感知系统性能至关重要。然而，标准方法通常只描述了实际性能的部分情况。幸运的是，检测和跟踪为实时系统的详细性能分析提供了绝佳的机会。在本文中，我们展示了 ROS 2 的新颖开源跟踪工具和技术如何使我们能够识别集中式或分布式感知和地图系统内的延迟、瓶颈和关键路径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对ROS 2的实时追踪工具和技术，用于分析、调试和优化机器人感知与映射系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 感知与映射系统在机器人应用中资源消耗大，传统方法难以全面反映实际性能，需更精确的分析手段以解决实时性问题。
AI.method: 开发开源的实时追踪工具，通过仪器化和追踪技术，分析集中式和分布式系统中的延迟、瓶颈及关键路径。
AI.result: 成功识别了系统中的性能瓶颈和关键路径，验证了工具在优化感知与映射系统中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为ROS 2系统提供了高效的性能分析方法，有助于提升机器人实时应用的效率和可靠性。
