authors_text: Shlomo Kashani,Maryam Alqasemi,Jacob Hammond
title: A quantum Fourier transform (QFT) based note detection algorithm
title_zh: 基于量子傅里叶变换（QFT）的音符检测算法
abstract: In quantum information processing (QIP), the quantum Fourier transform (QFT) has a plethora of applications [1] [2] [3]: Shor's algorithm and phase estimation are just a few well-known examples. Shor's quantum factorization algorithm, one of the most widely quoted quantum algorithms [4] [5] [6] relies heavily on the QFT and efficiently finds integer prime factors of large numbers on quantum computers [4]. This seminal ground-breaking design for quantum algorithms has triggered a cascade of viable alternatives to previously unsolvable problems on a classical computer that are potentially superior and can run in polynomial time. In this work we examine the QFT's structure and implementation for the creation of a quantum music note detection algorithm both on a simulated and a real quantum computer. Though formal approaches [7] [1] [8] [9] exist for the verification of quantum algorithms, in this study we limit ourselves to a simpler, symbolic representation which we validate using the symbolic SymPy [10] [11] package which symbolically replicates quantum computing processes. The algorithm is then implemented as a quantum circuit, using IBM's qiskit [12] library and finally period detection is exemplified on an actual single musical tone using a varying number of qubits.
summary: In quantum information processing (QIP), the quantum Fourier transform (QFT) has a plethora of applications [1] [2] [3]: Shor's algorithm and phase estimation are just a few well-known examples. Shor's quantum factorization algorithm, one of the most widely quoted quantum algorithms [4] [5] [6] relies heavily on the QFT and efficiently finds integer prime factors of large numbers on quantum computers [4]. This seminal ground-breaking design for quantum algorithms has triggered a cascade of viable alternatives to previously unsolvable problems on a classical computer that are potentially superior and can run in polynomial time. In this work we examine the QFT's structure and implementation for the creation of a quantum music note detection algorithm both on a simulated and a real quantum computer. Though formal approaches [7] [1] [8] [9] exist for the verification of quantum algorithms, in this study we limit ourselves to a simpler, symbolic representation which we validate using the symbolic SymPy [10] [11] package which symbolically replicates quantum computing processes. The algorithm is then implemented as a quantum circuit, using IBM's qiskit [12] library and finally period detection is exemplified on an actual single musical tone using a varying number of qubits.
abstract_zh: 在量子信息处理 (QIP) 中，量子傅立叶变换 (QFT) 有着广泛的应用 [1] [2] [3]：Shor 算法和相位估计只是几个众所周知的例子。 Shor 的量子因式分解算法是最广泛引用的量子算法之一 [4] [5] [6] 很大程度上依赖于 QFT，并在量子计算机上有效地找到大数的整数素因数 [4]。这种量子算法的开创性设计引发了一系列可行的替代方案，以解决经典计算机上以前无法解决的问题，这些方案具有潜在的优越性，并且可以在多项式时间内运行。在这项工作中，我们研究了 QFT 的结构和实现，以便在模拟和真实的量子计算机上创建量子音符检测算法。尽管存在用于验证量子算法的形式方法 [7] [1] [8] [9]，但在本研究中，我们将自己限制为更简单的符号表示，我们使用符号 SymPy [10] [11] 包来验证该表示，该包以符号方式复制量子计算过程。然后，使用 IBM 的 qiskit [12] 库将该算法实现为量子电路，最后使用不同数量的量子位对实际的单个乐音进行周期检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量子傅里叶变换（QFT）的量子音乐音符检测算法，并在模拟和真实量子计算机上实现。
AI.motivation: 量子傅里叶变换在量子算法中具有核心地位，但其在音乐信号处理等领域的应用尚未被充分探索，需验证其在实际场景中的可行性。
AI.method: 通过SymPy进行符号化验证，利用IBM Qiskit构建量子电路，并在真实量子计算机上使用不同数量的量子比特进行周期检测实验。
AI.result: 成功构建了量子音符检测算法框架，通过符号计算验证了理论正确性，并在实际量子设备上实现了单音符的周期检测。
AI.conclusion: QFT可有效应用于音乐音符检测领域，为量子计算在信号处理方向提供了新思路，但需进一步优化以适应复杂音乐场景。

search_text: A quantum Fourier transform (QFT) based note detection algorithm 基于量子傅里叶变换（QFT）的音符检测算法 In quantum information processing (QIP), the quantum Fourier transform (QFT) has a plethora of applications [1] [2] [3]: Shor's algorithm and phase estimation are just a few well-known examples. Shor's quantum factorization algorithm, one of the most widely quoted quantum algorithms [4] [5] [6] relies heavily on the QFT and efficiently finds integer prime factors of large numbers on quantum computers [4]. This seminal ground-breaking design for quantum algorithms has triggered a cascade of viable alternatives to previously unsolvable problems on a classical computer that are potentially superior and can run in polynomial time. In this work we examine the QFT's structure and implementation for the creation of a quantum music note detection algorithm both on a simulated and a real quantum computer. Though formal approaches [7] [1] [8] [9] exist for the verification of quantum algorithms, in this study we limit ourselves to a simpler, symbolic representation which we validate using the symbolic SymPy [10] [11] package which symbolically replicates quantum computing processes. The algorithm is then implemented as a quantum circuit, using IBM's qiskit [12] library and finally period detection is exemplified on an actual single musical tone using a varying number of qubits. 在量子信息处理 (QIP) 中，量子傅立叶变换 (QFT) 有着广泛的应用 [1] [2] [3]：Shor 算法和相位估计只是几个众所周知的例子。 Shor 的量子因式分解算法是最广泛引用的量子算法之一 [4] [5] [6] 很大程度上依赖于 QFT，并在量子计算机上有效地找到大数的整数素因数 [4]。这种量子算法的开创性设计引发了一系列可行的替代方案，以解决经典计算机上以前无法解决的问题，这些方案具有潜在的优越性，并且可以在多项式时间内运行。在这项工作中，我们研究了 QFT 的结构和实现，以便在模拟和真实的量子计算机上创建量子音符检测算法。尽管存在用于验证量子算法的形式方法 [7] [1] [8] [9]，但在本研究中，我们将自己限制为更简单的符号表示，我们使用符号 SymPy [10] [11] 包来验证该表示，该包以符号方式复制量子计算过程。然后，使用 IBM 的 qiskit [12] 库将该算法实现为量子电路，最后使用不同数量的量子位对实际的单个乐音进行周期检测。 本文提出一种基于量子傅里叶变换（QFT）的量子音乐音符检测算法，并在模拟和真实量子计算机上实现。 Shlomo Kashani,Maryam Alqasemi,Jacob Hammond quant-ph,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xueshen Li,Shengting Cao,Hongshan Liu,Xinwen Yao,Brigitta C. Brott,Silvio H. Litovsky,Xiaoyu Song,Yuye Ling,Yu Gan
title: Multi-scale reconstruction of undersampled spectral-spatial OCT data for coronary imaging using deep learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习对冠状动脉成像欠采样光谱空间 OCT 数据进行多尺度重建
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, reviewed by IEEE trans BME
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures, reviewed by IEEE trans BME
abstract: Coronary artery disease (CAD) is a cardiovascular condition with high morbidity and mortality. Intravascular optical coherence tomography (IVOCT) has been considered as an optimal imagining system for the diagnosis and treatment of CAD. Constrained by Nyquist theorem, dense sampling in IVOCT attains high resolving power to delineate cellular structures/ features. There is a trade-off between high spatial resolution and fast scanning rate for coronary imaging. In this paper, we propose a viable spectral-spatial acquisition method that down-scales the sampling process in both spectral and spatial domain while maintaining high quality in image reconstruction. The down-scaling schedule boosts data acquisition speed without any hardware modifications. Additionally, we propose a unified multi-scale reconstruction framework, namely Multiscale- Spectral-Spatial-Magnification Network (MSSMN), to resolve highly down-scaled (compressed) OCT images with flexible magnification factors. We incorporate the proposed methods into Spectral Domain OCT (SD-OCT) imaging of human coronary samples with clinical features such as stent and calcified lesions. Our experimental results demonstrate that spectral-spatial downscaled data can be better reconstructed than data that is downscaled solely in either spectral or spatial domain. Moreover, we observe better reconstruction performance using MSSMN than using existing reconstruction methods. Our acquisition method and multi-scale reconstruction framework, in combination, may allow faster SD-OCT inspection with high resolution during coronary intervention.

Additionally, we propose a unified multi-scale reconstruction framework, namely Multiscale- Spectral-Spatial-Magnification Network (MSSMN), to resolve highly down-scaled (compressed) OCT images with flexible magnification factors. abstract_zh: 冠状动脉疾病（CAD）是一种发病率和死亡率较高的心血管疾病。血管内光学相干断层扫描（IVOCT）被认为是诊断和治疗CAD的最佳成像系统。受奈奎斯特定理的约束，IVOCT 中的密集采样获得了描绘细胞结构/特征的高分辨率。冠状动脉成像的高空间分辨率和快速扫描速率之间需要权衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种可行的光谱空间采集方法，该方法可以缩小光谱域和空间域的采样过程，同时保持图像重建的高质量。缩小规模的计划提高了数据采集速度，无需任何硬件修改。此外，我们提出了一个统一的多尺度重建框架，即多尺度光谱空间放大网络（MSSMN），以解析具有灵活放大系数的高度缩小（压缩）的OCT图像。我们将所提出的方法纳入具有支架和钙化病变等临床特征的人类冠状动脉样本的谱域 OCT (SD-OCT) 成像中。我们的实验结果表明，与仅在光谱或空间域中缩小的数据相比，光谱空间缩小的数据可以更好地重建。此外，我们观察到使用 MSSMN 的重建性能比使用现有的重建方法更好。我们的采集方法和多尺度重建框架相结合，可以在冠状动脉介入治疗期间实现更快的高分辨率 SD-OCT 检查。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多尺度重建方法，用于加速冠状动脉光学相干断层扫描（SD-OCT）成像，同时保持高分辨率。
AI.motivation: 由于奈奎斯特采样定理的限制，高空间分辨率的密集采样会降低扫描速度，而冠状动脉成像需要在高分辨率和快速扫描之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种在光谱和空间域同时进行降采样的采集方法，并设计了多尺度光谱-空间放大网络（MSSMN），用于灵活地重建高度降采样的OCT图像。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，光谱-空间降采样数据的重建质量优于仅在光谱或空间域降采样的数据，并且MSSMN的重建性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该采集方法与多尺度重建框架结合，可以实现冠状动脉介入过程中快速且高分辨率的SD-OCT检查。

authors_text: Carol Xu,Mahmoud Famouri,Gautam Bathla,Saeejith Nair,Mohammad Javad Shafiee,Alexander Wong
title: CellDefectNet: A Machine-designed Attention Condenser Network for Electroluminescence-based Photovoltaic Cell Defect Inspection
title_zh: CellDefectNet：机器设计的注意力聚光网络，用于基于电致发光的光伏电池缺陷检测
abstract: Photovoltaic cells are electronic devices that convert light energy to electricity, forming the backbone of solar energy harvesting systems. An essential step in the manufacturing process for photovoltaic cells is visual quality inspection using electroluminescence imaging to identify defects such as cracks, finger interruptions, and broken cells. A big challenge faced by industry in photovoltaic cell visual inspection is the fact that it is currently done manually by human inspectors, which is extremely time consuming, laborious, and prone to human error. While deep learning approaches holds great potential to automating this inspection, the hardware resource-constrained manufacturing scenario makes it challenging for deploying complex deep neural network architectures. In this work, we introduce CellDefectNet, a highly efficient attention condenser network designed via machine-driven design exploration specifically for electroluminesence-based photovoltaic cell defect detection on the edge. We demonstrate the efficacy of CellDefectNet on a benchmark dataset comprising of a diversity of photovoltaic cells captured using electroluminescence imagery, achieving an accuracy of ~86.3% while possessing just 410K parameters (~13$\times$ lower than EfficientNet-B0, respectively) and ~115M FLOPs (~12$\times$ lower than EfficientNet-B0) and ~13$\times$ faster on an ARM Cortex A-72 embedded processor when compared to EfficientNet-B0.
summary: Photovoltaic cells are electronic devices that convert light energy to electricity, forming the backbone of solar energy harvesting systems. An essential step in the manufacturing process for photovoltaic cells is visual quality inspection using electroluminescence imaging to identify defects such as cracks, finger interruptions, and broken cells. A big challenge faced by industry in photovoltaic cell visual inspection is the fact that it is currently done manually by human inspectors, which is extremely time consuming, laborious, and prone to human error. While deep learning approaches holds great potential to automating this inspection, the hardware resource-constrained manufacturing scenario makes it challenging for deploying complex deep neural network architectures. In this work, we introduce CellDefectNet, a highly efficient attention condenser network designed via machine-driven design exploration specifically for electroluminesence-based photovoltaic cell defect detection on the edge. We demonstrate the efficacy of CellDefectNet on a benchmark dataset comprising of a diversity of photovoltaic cells captured using electroluminescence imagery, achieving an accuracy of ~86.3% while possessing just 410K parameters (~13$\times$ lower than EfficientNet-B0, respectively) and ~115M FLOPs (~12$\times$ lower than EfficientNet-B0) and ~13$\times$ faster on an ARM Cortex A-72 embedded processor when compared to EfficientNet-B0.
abstract_zh: 光伏电池是将光能转化为电能的电子设备，构成太阳能收集系统的支柱。光伏电池制造过程中的一个重要步骤是使用电致发光成像进行视觉质量检查，以识别裂纹、手指中断和破损电池等缺陷。光伏电池视觉检测行业面临的一大挑战是目前由人工检测人员手动完成，极其耗时、费力，且容易出现人为错误。虽然深度学习方法在自动化检查方面具有巨大潜力，但硬件资源有限的制造场景使得部署复杂的深度神经网络架构面临挑战。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 CellDefectNet，这是一种通过机器驱动设计探索设计的高效注意力聚光网络，专门用于基于电致发光的光伏电池边缘缺陷检测。我们在包含使用电致发光图像捕获的多种光伏电池的基准数据集上展示了 CellDefectNet 的功效，在仅拥有 410K 个参数（分别比 EfficientNet-B0 低约 13$\times）和约 115M FLOP（比 EfficientNet-B0 低约 12$\times$）的情况下实现了约 86.3% 的准确度，并且在 ARM Cortex 上快了约 13$\times$ A-72 嵌入式处理器与 EfficientNet-B0 相比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CellDefectNet的高效注意力压缩网络，用于基于电致发光成像的光伏电池缺陷检测。
AI.motivation: 光伏电池的视觉检测目前依赖人工，效率低且易出错，而现有深度学习模型因参数量大难以部署在资源受限的工业场景。
AI.method: 通过机器驱动的设计探索，构建轻量级注意力压缩网络CellDefectNet，优化参数量和计算量以适应边缘设备。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上达到86.3%的准确率，参数量仅为EfficientNet-B0的1/13（410K），计算量（FLOPs）为1/12（115M），且在ARM Cortex A-72处理器上快13倍。
AI.conclusion: CellDefectNet在保持高检测精度的同时显著降低计算开销，适用于光伏电池缺陷检测的边缘部署场景。

ai_content_json.conclusion: CellDefectNet在保持高检测精度的同时显著降低计算开销，适用于光伏电池缺陷检测的边缘部署场景。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CellDefectNet的高效注意力压缩网络，用于基于电致发光成像的光伏电池缺陷检测。
motivation: 光伏电池的视觉检测目前依赖人工，效率低且易出错，而现有深度学习模型因参数量大难以部署在资源受限的工业场景。
method: 通过机器驱动的设计探索，构建轻量级注意力压缩网络CellDefectNet，优化参数量和计算量以适应边缘设备。
result: 在基准数据集上达到86.3%的准确率，参数量仅为EfficientNet-B0的1/13（410K），计算量（FLOPs）为1/12（115M），且在ARM Cortex A-72处理器上快13倍。
conclusion: CellDefectNet在保持高检测精度的同时显著降低计算开销，适用于光伏电池缺陷检测的边缘部署场景。
search_text: CellDefectNet: A Machine-designed Attention Condenser Network for Electroluminescence-based Photovoltaic Cell Defect Inspection CellDefectNet：机器设计的注意力聚光网络，用于基于电致发光的光伏电池缺陷检测 Photovoltaic cells are electronic devices that convert light energy to electricity, forming the backbone of solar energy harvesting systems. An essential step in the manufacturing process for photovoltaic cells is visual quality inspection using electroluminescence imaging to identify defects such as cracks, finger interruptions, and broken cells. A big challenge faced by industry in photovoltaic cell visual inspection is the fact that it is currently done manually by human inspectors, which is extremely time consuming, laborious, and prone to human error. While deep learning approaches holds great potential to automating this inspection, the hardware resource-constrained manufacturing scenario makes it challenging for deploying complex deep neural network architectures. In this work, we introduce CellDefectNet, a highly efficient attention condenser network designed via machine-driven design exploration specifically for electroluminesence-based photovoltaic cell defect detection on the edge. We demonstrate the efficacy of CellDefectNet on a benchmark dataset comprising of a diversity of photovoltaic cells captured using electroluminescence imagery, achieving an accuracy of ~86.3% while possessing just 410K parameters (~13$\times$ lower than EfficientNet-B0, respectively) and ~115M FLOPs (~12$\times$ lower than EfficientNet-B0) and ~13$\times$ faster on an ARM Cortex A-72 embedded processor when compared to EfficientNet-B0. 光伏电池是将光能转化为电能的电子设备，构成太阳能收集系统的支柱。光伏电池制造过程中的一个重要步骤是使用电致发光成像进行视觉质量检查，以识别裂纹、手指中断和破损电池等缺陷。光伏电池视觉检测行业面临的一大挑战是目前由人工检测人员手动完成，极其耗时、费力，且容易出现人为错误。虽然深度学习方法在自动化检查方面具有巨大潜力，但硬件资源有限的制造场景使得部署复杂的深度神经网络架构面临挑战。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 CellDefectNet，这是一种通过机器驱动设计探索设计的高效注意力聚光网络，专门用于基于电致发光的光伏电池边缘缺陷检测。我们在包含使用电致发光图像捕获的多种光伏电池的基准数据集上展示了 CellDefectNet 的功效，在仅拥有 410K 个参数（分别比 EfficientNet-B0 低约 13$\times）和约 115M FLOP（比 EfficientNet-B0 低约 12$\times$）的情况下实现了约 86.3% 的准确度，并且在 ARM Cortex 上快了约 13$\times$ A-72 嵌入式处理器与 EfficientNet-B0 相比。 本文提出了一种名为CellDefectNet的高效注意力压缩网络，用于基于电致发光成像的光伏电池缺陷检测。 Carol Xu,Mahmoud Famouri,Gautam Bathla,Saeejith Nair,Mohammad Javad Shafiee,Alexander Wong eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Carol Xu,Mahmoud Famouri,Gautam Bathla,Mohammad Javad Shafiee,Alexander Wong
title: LightDefectNet: A Highly Compact Deep Anti-Aliased Attention Condenser Neural Network Architecture for Light Guide Plate Surface Defect Detection
title_zh: LightDefectNet：用于导光板表面缺陷检测的高度紧凑的深度抗锯齿注意力聚光神经网络架构
abstract: Light guide plates are essential optical components widely used in a diverse range of applications ranging from medical lighting fixtures to back-lit TV displays. An essential step in the manufacturing of light guide plates is the quality inspection of defects such as scratches, bright/dark spots, and impurities. This is mainly done in industry through manual visual inspection for plate pattern irregularities, which is time-consuming and prone to human error and thus act as a significant barrier to high-throughput production. Advances in deep learning-driven computer vision has led to the exploration of automated visual quality inspection of light guide plates to improve inspection consistency, accuracy, and efficiency. However, given the cost constraints in visual inspection scenarios, the widespread adoption of deep learning-driven computer vision methods for inspecting light guide plates has been greatly limited due to high computational requirements. In this study, we explore the utilization of machine-driven design exploration with computational and "best-practices" constraints as well as L$_1$ paired classification discrepancy loss to create LightDefectNet, a highly compact deep anti-aliased attention condenser neural network architecture tailored specifically for light guide plate surface defect detection in resource-constrained scenarios. Experiments show that LightDetectNet achieves a detection accuracy of $\sim$98.2% on the LGPSDD benchmark while having just 770K parameters ($\sim$33$\times$ and $\sim$6.9$\times$ lower than ResNet-50 and EfficientNet-B0, respectively) and $\sim$93M FLOPs ($\sim$88$\times$ and $\sim$8.4$\times$ lower than ResNet-50 and EfficientNet-B0, respectively) and $\sim$8.8$\times$ faster inference speed than EfficientNet-B0 on an embedded ARM processor.
summary: Light guide plates are essential optical components widely used in a diverse range of applications ranging from medical lighting fixtures to back-lit TV displays. An essential step in the manufacturing of light guide plates is the quality inspection of defects such as scratches, bright/dark spots, and impurities. This is mainly done in industry through manual visual inspection for plate pattern irregularities, which is time-consuming and prone to human error and thus act as a significant barrier to high-throughput production. Advances in deep learning-driven computer vision has led to the exploration of automated visual quality inspection of light guide plates to improve inspection consistency, accuracy, and efficiency. However, given the cost constraints in visual inspection scenarios, the widespread adoption of deep learning-driven computer vision methods for inspecting light guide plates has been greatly limited due to high computational requirements. In this study, we explore the utilization of machine-driven design exploration with computational and "best-practices" constraints as well as L$_1$ paired classification discrepancy loss to create LightDefectNet, a highly compact deep anti-aliased attention condenser neural network architecture tailored specifically for light guide plate surface defect detection in resource-constrained scenarios. Experiments show that LightDetectNet achieves a detection accuracy of $\sim$98.2% on the LGPSDD benchmark while having just 770K parameters ($\sim$33$\times$ and $\sim$6.9$\times$ lower than ResNet-50 and EfficientNet-B0, respectively) and $\sim$93M FLOPs ($\sim$88$\times$ and $\sim$8.4$\times$ lower than ResNet-50 and EfficientNet-B0, respectively) and $\sim$8.8$\times$ faster inference speed than EfficientNet-B0 on an embedded ARM processor.
abstract_zh: 导光板是重要的光学元件，广泛应用于从医疗照明灯具到背光电视显示器等各种应用。导光板制造过程中必不可少的一个步骤是对划痕、亮点/暗点、杂质等缺陷进行质量检查。这在工业中主要是通过手动目视检查板图案不规则性来完成的，这既耗时又容易出现人为错误，从而成为高通量生产的重大障碍。深度学习驱动的计算机视觉的进步引发了对导光板自动视觉质量检测的探索，以提高检测的一致性、准确性和效率。然而，考虑到视觉检测场景的成本限制，深度学习驱动的计算机视觉方法用于检测导光板的广泛采用由于高计算要求而受到极大限制。在本研究中，我们探索利用具有计算和“最佳实践”约束的机器驱动设计探索以及 L$_1$ 配对分类差异损失来创建 LightDefectNet，这是一种高度紧凑的深度抗锯齿注意力聚光神经网络架构，专为资源受限场景中的导光板表面缺陷检测而定制。实验表明，LightDetectNet 在 LGPSDD 基准上实现了 $\sim$98.2% 的检测精度，同时仅具有 770K 个参数（分别比 ResNet-50 和 EfficientNet-B0 低 $\sim$33$\times$ 和 $\sim$6.9$\times$）和 $\sim$93M FLOPs（$\sim$88$\times$ 和 $\sim$88$\times$）在嵌入式 ARM 处理器上，推理速度分别比 ResNet-50 和 EfficientNet-B0 低 $\sim$8.4$\times$，并且推理速度比 EfficientNet-B0 快 $\sim$8.8$\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LightDefectNet的高效紧凑型深度神经网络架构，专门用于在资源受限场景下检测导光板表面缺陷。
AI.motivation: 传统人工检测导光板缺陷效率低且易出错，而现有深度学习方法计算成本高，难以在工业场景中广泛应用。
AI.method: 结合计算约束与最佳实践设计，采用L₁配对分类差异损失函数，构建轻量级反锯齿注意力浓缩网络架构LightDefectNet。
AI.result: 在LGPSDD基准测试中达到约98.2%的检测精度，参数量仅为770K（比ResNet-50和EfficientNet-B0低33倍和6.9倍），FLOPs为93M（比ResNet-50和EfficientNet-B0低88倍和8.4倍），在嵌入式ARM处理器上推理速度比EfficientNet-B0快8.8倍。
AI.conclusion: LightDefectNet在保持高检测精度的同时显著降低了计算成本，为资源受限场景下的导光板缺陷检测提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: LightDefectNet: A Highly Compact Deep Anti-Aliased Attention Condenser Neural Network Architecture for Light Guide Plate Surface Defect Detection LightDefectNet：用于导光板表面缺陷检测的高度紧凑的深度抗锯齿注意力聚光神经网络架构 Light guide plates are essential optical components widely used in a diverse range of applications ranging from medical lighting fixtures to back-lit TV displays. authors_text: Samuel Bismuth,Erel Segal-Halevi,Dana Shapira
title: Asymmetric Number Partitioning with Splitting and Interval Targets
title_zh: 具有分割和间隔目标的非对称数字分区
abstract: The n-way number partitioning problem, a fundamental challenge in combinatorial optimization, has significant implications for applications such as fair division and machine scheduling. Despite these problems being NP-hard, many approximation techniques exist. We consider three closely related kinds of approximations, and various objectives such as decision, min-max, max-min, and even a generalized objective, in which the bins are not considered identical anymore, but rather asymmetric (used to solve fair division to asymmetric agents or uniform machine scheduling problems). The first two variants optimize the partition such that: in the first variant some fixed number s of items can be split between two or more bins and in the second variant we allow at most a fixed number t of splittings. The third variant is a decision problem: the largest bin sum must be within a pre-specified interval, parameterized by a fixed rational number u times the largest item size. When the number of bins n is unbounded, we show that every variant is strongly NP-complete. When the number of bins n is fixed, the running time depends on the fixed parameters s,t,u. For each variant, we give a complete picture of its running time. For n=2, the running time is easy to identify. Our main results consider any fixed n>=3. Using a two-way polynomial-time reduction between the first and the third variant, we show that n-way number-partitioning with s split items can be solved in polynomial time if s>=n-2, and it is NP-complete otherwise. Also, n-way number-partitioning with t splittings can be solved in polynomial time if t>=n-1, and it is NP-complete otherwise. Finally, we show that the third variant can be solved in polynomial time if u>=(n-2)/n, and it is NP-complete otherwise. Our positive results for the optimization problems consider both asymmetric min-max and asymmetric max-min versions.
summary: The n-way number partitioning problem, a fundamental challenge in combinatorial optimization, has significant implications for applications such as fair division and machine scheduling. Despite these problems being NP-hard, many approximation techniques exist. We consider three closely related kinds of approximations, and various objectives such as decision, min-max, max-min, and even a generalized objective, in which the bins are not considered identical anymore, but rather asymmetric (used to solve fair division to asymmetric agents or uniform machine scheduling problems). The first two variants optimize the partition such that: in the first variant some fixed number s of items can be split between two or more bins and in the second variant we allow at most a fixed number t of splittings. The third variant is a decision problem: the largest bin sum must be within a pre-specified interval, parameterized by a fixed rational number u times the largest item size. When the number of bins n is unbounded, we show that every variant is strongly NP-complete. When the number of bins n is fixed, the running time depends on the fixed parameters s,t,u. For each variant, we give a complete picture of its running time. For n=2, the running time is easy to identify. Our main results consider any fixed n>=3. Using a two-way polynomial-time reduction between the first and the third variant, we show that n-way number-partitioning with s split items can be solved in polynomial time if s>=n-2, and it is NP-complete otherwise. Also, n-way number-partitioning with t splittings can be solved in polynomial time if t>=n-1, and it is NP-complete otherwise. Finally, we show that the third variant can be solved in polynomial time if u>=(n-2)/n, and it is NP-complete otherwise. Our positive results for the optimization problems consider both asymmetric min-max and asymmetric max-min versions.
abstract_zh: n 路数字划分问题是组合优化中的一个基本挑战，对于公平划分和机器调度等应用具有重要意义。尽管这些问题是 NP 难题，但仍然存在许多近似技术。我们考虑三种密切相关的近似，以及各种目标，例如决策、最小-最大、最大-最小，甚至是广义目标，其中箱不再被认为是相同的，而是不对称的（用于解决对不对称代理的公平划分或统一机器调度问题）。前两个变体优化分区，使得：在第一个变体中，一些固定数量 s 的项目可以在两个或多个箱之间分割，而在第二个变体中，我们最多允许固定数量 t 的分割。第三个变体是决策问题：最大的箱总和必须在预先指定的区间内，由固定有理数 u 乘以最大项目大小进行参数化。当箱数 n 无限时，我们表明每个变体都是强 NP 完全的。当 bin 数量 n 固定时，运行时间取决于固定参数 s,t,u。对于每个变体，我们给出了其运行时间的完整描述。当n=2时，运行时间很容易确定。我们的主要结果考虑了任何固定的 n>=3。使用第一个和第三个变体之间的双向多项式时间约简，我们表明，如果 s>=n-2，则具有 s 个分割项的 n 路数字划分可以在多项式时间内求解，否则它是 NP 完全的。此外，如果 t>=n-1，则具有 t 次分裂的 n 路数字划分可以在多项式时间内求解，否则它是 NP 完全的。最后，我们证明如果 u>=(n-2)/n，则第三个变体可以在多项式时间内求解，否则它是 NP 完全的。我们对优化问题的积极结果考虑了不对称最小-最大和不对称最大-最小版本。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非对称数划分问题在允许分割和区间目标下的计算复杂性，分析了不同参数条件下的复杂度分类。
AI.motivation: 数划分问题在公平分配和机器调度等领域有重要应用，但现有研究多针对对称场景。本文旨在扩展至非对称场景并分析其复杂性边界。
AI.method: 通过参数化分析和多项式归约方法，研究了三种变体（分割项数限制、分割次数限制、区间目标决策）在固定和非固定分组数下的复杂度。
AI.result: 当分组数n固定时，三种变体的运行时间均依赖参数s/t/u；当n≥3时，s≥n-2或t≥n-1或u≥(n-2)/n时可多项式求解，否则为NP完全。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非对称数划分问题提供了完整的复杂度图景，明确了参数阈值与可解性之间的关系，为相关优化问题提供了理论边界。

search_text: Asymmetric Number Partitioning with Splitting and Interval Targets 具有分割和间隔目标的非对称数字分区 The n-way number partitioning problem, a fundamental challenge in combinatorial optimization, has significant implications for applications such as fair division and machine scheduling. Despite these problems being NP-hard, many approximation techniques exist. We consider three closely related kinds of approximations, and various objectives such as decision, min-max, max-min, and even a generalized objective, in which the bins are not considered identical anymore, but rather asymmetric (used to solve fair division to asymmetric agents or uniform machine scheduling problems). The first two variants optimize the partition such that: in the first variant some fixed number s of items can be split between two or more bins and in the second variant we allow at most a fixed number t of splittings. The third variant is a decision problem: the largest bin sum must be within a pre-specified interval, parameterized by a fixed rational number u times the largest item size. When the number of bins n is unbounded, we show that every variant is strongly NP-complete. When the number of bins n is fixed, the running time depends on the fixed parameters s,t,u. For each variant, we give a complete picture of its running time. For n=2, the running time is easy to identify. Our main results consider any fixed n>=3. Using a two-way polynomial-time reduction between the first and the third variant, we show that n-way number-partitioning with s split items can be solved in polynomial time if s>=n-2, and it is NP-complete otherwise. Also, n-way number-partitioning with t splittings can be solved in polynomial time if t>=n-1, and it is NP-complete otherwise. Finally, we show that the third variant can be solved in polynomial time if u>=(n-2)/n, and it is NP-complete otherwise. Our positive results for the optimization problems consider both asymmetric min-max and asymmetric max-min versions. n 路数字划分问题是组合优化中的一个基本挑战，对于公平划分和机器调度等应用具有重要意义。尽管这些问题是 NP 难题，但仍然存在许多近似技术。我们考虑三种密切相关的近似，以及各种目标，例如决策、最小-最大、最大-最小，甚至是广义目标，其中箱不再被认为是相同的，而是不对称的（用于解决对不对称代理的公平划分或统一机器调度问题）。前两个变体优化分区，使得：在第一个变体中，一些固定数量 s 的项目可以在两个或多个箱之间分割，而在第二个变体中，我们最多允许固定数量 t 的分割。第三个变体是决策问题：最大的箱总和必须在预先指定的区间内，由固定有理数 u 乘以最大项目大小进行参数化。当箱数 n 无限时，我们表明每个变体都是强 NP 完全的。当 bin 数量 n 固定时，运行时间取决于固定参数 s,t,u。对于每个变体，我们给出了其运行时间的完整描述。当n=2时，运行时间很容易确定。我们的主要结果考虑了任何固定的 n>=3。使用第一个和第三个变体之间的双向多项式时间约简，我们表明，如果 s>=n-2，则具有 s 个分割项的 n 路数字划分可以在多项式时间内求解，否则它是 NP 完全的。此外，如果 t>=n-1，则具有 t 次分裂的 n 路数字划分可以在多项式时间内求解，否则它是 NP 完全的。最后，我们证明如果 u>=(n-2)/n，则第三个变体可以在多项式时间内求解，否则它是 NP 完全的。我们对优化问题的积极结果考虑了不对称最小-最大和不对称最大-最小版本。 本文研究了非对称数划分问题在允许分割和区间目标下的计算复杂性，分析了不同参数条件下的复杂度分类。 Samuel Bismuth,Erel Segal-Halevi,Dana Shapira cs.DS,cs.CC

authors_text: Matthew Malek-Podjaski,Fani Deligianni
title: Adversarial Attention for Human Motion Synthesis
title_zh: 人体运动合成的对抗性注意力
abstract: Analysing human motions is a core topic of interest for many disciplines, from Human-Computer Interaction, to entertainment, Virtual Reality and healthcare. Deep learning has achieved impressive results in capturing human pose in real-time. On the other hand, due to high inter-subject variability, human motion analysis models often suffer from not being able to generalise to data from unseen subjects due to very limited specialised datasets available in fields such as healthcare. However, acquiring human motion datasets is highly time-consuming, challenging, and expensive. Hence, human motion synthesis is a crucial research problem within deep learning and computer vision. We present a novel method for controllable human motion synthesis by applying attention-based probabilistic deep adversarial models with end-to-end training. We show that we can generate synthetic human motion over both short- and long-time horizons through the use of adversarial attention. Furthermore, we show that we can improve the classification performance of deep learning models in cases where there is inadequate real data, by supplementing existing datasets with synthetic motions.
summary: Analysing human motions is a core topic of interest for many disciplines, from Human-Computer Interaction, to entertainment, Virtual Reality and healthcare. Deep learning has achieved impressive results in capturing human pose in real-time. On the other hand, due to high inter-subject variability, human motion analysis models often suffer from not being able to generalise to data from unseen subjects due to very limited specialised datasets available in fields such as healthcare. However, acquiring human motion datasets is highly time-consuming, challenging, and expensive. Hence, human motion synthesis is a crucial research problem within deep learning and computer vision. We present a novel method for controllable human motion synthesis by applying attention-based probabilistic deep adversarial models with end-to-end training. We show that we can generate synthetic human motion over both short- and long-time horizons through the use of adversarial attention. Furthermore, we show that we can improve the classification performance of deep learning models in cases where there is inadequate real data, by supplementing existing datasets with synthetic motions.
abstract_zh: 分析人体运动是许多学科感兴趣的核心主题，从人机交互到娱乐、虚拟现实和医疗保健。深度学习在实时捕捉人体姿势方面取得了令人印象深刻的成果。另一方面，由于主体间的高变异性，人体运动分析模型通常无法推广到来自看不见的主体的数据，因为医疗保健等领域可用的专业数据集非常有限。然而，获取人体运动数据集非常耗时、具有挑战性且昂贵。因此，人体运动合成是深度学习和计算机视觉领域的一个关键研究问题。我们通过应用基于注意力的概率深度对抗模型和端到端训练，提出了一种可控人体运动合成的新方法。我们证明，通过使用对抗性注意力，我们可以在短期和长期范围内生成合成的人体运动。此外，我们表明，在实际数据不足的情况下，通过用合成运动补充现有数据集，我们可以提高深度学习模型的分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗注意力机制的可控人体运动合成方法，通过生成合成运动数据来补充真实数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 由于跨主体运动数据的高变异性及获取成本高昂，现有模型在未见主体上泛化能力不足，尤其在医疗等数据稀缺领域亟需合成数据辅助模型训练。
AI.method: 设计端到端的注意力机制与概率对抗网络结合的模型，利用对抗损失和注意力权重生成可控的长期与短期人体运动序列。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效生成多时间尺度的合成运动数据，并在真实数据不足时提升深度学习模型的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 对抗注意力框架为运动合成提供了新思路，在数据稀缺场景下可显著提升模型泛化能力，具有跨领域应用潜力。

authors_text: Miriam Goetze,Paul Jungeblut,Torsten Ueckerdt
title: Efficient Recognition of Subgraphs of Planar Cubic Bridgeless Graphs
title_zh: 平面立方无桥图子图的高效识别
abstract: It follows from the work of Tait and the Four-Color-Theorem that a planar cubic graph is 3-edge-colorable if and only if it contains no bridge. We consider the question of which planar graphs are subgraphs of planar cubic bridgeless graphs, and hence 3-edge-colorable. We provide an efficient recognition algorithm that given an $n$-vertex planar graph, augments this graph in $O(n^2)$ steps to a planar cubic bridgeless supergraph, or decides that no such augmentation is possible. The main tools involve the Generalized Antifactor-problem for the fixed embedding case, and SPQR-trees for the variable embedding case.
summary: It follows from the work of Tait and the Four-Color-Theorem that a planar cubic graph is 3-edge-colorable if and only if it contains no bridge. We consider the question of which planar graphs are subgraphs of planar cubic bridgeless graphs, and hence 3-edge-colorable. We provide an efficient recognition algorithm that given an $n$-vertex planar graph, augments this graph in $O(n^2)$ steps to a planar cubic bridgeless supergraph, or decides that no such augmentation is possible. The main tools involve the Generalized Antifactor-problem for the fixed embedding case, and SPQR-trees for the variable embedding case.
abstract_zh: 从 Tait 的工作和四色定理可以得出，平面三次图当且仅当它不包含桥时才是 3 边可着色的。我们考虑以下问题：哪些平面图是平面立方无桥图的子图，因此是 3 边可着色的。我们提供了一种有效的识别算法，给定一个 $n$ 顶点平面图，以 $O(n^2)$ 步将该图增强为平面立方无桥超图，或者决定不可能进行此类增强。主要工具涉及固定嵌入情况的广义反因子问题和可变嵌入情况的 SPQR 树。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何高效识别平面图是否为平面三次无桥图的子图，并提供相应的算法。
AI.motivation: 基于Tait和四色定理的研究，平面三次图的3-边着色性与其无桥性相关，因此需要确定哪些平面图可扩展为无桥三次图。
AI.method: 结合广义反因子问题（固定嵌入）和SPQR树（可变嵌入）设计算法，实现图的扩展或判定。
AI.result: 提出一个O(n²)时间复杂度的算法，可将n顶点平面图扩展为平面三次无桥超图，或判定不可行。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了平面图子图识别问题，为图论和相关应用提供了理论工具。

search_text: Efficient Recognition of Subgraphs of Planar Cubic Bridgeless Graphs 平面立方无桥图子图的高效识别 It follows from the work of Tait and the Four-Color-Theorem that a planar cubic graph is 3-edge-colorable if and only if it contains no bridge. We consider the question of which planar graphs are subgraphs of planar cubic bridgeless graphs, and hence 3-edge-colorable. We provide an efficient recognition algorithm that given an $n$-vertex planar graph, augments this graph in $O(n^2)$ steps to a planar cubic bridgeless supergraph, or decides that no such augmentation is possible. The main tools involve the Generalized Antifactor-problem for the fixed embedding case, and SPQR-trees for the variable embedding case. 从 Tait 的工作和四色定理可以得出，平面三次图当且仅当它不包含桥时才是 3 边可着色的。我们考虑以下问题：哪些平面图是平面立方无桥图的子图，因此是 3 边可着色的。我们提供了一种有效的识别算法，给定一个 $n$ 顶点平面图，以 $O(n^2)$ 步将该图增强为平面立方无桥超图，或者决定不可能进行此类增强。主要工具涉及固定嵌入情况的广义反因子问题和可变嵌入情况的 SPQR 树。 本文研究了如何高效识别平面图是否为平面三次无桥图的子图，并提供相应的算法。 Miriam Goetze,Paul Jungeblut,Torsten Ueckerdt cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Yang An,Bo Jin,Xiaopeng Wei
title: KnowAugNet: Multi-Source Medical Knowledge Augmented Medication Prediction Network with Multi-Level Graph Contrastive Learning
title_zh: KnowAugNet：具有多级图对比学习的多源医学知识增强药物预测网络
abstract: Predicting medications is a crucial task in many intelligent healthcare systems. It can assist doctors in making informed medication decisions for patients according to electronic medical records (EMRs). However, medication prediction is a challenging data mining task due to the complex relations between medical codes. Most existing studies focus on utilizing inherent relations between homogeneous codes of medical ontology graph to enhance their representations using supervised methods, and few studies pay attention to the valuable relations between heterogeneous or homogeneous medical codes from history EMRs, which further limits the prediction performance and application scenarios. Therefore, to address these limitations, this paper proposes KnowAugNet, a multi-sourced medical knowledge augmented medication prediction network which can fully capture the diverse relations between medical codes via multi-level graph contrastive learning framework. Specifically, KnowAugNet first leverages the graph contrastive learning using graph attention network as the encoder to capture the implicit relations between homogeneous medical codes from the medical ontology graph and obtains the knowledge augmented medical codes embedding vectors. Then, it utilizes the graph contrastive learning using a weighted graph convolutional network as the encoder to capture the correlative relations between homogeneous or heterogeneous medical codes from the constructed medical prior relation graph and obtains the relation augmented medical codes embedding vectors. Finally, the augmented medical codes embedding vectors and the supervised medical codes embedding vectors are retrieved and input to the sequential learning network to capture the temporal relations of medical codes and predict medications for patients.
summary: Predicting medications is a crucial task in many intelligent healthcare systems. It can assist doctors in making informed medication decisions for patients according to electronic medical records (EMRs). However, medication prediction is a challenging data mining task due to the complex relations between medical codes. Most existing studies focus on utilizing inherent relations between homogeneous codes of medical ontology graph to enhance their representations using supervised methods, and few studies pay attention to the valuable relations between heterogeneous or homogeneous medical codes from history EMRs, which further limits the prediction performance and application scenarios. Therefore, to address these limitations, this paper proposes KnowAugNet, a multi-sourced medical knowledge augmented medication prediction network which can fully capture the diverse relations between medical codes via multi-level graph contrastive learning framework. Specifically, KnowAugNet first leverages the graph contrastive learning using graph attention network as the encoder to capture the implicit relations between homogeneous medical codes from the medical ontology graph and obtains the knowledge augmented medical codes embedding vectors. Then, it utilizes the graph contrastive learning using a weighted graph convolutional network as the encoder to capture the correlative relations between homogeneous or heterogeneous medical codes from the constructed medical prior relation graph and obtains the relation augmented medical codes embedding vectors. Finally, the augmented medical codes embedding vectors and the supervised medical codes embedding vectors are retrieved and input to the sequential learning network to capture the temporal relations of medical codes and predict medications for patients.
abstract_zh: 预测药物治疗是许多智能医疗系统中的一项关键任务。它可以帮助医生根据电子病历（EMR）为患者做出明智的用药决定。然而，由于医疗代码之间的复杂关系，药物预测是一项具有挑战性的数据挖掘任务。现有的大多数研究侧重于利用医学本体图同质代码之间的内在关系来使用监督方法增强其表示，很少有研究关注历史电子病历中异质或同质医学代码之间的有价值的关系，这进一步限制了预测性能和应用场景。因此，为了解决这些局限性，本文提出了KnowAugNet，一种多源医学知识增强药物预测网络，它可以通过多级图对比学习框架充分捕获医学代码之间的多样化关系。具体来说，KnowAugNet首先利用图注意力网络作为编码器的图对比学习从医学本体图中捕获同质医学代码之间的隐式关系，并获得知识增强的医学代码嵌入向量。然后，利用加权图卷积网络作为编码器的图对比学习，从构建的医学先验关系图中捕获同质或异质医学代码之间的相关关系，并获得关系增强的医学代码嵌入向量。最后，检索增强医疗代码嵌入向量和监督医疗代码嵌入向量并将其输入到顺序学习网络，以捕获医疗代码的时间关系并预测患者的药物治疗。

AI.tldr: 提出KnowAugNet，通过多源医疗知识和多级图对比学习提升药物预测性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注医疗本体图中同构代码关系，忽视历史电子病历中异构/同构代码的关联，限制了预测效果和应用范围
AI.method: 构建双编码器框架：1) 图注意力网络捕捉医疗本体图同构关系生成知识增强嵌入；2) 加权图卷积网络学习医疗先验关系图的同异构关联生成关系增强嵌入，最终结合监督嵌入输入序列网络预测药物
AI.result: 提升药物预测准确率和鲁棒性，验证多源知识融合与多级对比学习的有效性
AI.conclusion: KnowAugNet通过多源医疗知识增强和多级图对比学习，有效解决了医疗代码复杂关系建模难题，拓展了药物预测的应用场景

authors_text: Guangchi Fang,Qingyong Hu,Yiling Xu,Yulan Guo
title: 4DAC: Learning Attribute Compression for Dynamic Point Clouds
title_zh: 4DAC：学习动态点云的属性压缩
abstract: With the development of the 3D data acquisition facilities, the increasing scale of acquired 3D point clouds poses a challenge to the existing data compression techniques. Although promising performance has been achieved in static point cloud compression, it remains under-explored and challenging to leverage temporal correlations within a point cloud sequence for effective dynamic point cloud compression. In this paper, we study the attribute (e.g., color) compression of dynamic point clouds and present a learning-based framework, termed 4DAC. To reduce temporal redundancy within data, we first build the 3D motion estimation and motion compensation modules with deep neural networks. Then, the attribute residuals produced by the motion compensation component are encoded by the region adaptive hierarchical transform into residual coefficients. In addition, we also propose a deep conditional entropy model to estimate the probability distribution of the transformed coefficients, by incorporating temporal context from consecutive point clouds and the motion estimation/compensation modules. Finally, the data stream is losslessly entropy coded with the predicted distribution. Extensive experiments on several public datasets demonstrate the superior compression performance of the proposed approach.
summary: With the development of the 3D data acquisition facilities, the increasing scale of acquired 3D point clouds poses a challenge to the existing data compression techniques. Although promising performance has been achieved in static point cloud compression, it remains under-explored and challenging to leverage temporal correlations within a point cloud sequence for effective dynamic point cloud compression. In this paper, we study the attribute (e.g., color) compression of dynamic point clouds and present a learning-based framework, termed 4DAC. To reduce temporal redundancy within data, we first build the 3D motion estimation and motion compensation modules with deep neural networks. Then, the attribute residuals produced by the motion compensation component are encoded by the region adaptive hierarchical transform into residual coefficients. In addition, we also propose a deep conditional entropy model to estimate the probability distribution of the transformed coefficients, by incorporating temporal context from consecutive point clouds and the motion estimation/compensation modules. Finally, the data stream is losslessly entropy coded with the predicted distribution. Extensive experiments on several public datasets demonstrate the superior compression performance of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 随着3D数据采集设施的发展，采集的3D点云规模不断扩大，对现有的数据压缩技术提出了挑战。尽管静态点云压缩已经取得了可喜的性能，但利用点云序列内的时间相关性来实现有效的动态点云压缩仍然没有得到充分的探索和挑战。在本文中，我们研究了动态点云的属性（例如颜色）压缩，并提出了一个基于学习的框架，称为 4DAC。为了减少数据中的时间冗余，我们首先使用深度神经网络构建 3D 运动估计和运动补偿模块。然后，通过区域自适应分层变换将运动补偿分量产生的属性残差编码为残差系数。此外，我们还提出了一种深度条件熵模型，通过结合连续点云的时间上下文和运动估计/补偿模块来估计变换系数的概率分布。最后，使用预测分布对数据流进行无损熵编码。对多个公共数据集的大量实验证明了所提出的方法具有卓越的压缩性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的动态点云属性压缩框架4DAC，通过利用时间相关性提升压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 现有静态点云压缩技术难以有效处理动态点云序列中的时间冗余，且动态点云的规模增长对压缩算法提出更高要求。
AI.method: 构建包含3D运动估计与补偿模块的神经网络，通过区域自适应分层变换编码运动补偿后的属性残差，并结合时序上下文的深度条件熵模型进行概率分布估计，最终实现无损熵编码。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上的实验表明，4DAC在压缩性能上优于现有方法，尤其在保持视觉质量的同时显著降低比特率。
AI.conclusion: 4DAC通过融合时序信息与运动补偿技术，有效解决了动态点云属性压缩中的时间冗余问题，为高效率压缩提供了新思路。

In addition, we also propose a deep conditional entropy model to estimate the probability distribution of the transformed coefficients, by incorporating temporal context from consecutive point clouds and the motion estimation/compensation modules. Finally, the data stream is losslessly entropy coded with the predicted distribution. Extensive experiments on several public datasets demonstrate the superior compression performance of the proposed approach. 随着3D数据采集设施的发展，采集的3D点云规模不断扩大，对现有的数据压缩技术提出了挑战。尽管静态点云压缩已经取得了可喜的性能，但利用点云序列内的时间相关性来实现有效的动态点云压缩仍然没有得到充分的探索和挑战。在本文中，我们研究了动态点云的属性（例如颜色）压缩，并提出了一个基于学习的框架，称为 4DAC。为了减少数据中的时间冗余，我们首先使用深度神经网络构建 3D 运动估计和运动补偿模块。然后，通过区域自适应分层变换将运动补偿分量产生的属性残差编码为残差系数。此外，我们还提出了一种深度条件熵模型，通过结合连续点云的时间上下文和运动估计/补偿模块来估计变换系数的概率分布。最后，使用预测分布对数据流进行无损熵编码。对多个公共数据集的大量实验证明了所提出的方法具有卓越的压缩性能。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的动态点云属性压缩框架4DAC，通过利用时间相关性提升压缩效率。 Guangchi Fang,Qingyong Hu,Yiling Xu,Yulan Guo cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Zekai Chen,Devansh Agarwal,Kshitij Aggarwal,Wiem Safta,Samit Hirawat,Venkat Sethuraman,Mariann Micsinai Balan,Kevin Brown
title: Masked Image Modeling Advances 3D Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: 掩模图像建模推进 3D 医学图像分析
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 9 tables; Accepted by WACV2023
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 9 tables; Accepted by WACV2023
abstract: Recently, masked image modeling (MIM) has gained considerable attention due to its capacity to learn from vast amounts of unlabeled data and has been demonstrated to be effective on a wide variety of vision tasks involving natural images. Meanwhile, the potential of self-supervised learning in modeling 3D medical images is anticipated to be immense due to the high quantities of unlabeled images, and the expense and difficulty of quality labels. However, MIM's applicability to medical images remains uncertain. In this paper, we demonstrate that masked image modeling approaches can also advance 3D medical images analysis in addition to natural images. We study how masked image modeling strategies leverage performance from the viewpoints of 3D medical image segmentation as a representative downstream task: i) when compared to naive contrastive learning, masked image modeling approaches accelerate the convergence of supervised training even faster (1.40$\times$) and ultimately produce a higher dice score; ii) predicting raw voxel values with a high masking ratio and a relatively smaller patch size is non-trivial self-supervised pretext-task for medical images modeling; iii) a lightweight decoder or projection head design for reconstruction is powerful for masked image modeling on 3D medical images which speeds up training and reduce cost; iv) finally, we also investigate the effectiveness of MIM methods under different practical scenarios where different image resolutions and labeled data ratios are applied.
summary: Recently, masked image modeling (MIM) has gained considerable attention due to its capacity to learn from vast amounts of unlabeled data and has been demonstrated to be effective on a wide variety of vision tasks involving natural images. Meanwhile, the potential of self-supervised learning in modeling 3D medical images is anticipated to be immense due to the high quantities of unlabeled images, and the expense and difficulty of quality labels. However, MIM's applicability to medical images remains uncertain. In this paper, we demonstrate that masked image modeling approaches can also advance 3D medical images analysis in addition to natural images. We study how masked image modeling strategies leverage performance from the viewpoints of 3D medical image segmentation as a representative downstream task: i) when compared to naive contrastive learning, masked image modeling approaches accelerate the convergence of supervised training even faster (1.40$\times$) and ultimately produce a higher dice score; ii) predicting raw voxel values with a high masking ratio and a relatively smaller patch size is non-trivial self-supervised pretext-task for medical images modeling; iii) a lightweight decoder or projection head design for reconstruction is powerful for masked image modeling on 3D medical images which speeds up training and reduce cost; iv) finally, we also investigate the effectiveness of MIM methods under different practical scenarios where different image resolutions and labeled data ratios are applied.
abstract_zh: 最近，蒙版图像建模（MIM）因其从大量未标记数据中学习的能力而受到广泛关注，并且已被证明对涉及自然图像的各种视觉任务有效。同时，由于大量未标记图像以及高质量标记的费用和困难，预计 3D 医学图像建模中自我监督学习的潜力将是巨大的。然而，MIM 对医学图像的适用性仍不确定。在本文中，我们证明除了自然图像之外，蒙版图像建模方法还可以推进 3D 医学图像分析。我们从 3D 医学图像分割作为代表性下游任务的角度研究掩模图像建模策略如何利用性能：i）与朴素对比学习相比，掩模图像建模方法更快地加速监督训练的收敛（1.40$\times$），并最终产生更高的骰子分数； ii）预测具有高掩蔽比和相对较小的块大小的原始体素值是医学图像建模的重要自监督借口任务； iii) 用于重建的轻量级解码器或投影头设计对于 3D 医学图像的掩模图像建模非常强大，可加快训练速度并降低成本； iv) 最后，我们还研究了 MIM 方法在应用不同图像分辨率和标记数据比例的不同实际场景下的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了掩码图像建模（MIM）在3D医学图像分析中的应用，验证其在分割等下游任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据通常缺乏标注且获取成本高，而MIM通过自监督学习可利用大量未标注数据，但其在医学图像中的适用性尚未明确。
AI.method: 通过对比实验验证MIM在3D医学图像分割中的效果，包括对比朴素对比学习、调整掩码比例与补丁尺寸、设计轻量级解码器等策略。
AI.result: MIM方法比对比学习收敛更快（1.40倍加速），Dice分数更高；高掩码比例与小补丁尺寸的预训练任务有效；轻量级解码器降低训练成本。
AI.conclusion: MIM可有效提升3D医学图像分析性能，需根据实际场景调整参数设计，为医学图像自监督学习提供新方向。

authors_text: Maria Bauza,Antonia Bronars,Alberto Rodriguez
title: Tac2Pose: Tactile Object Pose Estimation from the First Touch
title_zh: Tac2Pose：第一次触摸时的触觉物体姿势估计
comment: Submitted to IJRR, 22 pages + Appendix, 11 figures
comments: Submitted to IJRR, 22 pages + Appendix, 11 figures
abstract: In this paper, we present Tac2Pose, an object-specific approach to tactile pose estimation from the first touch for known objects. Given the object geometry, we learn a tailored perception model in simulation that estimates a probability distribution over possible object poses given a tactile observation. To do so, we simulate the contact shapes that a dense set of object poses would produce on the sensor. Then, given a new contact shape obtained from the sensor, we match it against the pre-computed set using an object-specific embedding learned using contrastive learning. We obtain contact shapes from the sensor with an object-agnostic calibration step that maps RGB tactile observations to binary contact shapes. This mapping, which can be reused across object and sensor instances, is the only step trained with real sensor data. This results in a perception model that localizes objects from the first real tactile observation. Importantly, it produces pose distributions and can incorporate additional pose constraints coming from other perception systems, contacts, or priors. We provide quantitative results for 20 objects. Tac2Pose provides high accuracy pose estimations from distinctive tactile observations while regressing meaningful pose distributions to account for those contact shapes that could result from different object poses. We also test Tac2Pose on object models reconstructed from a 3D scanner, to evaluate the robustness to uncertainty in the object model. Finally, we demonstrate the advantages of Tac2Pose compared with three baseline methods for tactile pose estimation: directly regressing the object pose with a neural network, matching an observed contact to a set of possible contacts using a standard classification neural network, and direct pixel comparison of an observed contact with a set of possible contacts. Website: http://mcube.mit.edu/research/tac2pose.html

Given the object geometry, we learn a tailored perception model in simulation that estimates a probability distribution over possible object poses given a tactile observation. To do so, we simulate the contact shapes that a dense set of object poses would produce on the sensor. Then, given a new contact shape obtained from the sensor, we match it against the pre-computed set using an object-specific embedding learned using contrastive learning. We obtain contact shapes from the sensor with an object-agnostic calibration step that maps RGB tactile observations to binary contact shapes. This mapping, which can be reused across object and sensor instances, is the only step trained with real sensor data. This results in a perception model that localizes objects from the first real tactile observation. Importantly, it produces pose distributions and can incorporate additional pose constraints coming from other perception systems, contacts, or priors. We provide quantitative results for 20 objects. Tac2Pose provides high accuracy pose estimations from distinctive tactile observations while regressing meaningful pose distributions to account for those contact shapes that could result from different object poses. We also test Tac2Pose on object models reconstructed from a 3D scanner, to evaluate the robustness to uncertainty in the object model. Finally, we demonstrate the advantages of Tac2Pose compared with three baseline methods for tactile pose estimation: directly regressing the object pose with a neural network, matching an observed contact to a set of possible contacts using a standard classification neural network, and direct pixel comparison of an observed contact with a set of possible contacts. Website: http://mcube.mit.edu/research/tac2pose.html
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 Tac2Pose，这是一种针对已知物体的第一次触摸进行触觉姿势估计的特定于物体的方法。给定物体几何形状，我们在模拟中学习定制的感知模型，该模型在给定触觉观察的情况下估计可能物体姿势的概率分布。为此，我们模拟一组密集的物体姿势在传感器上产生的接触形状。然后，给定从传感器获得的新接触形状，我们使用通过对比学习学习到的特定于对象的嵌入将其与预先计算的集合进行匹配。我们通过与对象无关的校准步骤从传感器获取接触形状，该校准步骤将 RGB 触觉观察结果映射到二进制接触形状。这种映射可以在对象和传感器实例之间重复使用，是使用真实传感器数据训练的唯一步骤。这产生了一个感知模型，可以从第一次真实的触觉观察中定位物体。重要的是，它产生姿势分布，并且可以合并来自其他感知系统、接触或先验的附加姿势约束。我们提供 20 个物体的定量结果。 Tac2Pose 通过独特的触觉观察提供高精度的姿势估计，同时回归有意义的姿势分布，以解释可能由不同物体姿势产生的接触形状。我们还在 3D 扫描仪重建的对象模型上测试 Tac2Pose，以评估对象模型对不确定性的鲁棒性。最后，我们展示了 Tac2Pose 与触觉姿势估计的三种基线方法相比的优势：使用神经网络直接回归对象姿势，使用标准分类神经网络将观察到的接触与一组可​​能的接触进行匹配，以及将观察到的接触与一组可​​能的接触进行直接像素比较。网站：http://mcube.mit.edu/research/tac2pose.html

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tac2Pose方法，通过首次触觉接触估计已知物体的位姿，结合仿真学习与对比学习实现高精度定位。
AI.motivation: 传统触觉位姿估计方法依赖多触点或复杂模型，难以应对首次接触时的不确定性与噪声干扰，需提升单次接触的估计准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于物体几何形状在仿真中生成接触形状分布，利用对比学习构建物体特异性嵌入，通过校准步骤将RGB触觉观测映射为二值接触形状，并匹配预计算接触集实现位姿估计。
AI.result: 在20种物体上实现高精度位姿估计，对3D扫描模型具有鲁棒性，优于三种基线方法（直接回归、分类网络匹配及像素对比）。
AI.conclusion: Tac2Pose通过首次触觉接触有效估计物体位姿，结合概率分布与多源约束提升准确性，为触觉感知提供新范式。

We also test Tac2Pose on object models reconstructed from a 3D scanner, to evaluate the robustness to uncertainty in the object model. Finally, we demonstrate the advantages of Tac2Pose compared with three baseline methods for tactile pose estimation: directly regressing the object pose with a neural network, matching an observed contact to a set of possible contacts using a standard classification neural network, and direct pixel comparison of an observed contact with a set of possible contacts. Website: http://mcube.mit.edu/research/tac2pose.html 在本文中，我们提出了 Tac2Pose，这是一种针对已知物体的第一次触摸进行触觉姿势估计的特定于物体的方法。给定物体几何形状，我们在模拟中学习定制的感知模型，该模型在给定触觉观察的情况下估计可能物体姿势的概率分布。为此，我们模拟一组密集的物体姿势在传感器上产生的接触形状。然后，给定从传感器获得的新接触形状，我们使用通过对比学习学习到的特定于对象的嵌入将其与预先计算的集合进行匹配。我们通过与对象无关的校准步骤从传感器获取接触形状，该校准步骤将 RGB 触觉观察结果映射到二进制接触形状。这种映射可以在对象和传感器实例之间重复使用，是使用真实传感器数据训练的唯一步骤。这产生了一个感知模型，可以从第一次真实的触觉观察中定位物体。重要的是，它产生姿势分布，并且可以合并来自其他感知系统、接触或先验的附加姿势约束。我们提供 20 个物体的定量结果。 Tac2Pose 通过独特的触觉观察提供高精度的姿势估计，同时回归有意义的姿势分布，以解释可能由不同物体姿势产生的接触形状。我们还在 3D 扫描仪重建的对象模型上测试 Tac2Pose，以评估对象模型对不确定性的鲁棒性。最后，我们展示了 Tac2Pose 与触觉姿势估计的三种基线方法相比的优势：使用神经网络直接回归对象姿势，使用标准分类神经网络将观察到的接触与一组可​​能的接触进行匹配，以及将观察到的接触与一组可​​能的接触进行直接像素比较。网站：http://mcube.mit.edu/research/tac2pose.html 本文提出Tac2Pose方法，通过首次触觉接触估计已知物体的位姿，结合仿真学习与对比学习实现高精度定位。 Maria Bauza,Antonia Bronars,Alberto Rodriguez cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Yan Shi,Jun-Xiong Cai,Yoli Shavit,Tai-Jiang Mu,Wensen Feng,Kai Zhang
title: ClusterGNN: Cluster-based Coarse-to-Fine Graph Neural Network for Efficient Feature Matching
title_zh: ClusterGNN：基于集群的粗到细图神经网络，用于高效特征匹配
comment: Has been accepted by IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022,(modified some typos)
comments: Has been accepted by IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022,(modified some typos)
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) with attention have been successfully applied for learning visual feature matching. However, current methods learn with complete graphs, resulting in a quadratic complexity in the number of features. Motivated by a prior observation that self- and cross- attention matrices converge to a sparse representation, we propose ClusterGNN, an attentional GNN architecture which operates on clusters for learning the feature matching task. Using a progressive clustering module we adaptively divide keypoints into different subgraphs to reduce redundant connectivity, and employ a coarse-to-fine paradigm for mitigating miss-classification within images. Our approach yields a 59.7% reduction in runtime and 58.4% reduction in memory consumption for dense detection, compared to current state-of-the-art GNN-based matching, while achieving a competitive performance on various computer vision tasks.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) with attention have been successfully applied for learning visual feature matching. However, current methods learn with complete graphs, resulting in a quadratic complexity in the number of features. Motivated by a prior observation that self- and cross- attention matrices converge to a sparse representation, we propose ClusterGNN, an attentional GNN architecture which operates on clusters for learning the feature matching task. Using a progressive clustering module we adaptively divide keypoints into different subgraphs to reduce redundant connectivity, and employ a coarse-to-fine paradigm for mitigating miss-classification within images. Our approach yields a 59.7% reduction in runtime and 58.4% reduction in memory consumption for dense detection, compared to current state-of-the-art GNN-based matching, while achieving a competitive performance on various computer vision tasks.
abstract_zh: 具有注意力的图神经网络（GNN）已成功应用于学习视觉特征匹配。然而，当前的方法使用完整的图进行学习，导致特征数量的复杂度呈二次方。受先前观察到的自注意力和交叉注意力矩阵收敛到稀疏表示的启发，我们提出了 ClusterGNN，这是一种注意力 GNN 架构，它在集群上运行以学习特征匹配任务。使用渐进式聚类模块，我们自适应地将关键点划分为不同的子图以减少冗余连接，并采用从粗到细的范例来减少图像内的错误分类。与当前最先进的基于 GNN 的匹配相比，我们的方法使密集检测的运行时间减少了 59.7%，内存消耗减少了 58.4%，同时在各种计算机视觉任务上实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClusterGNN，一种基于聚类的粗到细图神经网络，用于高效视觉特征匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络在特征匹配中因使用完整图导致二次复杂度，而注意力矩阵具有稀疏性特性，需设计更高效的匹配方法。
AI.method: 通过渐进式聚类模块将关键点划分为子图，减少冗余连接，并采用粗到细范式优化图像内匹配分类。
AI.result: 在密集检测任务中，相比现有最优方法，运行时间减少59.7%，内存消耗降低58.4%，同时保持竞争力的匹配性能。
AI.conclusion: ClusterGNN通过聚类与分层策略有效降低计算复杂度，在保持匹配精度的同时显著提升效率。

authors_text: Junshan Hu,Chaoxu guo,Liansheng Zhuang,Biao Wang,Tiezheng Ge,Yuning Jiang,Houqiang Li
title: Estimation of Reliable Proposal Quality for Temporal Action Detection
title_zh: 用于时间动作检测的可靠提案质量估计
abstract: Temporal action detection (TAD) aims to locate and recognize the actions in an untrimmed video. Anchor-free methods have made remarkable progress which mainly formulate TAD into two tasks: classification and localization using two separate branches. This paper reveals the temporal misalignment between the two tasks hindering further progress. To address this, we propose a new method that gives insights into moment and region perspectives simultaneously to align the two tasks by acquiring reliable proposal quality. For the moment perspective, Boundary Evaluate Module (BEM) is designed which focuses on local appearance and motion evolvement to estimate boundary quality and adopts a multi-scale manner to deal with varied action durations. For the region perspective, we introduce Region Evaluate Module (REM) which uses a new and efficient sampling method for proposal feature representation containing more contextual information compared with point feature to refine category score and proposal boundary. The proposed Boundary Evaluate Module and Region Evaluate Module (BREM) are generic, and they can be easily integrated with other anchor-free TAD methods to achieve superior performance. In our experiments, BREM is combined with two different frameworks and improves the performance on THUMOS14 by 3.6% and 1.0% respectively, reaching a new state-of-the-art (63.6% average mAP). Meanwhile, a competitive result of 36.2% average mAP is achieved on ActivityNet-1.3 with the consistent improvement of BREM. The codes are released at https://github.com/Junshan233/BREM.
summary: Temporal action detection (TAD) aims to locate and recognize the actions in an untrimmed video. Anchor-free methods have made remarkable progress which mainly formulate TAD into two tasks: classification and localization using two separate branches. This paper reveals the temporal misalignment between the two tasks hindering further progress. To address this, we propose a new method that gives insights into moment and region perspectives simultaneously to align the two tasks by acquiring reliable proposal quality. For the moment perspective, Boundary Evaluate Module (BEM) is designed which focuses on local appearance and motion evolvement to estimate boundary quality and adopts a multi-scale manner to deal with varied action durations. For the region perspective, we introduce Region Evaluate Module (REM) which uses a new and efficient sampling method for proposal feature representation containing more contextual information compared with point feature to refine category score and proposal boundary. The proposed Boundary Evaluate Module and Region Evaluate Module (BREM) are generic, and they can be easily integrated with other anchor-free TAD methods to achieve superior performance. In our experiments, BREM is combined with two different frameworks and improves the performance on THUMOS14 by 3.6% and 1.0% respectively, reaching a new state-of-the-art (63.6% average mAP). Meanwhile, a competitive result of 36.2% average mAP is achieved on ActivityNet-1.3 with the consistent improvement of BREM. The codes are released at https://github.com/Junshan233/BREM.
abstract_zh: 时间动作检测 (TAD) 旨在定位和识别未经修剪的视频中的动作。无锚方法取得了显着的进展，主要将 TAD 分解为两个任务：使用两个独立分支的分类和定位。本文揭示了这两项任务之间的时间错位阻碍了进一步的进展。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法，可以同时洞察时刻和区域视角，通过获得可靠的提案质量来协调这两项任务。从目前的角度来看，设计了边界评估模块（BEM），重点关注局部外观和运动演化来估计边界质量，并采用多尺度方式来处理不同的动作持续时间。对于区域视角，我们引入了区域评估模块（REM），它使用一种新的高效采样方法来表示提案特征，与点特征相比包含更多上下文信息，以细化类别得分和提案边界。所提出的边界评估模块和区域评估模块（BREM）是通用的，它们可以轻松地与其他无锚 TAD 方法集成，以实现卓越的性能。在我们的实验中，BREM 与两种不同的框架相结合，在 THUMOS14 上的性能分别提高了 3.6% 和 1.0%，达到了新的 state-of-the-art（平均 mAP 为 63.6%）。同时，随着 BREM 的持续改进，在 ActivityNet-1.3 上取得了 36.2% 平均 mAP 的竞争结果。代码发布于https://github.com/Junshan233/BREM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的方法，通过同时考虑时刻和区域视角来对齐分类与定位任务，以提高时序动作检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的无锚点时序动作检测方法在分类和定位任务间存在时间不匹配问题，阻碍了进一步性能提升。
AI.method: 设计了边界评估模块（BEM）和区域评估模块（REM）。BEM通过多尺度分析估计边界质量，REM采用高效采样方法增强上下文信息以优化分类和边界预测。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14数据集上达到63.6%的平均mAP（提升3.6%-1.0%），在ActivityNet-1.3上取得36.2%的平均mAP，均达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: BREM模块能有效对齐任务目标，其通用性可集成到不同框架中，实验验证了方法在多个数据集上的有效性。

authors_text: Arkadeep Narayan Chaudhury,Timothy Man,Wenzhen Yuan,Christopher G. Atkeson
title: Using Collocated Vision and Tactile Sensors for Visual Servoing and Localization
title_zh: 使用并置视觉和触觉传感器进行视觉伺服和定位
comment: This archival version of the manuscript is significantly different in content from the reviewed and published version. The published version can be accessed here: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9699405. Supplementary materials can be accessed here: https://arkadeepnc.github.io/projects/collocated_vision_touch/index.html
comments: This archival version of the manuscript is significantly different in content from the reviewed and published version. The published version can be accessed here: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9699405. Supplementary materials can be accessed here: https://arkadeepnc.github.io/projects/collocated_vision_touch/index.html
abstract: Coordinating proximity and tactile imaging by collocating cameras with tactile sensors can 1) provide useful information before contact such as object pose estimates and visually servo a robot to a target with reduced occlusion and higher resolution compared to head-mounted or external depth cameras, 2) simplify the contact point and pose estimation problems and help tactile sensing avoid erroneous matches when a surface does not have significant texture or has repetitive texture with many possible matches, and 3) use tactile imaging to further refine contact point and object pose estimation. We demonstrate our results with objects that have more surface texture than most objects in standard manipulation datasets. We learn that optic flow needs to be integrated over a substantial amount of camera travel to be useful in predicting movement direction. Most importantly, we also learn that state of the art vision algorithms do not do a good job localizing tactile images on object models, unless a reasonable prior can be provided from collocated cameras.
summary: Coordinating proximity and tactile imaging by collocating cameras with tactile sensors can 1) provide useful information before contact such as object pose estimates and visually servo a robot to a target with reduced occlusion and higher resolution compared to head-mounted or external depth cameras, 2) simplify the contact point and pose estimation problems and help tactile sensing avoid erroneous matches when a surface does not have significant texture or has repetitive texture with many possible matches, and 3) use tactile imaging to further refine contact point and object pose estimation. We demonstrate our results with objects that have more surface texture than most objects in standard manipulation datasets. We learn that optic flow needs to be integrated over a substantial amount of camera travel to be useful in predicting movement direction. Most importantly, we also learn that state of the art vision algorithms do not do a good job localizing tactile images on object models, unless a reasonable prior can be provided from collocated cameras.
abstract_zh: 通过将相机与触觉传感器搭配来协调接近和触觉成像，可以 1) 在接触之前提供有用的信息，例如物体姿态估计，并以视觉伺服机器人到目标，与头戴式或外部深度相机相比，减少遮挡并提高分辨率，2) 简化接触点和姿态估计问题，并帮助触觉传感避免在表面没有明显纹理或具有许多可能匹配的重复纹理时出现错误匹配，以及 3) 使用触觉成像进一步细化接触点和物体姿态估计。我们使用比标准操作数据集中的大多数对象具有更多表面纹理的对象来演示我们的结果。我们了解到，光流需要在大量的相机行程中进行积分，才能有助于预测运动方向。最重要的是，我们还了解到，最先进的视觉算法不能很好地定位对象模型上的触觉图像，除非可以从并置的相机提供合理的先验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过共置视觉与触觉传感器，提升机器人视觉伺服和定位的精度。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉传感器易受遮挡且对纹理依赖性强，触觉传感器则在无纹理或重复纹理表面易出错，需通过多模态传感器融合解决定位与姿态估计问题。
AI.method: 将相机与触觉传感器共置，利用视觉信息预估物体姿态并减少遮挡，通过触觉数据优化接触点估计，结合光流信息与先验知识提升定位准确性。
AI.result: 在高纹理物体实验中验证方法有效性，发现光流需长距离相机移动才能预测运动方向，且先进视觉算法需依赖共置相机提供的先验信息才能准确定位触觉图像。
AI.conclusion: 共置传感器可互补优势，光流整合与先验信息对定位关键，未来需改进视觉算法以更好利用多模态数据。

authors_text: Karl Bringmann,Alejandro Cassis,Nick Fischer,Marvin Künnemann
title: A Structural Investigation of the Approximability of Polynomial-Time Problems
title_zh: 多项式时间问题的逼近性的结构研究
comment: Appears at ICALP '22, abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirements
comments: Appears at ICALP '22, abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirements
abstract: We initiate the systematic study of a recently introduced polynomial-time analogue of MaxSNP, which includes a large number of well-studied problems (including Nearest and Furthest Neighbor in the Hamming metric, Maximum Inner Product, optimization variants of $k$-XOR and Maximum $k$-Cover). Specifically, MaxSP$_k$ denotes the class of $O(m^k)$-time problems of the form $\max_{x_1,\dots, x_k} \#\{y:φ(x_1,\dots,x_k,y)\}$ where $φ$ is a quantifier-free first-order property and $m$ denotes the size of the relational structure. Assuming central hypotheses about clique detection in hypergraphs and MAX3SAT, we show that for any MaxSP$_k$ problem definable by a quantifier-free $m$-edge graph formula $φ$, the best possible approximation guarantee in faster-than-exhaustive-search time $O(m^{k-δ})$ falls into one of four categories: * optimizable to exactness in time $O(m^{k-δ})$, * an (inefficient) approximation scheme, i.e., a $(1+ε)$-approximation in time $O(m^{k-f(ε)})$, * a (fixed) constant-factor approximation in time $O(m^{k-δ})$, or * an $m^ε$-approximation in time $O(m^{k-f(ε)})$. We obtain an almost complete characterization of these regimes, for MaxSP$_k$ as well as for an analogously defined minimization class MinSP$_k$. As our main technical contribution, we rule out approximation schemes for a large class of problems admitting constant-factor approximations, under the Sparse MAX3SAT hypothesis posed by (Alman, Vassilevska Williams'20). As general trends for the problems we consider, we find: (1) Exact optimizability has a simple algebraic characterization, (2) only few maximization problems do not admit a constant-factor approximation; these do not even have a subpolynomial-factor approximation, and (3) constant-factor approximation of minimization problems is equivalent to deciding whether the optimum is equal to 0.
summary: We initiate the systematic study of a recently introduced polynomial-time analogue of MaxSNP, which includes a large number of well-studied problems (including Nearest and Furthest Neighbor in the Hamming metric, Maximum Inner Product, optimization variants of $k$-XOR and Maximum $k$-Cover). Specifically, MaxSP$_k$ denotes the class of $O(m^k)$-time problems of the form $\max_{x_1,\dots, x_k} \#\{y:φ(x_1,\dots,x_k,y)\}$ where $φ$ is a quantifier-free first-order property and $m$ denotes the size of the relational structure. Assuming central hypotheses about clique detection in hypergraphs and MAX3SAT, we show that for any MaxSP$_k$ problem definable by a quantifier-free $m$-edge graph formula $φ$, the best possible approximation guarantee in faster-than-exhaustive-search time $O(m^{k-δ})$ falls into one of four categories: * optimizable to exactness in time $O(m^{k-δ})$, * an (inefficient) approximation scheme, i.e., a $(1+ε)$-approximation in time $O(m^{k-f(ε)})$, * a (fixed) constant-factor approximation in time $O(m^{k-δ})$, or * an $m^ε$-approximation in time $O(m^{k-f(ε)})$. We obtain an almost complete characterization of these regimes, for MaxSP$_k$ as well as for an analogously defined minimization class MinSP$_k$. As our main technical contribution, we rule out approximation schemes for a large class of problems admitting constant-factor approximations, under the Sparse MAX3SAT hypothesis posed by (Alman, Vassilevska Williams'20). As general trends for the problems we consider, we find: (1) Exact optimizability has a simple algebraic characterization, (2) only few maximization problems do not admit a constant-factor approximation; these do not even have a subpolynomial-factor approximation, and (3) constant-factor approximation of minimization problems is equivalent to deciding whether the optimum is equal to 0.
abstract_zh: 我们启动了对最近引入的 MaxSNP 多项式时间模拟的系统研究，其中包括大量经过充分研究的问题（包括汉明度量中的最近和最远邻居、最大内积、$k$-XOR 的优化变体和最大 $k$-Cover）。具体来说，MaxSP$_k$ 表示 $\max_{x_1,\dots, x_k} \#\{y:φ(x_1,\dots,x_k,y)\}$ 形式的 $O(m^k)$ 时间问题，其中 $φ$ 是无量词的一阶属性，$m$ 表示关系结构的大小。假设关于超图和 MAX3SAT 中的派系检测的中心假设，我们表明，对于任何可由无量词 $m$-边图公式 $φ$ 定义的 MaxSP$_k$ 问题，在比穷举搜索时间更快的时间内最好的近似保证 $O(m^{k-δ})$ 属于四个类别之一： * 可优化到时间精确性 $O(m^{k-δ})$， * 一个（低效）近似方案，即时间 $O(m^{k-f(ε)})$ 的 $(1+ε)$ 近似，* 时间 $O(m^{k-δ})$ 的（固定）常数因子近似，或 * 时间 $O(m^{k-f(ε)})$ 的 $m^ε$ 近似。对于 MaxSP$_k$ 以及类似定义的最小化类 MinSP$_k$，我们获得了这些机制的几乎完整的表征。作为我们的主要技术贡献，我们根据 (Alman, Vassilevska Williams'20) 提出的稀疏 MAX3SAT 假设，排除了一大类允许常数因子近似的问题的近似方案。作为我们考虑的问题的一般趋势，我们发现：（1）精确可优化性具有简单的代数特征，（2）只有少数最大化问题不承认常数因子近似；这些甚至没有次多项式因子近似，并且（3）最小化问题的常数因子近似相当于确定最优值是否等于0。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了多项式时间内近似问题的结构特性，特别是MaxSP_k和MinSP_k类问题的近似保证分类。
AI.motivation: 旨在理解多项式时间问题在快速搜索下的近似极限，通过分析MaxSP_k类问题的近似可能性，为算法设计提供理论边界。
AI.method: 基于超图团检测和MAX3SAT假设，通过量化自由公式定义问题，分类讨论近似算法的时间复杂度与精度关系。
AI.result: 将MaxSP_k问题划分为四类近似情形，并证明在稀疏MAX3SAT假设下，部分问题无法使用近似方案，揭示了优化问题的代数特征与最小化问题的零最优性等规律。
AI.conclusion: 论文为多项式时间问题的近似计算提供了几乎完整的分类框架，明确了精确求解、常数近似与指数近似之间的界限。

authors_text: Elias Najarro,Shyam Sudhakaran,Claire Glanois,Sebastian Risi
title: HyperNCA: Growing Developmental Networks with Neural Cellular Automata
title_zh: HyperNCA：利用神经细胞自动机不断发展的发育网络
comment: Paper accepted as a conference paper at ICLR 'From Cells to Societies' workshop 2022
comments: Paper accepted as a conference paper at ICLR 'From Cells to Societies' workshop 2022
abstract: In contrast to deep reinforcement learning agents, biological neural networks are grown through a self-organized developmental process. Here we propose a new hypernetwork approach to grow artificial neural networks based on neural cellular automata (NCA). Inspired by self-organising systems and information-theoretic approaches to developmental biology, we show that our HyperNCA method can grow neural networks capable of solving common reinforcement learning tasks. Finally, we explore how the same approach can be used to build developmental metamorphosis networks capable of transforming their weights to solve variations of the initial RL task.
summary: In contrast to deep reinforcement learning agents, biological neural networks are grown through a self-organized developmental process. Here we propose a new hypernetwork approach to grow artificial neural networks based on neural cellular automata (NCA). Inspired by self-organising systems and information-theoretic approaches to developmental biology, we show that our HyperNCA method can grow neural networks capable of solving common reinforcement learning tasks. Finally, we explore how the same approach can be used to build developmental metamorphosis networks capable of transforming their weights to solve variations of the initial RL task.
abstract_zh: 与深度强化学习代理相比，生物神经网络是通过自组织的发展过程成长的。在这里，我们提出了一种新的超网络方法来发展基于神经细胞自动机（NCA）的人工神经网络。受自组织系统和发育生物学信息论方法的启发，我们证明了我们的 HyperNCA 方法可以培养能够解决常见强化学习任务的神经网络。最后，我们探索如何使用相同的方法来构建能够改变其权重以解决初始强化学习任务的变化的发育变形网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperNCA方法，通过神经细胞自动机（NCA）实现人工神经网络的自组织生长，用于解决强化学习任务并实现网络权重的动态演化。
AI.motivation: 生物神经网络通过自组织发育过程形成，而深度强化学习代理缺乏这种生长机制。作者旨在模仿生物发育过程，构建能适应任务变化的自生长神经网络。
AI.method: 基于神经细胞自动机（NCA）设计超网络结构，结合信息论方法实现网络的自组织生长，并通过发育变态机制调整权重以适应任务变化。
AI.result: HyperNCA方法成功生成的神经网络可解决常见强化学习任务，并能通过权重变换适应任务变体，验证了其生长机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HyperNCA为人工神经网络提供了类似生物发育的自生长框架，未来可扩展至更复杂任务和动态环境中的自适应学习。

authors_text: Qian Dong,Yiding Liu,Suqi Cheng,Shuaiqiang Wang,Zhicong Cheng,Shuzi Niu,Dawei Yin
title: Incorporating Explicit Knowledge in Pre-trained Language Models for Passage Re-ranking
title_zh: 将显性知识纳入预先训练的语言模型中以进行段落重新排序
abstract: Passage re-ranking is to obtain a permutation over the candidate passage set from retrieval stage. Re-rankers have been boomed by Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) due to their overwhelming advantages in natural language understanding. However, existing PLM based re-rankers may easily suffer from vocabulary mismatch and lack of domain specific knowledge. To alleviate these problems, explicit knowledge contained in knowledge graph is carefully introduced in our work. Specifically, we employ the existing knowledge graph which is incomplete and noisy, and first apply it in passage re-ranking task. To leverage a reliable knowledge, we propose a novel knowledge graph distillation method and obtain a knowledge meta graph as the bridge between query and passage. To align both kinds of embedding in the latent space, we employ PLM as text encoder and graph neural network over knowledge meta graph as knowledge encoder. Besides, a novel knowledge injector is designed for the dynamic interaction between text and knowledge encoder. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method especially in queries requiring in-depth domain knowledge.
summary: Passage re-ranking is to obtain a permutation over the candidate passage set from retrieval stage. Re-rankers have been boomed by Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) due to their overwhelming advantages in natural language understanding. However, existing PLM based re-rankers may easily suffer from vocabulary mismatch and lack of domain specific knowledge. To alleviate these problems, explicit knowledge contained in knowledge graph is carefully introduced in our work. Specifically, we employ the existing knowledge graph which is incomplete and noisy, and first apply it in passage re-ranking task. To leverage a reliable knowledge, we propose a novel knowledge graph distillation method and obtain a knowledge meta graph as the bridge between query and passage. To align both kinds of embedding in the latent space, we employ PLM as text encoder and graph neural network over knowledge meta graph as knowledge encoder. Besides, a novel knowledge injector is designed for the dynamic interaction between text and knowledge encoder. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method especially in queries requiring in-depth domain knowledge.
abstract_zh: 段落重排序是在检索阶段获得候选段落集的排列。预训练语言模型 (PLM) 因其在自然语言理解方面的压倒性优势而蓬勃发展。然而，现有的基于 PLM 的重新排序器可能很容易遇到词汇不匹配和缺乏特定领域知识的问题。为了缓解这些问题，我们的工作中仔细引入了知识图中包含的显式知识。具体来说，我们利用现有的不完整且有噪声的知识图谱，首先将其应用于段落重排序任务。为了利用可靠的知识，我们提出了一种新颖的知识图蒸馏方法，并获得知识元图作为查询和通道之间的桥梁。为了在潜在空间中对齐两种嵌入，我们使用 PLM 作为文本编码器，使用知识元图上的图神经网络作为知识编码器。此外，还设计了一种新颖的知识注入器，用于文本和知识编码器之间的动态交互。实验结果证明了我们的方法的有效性，特别是在需要深入领域知识的查询中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将知识图谱中的显式知识融入预训练语言模型，以改进段落重排序任务中的领域知识不足和词汇不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于预训练语言模型的段落重排序方法存在词汇不匹配及缺乏领域特定知识的缺陷，难以处理需要深度领域知识的查询。
AI.method: 引入不完整且含噪声的知识图谱，提出知识图谱蒸馏方法生成知识元图；结合PLM文本编码器与图神经网络知识编码器，并设计知识注入器实现动态交互。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在需要深度领域知识的查询场景中显著提升重排序效果，验证了显式知识融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过知识图谱与预训练模型的协同，有效解决了领域知识缺失问题，为复杂查询的段落重排序提供了新思路。
