We curated, mapped and systematized more than 3500 machine learning model performance results from the open repository 'Papers with Code' to enable a global and comprehensive analysis. Our results suggest that the large majority of natural language processing metrics currently used have properties that may result in an inadequate reflection of a models' performance. Furthermore, we found that ambiguities and inconsistencies in the reporting of metrics may lead to difficulties in interpreting and comparing model performances, impairing transparency and reproducibility in NLP research. 衡量自然语言处理模型的性能具有挑战性。传统使用的指标（例如最初为机器翻译和摘要设计的 BLEU 和 ROUGE）已被证明与人类判断的相关性较低，并且缺乏向其他任务和语言的可迁移性。在过去 15 年中，人们提出了多种替代指标。然而，目前尚不清楚这对 NLP 基准测试工作有多大影响。在这里，我们首次对用于衡量自然语言处理性能的指标进行了大规模横断面分析。我们对开放存储库“带代码的论文”中的 3500 多个机器学习模型性能结果进行了策划、映射和系统化，以实现全球性的全面分析。我们的结果表明，当前使用的绝大多数自然语言处理指标都具有可能导致模型性能反映不充分的属性。此外，我们发现指标报告中的模糊性和不一致可能会导致解释和比较模型性能的困难，从而损害 NLP 研究的透明度和可重复性。 本文对自然语言处理领域中使用的性能评估指标进行了全球范围的跨学科分析，系统评估了现有指标的有效性与问题。 Kathrin Blagec,Georg Dorffner,Milad Moradi,Simon Ott,Matthias Samwald cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Haoyue Cheng,Zhaoyang Liu,Hang Zhou,Chen Qian,Wayne Wu,Limin Wang
title: Joint-Modal Label Denoising for Weakly-Supervised Audio-Visual Video Parsing
title_zh: 用于弱监督视听视频解析的联合模态标签去噪
abstract: This paper focuses on the weakly-supervised audio-visual video parsing task, which aims to recognize all events belonging to each modality and localize their temporal boundaries. This task is challenging because only overall labels indicating the video events are provided for training. However, an event might be labeled but not appear in one of the modalities, which results in a modality-specific noisy label problem. In this work, we propose a training strategy to identify and remove modality-specific noisy labels dynamically. It is motivated by two key observations: 1) networks tend to learn clean samples first; and 2) a labeled event would appear in at least one modality. Specifically, we sort the losses of all instances within a mini-batch individually in each modality, and then select noisy samples according to the relationships between intra-modal and inter-modal losses. Besides, we also propose a simple but valid noise ratio estimation method by calculating the proportion of instances whose confidence is below a preset threshold. Our method makes large improvements over the previous state of the arts (e.g. from 60.0\% to 63.8\% in segment-level visual metric), which demonstrates the effectiveness of our approach. Code and trained models are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/MCG-NJU/JoMoLD}.
summary: This paper focuses on the weakly-supervised audio-visual video parsing task, which aims to recognize all events belonging to each modality and localize their temporal boundaries. This task is challenging because only overall labels indicating the video events are provided for training. However, an event might be labeled but not appear in one of the modalities, which results in a modality-specific noisy label problem. In this work, we propose a training strategy to identify and remove modality-specific noisy labels dynamically. It is motivated by two key observations: 1) networks tend to learn clean samples first; and 2) a labeled event would appear in at least one modality. Specifically, we sort the losses of all instances within a mini-batch individually in each modality, and then select noisy samples according to the relationships between intra-modal and inter-modal losses. Besides, we also propose a simple but valid noise ratio estimation method by calculating the proportion of instances whose confidence is below a preset threshold. Our method makes large improvements over the previous state of the arts (e.g. from 60.0\% to 63.8\% in segment-level visual metric), which demonstrates the effectiveness of our approach. Code and trained models are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/MCG-NJU/JoMoLD}.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注弱监督视听视频解析任务，旨在识别属于每种模态的所有事件并定位它们的时间边界。这项任务具有挑战性，因为仅提供指示视频事件的总体标签用于训练。然而，事件可能被标记但未出现在其中一种模态中，这会导致特定于模态的噪声标签问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种训练策略来动态识别和删除特定于模态的噪声标签。它的动机有两个关键观察结果：1）网络倾向于首先学习干净的样本； 2) 标记事件将以至少一种方式出现。具体来说，我们对每种模态中小批量内所有实例的损失进行单独排序，然后根据模内损失和模间损失之间的关系选择噪声样本。此外，我们还提出了一种简单但有效的噪声比估计方法，通过计算置信度低于预设阈值的实例的比例。我们的方法比之前的技术水平有了很大的改进（例如，分段级视觉指标从 60.0% 提高到 63.8%），这证明了我们方法的有效性。代码和训练模型可在 \url{https://github.com/MCG-NJU/JoMoLD} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督音频-视觉视频解析方法，通过动态去除模态特定的噪声标签来提升事件识别和时间边界定位的准确性。
AI.motivation: 弱监督视频解析任务中，仅提供整体事件标签导致模态特定噪声标签问题（事件可能在某一模态中缺失），而现有方法难以有效识别并去除此类噪声。
AI.method: 基于两个关键观察：1）网络优先学习干净样本；2）标签事件至少出现在一模态。通过分别排序每模态实例损失，利用模内与模间损失关系筛选噪声样本，并计算置信度阈值下的噪声比例进行估计。
AI.result: 在段级视觉指标上，方法性能从60.0%提升至63.8%，优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态噪声标签去除策略有效解决了弱监督音频-视觉视频解析中的模态噪声问题，验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Luigi Filippo Chiara,Pasquale Coscia,Sourav Das,Simone Calderara,Rita Cucchiara,Lamberto Ballan
title: Goal-driven Self-Attentive Recurrent Networks for Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 用于轨迹预测的目标驱动自注意力循环网络
abstract: Human trajectory forecasting is a key component of autonomous vehicles, social-aware robots and advanced video-surveillance applications. This challenging task typically requires knowledge about past motion, the environment and likely destination areas. In this context, multi-modality is a fundamental aspect and its effective modeling can be beneficial to any architecture. Inferring accurate trajectories is nevertheless challenging, due to the inherently uncertain nature of the future. To overcome these difficulties, recent models use different inputs and propose to model human intentions using complex fusion mechanisms. In this respect, we propose a lightweight attention-based recurrent backbone that acts solely on past observed positions. Although this backbone already provides promising results, we demonstrate that its prediction accuracy can be improved considerably when combined with a scene-aware goal-estimation module. To this end, we employ a common goal module, based on a U-Net architecture, which additionally extracts semantic information to predict scene-compliant destinations. We conduct extensive experiments on publicly-available datasets (i.e. SDD, inD, ETH/UCY) and show that our approach performs on par with state-of-the-art techniques while reducing model complexity.
summary: Human trajectory forecasting is a key component of autonomous vehicles, social-aware robots and advanced video-surveillance applications. This challenging task typically requires knowledge about past motion, the environment and likely destination areas. In this context, multi-modality is a fundamental aspect and its effective modeling can be beneficial to any architecture. Inferring accurate trajectories is nevertheless challenging, due to the inherently uncertain nature of the future. To overcome these difficulties, recent models use different inputs and propose to model human intentions using complex fusion mechanisms. In this respect, we propose a lightweight attention-based recurrent backbone that acts solely on past observed positions. Although this backbone already provides promising results, we demonstrate that its prediction accuracy can be improved considerably when combined with a scene-aware goal-estimation module. To this end, we employ a common goal module, based on a U-Net architecture, which additionally extracts semantic information to predict scene-compliant destinations. We conduct extensive experiments on publicly-available datasets (i.e. SDD, inD, ETH/UCY) and show that our approach performs on par with state-of-the-art techniques while reducing model complexity.
abstract_zh: 人类轨迹预测是自动驾驶汽车、社交机器人和先进视频监控应用的关键组成部分。这项具有挑战性的任务通常需要了解过去的运动、环境和可能的目的地区域。在这种情况下，多模态是一个基本方面，其有效建模对任何架构都有益。然而，由于未来本质上的不确定性，推断准确的轨迹仍然具有挑战性。为了克服这些困难，最近的模型使用不同的输入，并提出使用复杂的融合机制来模拟人类意图。在这方面，我们提出了一种轻量级的基于注意力的循环骨干网，它仅作用于过去观察到的位置。尽管该主干网络已经提供了有希望的结果，但我们证明，当与场景感知目标估计模块结合使用时，其预测精度可以大大提高。为此，我们采用基于 U-Net 架构的通用目标模块，该模块还提取语义信息来预测符合场景的目的地。我们对公开可用的数据集（即 SDD、inD、ETH/UCY）进行了广泛的实验，并表明我们的方法与最先进的技术相当，同时降低了模型复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于目标驱动的自注意力循环网络（GSA-RN）用于轨迹预测，结合场景感知的目标估计模块提升预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统轨迹预测方法依赖复杂融合机制且难以处理未来不确定性，需更高效的多模态建模与轻量化模型设计。
AI.method: 设计轻量级自注意力循环网络处理历史轨迹，结合U-Net架构的场景感知模块提取语义信息预测合规目标。
AI.result: 在SDD、inD、ETH/UCY数据集上性能与SOTA方法相当，同时模型复杂度显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 目标驱动的模块化设计有效提升轨迹预测精度，验证了轻量化架构在复杂场景下的可行性。

authors_text: Sneha Das,Nicole Nadine Lønfeldt,Anne Katrine Pagsberg,Line. H. Clemmensen
title: Speech Detection For Child-Clinician Conversations In Danish For Low-Resource In-The-Wild Conditions: A Case Study
title_zh: 在资源匮乏的野外条件下对儿童与临床医生的丹麦语对话进行语音检测：案例研究
abstract: Use of speech models for automatic speech processing tasks can improve efficiency in the screening, analysis, diagnosis and treatment in medicine and psychiatry. However, the performance of pre-processing speech tasks like segmentation and diarization can drop considerably on in-the-wild clinical data, specifically when the target dataset comprises of atypical speech. In this paper we study the performance of a pre-trained speech model on a dataset comprising of child-clinician conversations in Danish with respect to the classification threshold. Since we do not have access to sufficient labelled data, we propose few-instance threshold adaptation, wherein we employ the first minutes of the speech conversation to obtain the optimum classification threshold. Through our work in this paper, we learned that the model with default classification threshold performs worse on children from the patient group. Furthermore, the error rates of the model is directly correlated to the severity of diagnosis in the patients. Lastly, our study on few-instance adaptation shows that three-minutes of clinician-child conversation is sufficient to obtain the optimum classification threshold.
summary: Use of speech models for automatic speech processing tasks can improve efficiency in the screening, analysis, diagnosis and treatment in medicine and psychiatry. However, the performance of pre-processing speech tasks like segmentation and diarization can drop considerably on in-the-wild clinical data, specifically when the target dataset comprises of atypical speech. In this paper we study the performance of a pre-trained speech model on a dataset comprising of child-clinician conversations in Danish with respect to the classification threshold. Since we do not have access to sufficient labelled data, we propose few-instance threshold adaptation, wherein we employ the first minutes of the speech conversation to obtain the optimum classification threshold. Through our work in this paper, we learned that the model with default classification threshold performs worse on children from the patient group. Furthermore, the error rates of the model is directly correlated to the severity of diagnosis in the patients. Lastly, our study on few-instance adaptation shows that three-minutes of clinician-child conversation is sufficient to obtain the optimum classification threshold.
abstract_zh: 使用语音模型进行自动语音处理任务可以提高医学和精神病学的筛查、分析、诊断和治疗的效率。然而，在野外临床数据上，分割和二值化等预处理语音任务的性能可能会大幅下降，特别是当目标数据集包含非典型语音时。在本文中，我们研究了预训练语音模型在由丹麦语儿童与临床医生对话组成的数据集上相对于分类阈值的性能。由于我们无法访问足够的标记数据，因此我们提出了少实例阈值自适应，其中我们利用语音对话的前几分钟来获得最佳分类阈值。通过本文的工作，我们了解到具有默认分类阈值的模型对患者组的儿童表现较差。此外，模型的错误率与患者诊断的严重程度直接相关。最后，我们对少数实例适应的研究表明，三分钟的临床医生与儿童的对话足以获得最佳分类阈值。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了预训练语音模型在丹麦儿童-临床医生对话中的语音分割和说话人分离任务性能，并提出了一种基于少量样本的阈值适应方法以应对低资源场景。
AI.motivation: 临床语音数据（尤其是儿童患者非典型语音）在自动语音处理任务中表现不佳，而现有方法依赖大量标注数据，难以适应医疗场景的低资源条件。
AI.method: 通过使用对话前几分钟的语音数据动态调整分类阈值，无需大量标注即可实现模型优化，验证了三分钟临床对话足以确定最佳阈值。
AI.result: 默认阈值在患者组儿童语音上表现较差，模型错误率与诊断严重程度直接相关，少量样本适应方法显著提升了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 少量样本阈值适应方法可有效提升临床语音处理性能，尤其适用于资源受限的医疗场景，且三分钟对话数据已足够完成模型优化。

authors_text: Dennis Burgermeister,Cristóbal Curio
title: PedRecNet: Multi-task deep neural network for full 3D human pose and orientation estimation
title_zh: PedRecNet：用于全 3D 人体姿势和方向估计的多任务深度神经网络
abstract: We present a multitask network that supports various deep neural network based pedestrian detection functions. Besides 2D and 3D human pose, it also supports body and head orientation estimation based on full body bounding box input. This eliminates the need for explicit face recognition. We show that the performance of 3D human pose estimation and orientation estimation is comparable to the state-of-the-art. Since very few data sets exist for 3D human pose and in particular body and head orientation estimation based on full body data, we further show the benefit of particular simulation data to train the network. The network architecture is relatively simple, yet powerful, and easily adaptable for further research and applications.
summary: We present a multitask network that supports various deep neural network based pedestrian detection functions. Besides 2D and 3D human pose, it also supports body and head orientation estimation based on full body bounding box input. This eliminates the need for explicit face recognition. We show that the performance of 3D human pose estimation and orientation estimation is comparable to the state-of-the-art. Since very few data sets exist for 3D human pose and in particular body and head orientation estimation based on full body data, we further show the benefit of particular simulation data to train the network. The network architecture is relatively simple, yet powerful, and easily adaptable for further research and applications.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个多任务网络，支持各种基于深度神经网络的行人检测功能。除了 2D 和 3D 人体姿势外，它还支持基于全身边界框输入的身体和头部方向估计。这消除了显式人脸识别的需要。我们证明 3D 人体姿势估计和方向估计的性能可与最先进的技术相媲美。由于 3D 人体姿势的数据集非常少，特别是基于全身数据的身体和头部方向估计，我们进一步展示了特定模拟数据对训练网络的好处。该网络架构相对简单，但功能强大，并且易于适应进一步的研究和应用。

AI.tldr: 开发一种名为PedRecNet的多任务深度神经网络，用于全身3D人体姿态和方向估计。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人体姿态及方向估计数据集稀缺，且传统方法依赖人脸识别，需提出无需显式人脸的解决方案并提升模型适应性。
AI.method: 设计多任务网络架构，结合2D/3D姿态估计与身体/头部方向预测，基于全身边界框输入，利用模拟数据补充训练以应对数据不足问题。
AI.result: 3D姿态和方向估计性能达到SOTA水平，网络结构简单且易于扩展，验证了模拟数据在训练中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PedRecNet为复杂场景下的人体姿态与方向估计提供了高效方案，其模块化设计和模拟数据应用策略对后续研究具有参考价值。

authors_text: Shaoning Xiao,Long Chen,Kaifeng Gao,Zhao Wang,Yi Yang,Zhimeng Zhang,Jun Xiao
title: Rethinking Multi-Modal Alignment in Video Question Answering from Feature and Sample Perspectives
title_zh: 从特征和样本角度重新思考视频问答中的多模态对齐
abstract: Reasoning about causal and temporal event relations in videos is a new destination of Video Question Answering (VideoQA).The major stumbling block to achieve this purpose is the semantic gap between language and video since they are at different levels of abstraction. Existing efforts mainly focus on designing sophisticated architectures while utilizing frame- or object-level visual representations. In this paper, we reconsider the multi-modal alignment problem in VideoQA from feature and sample perspectives to achieve better performance. From the view of feature,we break down the video into trajectories and first leverage trajectory feature in VideoQA to enhance the alignment between two modalities. Moreover, we adopt a heterogeneous graph architecture and design a hierarchical framework to align both trajectory-level and frame-level visual feature with language feature. In addition, we found that VideoQA models are largely dependent on language priors and always neglect visual-language interactions. Thus, two effective yet portable training augmentation strategies are designed to strengthen the cross-modal correspondence ability of our model from the view of sample. Extensive results show that our method outperforms all the state-of-the-art models on the challenging NExT-QA benchmark, which demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Reasoning about causal and temporal event relations in videos is a new destination of Video Question Answering (VideoQA).The major stumbling block to achieve this purpose is the semantic gap between language and video since they are at different levels of abstraction. Existing efforts mainly focus on designing sophisticated architectures while utilizing frame- or object-level visual representations. In this paper, we reconsider the multi-modal alignment problem in VideoQA from feature and sample perspectives to achieve better performance. From the view of feature,we break down the video into trajectories and first leverage trajectory feature in VideoQA to enhance the alignment between two modalities. Moreover, we adopt a heterogeneous graph architecture and design a hierarchical framework to align both trajectory-level and frame-level visual feature with language feature. In addition, we found that VideoQA models are largely dependent on language priors and always neglect visual-language interactions. Thus, two effective yet portable training augmentation strategies are designed to strengthen the cross-modal correspondence ability of our model from the view of sample. Extensive results show that our method outperforms all the state-of-the-art models on the challenging NExT-QA benchmark, which demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 推理视频中的因果关系和时间事件关系是视频问答（VideoQA）的新目标。实现这一目标的主要障碍是语言和视频之间的语义差距，因为它们处于不同的抽象层次。现有的工作主要集中在设计复杂的架构，同时利用框架或对象级视觉表示。在本文中，我们从特征和样本的角度重新考虑VideoQA中的多模态对齐问题，以实现更好的性能。从特征的角度来看，我们将视频分解为轨迹，并首先利用 VideoQA 中的轨迹特征来增强两种模态之间的对齐。此外，我们采用异构图架构并设计分层框架，将轨迹级和帧级视觉特征与语言特征对齐。此外，我们发现 VideoQA 模型在很大程度上依赖于语言先验，并且总是忽略视觉语言交互。因此，设计了两种有效且可移植的训练增强策略，以从样本的角度增强我们模型的跨模态对应能力。大量结果表明，我们的方法在具有挑战性的 NExT-QA 基准上优于所有最先进的模型，这证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文从特征和样本视角重新思考视频问答中的多模态对齐问题，通过引入轨迹特征和训练增强策略提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答模型存在语言与视频语义鸿沟、依赖语言先验且忽视视觉-语言交互的问题，需改进多模态对齐以提升性能。
AI.method: 分解视频为轨迹并利用轨迹特征，采用异构图架构和分层框架对齐多粒度特征；设计两种训练增强策略强化跨模态交互能力。
AI.result: 在NExT-QA基准上优于所有现有方法，验证了轨迹特征和训练策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征层面的轨迹建模和样本层面的训练增强，有效解决了视频问答中的多模态对齐问题，提升了模型表现。

ai_content.result: 在NExT-QA基准上优于所有现有方法，验证了轨迹特征和训练策略的有效性。

search_text: Rethinking Multi-Modal Alignment in Video Question Answering from Feature and Sample Perspectives 从特征和样本角度重新思考视频问答中的多模态对齐 Reasoning about causal and temporal event relations in videos is a new destination of Video Question Answering (VideoQA).The major stumbling block to achieve this purpose is the semantic gap between language and video since they are at different levels of abstraction. Existing efforts mainly focus on designing sophisticated architectures while utilizing frame- or object-level visual representations. In this paper, we reconsider the multi-modal alignment problem in VideoQA from feature and sample perspectives to achieve better performance. From the view of feature,we break down the video into trajectories and first leverage trajectory feature in VideoQA to enhance the alignment between two modalities. Moreover, we adopt a heterogeneous graph architecture and design a hierarchical framework to align both trajectory-level and frame-level visual feature with language feature. In addition, we found that VideoQA models are largely dependent on language priors and always neglect visual-language interactions. Thus, two effective yet portable training augmentation strategies are designed to strengthen the cross-modal correspondence ability of our model from the view of sample. Extensive results show that our method outperforms all the state-of-the-art models on the challenging NExT-QA benchmark, which demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method. 推理视频中的因果关系和时间事件关系是视频问答（VideoQA）的新目标。实现这一目标的主要障碍是语言和视频之间的语义差距，因为它们处于不同的抽象层次。现有的工作主要集中在设计复杂的架构，同时利用框架或对象级视觉表示。在本文中，我们从特征和样本的角度重新考虑VideoQA中的多模态对齐问题，以实现更好的性能。从特征的角度来看，我们将视频分解为轨迹，并首先利用 VideoQA 中的轨迹特征来增强两种模态之间的对齐。此外，我们采用异构图架构并设计分层框架，将轨迹级和帧级视觉特征与语言特征对齐。此外，我们发现 VideoQA 模型在很大程度上依赖于语言先验，并且总是忽略视觉语言交互。因此，设计了两种有效且可移植的训练增强策略，以从样本的角度增强我们模型的跨模态对应能力。大量结果表明，我们的方法在具有挑战性的 NExT-QA 基准上优于所有最先进的模型，这证明了所提出方法的有效性。 本文从特征和样本视角重新思考视频问答中的多模态对齐问题，通过引入轨迹特征和训练增强策略提升模型性能。 Shaoning Xiao,Long Chen,Kaifeng Gao,Zhao Wang,Yi Yang,Zhimeng Zhang,Jun Xiao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Hong Zhang,Ji Liu,Juncheng Jia,Yang Zhou,Huaiyu Dai,Dejing Dou
title: FedDUAP: Federated Learning with Dynamic Update and Adaptive Pruning Using Shared Data on the Server
title_zh: FedDUAP：使用服务器上共享数据进行动态更新和自适应修剪的联邦学习
comment: To appear in IJCAI, 7 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
comments: To appear in IJCAI, 7 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Despite achieving remarkable performance, Federated Learning (FL) suffers from two critical challenges, i.e., limited computational resources and low training efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel FL framework, i.e., FedDUAP, with two original contributions, to exploit the insensitive data on the server and the decentralized data in edge devices to further improve the training efficiency. First, a dynamic server update algorithm is designed to exploit the insensitive data on the server, in order to dynamically determine the optimal steps of the server update for improving the convergence and accuracy of the global model. Second, a layer-adaptive model pruning method is developed to perform unique pruning operations adapted to the different dimensions and importance of multiple layers, to achieve a good balance between efficiency and effectiveness. By integrating the two original techniques together, our proposed FL model, FedDUAP, significantly outperforms baseline approaches in terms of accuracy (up to 4.8% higher), efficiency (up to 2.8 times faster), and computational cost (up to 61.9% smaller).
summary: Despite achieving remarkable performance, Federated Learning (FL) suffers from two critical challenges, i.e., limited computational resources and low training efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel FL framework, i.e., FedDUAP, with two original contributions, to exploit the insensitive data on the server and the decentralized data in edge devices to further improve the training efficiency. First, a dynamic server update algorithm is designed to exploit the insensitive data on the server, in order to dynamically determine the optimal steps of the server update for improving the convergence and accuracy of the global model. Second, a layer-adaptive model pruning method is developed to perform unique pruning operations adapted to the different dimensions and importance of multiple layers, to achieve a good balance between efficiency and effectiveness. By integrating the two original techniques together, our proposed FL model, FedDUAP, significantly outperforms baseline approaches in terms of accuracy (up to 4.8% higher), efficiency (up to 2.8 times faster), and computational cost (up to 61.9% smaller).
abstract_zh: 尽管联邦学习（FL）取得了显着的性能，但仍面临两个关键挑战，即有限的计算资源和低训练效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 FL 框架，即 FedDUAP，具有两个原创贡献，以利用服务器上的不敏感数据和边缘设备中的分散数据来进一步提高训练效率。首先，设计了动态服务器更新算法，以利用服务器上的不敏感数据，动态确定服务器更新的最佳步骤，以提高全局模型的收敛性和准确性。其次，开发了层自适应模型剪枝方法，以执行适应多层的不同维度和重要性的独特剪枝操作，以实现效率和效果之间的良好平衡。通过将两种原始技术集成在一起，我们提出的 FL 模型 FedDUAP 在准确性（高出 4.8%）、效率（快了 2.8 倍）和计算成本（低了 61.9%）方面显着优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedDUAP联邦学习框架，通过动态更新算法和自适应剪枝技术，利用服务器和边缘设备数据提升训练效率与模型性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习面临计算资源有限和训练效率低下的挑战，现有方法难以有效平衡模型精度与计算成本。
AI.method: 设计动态服务器更新算法利用服务器端不敏感数据优化全局模型收敛性，并开发层适应性模型剪枝方法，针对不同层维度与重要性进行差异化剪枝。
AI.result: FedDUAP在精度（提升4.8%）、效率（快2.8倍）和计算成本（降低61.9%）方面显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合动态更新与自适应剪枝技术，FedDUAP有效解决了联邦学习中的资源与效率瓶颈问题。

authors_text: Lukas Ewecker,Lars Ohnemus,Robin Schwager,Stefan Roos,Tim Brühl,Sascha Saralajew
title: Combining Visual Saliency Methods and Sparse Keypoint Annotations to Providently Detect Vehicles at Night
title_zh: 结合视觉显着性方法和稀疏关键点注释来主动检测夜间车辆
abstract: Provident detection of other road users at night has the potential for increasing road safety. For this purpose, humans intuitively use visual cues, such as light cones and light reflections emitted by other road users to be able to react to oncoming traffic at an early stage. This behavior can be imitated by computer vision methods by predicting the appearance of vehicles based on emitted light reflections caused by the vehicle's headlights. Since current object detection algorithms are mainly based on detecting directly visible objects annotated via bounding boxes, the detection and annotation of light reflections without sharp boundaries is challenging. For this reason, the extensive open-source dataset PVDN (Provident Vehicle Detection at Night) was published, which includes traffic scenarios at night with light reflections annotated via keypoints. In this paper, we explore the potential of saliency-based approaches to create different object representations based on the visual saliency and sparse keypoint annotations of the PVDN dataset. For that, we extend the general idea of Boolean map saliency towards a context-aware approach by taking into consideration sparse keypoint annotations by humans. We show that this approach allows for an automated derivation of different object representations, such as binary maps or bounding boxes so that detection models can be trained on different annotation variants and the problem of providently detecting vehicles at night can be tackled from different perspectives. With that, we provide further powerful tools and methods to study the problem of detecting vehicles at night before they are actually visible.
summary: Provident detection of other road users at night has the potential for increasing road safety. For this purpose, humans intuitively use visual cues, such as light cones and light reflections emitted by other road users to be able to react to oncoming traffic at an early stage. This behavior can be imitated by computer vision methods by predicting the appearance of vehicles based on emitted light reflections caused by the vehicle's headlights. Since current object detection algorithms are mainly based on detecting directly visible objects annotated via bounding boxes, the detection and annotation of light reflections without sharp boundaries is challenging. For this reason, the extensive open-source dataset PVDN (Provident Vehicle Detection at Night) was published, which includes traffic scenarios at night with light reflections annotated via keypoints. In this paper, we explore the potential of saliency-based approaches to create different object representations based on the visual saliency and sparse keypoint annotations of the PVDN dataset. For that, we extend the general idea of Boolean map saliency towards a context-aware approach by taking into consideration sparse keypoint annotations by humans. We show that this approach allows for an automated derivation of different object representations, such as binary maps or bounding boxes so that detection models can be trained on different annotation variants and the problem of providently detecting vehicles at night can be tackled from different perspectives. With that, we provide further powerful tools and methods to study the problem of detecting vehicles at night before they are actually visible.
abstract_zh: 夜间对其他道路使用者的预先检测有可能提高道路安全。为此，人类直观地使用视觉提示，例如其他道路使用者发出的光锥和光反射，以便能够尽早对迎面而来的交通做出反应。这种行为可以通过计算机视觉方法来模拟，根据车辆前灯引起的发射光反射来预测车辆的外观。由于当前的对象检测算法主要基于检测通过边界框注释的直接可见对象，因此没有清晰边界的光反射的检测和注释具有挑战性。因此，发布了广泛的开源数据集 PVDN（Provident VehicleDetection at Night），其中包括夜间交通场景，并通过关键点注释光反射。在本文中，我们探索基于显着性的方法的潜力，以根据 PVDN 数据集的视觉显着性和稀疏关键点注释创建不同的对象表示。为此，我们通过考虑人类的稀疏关键点注释，将布尔图显着性的一般思想扩展到上下文感知方法。我们表明，这种方法允许自动推导不同的对象表示，例如二进制地图或边界框，以便可以在不同的注释变体上训练检测模型，并且可以从不同的角度解决夜间检测车辆的问题。这样，我们提供了更强大的工具和方法来研究在夜间车辆真正可见之前检测车辆的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合视觉显著性方法和稀疏关键点标注，以在夜间提前检测车辆，提高道路安全。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测算法依赖于明确边界框标注，难以处理夜间车辆灯光反射等无明确边界的视觉线索，需探索新方法模拟人类通过光反射感知交通的机制。
AI.method: 扩展布尔地图显著性方法为上下文感知模型，整合PVDN数据集的人类稀疏关键点标注，生成二值图或边界框等不同目标表示形式，训练多视角检测模型。
AI.result: 构建了包含夜间光反射关键点标注的PVDN数据集，验证了基于显著性与关键点融合的方法可自动生成多样化标注，为夜间车辆提前检测提供新工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模拟人类视觉机制，为夜间无明确边界目标的检测提供了有效工具，有助于提升道路安全性和自动驾驶技术。

search_text: Combining Visual Saliency Methods and Sparse Keypoint Annotations to Providently Detect Vehicles at Night 结合视觉显着性方法和稀疏关键点注释来主动检测夜间车辆 Provident detection of other road users at night has the potential for increasing road safety. For this purpose, humans intuitively use visual cues, such as light cones and light reflections emitted by other road users to be able to react to oncoming traffic at an early stage. This behavior can be imitated by computer vision methods by predicting the appearance of vehicles based on emitted light reflections caused by the vehicle's headlights. Since current object detection algorithms are mainly based on detecting directly visible objects annotated via bounding boxes, the detection and annotation of light reflections without sharp boundaries is challenging. For this reason, the extensive open-source dataset PVDN (Provident Vehicle Detection at Night) was published, which includes traffic scenarios at night with light reflections annotated via keypoints. In this paper, we explore the potential of saliency-based approaches to create different object representations based on the visual saliency and sparse keypoint annotations of the PVDN dataset. For that, we extend the general idea of Boolean map saliency towards a context-aware approach by taking into consideration sparse keypoint annotations by humans. We show that this approach allows for an automated derivation of different object representations, such as binary maps or bounding boxes so that detection models can be trained on different annotation variants and the problem of providently detecting vehicles at night can be tackled from different perspectives. With that, we provide further powerful tools and methods to study the problem of detecting vehicles at night before they are actually visible. 夜间对其他道路使用者的预先检测有可能提高道路安全。为此，人类直观地使用视觉提示，例如其他道路使用者发出的光锥和光反射，以便能够尽早对迎面而来的交通做出反应。这种行为可以通过计算机视觉方法来模拟，根据车辆前灯引起的发射光反射来预测车辆的外观。由于当前的对象检测算法主要基于检测通过边界框注释的直接可见对象，因此没有清晰边界的光反射的检测和注释具有挑战性。因此，发布了广泛的开源数据集 PVDN（Provident VehicleDetection at Night），其中包括夜间交通场景，并通过关键点注释光反射。在本文中，我们探索基于显着性的方法的潜力，以根据 PVDN 数据集的视觉显着性和稀疏关键点注释创建不同的对象表示。为此，我们通过考虑人类的稀疏关键点注释，将布尔图显着性的一般思想扩展到上下文感知方法。我们表明，这种方法允许自动推导不同的对象表示，例如二进制地图或边界框，以便可以在不同的注释变体上训练检测模型，并且可以从不同的角度解决夜间检测车辆的问题。这样，我们提供了更强大的工具和方法来研究在夜间车辆真正可见之前检测车辆的问题。 本文提出结合视觉显著性方法和稀疏关键点标注，以在夜间提前检测车辆，提高道路安全。 Lukas Ewecker,Lars Ohnemus,Robin Schwager,Stefan Roos,Tim Brühl,Sascha Saralajew cs.CV

authors_text: Minghui Chen,Cheng Wen,Feng Zheng,Fengxiang He,Ling Shao
title: VITA: A Multi-Source Vicinal Transfer Augmentation Method for Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: VITA：一种用于分布外泛化的多源邻近传递增强方法
abstract: Invariance to diverse types of image corruption, such as noise, blurring, or colour shifts, is essential to establish robust models in computer vision. Data augmentation has been the major approach in improving the robustness against common corruptions. However, the samples produced by popular augmentation strategies deviate significantly from the underlying data manifold. As a result, performance is skewed toward certain types of corruption. To address this issue, we propose a multi-source vicinal transfer augmentation (VITA) method for generating diverse on-manifold samples. The proposed VITA consists of two complementary parts: tangent transfer and integration of multi-source vicinal samples. The tangent transfer creates initial augmented samples for improving corruption robustness. The integration employs a generative model to characterize the underlying manifold built by vicinal samples, facilitating the generation of on-manifold samples. Our proposed VITA significantly outperforms the current state-of-the-art augmentation methods, demonstrated in extensive experiments on corruption benchmarks.
summary: Invariance to diverse types of image corruption, such as noise, blurring, or colour shifts, is essential to establish robust models in computer vision. Data augmentation has been the major approach in improving the robustness against common corruptions. However, the samples produced by popular augmentation strategies deviate significantly from the underlying data manifold. As a result, performance is skewed toward certain types of corruption. To address this issue, we propose a multi-source vicinal transfer augmentation (VITA) method for generating diverse on-manifold samples. The proposed VITA consists of two complementary parts: tangent transfer and integration of multi-source vicinal samples. The tangent transfer creates initial augmented samples for improving corruption robustness. The integration employs a generative model to characterize the underlying manifold built by vicinal samples, facilitating the generation of on-manifold samples. Our proposed VITA significantly outperforms the current state-of-the-art augmentation methods, demonstrated in extensive experiments on corruption benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 对于各种类型的图像损坏（例如噪声、模糊或色移）的不变性对于在计算机视觉中建立稳健的模型至关重要。数据增强一直是提高针对常见腐败的鲁棒性的主要方法。然而，流行的增强策略生成的样本与底层数据流形有很大偏差。结果，绩效偏向于某些类型的腐败。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种多源邻位转移增强（VITA）方法来生成不同的流形样本。所提出的 VITA 由两个互补部分组成：切线传输和多源邻近样本的集成。切线传输创建初始增强样本以提高腐败鲁棒性。该集成采用生成模型来表征由邻近样本构建的基础流形，从而促进流形上样本的生成。我们提出的 VITA 显着优于当前最先进的增强方法，这在腐败基准的大量实验中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多源邻域迁移增强方法VITA，用于生成符合数据流形的多样化样本以提升模型在分布外场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法生成的样本偏离真实数据流形，导致模型对特定类型图像退化（如噪声、模糊）的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: VITA包含两个模块：1）切线迁移生成初始增强样本；2）通过生成模型整合多源邻域样本，构建流形表征以生成符合流形的样本。
AI.result: 在多个图像退化基准测试中，VITA显著优于当前最先进的数据增强方法。
AI.conclusion: VITA通过生成符合数据流形的多样化样本，有效提升了模型对分布外退化的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

authors_text: Gjorgjina Cenikj,Ryan Dieter Lang,Andries Petrus Engelbrecht,Carola Doerr,Peter Korošec,Tome Eftimov
title: SELECTOR: Selecting a Representative Benchmark Suite for Reproducible Statistical Comparison
title_zh: 选择器：选择具有代表性的基准套件进行可重复的统计比较
abstract: Fair algorithm evaluation is conditioned on the existence of high-quality benchmark datasets that are non-redundant and are representative of typical optimization scenarios. In this paper, we evaluate three heuristics for selecting diverse problem instances which should be involved in the comparison of optimization algorithms in order to ensure robust statistical algorithm performance analysis. The first approach employs clustering to identify similar groups of problem instances and subsequent sampling from each cluster to construct new benchmarks, while the other two approaches use graph algorithms for identifying dominating and maximal independent sets of nodes. We demonstrate the applicability of the proposed heuristics by performing a statistical performance analysis of five portfolios consisting of three optimization algorithms on five of the most commonly used optimization benchmarks. The results indicate that the statistical analyses of the algorithms' performance, conducted on each benchmark separately, produce conflicting outcomes, which can be used to give a false indication of the superiority of one algorithm over another. On the other hand, when the analysis is conducted on the problem instances selected with the proposed heuristics, which uniformly cover the problem landscape, the statistical outcomes are robust and consistent.
summary: Fair algorithm evaluation is conditioned on the existence of high-quality benchmark datasets that are non-redundant and are representative of typical optimization scenarios. In this paper, we evaluate three heuristics for selecting diverse problem instances which should be involved in the comparison of optimization algorithms in order to ensure robust statistical algorithm performance analysis. The first approach employs clustering to identify similar groups of problem instances and subsequent sampling from each cluster to construct new benchmarks, while the other two approaches use graph algorithms for identifying dominating and maximal independent sets of nodes. We demonstrate the applicability of the proposed heuristics by performing a statistical performance analysis of five portfolios consisting of three optimization algorithms on five of the most commonly used optimization benchmarks. The results indicate that the statistical analyses of the algorithms' performance, conducted on each benchmark separately, produce conflicting outcomes, which can be used to give a false indication of the superiority of one algorithm over another. On the other hand, when the analysis is conducted on the problem instances selected with the proposed heuristics, which uniformly cover the problem landscape, the statistical outcomes are robust and consistent.
abstract_zh: 公平算法评估的条件是存在高质量的基准数据集，这些基准数据集是非冗余的，并且能够代表典型的优化场景。在本文中，我们评估了用于选择不同问题实例的三种启发式方法，这些实例应参与优化算法的比较，以确保稳健的统计算法性能分析。第一种方法采用聚类来识别相似的问题实例组，然后从每个聚类中进行采样以构建新的基准，而其他两种方法则使用图算法来识别主导和最大独立节点集。我们通过对五个最常用的优化基准上的三个优化算法组成的五个投资组合进行统计性能分析，证明了所提出的启发式方法的适用性。结果表明，分别对每个基准进行的算法性能统计分析会产生相互矛盾的结果，这可能会错误地表明一种算法相对于另一种算法的优越性。另一方面，当对使用所提出的启发式选择的问题实例进行分析时，这些实例统一覆盖了问题景观，统计结果是稳健且一致的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SELECTOR方法，通过三种启发式策略选择代表性基准套件，以提升优化算法性能比较的统计稳健性。
AI.motivation: 现有基准数据集存在冗余性，导致算法性能比较结果矛盾，需构建非冗余且覆盖全面的基准套件以确保评估可靠性。
AI.method: 采用聚类采样、支配集识别和最大独立集三种启发式方法，从常用基准中筛选具有代表性的测试实例。
AI.result: 传统基准分析产生冲突结论，而SELECTOR方法选取的基准套件使统计结果保持稳健一致，消除算法性能比较的歧义。
AI.conclusion: 所提启发式方法能有效构建覆盖问题景观的代表性基准，为优化算法的可重复性评估提供可靠基础。

authors_text: Su Lu,Han-Jia Ye,De-Chuan Zhan
title: Selective Cross-Task Distillation
title_zh: 选择性交叉任务蒸馏
abstract: The outpouring of various pre-trained models empowers knowledge distillation by providing abundant teacher resources, but there lacks a developed mechanism to utilize these teachers adequately. With a massive model repository composed of teachers pre-trained on diverse tasks, we must surmount two obstacles when using knowledge distillation to learn a new task. First, given a fixed computing budget, it is not affordable to try each teacher and train the student repeatedly, making it necessary to seek out the most contributive teacher precisely and efficiently. Second, semantic gaps exist between the teachers and the target student since they are trained on different tasks. Thus, we need to extract knowledge from a general label space that may be different from the student's. Faced with these two challenges, we study a new setting named selective cross-task distillation that includes teacher assessment and generalized knowledge reuse. We bridge the teacher's label space and the student's label space through optimal transport. The transportation cost from the teacher's prediction to the student's prediction measures the relatedness between two tasks and acts as an objective for distillation. Our method reuses cross-task knowledge from a distinct label space and efficiently assesses teachers without enumerating the model repository. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: The outpouring of various pre-trained models empowers knowledge distillation by providing abundant teacher resources, but there lacks a developed mechanism to utilize these teachers adequately. With a massive model repository composed of teachers pre-trained on diverse tasks, we must surmount two obstacles when using knowledge distillation to learn a new task. First, given a fixed computing budget, it is not affordable to try each teacher and train the student repeatedly, making it necessary to seek out the most contributive teacher precisely and efficiently. Second, semantic gaps exist between the teachers and the target student since they are trained on different tasks. Thus, we need to extract knowledge from a general label space that may be different from the student's. Faced with these two challenges, we study a new setting named selective cross-task distillation that includes teacher assessment and generalized knowledge reuse. We bridge the teacher's label space and the student's label space through optimal transport. The transportation cost from the teacher's prediction to the student's prediction measures the relatedness between two tasks and acts as an objective for distillation. Our method reuses cross-task knowledge from a distinct label space and efficiently assesses teachers without enumerating the model repository. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 各种预训练模型的大量涌现，为知识的提炼提供了丰富的教师资源，但缺乏成熟的机制来充分利用这些教师。由于拥有由经过不同任务预培训的教师组成的庞大模型存储库，我们在使用知识蒸馏来学习新任务时必须克服两个障碍。首先，在给定固定的计算预算的情况下，不可能对每个教师进行反复尝试并训练学生，因此有必要精确有效地寻找最有贡献的教师。其次，教师和目标学生之间存在语义差距，因为他们接受的任务不同。因此，我们需要从可能与学生不同的通用标签空间中提取知识。面对这两个挑战，我们研究了一种名为选择性跨任务蒸馏的新设置，其中包括教师评估和广义知识重用。我们通过最佳传输连接教师的标签空间和学生的标签空间。从教师预测到学生预测的运输成本衡量了两个任务之间的相关性，并作为蒸馏的目标。我们的方法重用来自不同标签空间的跨任务知识，并有效地评估教师，而无需枚举模型存储库。实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种选择性跨任务知识蒸馏方法，通过有效利用多任务预训练教师模型来提升学生模型的学习效率。
AI.motivation: 预训练模型的大量涌现为知识蒸馏提供了丰富资源，但缺乏高效利用这些教师模型的机制，尤其在计算预算有限和跨任务语义差异的情况下。
AI.method: 通过最优运输理论桥接教师与学生的标签空间，利用运输成本衡量任务相关性，并设计目标函数实现跨任务知识复用，无需遍历所有教师模型。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在多个任务上的有效性，能够高效筛选贡献度高的教师并提升学生模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的跨任务知识蒸馏框架解决了教师选择效率与语义差异问题，为多任务学习提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Selective Cross-Task Distillation 选择性交叉任务蒸馏 The outpouring of various pre-trained models empowers knowledge distillation by providing abundant teacher resources, but there lacks a developed mechanism to utilize these teachers adequately. With a massive model repository composed of teachers pre-trained on diverse tasks, we must surmount two obstacles when using knowledge distillation to learn a new task. First, given a fixed computing budget, it is not affordable to try each teacher and train the student repeatedly, making it necessary to seek out the most contributive teacher precisely and efficiently. Second, semantic gaps exist between the teachers and the target student since they are trained on different tasks. Thus, we need to extract knowledge from a general label space that may be different from the student's. Faced with these two challenges, we study a new setting named selective cross-task distillation that includes teacher assessment and generalized knowledge reuse. We bridge the teacher's label space and the student's label space through optimal transport. The transportation cost from the teacher's prediction to the student's prediction measures the relatedness between two tasks and acts as an objective for distillation. Our method reuses cross-task knowledge from a distinct label space and efficiently assesses teachers without enumerating the model repository. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. 各种预训练模型的大量涌现，为知识的提炼提供了丰富的教师资源，但缺乏成熟的机制来充分利用这些教师。由于拥有由经过不同任务预培训的教师组成的庞大模型存储库，我们在使用知识蒸馏来学习新任务时必须克服两个障碍。首先，在给定固定的计算预算的情况下，不可能对每个教师进行反复尝试并训练学生，因此有必要精确有效地寻找最有贡献的教师。其次，教师和目标学生之间存在语义差距，因为他们接受的任务不同。因此，我们需要从可能与学生不同的通用标签空间中提取知识。面对这两个挑战，我们研究了一种名为选择性跨任务蒸馏的新设置，其中包括教师评估和广义知识重用。我们通过最佳传输连接教师的标签空间和学生的标签空间。从教师预测到学生预测的运输成本衡量了两个任务之间的相关性，并作为蒸馏的目标。我们的方法重用来自不同标签空间的跨任务知识，并有效地评估教师，而无需枚举模型存储库。实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种选择性跨任务知识蒸馏方法，通过有效利用多任务预训练教师模型来提升学生模型的学习效率。 Su Lu,Han-Jia Ye,De-Chuan Zhan cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Ge Wang,Li Tan,Ziliang Shang,He Liu
title: Multimodal Dual Emotion with Fusion of Visual Sentiment for Rumor Detection
title_zh: 融合视觉情感的多模态双重情感用于谣言检测
comment: There is an error in the experimental recording process, and the results reported in the article need to be re-checked
comments: There is an error in the experimental recording process, and the results reported in the article need to be re-checked
abstract: In recent years, rumors have had a devastating impact on society, making rumor detection a significant challenge. However, the studies on rumor detection ignore the intense emotions of images in the rumor content. This paper verifies that the image emotion improves the rumor detection efficiency. A Multimodal Dual Emotion feature in rumor detection, which consists of visual and textual emotions, is proposed. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study which uses visual emotion in rumor detection. The experiments on real datasets verify that the proposed features outperform the state-of-the-art sentiment features, and can be extended in rumor detectors while improving their performance.
summary: In recent years, rumors have had a devastating impact on society, making rumor detection a significant challenge. However, the studies on rumor detection ignore the intense emotions of images in the rumor content. This paper verifies that the image emotion improves the rumor detection efficiency. A Multimodal Dual Emotion feature in rumor detection, which consists of visual and textual emotions, is proposed. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study which uses visual emotion in rumor detection. The experiments on real datasets verify that the proposed features outperform the state-of-the-art sentiment features, and can be extended in rumor detectors while improving their performance.
abstract_zh: 近年来，谣言对社会造成了毁灭性影响，谣言检测成为一项重大挑战。然而，谣言检测的研究忽视了谣言内容中图像的强烈情感。本文验证了图像情感提高了谣言检测效率。提出了谣言检测中的多模态双重情感特征，其中包括视觉和文本情感。据我们所知，这是第一个在谣言检测中使用视觉情感的研究。在真实数据集上的实验验证了所提出的特征优于最先进的情感特征，并且可以在谣言检测器中扩展，同时提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合视觉与文本情感的多模态双重情感特征，用于提升谣言检测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有谣言检测研究未充分考虑图像中的强烈情感因素，而图像情感对检测效果有显著影响。
AI.method: 设计包含视觉情感与文本情感的多模态双重情感特征，首次将视觉情感引入谣言检测任务。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法优于现有最先进的情感特征，在谣言检测器中可扩展应用并提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 视觉情感融合有效提升谣言检测效果，为多模态谣言检测提供了新方向。

authors_text: Adrian Holzbock,Alexander Tsaregorodtsev,Youssef Dawoud,Klaus Dietmayer,Vasileios Belagiannis
title: A Spatio-Temporal Multilayer Perceptron for Gesture Recognition
title_zh: 用于手势识别的时空多层感知器
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV 2022), June 5 - June 9, 2022, Aachen, Germany
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV 2022), June 5 - June 9, 2022, Aachen, Germany
abstract: Gesture recognition is essential for the interaction of autonomous vehicles with humans. While the current approaches focus on combining several modalities like image features, keypoints and bone vectors, we present neural network architecture that delivers state-of-the-art results only with body skeleton input data. We propose the spatio-temporal multilayer perceptron for gesture recognition in the context of autonomous vehicles. Given 3D body poses over time, we define temporal and spatial mixing operations to extract features in both domains. Additionally, the importance of each time step is re-weighted with Squeeze-and-Excitation layers. An extensive evaluation of the TCG and Drive&Act datasets is provided to showcase the promising performance of our approach. Furthermore, we deploy our model to our autonomous vehicle to show its real-time capability and stable execution.
summary: Gesture recognition is essential for the interaction of autonomous vehicles with humans. While the current approaches focus on combining several modalities like image features, keypoints and bone vectors, we present neural network architecture that delivers state-of-the-art results only with body skeleton input data. We propose the spatio-temporal multilayer perceptron for gesture recognition in the context of autonomous vehicles. Given 3D body poses over time, we define temporal and spatial mixing operations to extract features in both domains. Additionally, the importance of each time step is re-weighted with Squeeze-and-Excitation layers. An extensive evaluation of the TCG and Drive&Act datasets is provided to showcase the promising performance of our approach. Furthermore, we deploy our model to our autonomous vehicle to show its real-time capability and stable execution.
abstract_zh: 手势识别对于自动驾驶车辆与人类的交互至关重要。虽然当前的方法侧重于组合图像特征、关键点和骨骼向量等多种模式，但我们提出的神经网络架构仅使用身体骨骼输入数据即可提供最先进的结果。我们提出了用于自动驾驶车辆中手势识别的时空多层感知器。给定随时间变化的 3D 身体姿势，我们定义时间和空间混合操作来提取两个域中的特征。此外，每个时间步的重要性都通过挤压和激励层重新加权。对 TCG 和 Drive&Act 数据集进行了广泛的评估，以展示我们方法的良好性能。此外，我们将模型部署到自动驾驶汽车上，以展示其实时能力和稳定的执行能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空多层感知机的手势识别方法，专为自动驾驶场景设计，仅使用身体骨骼数据实现高精度识别。
AI.motivation: 现有手势识别方法依赖多模态数据融合，而本文旨在通过简化输入模态（仅使用骨骼数据）提升自动驾驶系统中人机交互的效率与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计时空多层感知机架构，结合时序与空域特征提取操作，并引入Squeeze-and-Excitation模块动态加权时间步的重要性。
AI.result: 在TCG和Drive&Act数据集上达到先进性能，且成功部署于自动驾驶车辆，验证了模型的实时性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 仅依赖骨骼数据的时空感知机架构可有效实现高精度手势识别，为自动驾驶人机交互提供轻量化解决方案。

Furthermore, we deploy our model to our autonomous vehicle to show its real-time capability and stable execution. 手势识别对于自动驾驶车辆与人类的交互至关重要。虽然当前的方法侧重于组合图像特征、关键点和骨骼向量等多种模式，但我们提出的神经网络架构仅使用身体骨骼输入数据即可提供最先进的结果。我们提出了用于自动驾驶车辆中手势识别的时空多层感知器。给定随时间变化的 3D 身体姿势，我们定义时间和空间混合操作来提取两个域中的特征。此外，每个时间步的重要性都通过挤压和激励层重新加权。对 TCG 和 Drive&Act 数据集进行了广泛的评估，以展示我们方法的良好性能。此外，我们将模型部署到自动驾驶汽车上，以展示其实时能力和稳定的执行能力。 本文提出一种基于时空多层感知机的手势识别方法，专为自动驾驶场景设计，仅使用身体骨骼数据实现高精度识别。 Adrian Holzbock,Alexander Tsaregorodtsev,Youssef Dawoud,Klaus Dietmayer,Vasileios Belagiannis cs.CV

authors_text: Fuchuan Tong,Siqi Zheng,Min Zhang,Yafeng Chen,Hongbin Suo,Qingyang Hong,Lin Li
title: Graph Convolutional Network Based Semi-Supervised Learning on Multi-Speaker Meeting Data
title_zh: 基于图卷积网络的多发言者会议数据半监督学习
abstract: Unsupervised clustering on speakers is becoming increasingly important for its potential uses in semi-supervised learning. In reality, we are often presented with enormous amounts of unlabeled data from multi-party meetings and discussions. An effective unsupervised clustering approach would allow us to significantly increase the amount of training data without additional costs for annotations. Recently, methods based on graph convolutional networks (GCN) have received growing attention for unsupervised clustering, as these methods exploit the connectivity patterns between nodes to improve learning performance. In this work, we present a GCN-based approach for semi-supervised learning. Given a pre-trained embedding extractor, a graph convolutional network is trained on the labeled data and clusters unlabeled data with "pseudo-labels". We present a self-correcting training mechanism that iteratively runs the cluster-train-correct process on pseudo-labels. We show that this proposed approach effectively uses unlabeled data and improves speaker recognition accuracy.
summary: Unsupervised clustering on speakers is becoming increasingly important for its potential uses in semi-supervised learning. In reality, we are often presented with enormous amounts of unlabeled data from multi-party meetings and discussions. An effective unsupervised clustering approach would allow us to significantly increase the amount of training data without additional costs for annotations. Recently, methods based on graph convolutional networks (GCN) have received growing attention for unsupervised clustering, as these methods exploit the connectivity patterns between nodes to improve learning performance. In this work, we present a GCN-based approach for semi-supervised learning. Given a pre-trained embedding extractor, a graph convolutional network is trained on the labeled data and clusters unlabeled data with "pseudo-labels". We present a self-correcting training mechanism that iteratively runs the cluster-train-correct process on pseudo-labels. We show that this proposed approach effectively uses unlabeled data and improves speaker recognition accuracy.
abstract_zh: 说话人的无监督聚类因其在半监督学习中的潜在用途而变得越来越重要。事实上，我们经常会收到来自多方会议和讨论的大量未标记数据。有效的无监督聚类方法将使我们能够显着增加训练数据量，而无需额外的注释成本。最近，基于图卷积网络（GCN）的方法在无监督聚类方面受到越来越多的关注，因为这些方法利用节点之间的连接模式来提高学习性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 GCN 的半监督学习方法。给定预先训练的嵌入提取器，图卷积网络在标记数据上进行训练，并将未标记数据与“伪标签”进行聚类。我们提出了一种自我校正训练机制，可以在伪标签上迭代运行集群训练校正过程。我们表明，这种提出的方​​法有效地使用未标记的数据并提高了说话人识别的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图卷积网络的半监督学习方法，通过利用多说话人会议中的未标记数据提升说话人识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 多方会议数据中存在大量未标注信息，有效聚类可显著增加训练数据量并降低标注成本，而图卷积网络能通过节点连接模式提升学习性能。
AI.method: 使用预训练嵌入提取器构建图结构，通过GCN在标记数据上训练模型，采用伪标签聚类未标记数据，并设计自纠正机制迭代优化伪标签。
AI.result: 该方法有效利用未标记数据，实验表明说话人识别准确率得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 结合GCN与自纠正机制的半监督学习方法能够高效利用未标记数据，增强多说话人场景下的模型性能。

authors_text: Michael A. Bekos,Giordano Da Lozzo,Petr Hliněný,Michael Kaufmann
title: Graph Product Structure for h-Framed Graphs
title_zh: h 框架图的图积结构
abstract: Graph product structure theory expresses certain graphs as subgraphs of the strong product of much simpler graphs. In particular, an elegant formulation for the corresponding structural theorems involves the strong product of a path and of a bounded treewidth graph, and allows to lift combinatorial results for bounded treewidth graphs to graph classes for which the product structure holds, such as to planar graphs [Dujmović et al., J. ACM, 67(4), 22:1-38, 2020]. In this paper, we join the search for extensions of this powerful tool beyond planarity by considering the h-framed graphs, a graph class that includes 1-planar, optimal 2-planar, and k-map graphs (for appropriate values of h). We establish a graph product structure theorem for h-framed graphs stating that the graphs in this class are subgraphs of the strong product of a path, of a planar graph of treewidth at most 3, and of a clique of size $3\lfloor h/2 \rfloor +\lfloor h/3 \rfloor -1$. This allows us to improve over the previous structural theorems for 1-planar and k-map graphs. Our results constitute significant progress over the previous bounds on the queue number, non-repetitive chromatic number, and p-centered chromatic number of these graph classes, e.g., we lower the currently best upper bound on the queue number of 1-planar graphs and k-map graphs from 495 to 81 and from 32225k(k-3) to 61k, respectively. We also employ the product structure machinery to improve the current upper bounds of twin-width of planar and 1-planar graphs from 183 to 37, and from O(1) to 80, respectively. All our structural results are constructive and yield efficient algorithms to obtain the corresponding decompositions.
summary: Graph product structure theory expresses certain graphs as subgraphs of the strong product of much simpler graphs. In particular, an elegant formulation for the corresponding structural theorems involves the strong product of a path and of a bounded treewidth graph, and allows to lift combinatorial results for bounded treewidth graphs to graph classes for which the product structure holds, such as to planar graphs [Dujmović et al., J. ACM, 67(4), 22:1-38, 2020]. In this paper, we join the search for extensions of this powerful tool beyond planarity by considering the h-framed graphs, a graph class that includes 1-planar, optimal 2-planar, and k-map graphs (for appropriate values of h). We establish a graph product structure theorem for h-framed graphs stating that the graphs in this class are subgraphs of the strong product of a path, of a planar graph of treewidth at most 3, and of a clique of size $3\lfloor h/2 \rfloor +\lfloor h/3 \rfloor -1$. This allows us to improve over the previous structural theorems for 1-planar and k-map graphs. Our results constitute significant progress over the previous bounds on the queue number, non-repetitive chromatic number, and p-centered chromatic number of these graph classes, e.g., we lower the currently best upper bound on the queue number of 1-planar graphs and k-map graphs from 495 to 81 and from 32225k(k-3) to 61k, respectively. We also employ the product structure machinery to improve the current upper bounds of twin-width of planar and 1-planar graphs from 183 to 37, and from O(1) to 80, respectively. All our structural results are constructive and yield efficient algorithms to obtain the corresponding decompositions.
abstract_zh: 图积结构理论将某些图表示为更简单图的强积的子图。特别是，相应结构定理的优雅公式涉及路径和有界树宽图的强乘积，并且允许将有界树宽图的组合结果提升到乘积结构所适用的图类，例如平面图 [Dujmović et al., J. ACM, 67(4), 22:1-38, 2020]。在本文中，我们通过考虑 h 框架图（包括 1 平面图、最优 2 平面图和 k 图（对于适当的 h 值））来加入对这个强大工具在平面性之外的扩展的搜索。我们为 h 框架图建立了图积结构定理，指出此类图是路径、树宽最多为 3 的平面图以及大小为 $3\lfloor h/2 \rfloor +\lfloor h/3 \rfloor -1$ 的团的强积的子图。这使我们能够改进之前的 1 平面和 k 图的结构定理。我们的结果比之前这些图类的队列数、非重复色数和 p 中心色数的界限取得了重大进展，例如，我们将 1-平面图和 k-map 图的队列数的当前最佳上限分别从 495 降低到 81，从 32225k(k-3) 降低到 61k。我们还采用乘积结构机制将平面图和 1 平面图的双宽度当前上限分别从 183 改进到 37，从 O(1) 改进到 80。我们所有的结构结果都是建设性的，并产生有效的算法来获得相应的分解。

AI.tldr: 本文将图乘积结构理论扩展至h-框架图，证明该类图可表示为路径、有限树宽图及特定规模完全图的强乘积子图，并利用该结构改进了多项图参数的上界。
AI.motivation: 图乘积结构理论已成功应用于平面图等类，但需进一步扩展至更复杂的图类（如1-平面图、k-地图图）。h-框架图包含这些图类，研究其结构有助于提升相关组合性质的分析能力。
AI.method: 通过建立h-框架图的强乘积结构定理，将其表示为路径、树宽≤3的平面图及规模为$3\\lfloor h/2 \rfloor +\\lfloor h/3 \rfloor -1$的完全图的强乘积子图，并基于此推导参数上界。
AI.result: 将1-平面图和k-地图图的排队数上界分别从495降至81、从32225k(k-3)降至61k；将平面图和1-平面图的双宽上界分别从183降至37、从O(1)降至80，并提供构造性分解算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过h-框架图的乘积结构理论，在图参数上界和分解算法方面取得显著进展，为非平面图类的组合分析提供了新工具。

authors_text: Valéry Dewil,Aranud Barral,Gabriele Facciolo,Pablo Arias
title: Self-supervision versus synthetic datasets: which is the lesser evil in the context of video denoising?
title_zh: 自监督与合成数据集：在视频去噪的背景下，哪个危害较小？
abstract: Supervised training has led to state-of-the-art results in image and video denoising. However, its application to real data is limited since it requires large datasets of noisy-clean pairs that are difficult to obtain. For this reason, networks are often trained on realistic synthetic data. More recently, some self-supervised frameworks have been proposed for training such denoising networks directly on the noisy data without requiring ground truth. On synthetic denoising problems supervised training outperforms self-supervised approaches, however in recent years the gap has become narrower, especially for video. In this paper, we propose a study aiming to determine which is the best approach to train denoising networks for real raw videos: supervision on synthetic realistic data or self-supervision on real data. A complete study with quantitative results in case of natural videos with real motion is impossible since no dataset with clean-noisy pairs exists. We address this issue by considering three independent experiments in which we compare the two frameworks. We found that self-supervision on the real data outperforms supervision on synthetic data, and that in normal illumination conditions the drop in performance is due to the synthetic ground truth generation, not the noise model.
summary: Supervised training has led to state-of-the-art results in image and video denoising. However, its application to real data is limited since it requires large datasets of noisy-clean pairs that are difficult to obtain. For this reason, networks are often trained on realistic synthetic data. More recently, some self-supervised frameworks have been proposed for training such denoising networks directly on the noisy data without requiring ground truth. On synthetic denoising problems supervised training outperforms self-supervised approaches, however in recent years the gap has become narrower, especially for video. In this paper, we propose a study aiming to determine which is the best approach to train denoising networks for real raw videos: supervision on synthetic realistic data or self-supervision on real data. A complete study with quantitative results in case of natural videos with real motion is impossible since no dataset with clean-noisy pairs exists. We address this issue by considering three independent experiments in which we compare the two frameworks. We found that self-supervision on the real data outperforms supervision on synthetic data, and that in normal illumination conditions the drop in performance is due to the synthetic ground truth generation, not the noise model.
abstract_zh: 监督训练在图像和视频去噪方面取得了最先进的结果。然而，它在实际数据中的应用受到限制，因为它需要难以获得的大量噪声-干净对的数据集。因此，网络通常根据真实的合成数据进行训练。最近，有人提出了一些自监督框架，用于直接在噪声数据上训练此类去噪网络，而不需要地面事实。在合成去噪问题上，监督训练优于自监督方法，但近年来差距已经缩小，尤其是对于视频。在本文中，我们提出了一项研究，旨在确定哪种是训练真实原始视频去噪网络的最佳方法：对合成现实数据的监督或对真实数据的自我监督。对具有真实运动的自然视频进行定量结果的完整研究是不可能的，因为不存在具有干净噪声对的数据集。我们通过考虑三个独立的实验来解决这个问题，在这些实验中我们比较了两个框架。我们发现，对真实数据的自我监督优于对合成数据的监督，并且在正常照明条件下，性能下降是由于合成地面实况生成造成的，而不是噪声模型。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了在视频去噪任务中，使用合成数据集进行监督学习与在真实数据上进行自监督学习的效果。
AI.motivation: 监督学习依赖难以获取的真实噪声-干净图像对，而合成数据集和自监督方法各有局限，需明确哪种方式更适合实际视频去噪。
AI.method: 通过三个独立实验，对比监督学习（基于合成数据）与自监督学习（基于真实数据）在视频去噪中的性能差异。
AI.result: 自监督方法在真实数据上表现优于监督方法，且性能下降主要归因于合成数据的地面真值生成而非噪声模型。
AI.conclusion: 在真实视频去噪中，自监督学习优于基于合成数据的监督学习，应优先采用自监督框架。

authors_text: Prithviraj Pramanik,Prasenjit Karmakar,Praveen Kumar Sharma,Soumyajit Chatterjee,Abhijit Roy,Santanu Mandal,Subrata Nandi,Sandip Chakraborty,Mousumi Saha,Sujoy Saha
title: AQuaMoHo: Localized Low-Cost Outdoor Air Quality Sensing over a Thermo-Hygrometer
title_zh: AQuaMoHo：通过温湿度计进行本地化低成本室外空气质量传感
abstract: Efficient air quality sensing serves as one of the essential services provided in any recent smart city. Mostly facilitated by sparsely deployed Air Quality Monitoring Stations (AQMSs) that are difficult to install and maintain, the overall spatial variation heavily impacts air quality monitoring for locations far enough from these pre-deployed public infrastructures. To mitigate this, we in this paper propose a framework named AQuaMoHo that can annotate data obtained from a low-cost thermo-hygrometer (as the sole physical sensing device) with the AQI labels, with the help of additional publicly crawled Spatio-temporal information of that locality. At its core, AQuaMoHo exploits the temporal patterns from a set of readily available spatial features using an LSTM-based model and further enhances the overall quality of the annotation using temporal attention. From a thorough study of two different cities, we observe that AQuaMoHo can significantly help annotate the air quality data on a personal scale.
summary: Efficient air quality sensing serves as one of the essential services provided in any recent smart city. Mostly facilitated by sparsely deployed Air Quality Monitoring Stations (AQMSs) that are difficult to install and maintain, the overall spatial variation heavily impacts air quality monitoring for locations far enough from these pre-deployed public infrastructures. To mitigate this, we in this paper propose a framework named AQuaMoHo that can annotate data obtained from a low-cost thermo-hygrometer (as the sole physical sensing device) with the AQI labels, with the help of additional publicly crawled Spatio-temporal information of that locality. At its core, AQuaMoHo exploits the temporal patterns from a set of readily available spatial features using an LSTM-based model and further enhances the overall quality of the annotation using temporal attention. From a thorough study of two different cities, we observe that AQuaMoHo can significantly help annotate the air quality data on a personal scale.
abstract_zh: 高效的空气质量传感是当今智慧城市提供的基本服务之一。主要是由难以安装和维护的稀疏部署的空气质量监测站（AQMS）推动，总体空间变化严重影响了距离这些预先部署的公共基础设施足够远的位置的空气质量监测。为了缓解这一问题，我们在本文中提出了一个名为 AQuaMoHo 的框架，该框架可以借助 AQI 标签来注释从低成本温湿度计（作为唯一的物理传感设备）获得的数据，并借助该地点的其他公开爬取的时空信息。 AQuaMoHo 的核心是使用基于 LSTM 的模型，利用一组现成的空间特征中的时间模式，并使用时间注意力进一步提高注释的整体质量。通过对两个不同城市的深入研究，我们发现 AQuaMoHo 可以显着帮助注释个人规模的空气质量数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AQuaMoHo框架，利用低成本温湿度传感器结合时空数据标注空气质量指数（AQI），以解决传统空气质量监测站部署成本高、覆盖不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统空气质量监测站（AQMS）部署成本高且维护困难，导致偏远区域监测数据不足，亟需低成本、高覆盖的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于LSTM模型和时序注意力机制，整合公开获取的时空信息与温湿度传感器数据，实现对空气质量指数的标注与预测。
AI.result: 在两个城市的实验中，AQuaMoHo显著提升了个人尺度的空气质量数据标注效果，验证了其在低成本场景下的可行性。
AI.conclusion: AQuaMoHo通过融合低成本硬件与时空数据分析，为个性化空气质量监测提供了经济高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Shuo Zhang,Junzhou Zhao,Pinghui Wang,Yu Li,Yi Huang,Junlan Feng
title: "Think Before You Speak": Improving Multi-Action Dialog Policy by Planning Single-Action Dialogs
title_zh: “说话之前先思考”：通过规划单动作对话来改进多动作对话策略
abstract: Multi-action dialog policy (MADP), which generates multiple atomic dialog actions per turn, has been widely applied in task-oriented dialog systems to provide expressive and efficient system responses. Existing MADP models usually imitate action combinations from the labeled multi-action dialog samples. Due to data limitations, they generalize poorly toward unseen dialog flows. While interactive learning and reinforcement learning algorithms can be applied to incorporate external data sources of real users and user simulators, they take significant manual effort to build and suffer from instability. To address these issues, we propose Planning Enhanced Dialog Policy (PEDP), a novel multi-task learning framework that learns single-action dialog dynamics to enhance multi-action prediction. Our PEDP method employs model-based planning for conceiving what to express before deciding the current response through simulating single-action dialogs. Experimental results on the MultiWOZ dataset demonstrate that our fully supervised learning-based method achieves a solid task success rate of 90.6%, improving 3% compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Multi-action dialog policy (MADP), which generates multiple atomic dialog actions per turn, has been widely applied in task-oriented dialog systems to provide expressive and efficient system responses. Existing MADP models usually imitate action combinations from the labeled multi-action dialog samples. Due to data limitations, they generalize poorly toward unseen dialog flows. While interactive learning and reinforcement learning algorithms can be applied to incorporate external data sources of real users and user simulators, they take significant manual effort to build and suffer from instability. To address these issues, we propose Planning Enhanced Dialog Policy (PEDP), a novel multi-task learning framework that learns single-action dialog dynamics to enhance multi-action prediction. Our PEDP method employs model-based planning for conceiving what to express before deciding the current response through simulating single-action dialogs. Experimental results on the MultiWOZ dataset demonstrate that our fully supervised learning-based method achieves a solid task success rate of 90.6%, improving 3% compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 多动作对话策略（MADP）每轮生成多个原子对话动作，已广泛应用于面向任务的对话系统，以提供富有表现力和高效的系统响应。现有的 MADP 模型通常模仿带标签的多动作对话样本中的动作组合。由于数据限制，它们对看不见的对话流的泛化能力很差。虽然交互式学习和强化学习算法可以应用于合并真实用户和用户模拟器的外部数据源，但它们需要大量的手动工作来构建并且存在不稳定的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了规划增强对话策略（PEDP），这是一种新颖的多任务学习框架，可以学习单动作对话动态以增强多动作预测。我们的 PEDP 方法采用基于模型的规划，在通过模拟单操作对话决定当前响应之前构思要表达的内容。 MultiWOZ 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们基于完全监督学习的方法实现了 90.6% 的可靠任务成功率，与最先进的方法相比提高了 3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单动作对话规划的多任务学习框架PEDP，以改进多动作对话策略（MADP）的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MADP模型因依赖标注数据导致泛化能力不足，而交互学习和强化学习方法需大量人工干预且不稳定，亟需更高效稳定的解决方案。
AI.method: PEDP通过模型基于规划模拟单动作对话，学习单动作动态以增强多动作预测，采用全监督学习框架实现。
AI.result: 在MultiWOZ数据集上，PEDP任务成功率达90.6%，较现有最优方法提升3%。
AI.conclusion: PEDP通过单动作规划有效提升了多动作对话策略的性能，避免了交互学习的缺陷，在基准测试中表现优异。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单动作对话规划的多任务学习框架PEDP，以改进多动作对话策略（MADP）的泛化能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有MADP模型因依赖标注数据导致泛化能力不足，而交互学习和强化学习方法需大量人工干预且不稳定，亟需更高效稳定的解决方案。
ai_content.method: PEDP通过模型基于规划模拟单动作对话，学习单动作动态以增强多动作预测，采用全监督学习框架实现。
ai_content.result: 在MultiWOZ数据集上，PEDP任务成功率达90.6%，较现有最优方法提升3%。
ai_content.conclusion: PEDP通过单动作规划有效提升了多动作对话策略的性能，避免了交互学习的缺陷，在基准测试中表现优异。

search_text: "Think Before You Speak": Improving Multi-Action Dialog Policy by Planning Single-Action Dialogs “说话之前先思考”：通过规划单动作对话来改进多动作对话策略 Multi-action dialog policy (MADP), which generates multiple atomic dialog actions per turn, has been widely applied in task-oriented dialog systems to provide expressive and efficient system responses. Existing MADP models usually imitate action combinations from the labeled multi-action dialog samples. Due to data limitations, they generalize poorly toward unseen dialog flows. While interactive learning and reinforcement learning algorithms can be applied to incorporate external data sources of real users and user simulators, they take significant manual effort to build and suffer from instability. To address these issues, we propose Planning Enhanced Dialog Policy (PEDP), a novel multi-task learning framework that learns single-action dialog dynamics to enhance multi-action prediction. Our PEDP method employs model-based planning for conceiving what to express before deciding the current response through simulating single-action dialogs. Experimental results on the MultiWOZ dataset demonstrate that our fully supervised learning-based method achieves a solid task success rate of 90.6%, improving 3% compared to the state-of-the-art methods. 多动作对话策略（MADP）每轮生成多个原子对话动作，已广泛应用于面向任务的对话系统，以提供富有表现力和高效的系统响应。现有的 MADP 模型通常模仿带标签的多动作对话样本中的动作组合。由于数据限制，它们对看不见的对话流的泛化能力很差。虽然交互式学习和强化学习算法可以应用于合并真实用户和用户模拟器的外部数据源，但它们需要大量的手动工作来构建并且存在不稳定的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了规划增强对话策略（PEDP），这是一种新颖的多任务学习框架，可以学习单动作对话动态以增强多动作预测。我们的 PEDP 方法采用基于模型的规划，在通过模拟单操作对话决定当前响应之前构思要表达的内容。 MultiWOZ 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们基于完全监督学习的方法实现了 90.6% 的可靠任务成功率，与最先进的方法相比提高了 3%。 本文提出了一种基于单动作对话规划的多任务学习框架PEDP，以改进多动作对话策略（MADP）的泛化能力。 Shuo Zhang,Junzhou Zhao,Pinghui Wang,Yu Li,Yi Huang,Junlan Feng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Avi Gazneli,Gadi Zimerman,Tal Ridnik,Gilad Sharir,Asaf Noy
title: End-to-End Audio Strikes Back: Boosting Augmentations Towards An Efficient Audio Classification Network
title_zh: 端到端音频反击：增强增强功能以​​实现高效的音频分类网络
abstract: While efficient architectures and a plethora of augmentations for end-to-end image classification tasks have been suggested and heavily investigated, state-of-the-art techniques for audio classifications still rely on numerous representations of the audio signal together with large architectures, fine-tuned from large datasets. By utilizing the inherited lightweight nature of audio and novel audio augmentations, we were able to present an efficient end-to-end network with strong generalization ability. Experiments on a variety of sound classification sets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our approach, by achieving state-of-the-art results in various settings. Public code is available at: \href{https://github.com/Alibaba-MIIL/AudioClassfication}{this http url}
summary: While efficient architectures and a plethora of augmentations for end-to-end image classification tasks have been suggested and heavily investigated, state-of-the-art techniques for audio classifications still rely on numerous representations of the audio signal together with large architectures, fine-tuned from large datasets. By utilizing the inherited lightweight nature of audio and novel audio augmentations, we were able to present an efficient end-to-end network with strong generalization ability. Experiments on a variety of sound classification sets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our approach, by achieving state-of-the-art results in various settings. Public code is available at: \href{https://github.com/Alibaba-MIIL/AudioClassfication}{this http url}
abstract_zh: 虽然已经提出并深入研究了用于端到端图像分类任务的高效架构和大量增强，但最先进的音频分类技术仍然依赖于音频信号的大量表示以及大型架构，并根据大型数据集进行微调。通过利用音频继承的轻量级性质和新颖的音频增强，我们能够提供具有强大泛化能力的高效端到端网络。通过在各种设置中实现最先进的结果，对各种声音分类集的实验证明了我们方法的有效性和鲁棒性。公共代码位于：\href{https://github.com/Alibaba-MIIL/AudioClassfication}{this http url}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的端到端音频分类网络，通过利用音频的轻量特性和新颖的数据增强方法，提升音频分类的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前音频分类技术依赖复杂的音频表示和大规模模型，而图像分类已实现高效轻量化。本文旨在通过音频固有特性与创新增强方法，构建更高效的音频分类模型。
AI.method: 结合音频信号的轻量特性设计网络架构，并引入新型音频增强技术，优化模型泛化能力与计算效率。
AI.result: 在多个声音分类数据集上达到最先进水平，验证了方法在不同场景下的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过轻量化架构与增强技术的结合，本文证明了端到端音频分类网络在效率与性能上的可行性，为音频任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Kaiwen Li,Tao Zhang,Rui Wang,Ling Wang
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Online Routing of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles with Wireless Power Transfer
title_zh: 用于无线充电无人机在线路由的深度强化学习
abstract: The unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) plays an vital role in various applications such as delivery, military mission, disaster rescue, communication, etc., due to its flexibility and versatility. This paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning method to solve the UAV online routing problem with wireless power transfer, which can charge the UAV remotely without wires, thus extending the capability of the battery-limited UAV. Our study considers the power consumption of the UAV and the wireless charging process. Unlike the previous works, we solve the problem by a designed deep neural network. The model is trained using a deep reinforcement learning method offline, and is used to optimize the UAV routing problem online. On small and large scale instances, the proposed model runs from four times to 500 times faster than Google OR-tools, the state-of-the-art combinatorial optimization solver, with identical solution quality. It also outperforms different types of heuristic and local search methods in terms of both run-time and optimality. In addition, once the model is trained, it can scale to new generated problem instances with arbitrary topology that are not seen during training. The proposed method is practically applicable when the problem scale is large and the response time is crucial.
summary: The unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) plays an vital role in various applications such as delivery, military mission, disaster rescue, communication, etc., due to its flexibility and versatility. This paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning method to solve the UAV online routing problem with wireless power transfer, which can charge the UAV remotely without wires, thus extending the capability of the battery-limited UAV. Our study considers the power consumption of the UAV and the wireless charging process. Unlike the previous works, we solve the problem by a designed deep neural network. The model is trained using a deep reinforcement learning method offline, and is used to optimize the UAV routing problem online. On small and large scale instances, the proposed model runs from four times to 500 times faster than Google OR-tools, the state-of-the-art combinatorial optimization solver, with identical solution quality. It also outperforms different types of heuristic and local search methods in terms of both run-time and optimality. In addition, once the model is trained, it can scale to new generated problem instances with arbitrary topology that are not seen during training. The proposed method is practically applicable when the problem scale is large and the response time is crucial.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）由于其灵活性和多功能性，在运送、军事任务、灾难救援、通信等各种应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。本文提出了一种深度强化学习方法，通过无线充电解决无人机在线路由问题，无需电线即可远程为无人机充电，从而扩展了电池有限的无人机的能力。我们的研究考虑了无人机的功耗和无线充电过程。与之前的工作不同，我们通过设计的深度神经网络来解决问题。该模型使用深度强化学习方法进行离线训练，并用于在线优化无人机路径问题。在小型和大型实例中，所提出的模型的运行速度比 Google OR-tools（最先进的组合优化求解器）快四倍到 500 倍，并且具有相同的解决方案质量。在运行时间和最优性方面，它还优于不同类型的启发式和局部搜索方法。此外，一旦模型经过训练，它就可以扩展到新生成的具有训练期间未见的任意拓扑的问题实例。当问题规模较大且响应时间至关重要时，该方法具有实际应用价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的方法，用于解决配备无线充电功能的无人机在线路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 无人机因电池续航限制难以长时间执行任务，而无线充电技术可延长其作业时间，但现有方法在大规模场景下效率不足。
AI.method: 设计深度神经网络模型，通过离线深度强化学习训练，实现在线路径优化，并支持任意拓扑结构的扩展。
AI.result: 该模型在小规模和大规模实例上分别比Google OR-tools快4至500倍，且在运行时间和解的质量上优于多种启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法适用于大规模、需快速响应的无人机路径规划场景，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jianpeng Yao,Quanliang Cao,Yuwei Ju,Yuxuan Sun,Ruiqi Liu,Xiaotao Han,Liang Li
title: Adaptive actuation of magnetic soft robots using deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习的磁软机器人的自适应驱动
abstract: Magnetic soft robots have attracted growing interest due to their unique advantages in terms of untethered actuation and excellent controllability. However, finding the required magnetization patterns or magnetic fields to achieve the desired functions of these robots is quite challenging in many cases. No unified framework for design has been proposed yet, and existing methods mainly rely on manual heuristics, which are hard to satisfy the high complexity level of the desired robotic motion. Here, we develop an intelligent method to solve the related inverse-design problems, implemented by introducing a novel simulation platform for magnetic soft robots based on Cosserat rod models and a deep reinforcement learning framework based on TD3. We demonstrate that magnetic soft robots with different magnetization patterns can learn to move without human guidance in simulations, and effective magnetic fields can be autonomously generated that can then be applied directly to real magnetic soft robots in an open-loop way.
summary: Magnetic soft robots have attracted growing interest due to their unique advantages in terms of untethered actuation and excellent controllability. However, finding the required magnetization patterns or magnetic fields to achieve the desired functions of these robots is quite challenging in many cases. No unified framework for design has been proposed yet, and existing methods mainly rely on manual heuristics, which are hard to satisfy the high complexity level of the desired robotic motion. Here, we develop an intelligent method to solve the related inverse-design problems, implemented by introducing a novel simulation platform for magnetic soft robots based on Cosserat rod models and a deep reinforcement learning framework based on TD3. We demonstrate that magnetic soft robots with different magnetization patterns can learn to move without human guidance in simulations, and effective magnetic fields can be autonomously generated that can then be applied directly to real magnetic soft robots in an open-loop way.
abstract_zh: 磁软机器人因其在无系绳驱动和优异的可控性方面的独特优势而引起了越来越多的兴趣。然而，在许多情况下，找到所需的磁化模式或磁场来实现这些机器人所需的功能非常具有挑战性。目前尚未提出统一的设计框架，现有方法主要依赖于手动启发式，很难满足所需机器人运动的高复杂性水平。在这里，我们开发了一种解决相关逆向设计问题的智能方法，通过引入基于 Cosserat 杆模型的新型磁软机器人仿真平台和基于 TD3 的深度强化学习框架来实现。我们证明，具有不同磁化模式的磁性软机器人可以在模拟中学习在没有人类指导的情况下移动，并且可以自主生成有效磁场，然后以开环方式直接应用于真实的磁性软机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的智能方法，用于解决磁软机器人的逆设计问题，实现自适应驱动。
AI.motivation: 现有磁软机器人设计依赖人工启发式方法，难以满足复杂运动需求，缺乏统一设计框架。
AI.method: 构建基于Cosserat杆模型的仿真平台，结合TD3深度强化学习框架实现自主磁化模式学习。
AI.result: 仿真中不同磁化模式的磁软机器人可自主学习运动，生成的磁场可直接应用于实际机器人开环控制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为磁软机器人磁化模式设计提供了智能化解决方案，提升了运动控制的复杂性与适应性。

search_text: Adaptive actuation of magnetic soft robots using deep reinforcement learning 使用深度强化学习的磁软机器人的自适应驱动 Magnetic soft robots have attracted growing interest due to their unique advantages in terms of untethered actuation and excellent controllability. However, finding the required magnetization patterns or magnetic fields to achieve the desired functions of these robots is quite challenging in many cases. Here, we develop an intelligent method to solve the related inverse-design problems, implemented by introducing a novel simulation platform for magnetic soft robots based on Cosserat rod models and a deep reinforcement learning framework based on TD3.
