authors_text: Yi Wan,Ali Rahimi-Kalahroudi,Janarthanan Rajendran,Ida Momennejad,Sarath Chandar,Harm van Seijen
title: Towards Evaluating Adaptivity of Model-Based Reinforcement Learning Methods
title_zh: 评估基于模型的强化学习方法的适应性
abstract: In recent years, a growing number of deep model-based reinforcement learning (RL) methods have been introduced. The interest in deep model-based RL is not surprising, given its many potential benefits, such as higher sample efficiency and the potential for fast adaption to changes in the environment. However, we demonstrate, using an improved version of the recently introduced Local Change Adaptation (LoCA) setup, that well-known model-based methods such as PlaNet and DreamerV2 perform poorly in their ability to adapt to local environmental changes. Combined with prior work that made a similar observation about the other popular model-based method, MuZero, a trend appears to emerge, suggesting that current deep model-based methods have serious limitations. We dive deeper into the causes of this poor performance, by identifying elements that hurt adaptive behavior and linking these to underlying techniques frequently used in deep model-based RL. We empirically validate these insights in the case of linear function approximation by demonstrating that a modified version of linear Dyna achieves effective adaptation to local changes. Furthermore, we provide detailed insights into the challenges of building an adaptive nonlinear model-based method, by experimenting with a nonlinear version of Dyna.
summary: In recent years, a growing number of deep model-based reinforcement learning (RL) methods have been introduced. The interest in deep model-based RL is not surprising, given its many potential benefits, such as higher sample efficiency and the potential for fast adaption to changes in the environment. However, we demonstrate, using an improved version of the recently introduced Local Change Adaptation (LoCA) setup, that well-known model-based methods such as PlaNet and DreamerV2 perform poorly in their ability to adapt to local environmental changes. Combined with prior work that made a similar observation about the other popular model-based method, MuZero, a trend appears to emerge, suggesting that current deep model-based methods have serious limitations. We dive deeper into the causes of this poor performance, by identifying elements that hurt adaptive behavior and linking these to underlying techniques frequently used in deep model-based RL. We empirically validate these insights in the case of linear function approximation by demonstrating that a modified version of linear Dyna achieves effective adaptation to local changes. Furthermore, we provide detailed insights into the challenges of building an adaptive nonlinear model-based method, by experimenting with a nonlinear version of Dyna.
abstract_zh: 近年来，越来越多的基于深度模型的强化学习（RL）方法被引入。人们对基于深度模型的强化学习感兴趣并不奇怪，因为它有许多潜在的好处，例如更高的样本效率和快速适应环境变化的潜力。然而，我们使用最近引入的局部变化适应 (LoCA) 设置的改进版本证明，众所周知的基于模型的方法（例如 PlaNet 和 DreamerV2）在适应局部环境变化的能力方面表现不佳。结合之前对另一种流行的基于模型的方法 MuZero 进行类似观察的工作，似乎出现了一种趋势，表明当前基于深度模型的方法存在严重的局限性。我们通过识别损害适应性行为的因素并将其与基于深度模型的强化学习中经常使用的底层技术联系起来，更深入地探讨了这种不良表现的原因。我们通过证明线性 Dyna 的修改版本实现了对局部变化的有效适应，在线性函数逼近的情况下凭经验验证了这些见解。此外，我们通过试验 Dyna 的非线性版本，对构建基于自适应非线性模型的方法的挑战提供了详细的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估基于模型的强化学习方法在应对局部环境变化时的适应性表现，并分析其局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于模型的深度强化学习方法在样本效率等方面有优势，但现有研究表明其在适应局部环境变化时表现不佳，需进一步探究原因并寻找改进方案。
AI.method: 通过改进的Local Change Adaptation（LoCA）框架测试PlaNet、DreamerV2等方法，分析影响适应性的技术因素，并基于线性函数逼近和非线性Dyna方法进行实验验证。
AI.result: 主流基于模型的方法在适应局部变化时表现差，但修改后的线性Dyna能有效适应；非线性模型的构建面临显著挑战。
AI.conclusion: 当前深度基于模型的强化学习方法在适应性上存在严重缺陷，需重新设计技术以提升其应对环境变化的能力，线性方法的改进为未来研究提供了方向。

authors_text: Mustafa Ayazoglu
title: IMDeception: Grouped Information Distilling Super-Resolution Network
title_zh: IMDeception：分组信息提取超分辨率网络
comment: Accepted for publication in NTIRE 2022 @ CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted for publication in NTIRE 2022 @ CVPR 2022
abstract: Single-Image-Super-Resolution (SISR) is a classical computer vision problem that has benefited from the recent advancements in deep learning methods, especially the advancements of convolutional neural networks (CNN). Although state-of-the-art methods improve the performance of SISR on several datasets, direct application of these networks for practical use is still an issue due to heavy computational load. For this purpose, recently, researchers have focused on more efficient and high-performing network structures. Information multi-distilling network (IMDN) is one of the highly efficient SISR networks with high performance and low computational load. IMDN achieves this efficiency with various mechanisms such as Intermediate Information Collection (IIC), working in a global setting, Progressive Refinement Module (PRM), and Contrast Aware Channel Attention (CCA), employed in a local setting. These mechanisms, however, do not equally contribute to the efficiency and performance of IMDN. In this work, we propose the Global Progressive Refinement Module (GPRM) as a less parameter-demanding alternative to the IIC module for feature aggregation. To further decrease the number of parameters and floating point operations persecond (FLOPS), we also propose Grouped Information Distilling Blocks (GIDB). Using the proposed structures, we design an efficient SISR network called IMDeception. Experiments reveal that the proposed network performs on par with state-of-the-art models despite having a limited number of parameters and FLOPS. Furthermore, using grouped convolutions as a building block of GIDB increases room for further optimization during deployment. To show its potential, the proposed model was deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX and it has been shown that it can run in real-time on this edge device
summary: Single-Image-Super-Resolution (SISR) is a classical computer vision problem that has benefited from the recent advancements in deep learning methods, especially the advancements of convolutional neural networks (CNN). Although state-of-the-art methods improve the performance of SISR on several datasets, direct application of these networks for practical use is still an issue due to heavy computational load. For this purpose, recently, researchers have focused on more efficient and high-performing network structures. Information multi-distilling network (IMDN) is one of the highly efficient SISR networks with high performance and low computational load. IMDN achieves this efficiency with various mechanisms such as Intermediate Information Collection (IIC), working in a global setting, Progressive Refinement Module (PRM), and Contrast Aware Channel Attention (CCA), employed in a local setting. These mechanisms, however, do not equally contribute to the efficiency and performance of IMDN. In this work, we propose the Global Progressive Refinement Module (GPRM) as a less parameter-demanding alternative to the IIC module for feature aggregation. To further decrease the number of parameters and floating point operations persecond (FLOPS), we also propose Grouped Information Distilling Blocks (GIDB). Using the proposed structures, we design an efficient SISR network called IMDeception. Experiments reveal that the proposed network performs on par with state-of-the-art models despite having a limited number of parameters and FLOPS. Furthermore, using grouped convolutions as a building block of GIDB increases room for further optimization during deployment. To show its potential, the proposed model was deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX and it has been shown that it can run in real-time on this edge device
abstract_zh: 单图像超分辨率（SISR）是一个经典的计算机视觉问题，受益于深度学习方法的最新进展，特别是卷积神经网络（CNN）的进步。尽管最先进的方法提高了 SISR 在多个数据集上的性能，但由于计算负荷过重，这些网络的直接应用仍然是一个问题。为此，最近，研究人员将注意力集中在更高效、高性能的网络结构上。信息多重蒸馏网络（IMDN）是高性能、低计算负载的高效SISR网络之一。 IMDN 通过各种机制实现了这种效率，例如在全局环境中工作的中间信息收集 (IIC)、在本地环境中使用的渐进细化模块 (PRM) 和对比度感知通道注意 (CCA)。然而，这些机制对 IMDN 的效率和性能的贡献并不相同。在这项工作中，我们提出了全局渐进细化模块（GPRM）作为 IIC 模块参数要求较低的替代方案，用于特征聚合。为了进一步减少参数数量和每秒浮点运算（FLOPS），我们还提出了分组信息蒸馏块（GIDB）。使用所提出的结构，我们设计了一个名为 IMDeception 的高效 SISR 网络。实验表明，尽管参数数量和 FLOPS 数量有限，但所提出的网络的性能与最先进的模型相当。此外，使用分组卷积作为 GIDB 的构建块增加了部署期间进一步优化的空间。为了展示其潜力，所提出的模型已部署在 NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX 上，并且已证明它可以在该边缘设备上实时运行

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IMDeception的高效单图像超分辨率网络，通过改进信息蒸馏机制以降低计算负载。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率网络计算量大，难以实际部署；虽然IMDN效率较高，但其部分模块冗余，需进一步优化参数与计算量。
AI.method: 设计全局渐进精炼模块（GPRM）替代IIC模块，并引入分组信息蒸馏块（GIDB）以减少参数量和FLOPS，构建轻量级网络IMDeception。
AI.result: IMDeception在保持高性能的同时参数量和FLOPS显著降低，并成功在NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX上实现实时运行。
AI.conclusion: 分组卷积结构为模型部署优化提供潜力，IMDeception验证了高效超分辨率网络在边缘设备上的可行性。

search_text: IMDeception: Grouped Information Distilling Super-Resolution Network IMDeception：分组信息提取超分辨率网络 Single-Image-Super-Resolution (SISR) is a classical computer vision problem that has benefited from the recent advancements in deep learning methods, especially the advancements of convolutional neural networks (CNN). Although state-of-the-art methods improve the performance of SISR on several datasets, direct application of these networks for practical use is still an issue due to heavy computational load. For this purpose, recently, researchers have focused on more efficient and high-performing network structures. Information multi-distilling network (IMDN) is one of the highly efficient SISR networks with high performance and low computational load. IMDN achieves this efficiency with various mechanisms such as Intermediate Information Collection (IIC), working in a global setting, Progressive Refinement Module (PRM), and Contrast Aware Channel Attention (CCA), employed in a local setting. These mechanisms, however, do not equally contribute to the efficiency and performance of IMDN. In this work, we propose the Global Progressive Refinement Module (GPRM) as a less parameter-demanding alternative to the IIC module for feature aggregation. To further decrease the number of parameters and floating point operations persecond (FLOPS), we also propose Grouped Information Distilling Blocks (GIDB). Using the proposed structures, we design an efficient SISR network called IMDeception. Experiments reveal that the proposed network performs on par with state-of-the-art models despite having a limited number of parameters and FLOPS. Furthermore, using grouped convolutions as a building block of GIDB increases room for further optimization during deployment. To show its potential, the proposed model was deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX and it has been shown that it can run in real-time on this edge device 单图像超分辨率（SISR）是一个经典的计算机视觉问题，受益于深度学习方法的最新进展，特别是卷积神经网络（CNN）的进步。尽管最先进的方法提高了 SISR 在多个数据集上的性能，但由于计算负荷过重，这些网络的直接应用仍然是一个问题。为此，最近，研究人员将注意力集中在更高效、高性能的网络结构上。信息多重蒸馏网络（IMDN）是高性能、低计算负载的高效SISR网络之一。 IMDN 通过各种机制实现了这种效率，例如在全局环境中工作的中间信息收集 (IIC)、在本地环境中使用的渐进细化模块 (PRM) 和对比度感知通道注意 (CCA)。然而，这些机制对 IMDN 的效率和性能的贡献并不相同。在这项工作中，我们提出了全局渐进细化模块（GPRM）作为 IIC 模块参数要求较低的替代方案，用于特征聚合。为了进一步减少参数数量和每秒浮点运算（FLOPS），我们还提出了分组信息蒸馏块（GIDB）。使用所提出的结构，我们设计了一个名为 IMDeception 的高效 SISR 网络。实验表明，尽管参数数量和 FLOPS 数量有限，但所提出的网络的性能与最先进的模型相当。此外，使用分组卷积作为 GIDB 的构建块增加了部署期间进一步优化的空间。为了展示其潜力，所提出的模型已部署在 NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX 上，并且已证明它可以在该边缘设备上实时运行 本文提出了一种名为IMDeception的高效单图像超分辨率网络，通过改进信息蒸馏机制以降低计算负载。 Mustafa Ayazoglu cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Weiyu Zhang,Gionnieve Lim,Simon Perrault,Chuyao Wang
title: A Review of Research on Civic Technology: Definitions, Theories, History and Insights
title_zh: 公民技术研究述评：定义、理论、历史和见解
abstract: There have been initiatives that take advantage of information and communication technologies to serve civic purposes, referred to as civic technologies (Civic Tech). In this paper, we present a review of 224 papers from the ACM Digital Library focusing on Computer Supported Cooperative Work and Human-Computer Interaction, the key fields supporting the building of Civic Tech. Through this review, we discuss the concepts, theories and history of civic tech research and provide insights on the technological tools, social processes and participation mechanisms involved. Our work seeks to direct future civic tech efforts to the phase of by the citizens.
summary: There have been initiatives that take advantage of information and communication technologies to serve civic purposes, referred to as civic technologies (Civic Tech). In this paper, we present a review of 224 papers from the ACM Digital Library focusing on Computer Supported Cooperative Work and Human-Computer Interaction, the key fields supporting the building of Civic Tech. Through this review, we discuss the concepts, theories and history of civic tech research and provide insights on the technological tools, social processes and participation mechanisms involved. Our work seeks to direct future civic tech efforts to the phase of by the citizens.
abstract_zh: 已经有一些利用信息和通信技术来服务于公民目的的举措，称为公民技术（Civic Tech）。在本文中，我们对 ACM 数字图书馆中的 224 篇论文进行了综述，重点关注计算机支持的协作工作和人机交互，这是支持公民技术建设的关键领域。通过这篇综述，我们讨论了公民技术研究的概念、理论和历史，并提供了对所涉及的技术工具、社会过程和参与机制的见解。我们的工作旨在将未来的公民技术工作引导至公民参与的阶段。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了公民技术（Civic Tech）的研究，探讨其概念、理论、历史及技术工具、社会过程和参与机制，旨在推动公民主导的公民技术发展。
AI.motivation: 现有公民技术研究分散，缺乏系统性综述，需整合现有成果以指导未来研究与实践。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分析ACM数字图书馆中224篇相关论文，涵盖计算机支持的协作工作与人机交互领域，梳理公民技术的研究脉络。
AI.result: 明确了公民技术的核心概念与理论框架，梳理了其发展历史，并总结了技术工具、社会过程及参与机制的关键研究发现。
AI.conclusion: 未来公民技术发展应更注重公民参与和自主性，促进技术与社会需求的深度融合。

authors_text: Prerana Mukherjee,Chandan Kumar Roy,Swalpa Kumar Roy
title: OCFormer: One-Class Transformer Network for Image Classification
title_zh: OCFormer：用于图像分类的一级 Transformer 网络
abstract: We propose a novel deep learning framework based on Vision Transformers (ViT) for one-class classification. The core idea is to use zero-centered Gaussian noise as a pseudo-negative class for latent space representation and then train the network using the optimal loss function. In prior works, there have been tremendous efforts to learn a good representation using varieties of loss functions, which ensures both discriminative and compact properties. The proposed one-class Vision Transformer (OCFormer) is exhaustively experimented on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Fashion-MNIST and CelebA eyeglasses datasets. Our method has shown significant improvements over competing CNN based one-class classifier approaches.
summary: We propose a novel deep learning framework based on Vision Transformers (ViT) for one-class classification. The core idea is to use zero-centered Gaussian noise as a pseudo-negative class for latent space representation and then train the network using the optimal loss function. In prior works, there have been tremendous efforts to learn a good representation using varieties of loss functions, which ensures both discriminative and compact properties. The proposed one-class Vision Transformer (OCFormer) is exhaustively experimented on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Fashion-MNIST and CelebA eyeglasses datasets. Our method has shown significant improvements over competing CNN based one-class classifier approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于视觉变换器（ViT）的新型深度学习框架，用于一类分类。核心思想是使用零中心高斯噪声作为潜在空间表示的伪负类，然后使用最优损失函数训练网络。在之前的工作中，人们付出了巨大的努力来使用各种损失函数来学习良好的表示，这确保了判别性和紧凑性。所提出的一类视觉变换器（OCFormer）在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Fashion-MNIST 和 CelebA 眼镜数据集上进行了详尽的实验。我们的方法比基于 CNN 的一类分类器方法有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer（ViT）的一类分类框架OCFormer，通过引入零中心高斯噪声作为伪负类并结合最优损失函数进行训练，提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多种损失函数学习判别性表示，但难以同时保证特征的区分性与紧凑性，需探索更有效的单类分类策略。
AI.method: 设计OCFormer网络，利用零中心高斯噪声构造伪负样本，在潜在空间中通过优化损失函数训练模型，替代传统多类分类的负样本依赖。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、Fashion-MNIST和CelebA眼镜数据集上，OCFormer显著优于基于CNN的一类分类方法。
AI.conclusion: OCFormer通过伪负类设计与Transformer结构结合，在单类图像分类任务中实现了性能突破，验证了方法的有效性。
